Genesis1:1 Taqi kunan qalltäwipanxa Diosax alaxpacha
Genesis1:2 Aka uraqix jan uñtani ch'usakïnwa
Genesis1:3 Diosasti sänwa: “Qhanax utjpan” sasa. Qhanasti ukspachaw utjxäna.
Genesis1:4 Diosax qhanan wali sumätap uñjasinxa
Genesis1:5 ukatsti qhanarux “uru” sutimpiw uchäna
Genesis1:6 Ukxarux Diosax sarakïnwa: “Umanakar jaljtayirix utjpan
Genesis1:7 Ukatsti ukhamapunïnwa. Diosasti umanak jaljtayir uchäna
Genesis1:8 Diosasti uka jaljtayatarux “alaxpacha” sutimpiw uchäna. Ukhamaw payïr urux phuqhasïna.
Genesis1:9 Ukatsti Diosax sänwa: “Alaxpachat aynachankki uka umanakax mayawjar tantacht'aspan
Genesis1:10 Diosasti wañarux “uraqi” sutimpiw uchäna
Genesis1:11 sänwa: “Uraqinxa kunayman alinak utjpan
Genesis1:12 Uraqinxa kunayman alinakaw jilantäna: Jathanak churir alinaka
Genesis1:13 Ukhamaw kimsïr urux phuqhasïna.
Genesis1:14 Ukatsti Diosax sarakïnwa: “Urumpi arumampi yaqhachañatakix alaxpachan qhanirinakax utjpan
Genesis1:15 
Genesis1:16 Diosasti pä jach'a qhanirinak luräna
Genesis1:17 Diosasti uka qhananakxa alaxpacharuw usküna
Genesis1:18 urusa
Genesis1:19 Ukhamaw pusïr urux phuqhasïna.
Genesis1:20 Ukxarusti Diosax sarakïnwa: “Umanxa kunayman jakir animalanak utjpan
Genesis1:21 Arsutapasti ukhamapuniw phuqhasïna. Diosasti qutan jakir wali jach'a axsarkay animalanak usküna
Genesis1:22 Taqi uka animalanak lurkatayna ukanakarusti aka aski arunak arsüna: “Qutanakar phuqhantañkam mirantapxpan
Genesis1:23 Ukhamaw phisqïr urux phuqhasïna.
Genesis1:24 Diosasti sarakïnwa: “Kunayman animalanak aka uraqin utjpan: uywañ animalanaka
Genesis1:25 Diosasti taqi uka animalanak luräna
Genesis1:26 Ukatsti Diosax sarakïnwa: “Jichhax jaqi lurarakiñäni
Genesis1:27 Kunapachatix Diosax jaqi lurkäna ukkhaxa
Genesis1:28 Ukatsti jupanakarux aski waxt'äwinak churäna: “Mirantapxam
Genesis1:29 Ukxarusti sarakïnwa: “Jichhax jumanakaruw churapxsma kunayman jathachir alinaka
Genesis1:30 Ukampis pampankir animalanakaru
Genesis1:31 Diosasti taqi kuntix lurkatayna ukanakan wali sumätap uñjäna. Ukhamat suxtïr urux phuqhasïna.
Genesis2:1 Ukhamaw alaxpachasa
Genesis2:2 Paqallqür urusti Diosax taqi luräwinakap tukuyasin samaräna.
Genesis2:3 Uka paqallqüri ursti Diosax jach'achänwa
Genesis2:4 Ukhamaw alaxpachana
Genesis2:5 janïraw alinakax utjkänti
Genesis2:6 Ukampisa
Genesis2:7 Ukxarusti Diosax laq'at jaqirux luräna
Genesis2:8 Ukatsti Diosax Edenat inti jalsu tuqirux achu churir quqanakan mä chiqa wakichäna
Genesis2:9 Diosasti kunayman achunak churir suma quqanak jilayäna
Genesis2:10 Edén chiqat mä jawiraw jalsüna
Genesis2:11 Nayrïr jawirax Pisón satänwa
Genesis2:12 Uka chiqan utjir qurix sinti sumawa
Genesis2:13 Payïri jawirasti Guihón satänwa
Genesis2:14 Kimsïri jawirasti Tigris satawa
Genesis2:15 Kunapachatix Tatit Diosax jaqir Edén chiqan uskkatayna yapuchañapataki
Genesis2:16 juparusti akham sänwa: “Aka chiqan utjir taqi quqanakan achupat manq'asïta
Genesis2:17 ukampisa askimpi
Genesis2:18 Ukxarusti
Genesis2:19 Diosasti
Genesis2:20 
Genesis2:21 Ukatsti Tatit Diosax jaqirux ikjayänwa
Genesis2:22 Uka jaraphit Tatit Diosax mä warmi luräna
Genesis2:23 chachasti uñjasinxa
Genesis2:24 Ukatpï chachax awkipsa
Genesis2:25 Ukapachasti chachasa
Genesis3:1 Diosasti taqi laq'unak lurkatayna uka taypinxa
Genesis3:2 Warmisti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Kawkïri quqan achupatsa manq'asipkakiristwa
Genesis3:3 chika taypinkki uka quqan achunakapak janix manq'apkiristti. Diosasti sapxarakituwa: “Janiw uka quqan achup manq'apxätati
Genesis3:4 Kataristi warmirux sänwa: —Janiw ukax chiqäkiti
Genesis3:5 Diosax sum yati
Genesis3:6 Warmisti uka quqan achupan manqt'añatakisa
Genesis3:7 Ukspachaw jupanakan nayranakapax jist'artäna
Genesis3:8 Chachampi warmimpisti
Genesis3:9 Ukampis Tatit Diosax chacharuw jawsäna
Genesis3:10 Chachasti sänwa: —Aka chiqan sarnaqatam ist'ta
Genesis3:11 Ukat Diosax jiskt'äna: —¿Khitirak q'alalätaw sistamsti? ¿Janiw manq'ätati sisksma uka quqan achupatti manq'taxa? —sasa.
Genesis3:12 Chachasti sarakïnwa: —Nayamp chika jakañatak churkista uka warmiw uka quqan achup churitu
Genesis3:13 Ukat Tatit Diosax warmir jiskt'arakïna: —¿Kunatsa jumax uk lurta? —sasa. Warmisti sarakïnwa: —Katariw nayarux sallqjitu
Genesis3:14 Ukat Tatit Diosax katarir sarakïna: —Aka luratamatxa
Genesis3:15 Warmimpi jumampisti wiñayaw timasipxäta
Genesis3:16 Warmirusti sarakïnwa: —Wawachaskäta ukkhasti wali t'aqhisiñampiw ususïta. Ukampis chachamampix wawanïñ munaskakïtawa
Genesis3:17 Chacharusti sarakïnwa: —Warmimar ist'atam layku
Genesis3:18 Uraqisti ch'aphinaka
Genesis3:19 Sapüru manq'añamsti jump'imampiw jikxatäta
Genesis3:20 Chachasti warmiparux Eva sutimpiw uchäna
Genesis3:21 Ukatsti Tatit Diosax uywanakan lip'ichipat isi lurarapïna
Genesis3:22 sarakïnwa: “Jichhax jaqix jiwasat maynïkaspas ukhamaw tukxi
Genesis3:23 Ukat Tatit Diosax Edén chiqat jaqirux jaqunuküna
Genesis3:24 Edén chiqat chachampiru warmimpiru jaqunukusinsti
Genesis4:1 Ukatsti chachax Eva warmipampiw mayachasxäna. Warmisti usur jaqiptxänwa
Genesis4:2 Ukxarusti Evax Abel sat wawaparuw wawachasïna
Genesis4:3 Mä qawqha pachatsti
Genesis4:4 Abelasti ovejanakapat suma lik'ïkis uk aparakïna
Genesis4:5 ukampis Tatitux janiw Caín chachan waxt'aparux sum uñtankataynati
Genesis4:6 Ukatsti Tatitux sänwa: “¿Kunatarak phiñastasti
Genesis4:7 Jumatix askïki uk lurasmaxa
Genesis4:8 Mä urusti
Genesis4:9 Ukat Tatitux Caín chacharux jiskt'äna: —¿Kawkinkis Abel jilamaxa? —sasa. Cainasti sarakïnwa: —Janiw yatktti. ¿Nayax jilaxan uñjiripätti? —sasa.
Genesis4:10 Tatitusti sarakïnwa: —¿Kunatsa jilamar jiwayta? Jilaman wilap wartkta ukax kunatix chiqapäki uk nayan uñjañaxatakiw art'asinitu.
Genesis4:11 Ukat jichhax jumax ñanqhachat uñjasïta
Genesis4:12 Wal yapuchkäta ukasa
Genesis4:13 Ukatsti Caín chachax Tatiturux sarakïnwa: —Janiw nayax uka jach'a mutuyäwi t'aqhiskiristti.
Genesis4:14 Jichhax aka uraqit jaqunukxistawa
Genesis4:15 Ukampis Tatitux jupar sarakïnwa: —Khititix jumar jiwaykätam ukax paqallqu kuti mutuyatäniwa —sasa. Ukatsti Tatitux mä chimpu Caín chacharux uchäna
Genesis4:16 Ukatsti kawkhantix Caín chachax Tatitumpi parlaskäna uka chiqat mistuwayxänwa
Genesis4:17 Ukatsti Cainax warmipampiw mayachasxäna
Genesis4:18 Caín chachat saraqirinakax akïrinakawa: Henoc
Genesis4:19 Lámec chachasti pä warminïnwa. Maynïrix Adá sata
Genesis4:20 Adá warmin wawapasti Jabal satänwa
Genesis4:21 Jabal sat jaqisti mä jilanirakïnwa Jubal sutini
Genesis4:22 Sila warmisti
Genesis4:23 Mä urusti
Genesis4:24 Caín chachar chhuxrinchiritix paqallqu kuti mutuyatächinixa
Genesis4:25 Adanampi Evampisti wasitat wawanïxapxäna
Genesis4:26 Set chachasti mä wawanirakïnwa
Genesis5:1 Diosax jupar uñtasit jaqirux luräna.
Genesis5:2 Chacha
Genesis5:3 Adanasti patak kimsa tunkan maranïnwa kunapachatix Set sat wawapax yurkän ukapachaxa
Genesis5:4 Uka qhipatsti Adanax kimsaqallq patak marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis5:5 ukhamasti Adán chachax llätunk patak kimsa tunkan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:6 Set chachasti patak phisqan maranïnwa kunapachatix Enós sat wawapax yurkän ukapachaxa.
Genesis5:7 Uka qhipatsti Set chachax kimsaqallq patak paqallqun marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis5:8 Ukhamasti Set chachax llätunk patak tunka payan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:9 Enós chachasti llätunk tunka maranïnwa kunapachatix Cainán wawapax yurkän ukapachaxa.
Genesis5:10 Uka qhipatsti Enós chachax kimsaqallq patak tunka phisqan marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis5:11 Ukhamasti Enós chachax llätunk patak phisqan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:12 Cainán sat chachasti paqallq tunk maranïnwa
Genesis5:13 Uka qhipatsti Cainán chachax kimsaqallq patak pusi tunka marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis5:14 Ukhamasti Cainán chachax llätunk patak tunkan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel chachax suxta tunk phisqan maranïnwa
Genesis5:16 Uka qhipatsti
Genesis5:17 Ukhamasti Mahalalel chachax kimsaqallq patak llätunk tunka phisqan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:18 Jared chachax patak suxta tunk payan maranïnwa
Genesis5:19 Uka qhipatsti
Genesis5:20 Ukhamasti Jared chachax llätunk patak suxta tunk payan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:21 Henoc chachax suxta tunk phisqan maranïnwa
Genesis5:22 Henoc chachasti Tatit Diosan munañaparjamapuniw sarnaqäna. Matusalén wawapan yuritapatsti
Genesis5:23 ukhamasti kimsa patak suxta tunk phisqan maranakaw jakäna.
Genesis5:24 Henoc chachan Tatit Diosan munañaparjam sarnaqatapatxa
Genesis5:25 Matusalén chachax patak kimsaqallq tunk paqallquni maranïnwa
Genesis5:26 Uka qhipatsti Matusalén chachax paqallq patak kimsaqallq tunk payan marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis5:27 Ukhamasti Matusalén chachax llätunk patak suxta tunk llätunkan maranïkäna ukkhaw jiwxäna.
Genesis5:28 Lámec chachax pataka kimsaqallq tunk payan maranïnwa kunapachatix wawapax yurkän ukkhaxa
Genesis5:29 uka wawaparusti Noé sasaw sutichäna
Genesis5:30 Noen yuritapatsti
Genesis5:31 ukhamasti paqallq patak paqallq tunk paqallquni maraw jakäna. Ukapachaw jiwxarakïna.
Genesis5:32 Noesti phisqa patak maranïxänwa
Genesis6:1 Kunapachatix jaqinakax aka uraqir phuqhantxapxän ukkhaxa
Genesis6:2 Diosan wawanakapasti uka warminakan jiwakïpxatap uñjapxäna. Ukat uka warminak ajllisipxäna
Genesis6:3 Ukampis Tatitux sänwa: “Janiw jaqirux wiñayatak jakaykäti
Genesis6:4 Kunapachatix Tatit Diosan wawanakapax jaqinakan phuchhanakapampi wawanïñatak mayachasipxän ukkhaxa
Genesis6:5 Tatitux jaqinakan sinti jan walinak lurapxatap uñjäna
Genesis6:6 jupasti jaqir luratapxa wal amtäna. Chuymapsa walirak usuyasïna
Genesis6:7 ukat säna: “Nayan lurat jaqirux aka uraqit q'al chhaqtayä
Genesis6:8 Ukampisa
Genesis6:9 Noé chachan sarnaqäwipax akhamänwa. Noé chachax aski jaqïnwa
Genesis6:10 Noé chachax kimsa wawanïnwa
Genesis6:11 Diosatakix aka uraqix ñanqhana
Genesis6:12 jaqinakasti jan walïpxapunïnwa. Diosax taqi ñanqha lurañanakan aka uraqin phuqhantatätap uñjasin
Genesis6:13 Noé chacharux sänwa: “Taqi jaqinak tukjañ amtta. Jupanakan jucha luratanakap laykusti aka uraqin jan walt'añanakaw utjxi
Genesis6:14 Jichhax resinosa sat lawat mä arca luram
Genesis6:15 Arcax akham tupunakanïñapawa: Sayt'urux patak kimsa tunka phisqan metroni
Genesis6:16 Kimsa pisoni luräta
Genesis6:17 Nayasti mä jach'a jallu apayanï
Genesis6:18 Ukampis jumampix mä suma arust'äwi lurä
Genesis6:19 Jumamp chikasti
Genesis6:20 
Genesis6:21 Ukxarux kunayman manq'añanak apthapisin imam
Genesis6:22 Noé chachasti kunjämtix Diosax siskatayna ukhamarjamaw taqi kunsa luräna.

Genesis11:23 Uka qhipatsti Serug chachax pä patak marampiw jakaskäna
Genesis11:24 Nahor chachasti pä tunka llätunkani maranïnwa kunapachatix Térah wawapax yurkän ukkhaxa.

Genesis46:14 Zabulón chachan wawanakapa: Séred

Genesis46:16 Gad chachan wawanakapa: Sefón
Genesis46:17 Aser chachan wawanakapa: Imná

Genesis46:20 Joseampina

Exodus12:22 Mä lamanaruw wila katuqapxäta

Exodus12:24 Aka luräwi

Exodus12:27 jumanakasti sapxätawa: ‘Aka uywax Tatitusar jach'añchas luqtata Pascua wilañchawa. Kunapachatix jupax Egipto uraqpachan thiyat thiya sarkäna egipcionakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakapar jiwarayasaxa

Exodus12:29 Chika arumasti Tatitux taqpach egipcionakan jilïr wawanakap jiwarayäna
Exodus12:30 Uka arumasti faraonampi
Exodus12:31 Uka arumpachaw faraonax Moisesampiru

Exodus12:38 Mistusasti walja ovejanakampi
Exodus12:39 Ukatsti egipcionakan jupanakar jank'ak markapat jaqunukutap laykusti

Exodus12:41 ukatsti kunürutix pusi patak kimsa tunkan marax phuqhaskäna uka uruw Tatitun taqpach ejercitopax Egipto uraqit mistsuwayxäna.
Exodus12:42 Uka aruman Tatitux israelitanakar Egipto uraqit irpsxañataki uñch'ukiyaskäna. Uka arumasti Tatitutaki satawa

Exodus14:14 Jumanakax jan llakisipxamti

Exodus14:16 Jumasti
Exodus14:17 Nayaw egipcionakarux chuymap qalarayä jumanakar arktaniñapataki; ukat faraonar nayan ch'aman kankañax uñacht'ayä
Exodus14:18 Kunapachatix faraonampiru
Exodus14:19 Ukat Diosan angelapampi

Exodus15:1 Ukatsti Moisesampi
Exodus15:2 Q'uchuxax Tatitutakiwa
Exodus15:3 Tatitux ch'aman nuwasiriwa. Sutipax Tatituwa.
Exodus15:4 Tatitux qutaruw jaqunti; faraonan carronakaparu
Exodus15:5 Jupanakax qalanakjamaw quta manqhir jaqurantti
Exodus15:6 Tatay
Exodus15:7 Jach'a ch'amamampiw jumatak sayt'asirinakarux jaqunuktaxa; q'apisiñamax ninjamaw aqti
Exodus15:8 Wali q'apisitaw phust'taxa
Exodus15:9 Uñisirinakaxax amuyataynawa: ‘¡Jikxatañkam jupanakar arktañäni! ¡Jupanakar tukjañäniwa! ¡Jupanakat aparkañäni ukanaksti
Exodus15:10 Ukampis jumax may phust'asakiw qutampi chhaqtaytaxa; jupanakax plomo metaljamaw uma mathapi manqhir chhaqhantawayapxi.
Exodus15:11 Tatay
Exodus15:12 ¡Jumasti ch'amamampix uraqimpiw egipcionakar manq'antaytaxa!
Exodus15:13 Munasiñamampiw juman qhispiyat markar irpasktaxa; ch'amamampiw qullan utjäwimar irpasktaxa.

Exodus25:15 uka lawanakxa arca kayunkki uka argollanakatxa janipuniw aysütati; pachparuw jaytäta.
Exodus25:16 Uka arcarusti nayax churkäma uka kamachinak uchäta.
Exodus25:17 “Ukxarusti suma quritkamak arcatakix mä qhuphiñ luräta
Exodus25:18 ukatsti suma quritkamak pä querubines sat chhiqhaninak luräta
Exodus25:19 Arca qhuphiñampi
Exodus25:20 purap uñthapisita
Exodus25:21 Ukatsti uka qhuphiñ arca patxar uchäta
Exodus25:22 Nayax arust'äwi arca patxankki uka pä querubines sat chhiqhaninak taypin jumampix jikisï. Ukatsti
Exodus25:23 “Acacia lawat mä mesa luram
Exodus25:24 Ukarux suma qurimpi lip'ikipayam
Exodus25:25 Uka mesan thiyapsti iranarux paqallqu centimetroni lurarakïta
Exodus25:26 ukxarusti qurit pusi argollanak luräta
Exodus25:27 uka argollanakax mesa thiya manqhankañapawa
Exodus25:28 Uka kallañ lawanaksti acacia lawat luräta
Exodus25:29 Vino waxt'a luqtañatakisti
Exodus25:30 Uka mesa patxarusti
Exodus25:31 “Ukxarusti suma qurit mä candelero martillomp liq'sus luräta. Uka candeleron kayupasa
Exodus25:32 thiyanakapatsti suxta amparanakaw saraqañapa
Exodus25:33 Candeleron sayiripat saraqki uka suxta amparanakan kimsa qiruw utjañapa almendro panqarar uñtata
Exodus25:34 candeleron sayiripax pusi qirunïniwa
Exodus25:35 Candeleron aynach tuqipan sapa paya amparat saraqki ukax mä muqunïniwa.
Exodus25:36 Muqunakapampi
Exodus25:37 Ukatsti paqallqu lamparanak lurarakïta

Exodus36:6 Ukat Moisesax campamentonkirinakar yatiyañatak khithäna akham sasa: “Jan khiti chachasa
Exodus36:7 apanipkän uka churäwinakax waljapuniw jilt'äna
Exodus36:8 Khitinakatix mayninakat sipan juk'amp suma lurañanak yatipkäna ukanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa lurapxäna. Uka Carpsti lino k'anthitamp lurat tunka cortinanakampiw lurapxäna

Exodus37:1 Besalel chachax acacia lawat arust'äwi arca luräna

Exodus37:3 Ukxarusti pusi kayupatakix qurit pusi argollanak lurarakïna

Exodus37:6 Ukxarusti suma quritkamak mä qhuphiñ lurarakïna

Exodus38:1 Ukxarusti Besalel chachax acacia lawat nakt'ayat waxt'anak luqtañ altar lurarakïna. Uka altarasti pusi tuqit mä tupunikïnwa

Exodus38:3 Altaratakisti broncetkamak taqpach yänakap lurarakïna
Exodus38:4 Ukxarusti broncet mä rejilla luraraki
Exodus38:5 Ukxarux pusi argollanak luraraki
Exodus38:6 Ukatsti altaratakix acacia lawat muruq'u lawanak luräna

Exodus39:1 Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan waxt'anak luqtir sacerdotenakatakix p'itat isinakap morado telata

Exodus39:7 Ukatsti Besalel chachax efod isin chinuñapxaruw ukanak uchäna
Exodus39:8 Ukxarusti pectoral sat isix suma p'itakipat luratarakïnwa efod isjama: qurita
Exodus39:9 Uka pectoralax paya iqthapitänwa

Exodus39:12 kimsïr siqinsti: jacinto
Exodus39:13 pusïr siqinsti: topacio
Exodus39:14 tunka payanirakïnwa

Exodus39:17 quri cadenanaksti pä argollanakxaruw uchapxäna.

Exodus39:21 Ukatsti pectoral isin argollapampi efod isin argollapampxa
Exodus39:22 Efod isin capapxa sawut morado telat lurapxäna.

Leviticus1:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw jupamp Jikisiñ Carpatpach jawsäna
Leviticus1:2 “Israelitanakampi parlam
Leviticus1:3 “Luqtañ uywatix nakhantayañatak urqu vacänixa
Leviticus1:4 uka uywan p'iqipxar amparampi luqxatasa. Ukhamat uka uywan jupa lanti juchanakapat pampachatäñatak katuqatäñapataki.
Leviticus1:5 Urqu vacarux Tatitun nayraqatapan kharinukuni; ukxarusti Aaronan sacerdote yuqanakapaw wila luqtapxani
Leviticus1:6 Khititix uka uywa nakt'at luqtkani ukasti
Leviticus1:7 sacerdotenakasti altarxaru nina aqtayapxani
Leviticus1:8 ukxaru uka kharinuqat aychsa
Leviticus1:9 Khititix luqtkani ukasti uka uywan jiphillanakapsa
Leviticus1:10 “Luqtañ uywatix nakhantayañatak oveja tamapata jan ukax
Leviticus1:11 ukasti Tatitun nayraqatapan altarat amstäxan kharinukutäñapawa. Aaronan sacerdote yuqanakapasti altararuw puspach thiyapat wilampi ch'allakipapxani;
Leviticus1:12 ukatsti uywan aychap kharinuqapxani
Leviticus1:13 Khititix luqtkani ukasti uka uywan jiphillanakapsa
Leviticus1:14 “Nakhantayañatak Tatitur luqtäwitix mä jamach'ïnixa
Leviticus1:15 Sacerdotew uka palomxa altaran luqtani: p'iqip q'iwiqasax altarat mä thiyar wilap ch'aqsuyasaw nakhantayani.
Leviticus1:16 Ukatsti kutupxa jiphillanakamppacha
Leviticus1:17 Ukxarusti uka palomxa chhiqhanakat katt'asaw ch'iyjañapa
Leviticus2:1 “Kunapachatix maynix granonakat wakichata mä luqtäwi Tatitur luqtañatak apanini ukkhaxa
Leviticus2:2 Uksti Aaronan sacerdote yuqanakapan ukaruw aparakini
Leviticus2:3 Uka jak'u waxt'at jilt'ki ukasti
Leviticus2:4 “Kunapachatix grano achunakat hornon qhathita mä waxt'a churäta ukkhasti
Leviticus2:5 “Waxt'äwimatix grano achunakat sartenar qhathiyatächixa
Leviticus2:6 ukatsti jisk'a jisk'a pachinuqasax aceitempiw warakipäta grano achunakat waxt'äwïtap layku.
Leviticus2:7 “Waxt'äwimatix grano achunakat phukhur qhathiyatänixa
Leviticus2:8 Ukanakampi uka waxt'a wakicht'xasasti
Leviticus2:9 Sacerdotex ukan uka waxt'at mä juk'a aptasax altarxan nakt'ayxani ukasti
Leviticus2:10 Uka waxt'at jilt'ki ukasti
Leviticus2:11 “Janipuniw jumanakax Tatitur luqtañatak grano achunakat wakichat waxt'arux levadura uchapxätati. Janipuniw kuna levadurasa
Leviticus2:12 Nayraqat achunakamp chikax levadursa
Leviticus2:13 “Taqi granonakat wakichat waxt'amarux jayuñchapunïtawa
Leviticus2:14 “Jumatix Tatitur nayrïr grano achunakat mä waxt'a luqtätaxa
Leviticus2:15 Ukxarusti aceitempi
Leviticus2:16 Ukatsti sacerdotew mä juk'a grano ch'axirt'atxa
Leviticus3:1 “Khititix uywanakapata mä qachu vaca jan ukax mä urqu vacsa Tatitumpi sumankthapiñatak luqtkani ukax jan kuna kamacht'at uywäñapawa.
Leviticus3:2 Khititix waxt'a luqtkani ukax
Leviticus3:3 “Khititix sumankthapiñatak uywa luqtkani ukax mä nakt'ayat waxt'a Tatitur luqtañapa
Leviticus3:4 maymurunakan lik'inakapa
Leviticus3:5 Sacerdotenakaw taqi uka lik'inak altarxar nakhantayapxani
Leviticus3:6 “Khititix sumankthapiñatak mä oveja luqtkani ukasti
Leviticus3:7 Uka luqtäwitix mä ovejänixa
Leviticus3:8 uka uywan p'iqipxaruw amparap luqxatani
Leviticus3:9 “Khititix sumankthapiñatak mä oveja Tatitur luqtkani ukasti nakhantat waxt'jam luqtañapawa
Leviticus3:10 maymurunaksti lik'imppacha
Leviticus3:11 Ukatsti
Leviticus3:12 “Uka luqtäwitix mä cabränixa
Leviticus3:13 ukkhasti
Leviticus3:14 “Khititix uka uywa luqtkani ukax nakhantat waxt'ata Tatitur luqtañapawa
Leviticus3:15 maymurunakan lik'inakapa
Leviticus3:16 Ukatsti
Leviticus3:17 “Aka kamachisti wiñayatakiwa
Leviticus4:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna akham sasa:
Leviticus4:2 “Israelitanakar sarakim: Maynitix jan amuyaskasina Tatitun kamachinakap p'akintas juch lurani
Leviticus4:3 “Jilïr sacerdotetix juch luranixa
Leviticus4:4 Ukatsti Tatitun nayraqataparuw apani Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar mantañäkis ukkharu; ukan amparap uywan p'iqipxar luqxatani
Leviticus4:5 Ukatsti jupa kipkaw vaca qallun mä juk'a wilap katusin Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar apani
Leviticus4:6 ukan luk'anap wilar juricht'asini
Leviticus4:7 Sacerdotesti mä juk'a wila aptasin q'apkiri incienso uchañäkis uka altaran waxranakaparuw jawirt'ani
Leviticus4:8 Ukatsti juchat luqtatäkis uka vaca qallutxa taqpach lik'inakap apsxarakini
Leviticus4:9 maymurunaksti lik'imppacha
Leviticus4:10 kunjämatix sumankthapiñatak luqtat urqu vacat apsutäkix ukhama. Ukatsti
Leviticus4:11 Vaca qallun lip'ichipamppacha
Leviticus4:12 jan ukax maypach urqu vaca qallu
Leviticus4:13 “Taqi israelit jaqinakatix jan amuyaskasin kuna jan walsa lurapxanixa
Leviticus4:14 kunapachatix uka jucha luratax yatisxani ukapachaw juchapat taqini mä urqu vaca wilañcha luqtapxani. Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa nayraqataruw apapxani
Leviticus4:15 ukan Tatitun nayraqatapan taqi jilïri jaqinakax uka urqu vacan p'iqipxar amparanakap luqxatapxani
Leviticus4:16 Ukxarusti jilïri sacerdotew uka urqu vacan mä juk'a wilapa Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar apani
Leviticus4:17 ukatsti luk'anapampi wilar juricht'asaxa
Leviticus4:18 Ukan mä juk'a wilampi Tatitun nayraqatapankki uka altaran waxranakaparuw jawirt'ani. Ukat taqpach wila jilt'irïki uksti
Leviticus4:19 Ukhamarakiw uka urqu vacat taqpach lik'inaka apsxani
Leviticus4:20 jan ukax
Leviticus4:21 Ukatsti uka urqu vacax campamentot anqäxar apsusin nakhantayatäxaniwa
Leviticus4:22 “Mä jilïritix jan amuyaskasina Tatit Diosapan kamachi arunakap p'akintanixa
Leviticus4:23 Kunapachatix uka jucha luratapa amuyasxani ukapachasti mä jan kuna kamacht'at chivo waxt'a luqtañatak apxarakini.
Leviticus4:24 Uka chivon p'iqipxaru amparap luqxatasin Tatitun nayraqatapan kharinukxani
Leviticus4:25 Ukxarusti sacerdotex juchat wilañcha luqtat chivon mä juk'a wilap luk'anapar juricht'asaxa
Leviticus4:26 ukatsti taqpach lik'i altarxar nakhantayxarakini
Leviticus4:27 “Mä markankir jaqitix jan amuyaskasina Tatitun kamachi arunakap p'akintanixa
Leviticus4:28 kunapachatix jucha luratap amuyasxani ukapachasti
Leviticus4:29 Ukatsti uka cabran p'iqipxaruw amparap luqxatani
Leviticus4:30 Ukatsti sacerdotex mä juk'a wilampi luk'anap juricht'asax altaran waxranakaparuw jawirt'ani
Leviticus4:31 Lik'inakapsti
Leviticus4:32 “Uka jaqitix jucha luratapat luqtañatak mä oveja apanini ukapachax jan kamacht'at qachu oveja apanini.
Leviticus4:33 Ukatsti amparap ovejan p'iqipxar luqxatani
Leviticus4:34 Ukatsti sacerdotex mä juk'a wilampi luk'anap juricht'asax altaran waxranakaparuw jawirt'ani
Leviticus4:35 Lik'inakapsti
Leviticus5:1 “Kuntix maynix uñjki
Leviticus5:2 “Maynitix kuna q'añsa llamkt'ani
Leviticus5:3 “Maynitix jan amuyaskasin jaqin kuna q'añuchatapsa llamkt'anixa
Leviticus5:4 “Maynitix jan sum amuyt'askasin chiq lurañatakisa
Leviticus5:5 “Khititix aka luräwinakat kawkïritsa juchañchat uñjasinixa
Leviticus5:6 ukatsti jucha luratapat mä qachu oveja Tatitur wilañcha luqtani
Leviticus5:7 “Janitix mä jisk'a oveja alañatak qullqix utjkani ukapachasti
Leviticus5:8 Uksti sacerdoteruw katuyani
Leviticus5:9 ukatsti kawkïritix juchat luqtatäki ukan mä juk'a wilapampiw uka altar thiyar ch'allt'ani
Leviticus5:10 Payïrimpisti nakt'at waxt'a luqtxarakini
Leviticus5:11 “Ukat janipun qullqix utjarapkani pä qhurukutu
Leviticus5:12 Uka jak'usti sacerdoten ukaruw apatäni
Leviticus5:13 ukhamat sacerdoten uka jaqin juchanakap pampachatäñ jikxatañapataki
Leviticus5:14 Tatitusti Moisesaruw akham säna:
Leviticus5:15 “Maynitix jan amuyaskasin juch lurani
Leviticus5:16 Ukatsti uka jaqix kunatix Tatitur luqtat qullana yänakat sallqjkäna ukanakat yapxatat phuqxañapawa. Chikatan chikatapäki uksti
Leviticus5:17 “Maynitix jan amuyaskasin Tatitun kamachi arunakap p'akintani ukax juchañchatäniwa
Leviticus5:18 Ukhamasti oveja tamanakapat mä jan kamacht'at urqu oveja apanini
Leviticus5:19 Uka wilañchasti jucha luratanakat luqtatawa

Leviticus6:7 Ukatsti sacerdotex taqi uka juchanaka
Leviticus6:8 Tatitux Moisesaruw akham sas parläna:
Leviticus6:9 “Aaronampiru
Leviticus6:10 Sacerdotesti suma lino isimpi
Leviticus6:11 Ukxarusti yaqha isimpiw isthapisxani
Leviticus6:12 “Altaran nakhaski uka ninasti janipuniw jiwarañapäkiti. Sacerdotew sapärmanthi qhantatix uka altarar lawanak apxatani
Leviticus6:13 Altarankir ninasti aqtatapunïñapawa
Leviticus6:14 “Aka yatichäwinakasti granonakat waxt'a luqtäwinakxat yatichäwinakawa: Sacerdotenakax altar nayräxan Tatit nayraqatan luqtapxani.
Leviticus6:15 Jupanakat mayniw uka luqtat jak'umpita
Leviticus6:16 Uka waxt'ata jilt'irsti Aaronampi
Leviticus6:17 Janiw levadurani phayapxañapäkiti. Jupanakaruw churxarakta kuna waxt'anakatix nakt'ayasina nayar luqtatäki ukanakata
Leviticus6:18 Akat qhiparusti
Leviticus6:19 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna
Leviticus6:20 “Aaronampi sacerdote yuqanakapampixa
Leviticus6:21 Uka waxt'sti mä sartenat wakicht'anipxani
Leviticus6:22 Aaronan yuqanakapat jilïri sacerdotesti
Leviticus6:23 Sacerdotenakan taqi waxt'anakapasti q'ala nakhantayatäñapapuniwa
Leviticus6:24 Tatitux Moisesaruw akham sas parläna:
Leviticus6:25 “Aaronampiru
Leviticus6:26 Jucha luratat uka wilañcha luqtasinxa
Leviticus6:27 Mä kunasa uka uywan aychapamp jikthaptani ukax qullanaruw tukuni
Leviticus6:28 Luqtäwinak churañ aychatix ñiq'i phukhur qhathiyatänixa
Leviticus6:29 “Aka luqtäwix qullanansa qullanapapuniwa. Uka luqtäwitsti Aaronan sacerdote yuqanakapakiw manq'apxañapa.
Leviticus6:30 Ukampisa kawkïr uywatix juchat luqtatäki
Leviticus7:1 “Jucha luräwinakat wilañcha luqtäwix aski qullanawa. Uka tuqinakat yatichäwinakasti akanakawa:
Leviticus7:2 Yatkasin pantjasïwi jucha luratanakat luqtat uywax
Leviticus7:3 Uka uywan taqi lik'inakapasti: kuna lik'itix wich'inkhan utjki
Leviticus7:4 paypach maymurun lik'inakapa
Leviticus7:5 Ukatsti sacerdotex taqi ukanak altarxaruw nakhantayxani
Leviticus7:6 uka wilañcha luqtäwitsti taqi sacerdotenakaw manq'apxani
Leviticus7:7 “Yatkasin pantjasïwi juch luratat wilañcha luqtäwisti
Leviticus7:8 Uka kipkaraki
Leviticus7:9 Granonak luqtäwinakatsti
Leviticus7:10 Uka kipkaraki taqi granonakata luqtatanaka
Leviticus7:11 “Sumankthapiñatak wilañchanak churaña tuqitxa
Leviticus7:12 Uka wilañchäwitix yuspagarañatakïchinixa
Leviticus7:13 uka yuspagaräwita
Leviticus7:14 Taqi uka luqtäwinakatsti mä qawqha apaqt'apxäta
Leviticus7:15 “Kawkïri uywatix yuspagarañataki
Leviticus7:16 Mä uywatix mä arsüwi phuqhañataki
Leviticus7:17 ukampis uka uywan aychapatix kimsürunsa utjaskakinixa
Leviticus7:18 Ukampisa maynitix uka sumankthapiñataki wilañcha luqtatäki uka uywan aychap kimsïr urunsa manq'askakinixa
Leviticus7:19 “Kawkïr aychatix mä kuna q'añumpi jak'achasiyatänixa
Leviticus7:20 “Kawkïri jaqitix jan q'umachatäkasin uka sumankthapiñatak Tatitur luqtata aycha manq'kani ukasti
Leviticus7:21 “Kawkïri jaqitix mä kuna q'añunaksa llamkt'ani
Leviticus7:22 Tatitusti Moisesarux saskakïnwa:
Leviticus7:23 “Israelitanakarusti akham sarakim: Urqu vacana

Leviticus7:26 “Kawkhantix jumanakax jakapkäta
Leviticus7:27 Khititix uka uywanakan wilap manq'kani ukasti
Leviticus7:28 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna
Leviticus7:29 “Israelitanakarusti akham sarakim: Maynitix sumankthapiña wilañcha Tatitur luqtañatak mä uywa apani ukaxa
Leviticus7:30 Jupa pachparakiw amparapampi nakhantayañat waxt'a Tatitun nayraqatapar apañapa

Leviticus7:32 Uka uywanakan kupi charapasti
Leviticus7:33 Uka kupi charasti kawkïri sacerdotetix lik'sa
Leviticus7:34 kuna wilañchanaktix israelitanakax sumankthapiñatak nayar luqtapkitu uka jaraphi aychanakxa
Leviticus7:35 Kuna waxt'anakatix Tatitutaki nakt'ayatäki ukanakax Aaronampiru wawanakapampiruw wakt'i
Leviticus7:36 Tatitusti israelita jaqinakaruw ukham churapxañapatak mayïna
Leviticus7:37 Nakhantayañatak luqtäwi tuqita
Leviticus7:38 Tatituw uka kamachinak Sinaí qullu patan Moisesar churäna

Leviticus8:2 “Jichhax Aaronampiru
Leviticus8:3 ukatsti taqi israelita jaqinakarux Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar mantañäkis uka chiqar tantacht'arakim” sasa.
Leviticus8:4 Moisesasti
Leviticus8:5 Ukat jaqinakarux sarakïna: “Tatitux ukham lurañas mayistu” sasa.
Leviticus8:6 Ukat Aaronampiru
Leviticus8:7 Ukatsti Aaronarux sacerdote isimpiw isintayäna
Leviticus8:8 Ukxarusti pectoralampiw uskuraki
Leviticus8:9 Ukatsti mä ch'uqañampiw p'iqit ch'uqanti
Leviticus8:10 Ukxarusti Moisesax luqtañ aceite aptäna
Leviticus8:11 Uka pachpa aceitempirakiw altarxa paqallqu kuti ch'allt'äna
Leviticus8:12 Ukxarusti Moisesax Aaronan p'iqipxaruw uka aceitempix warxatäna
Leviticus8:13 Ukhamarakiw Aaronan wawanakaparus jak'achasinipxañapatak mayïna
Leviticus8:14 Ukxarusti Moisesax kuna urqu vacatix jucha luratat luqtatäkani uk irptayanïna
Leviticus8:15 Ukatsti Moisesax uka urqu vaca kharinukxäna
Leviticus8:16 Ukxarusti Moisesax jiphillanakan taqi lik'inakap katüna
Leviticus8:17 Ukampis lip'ichipa
Leviticus8:18 Ukatsti Moisesax kuna urqu ovejatix nakhantayasin luqtatäkani uk irptayanïna
Leviticus8:19 Ukat Moisesax uka oveja kharinukxäna
Leviticus8:20 uka ovejan aychapsti jisk'a jisk'a kharinuqäna
Leviticus8:21 ukatsti uka ovejan jiphillanakapa
Leviticus8:22 Ukatsti Moisesax jank'akiw yaqha urqu oveja irptayaniraki
Leviticus8:23 Ukat Moisesax kharinukxäna
Leviticus8:24 Ukatsti Aaronan yuqanakaparuw jupar jak'achasinipxañapatak mayïna
Leviticus8:25 Moisesasti uka urqu ovejan wich'inkhapa
Leviticus8:26 Jan levaduran t'ant'a uchañ walayatxa
Leviticus8:27 ukatsti taqi ukanak Aaronan amparapxaru
Leviticus8:28 Uka luqtäwi tukuyatatsti
Leviticus8:29 Ukxarusti Moisesax uka uywan jaraphi aychap katusaw Tatitun nayraqatapar uñstäna kunjämarutix wakiski ukhamarjama. Kuna urqu ovejatix Tatitur luqtañatak wilañchat churatäkän ukatxa
Leviticus8:30 Ukatsti Moisesax jank'akiw kuna aceitetix Tatitur luqtasiñatak uskutäkän uk aptäna
Leviticus8:31 Ukatsti Moisesax Aaronampiru
Leviticus8:32 Ukatsti jilt'kani uka aychsa
Leviticus8:33 ukhamarus Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpat janipuniw sarapxätati paqallqu uru phuqhasiñapkama

Leviticus8:35 Ukhamasti
Leviticus8:36 Aaronampi

Leviticus10:3 Moisesasti Aaronarux sarakïnwa: —Tatitux akpï sañ munänxa kunapachatix siskäna: “Nayar jak'achasirinakarux q'uma kankañax uñacht'ayä

Leviticus10:5 Jupanakasti iyaw sasaw jutapxäna

Leviticus10:9 “Kunapachatix jumasa
Leviticus10:10 ukhamat kunatix qullanäki
Leviticus10:11 ukatsti kuna kamachinaktix Tatitux Moisés tuqi jumanakar churapktam ukanak israelitanakar yatichapxañamataki” sasa.

Leviticus10:13 Mä qullan chiqawjan manq'apxam

Leviticus10:17 —¿Kunatsa uka juchat luqtata chivo qullan utan jan manq'apxta? Jumanakax askiw yatipxta uka waxt'an qullanätapa
Leviticus10:18 Uka chivon wilapas janirakiw qullan uta manqhar apatäkataynati
Leviticus10:19 Aaronasti ukxaruw säna: —Uñjam
Leviticus10:20 Moisesasti ukanak ist'asax amukïxarakïnwa.

Leviticus11:33 “Uka jiwat animalanakan janchipatix mä phukhxaru liwxattani ukaxa
Leviticus11:34 Uka phukhun utjir umatix kuna manq'añxarus ch'aqxatani ukax
Leviticus11:35 Uka jiwat animalan janchipatix mä qhiri patxar liwxattani ukasti
Leviticus11:36 “Taqi khitinakatix uka jiwat animalanakan janchip llamkt'apkani ukanakasti
Leviticus11:37 “Uka animalanakan jiwat janchipatix yapuchañ jatharu liwxattani ukasti

Leviticus11:39 “Kawkïri uywanaktix jumanakax manq'añatak uskusipkäyäta ukat uka uywax jiwxarakini ukasti
Leviticus11:40 uka jiwat uywan aychap manq'kani ukasti
Leviticus11:41 “Uraqinjam qatatnaqtki uka laq'unakan aychapsti janipuniw manq'apxätati
Leviticus11:42 “Uraqinjam qatatnaqtir animalanaksti janipuniw manq'apxätati
Leviticus11:43 Jumanakax uka qatatnaqtir animalanak manq'asax jan q'añuchasipxamti
Leviticus11:44 Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa. Jumanakasti q'umachasipxañamawa
Leviticus11:45 Nayätwa Tatituxa

Leviticus12:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw säna:
Leviticus12:2 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Kunapachatix mä warmix usur jaqiptani
Leviticus12:3 Uka yuqall wawasti kimsaqallqu uru saraqataruw circuncisión luräwi katuqani.
Leviticus12:4 Ukampisa uka taykax kimsa tunka kimsani urunakampiw wila jutatapat q'umachasiskani. Kunanakatix Tatitur luqtatäki ukanaksti janipuniw llamkt'kaniti
Leviticus12:5 Ukampisa mä imill wawa wawachaskani ukkhasti
Leviticus12:6 “Kunapachatix q'umachasiñ urunakax phuqhasxani
Leviticus12:7 sacerdotex Tatitun nayraqataparuw ukanak luqtxani uka warmin juchapat pampachatäñapataki; ukhamat uka warmix wila jutatapat q'umachat uñjasxarakini.” Taqi ukanakawa mä yuqall wawana
Leviticus12:8 Ukampisa uka taykantix mä urqu oveja alañataki qullqix jan utjarapkani ukapachasti
Leviticus13:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus13:2 “Kunapachatix khitin janchipansa p'usux uñstani
Leviticus13:3 Sacerdotew uka jaqin janchipan llixtjtatap sumpach uñxatani
Leviticus13:4 “Ukat janchipantix janq'u janchix utjaspa
Leviticus13:5 Uka paqallqu urunak qhipatsti
Leviticus13:6 Uka paqallqu urunak qhipatsti wasitat sacerdotex uka usut jaqirux uñxatani
Leviticus13:7 “Ukampis uka llixtitix sacerdoten uñxatat qhipatsa
Leviticus13:8 Ukatsti sacerdotex wasitat uñxatasinxa
Leviticus13:9 “Kunapachatix maynix lepra usumpi llixtjtatäni ukkhaxa
Leviticus13:10 Sacerdotew juparux sum uñxatani
Leviticus13:11 uka jaqix jan qullkay lepra usuniwa. Uka jaqirusti sacerdotex q'añu jaqit qhanañchxañapa
Leviticus13:12 “Ukat uka lepra usutix jank'aki aqatatani
Leviticus13:13 sacerdotex uka usut jaqirux sum uñxatani; uka usutix taqpach janchip chhaqtaychi
Leviticus13:14 Ukampisa kunürutix uka jaqin janchipan wawa janchik uñstxani ukapachasti
Leviticus13:15 Ukhamasti sacerdotex uka wawa janchi sum uñxatani
Leviticus13:16 “Ukampis uka wawa janchitix janq'ur tukxani ukkhasti
Leviticus13:17 uñxatayasir sarañapawa
Leviticus13:18 “Kunapachatix mayni jaqin janchipan mä llixtix uñstani
Leviticus13:19 ukatsti uka p'usux janq'ur tukxani
Leviticus13:20 Uñxatasintix sacerdotex uka janchin kawkhatix p'usutäki ukkhax juk'amp janchi manqhankatapa
Leviticus13:21 Ukampis sacerdotetix uka llixtjtatäki ukkhan janq'u ñik'uta jan utjatap uñjani
Leviticus13:22 Ukatsti uka llixtitix juk'ampi janchipar aqantaskakini ukapachasti
Leviticus13:23 Ukampisa uka llixtjata chiqatix jan juk'ampi aqatatkani ukkhasti
Leviticus13:24 “Kunapachatix maynix janchip qhathsuyasini
Leviticus13:25 sacerdotew uñxatañaparaki. Uka janchin t'arwapatix janq'ur tukxani
Leviticus13:26 Ukampis sacerdotetix uñjani uka llixtjtatäki ukkhan janq'u ñik'utax jan utjatapa
Leviticus13:27 Ukat uka paqallqu urunaka phuqhasxipansti
Leviticus13:28 Ukampisa uka llixtitix jan juk'ampi janchin aqatatkani
Leviticus13:29 “Kunapachatix mä chachana
Leviticus13:30 sacerdotew uk uñxatañapa. Uka llixtitix janchit juk'ampi manqharu mantatäni
Leviticus13:31 Uka llixti uñxatasatix sacerdotex uka llixtin janchir jan juk'amp mantatap uñjani
Leviticus13:32 Paqallqu uru qhipatsti
Leviticus13:33 sacerdotex uka jaqirux ñik'utapsa
Leviticus13:34 Uka paqallqu urutsti sacerdotex wasitat uka jaqin janchip uñxatani
Leviticus13:35 Ukampisa uka llixtitix q'uma jaqit uñt'atäxatap qhipat juk'ampi aqatataskakini ukkhasti
Leviticus13:36 sacerdotex wasitat uka usut jaqirux uñxatani
Leviticus13:37 Ukampis sacerdotetix uka llixtin juk'ampi jan aqatatatap uñjani
Leviticus13:38 “Kunapachatix mä chachana jan ukax mä warmin janchiparus janq'u chhayphu llixtjama uñstkani ukapachasti
Leviticus13:39 ukax janchin mä jisk'a usukïtap amuyasini
Leviticus13:40 “Mä jaqirutix p'iqi ñik'utapax willirtxchi
Leviticus13:41 Mayni jaqirutix ñik'utapax nayräxa tuqit willirtxchi
Leviticus13:42 Ukampisa mä janq'u wila llixtitix p'iqi q'arawjan uñstkani ukkhasti
Leviticus13:43 Ukhamïpansti
Leviticus13:44 uka jaqix lepra usuniwa
Leviticus13:45 “Khititix lepra usunïki ukax ch'iyanuqat isimpiw uchasini
Leviticus13:46 Uka llixtinakapan utjañapkamasti uka jaqix q'añut uñt'atäniwa
Leviticus13:47 “Kunapachatix kuna q'añus t'awrat lurata
Leviticus13:48 jan ukax lip'ichit lurat mä kuna yänakansa uñstani
Leviticus13:49 ukat uka q'añutix ch'uxñaptani jan ukax wilaptanisa
Leviticus13:50 Sacerdotew uka q'añuchat isi uñxatani
Leviticus13:51 Paqallq uru qhipatsti sacerdotex wasitat uñxatani
Leviticus13:52 Ukhamasti kawkïri yänakatix ukham q'añuchjatäni ukanakasti q'ala nakhantayatäxañapawa
Leviticus13:53 ukampis sacerdotetix uka q'añun jan juk'ampi aqatatatap uñjani ukkhasti
Leviticus13:54 sacerdotex uka isinak t'axsuqatäñapatakiw mayini
Leviticus13:55 “Uka isinak t'axsutat qhipatsti
Leviticus13:56 Uka q'añu uñxatasintix sacerdotex amuyani ukax t'axsuqatäxatapat chhaqtxatapa
Leviticus13:57 Ukampis wasitattix uka isina
Leviticus13:58 Ukampis t'axsuta qhipat q'añux chhaqtani ukaxa
Leviticus13:59 Akanakaw isin utjir lepra usun yatichäwinakapaxa
Leviticus14:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna
Leviticus14:2 “Akanakaw mä lepra usuni jaqin q'umachasiñapxat yatichäwinakaxa: Usut jaqix sacerdoten nayraqatapar irpatäniwa
Leviticus14:3 sacerdotesti uka jaqirux campamento anqäxan uñxatani. Uka usut jaqitix k'umar jikxatasxani ukapachasti
Leviticus14:4 sacerdotex uka jaqin q'umachasiñapatakix jakaskir suma q'uma pä jamach'inak aptayanini
Leviticus14:5 Mayïr jamach'xa ñiq'i phukhu patxaru jiwayañapatakiw mayini
Leviticus14:6 Ukatsti
Leviticus14:7 Ukatsti kawkïri jaqitix uka lepra usut q'umachatäkani ukarux paqallqu kutiw uka wilampi ch'allsuni
Leviticus14:8 “Uka q'umachasiri jaqisti isinakap t'axsuqasxañapawa
Leviticus14:9 Paqallqu urunaka phuqhasxipansti
Leviticus14:10 “Kimsaqallqu ururusti jan kunas kamacht'at pä urqu ovejampi
Leviticus14:11 Kawkïri sacerdotetix q'umachkani ukasti
Leviticus14:12 ukatsti maynïr urqu ovejampi
Leviticus14:13 Uka urqu ovejsti kawkhantix wilañcha luqtañataki uywanakax kharinukusirïki ukkhan kharinukxañapa. Sumankthapiñataki
Leviticus14:14 “Ukatsti sacerdotex jucha luratat luqtatäkis uka uywan wilapampi luk'anapar juricht'asaw kawkïri jaqitix q'umachasiski ukan kupi jinchuparu
Leviticus14:15 Ukatsti mä juk'a aceite aptasaw ch'iqa ampar qutapar warxatani;
Leviticus14:16 kupi amparapan wikucht'ir luk'anapsti
Leviticus14:17 Amparapan jilt'kani uka aceitempisti
Leviticus14:18 Ukat jilt'ki uka aceitxa
Leviticus14:19 Ukatsti sacerdotex jank'akiw kuna wilañchatix juchat luqtatäki uk luqtxani
Leviticus14:20 uksti altarxaruw luqtani
Leviticus14:21 “Q'umachaskani uka jaqitix wali t'aqhin jakani
Leviticus14:22 pä qhurukutumpi jan ukax pä paloma chhiwchhimpi
Leviticus14:23 Kimsaqallqu ururusti
Leviticus14:24 Sacerdotesti
Leviticus14:25 kawkïri ovejatix juchat luqtatäkani uk kharinukuni
Leviticus14:26 ukatsti mä juk'a aceite aptasaw ch'iqa ampar qutapar warxatani;
Leviticus14:27 kupi amparapan wikucht'ir luk'anapsti
Leviticus14:28 Amparapan jilt'kani uka aceitempisti
Leviticus14:29 Ukat jilt'ki uka aceitxa
Leviticus14:30 Ukxarusti sacerdotex mayïri qhurukutu
Leviticus14:31 Mayïr qhurukutux jucha luratat wilañcha luqtäwitakïniwa
Leviticus14:32 Taqi ukanakaw yatichäwinakax kawkïri jaqinakatix lepra usuni uñstkani ukanakatakixa
Leviticus14:33 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus14:34 “Kunapachatix jumanakax Canaán uraqir mantxapxäta
Leviticus14:35 uka utanix sacerdoter uñjiriw sarani
Leviticus14:36 “Sacerdotesti janïra uka utar mantkasaxa
Leviticus14:37 “Sacerdotetix uka lepra usun ch'uxñätapa
Leviticus14:38 utat mistunisax
Leviticus14:39 Paqallqu uru phuqhasipansti sacerdotex wasitampiw uka lepra usur uñakipani
Leviticus14:40 kawkïr qalanakatix uka lepra usun q'añuchat uñstkani uka qalanak apsupxañapatakiw mayini
Leviticus14:41 uka kipkarakiw uka utan pirqanakap q'al khitsupxañap mayini
Leviticus14:42 Kawkïri qalanakatix apsutäkäna uka lantisti yaqha qalanak uskxapxani
Leviticus14:43 “Ukham taqi ukanak luratattix uka lepra usun q'añupax uñstaskakini ukkhasti
Leviticus14:44 sacerdotex wasitat uka utar mantasax uñakipani. Uka usutix wasitat uka utan aqatatatächixa
Leviticus14:45 Ukhamasti uka utax allinukutäñapawa
Leviticus14:46 Khititix uka urunakan Sacerdoten jist'antayat utar mantkani ukasti
Leviticus14:47 Khititix uka utan manq'kani
Leviticus14:48 “Sacerdotetix uka utan lepra usu chhaqtxatap amuyxani ukkhasti
Leviticus14:49 Uka uta q'umachañatakisti pä jamach'i katuni
Leviticus14:50 Uka jamach'inakatsti mayïrwa mä ñiq'i phukhxaru jiwayani
Leviticus14:51 Ukatsti
Leviticus14:52 Ukham uka uta q'umachani uka jamach'in wilapampi
Leviticus14:53 Uka qhipatsti marka anqäxaruw uka jakaskir jamach'irux antutxani
Leviticus14:54 Taqi ukanakaw lepra usunakata
Leviticus14:55 isinakan uñstkani
Leviticus14:56 ukhamarak p'usunakasa
Leviticus14:57 ukhamat kunatix q'umäki
Leviticus15:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus15:2 “Israelitanakarux akham sapxam: Kunapachatix mä chachax usutäkasin chhuxurasiñapat aliqak jathap aywiyxani ukkhax
Leviticus15:3 Ukham usutäsin maynitix jathap aliqak aywiyatapata
Leviticus15:4 “Kawkharutix uka usut jaqix ikt'kani uka chiqasti q'añut uñt'atäxaniwa. “Kawkharutix uka jaqix qunt'kani uka chiqas q'añut uñt'atäxarakiniwa.
Leviticus15:5 “Khititix uka jaqin ikiñap llamkt'kani ukasti
Leviticus15:6 “Khititix uka usut jaqin qunuñapar qunt'kani ukasti
Leviticus15:7 “Khititix uka usut jaqir llamkt'kani ukasti
Leviticus15:8 “Jathap aywiyir usut jaqitix mayni q'uma jaqir thuskatani ukasti
Leviticus15:9 “Uka usut jaqitix caballor qunxatañ qunuñar qunxatani ukasti
Leviticus15:10 “Khititix uka jathap aywiyir usut jaqin mä kuna qunt'atapxarus llamkt'kani
Leviticus15:11 “Uka usut jaqitix amparap jan jariqasis yaqha jaqir llamkt'kani
Leviticus15:12 “Uka usut jaqitix mä ñiq'i phukhurus llamkt'kani
Leviticus15:13 “Uka jaqitix usupat k'umarachasxani ukkhasti
Leviticus15:14 Kimsaqallqu ururusti pä qhurukutu jan ukax pä paloma chhiwchhinak apanini
Leviticus15:15 Sacerdotesti mayxa jucha luratat wilañcha luqtxani
Leviticus15:16 “Mä chachatix inamayak jathapsa wartkani ukkhax taqi janchip umampiw jariqasxani
Leviticus15:17 “Mä isirusa
Leviticus15:18 “Mä chachatix mä warmimpi ikintasin mayachasipxani ukkhasti
Leviticus15:19 “Mä warmitix phaxsi wilapampïni ukasti
Leviticus15:20 “Kawkharutix uka warmix phaxsi wilanïkasin ikt'kani ukax
Leviticus15:21 “Khititix uka phaxsi wilan warmin ikiñap llamkt'kani uka jaqix isip t'axsuqasxañapawa
Leviticus15:22 “Khititix uka warmin mä kunar qunxatatapxarus llamkt'kani ukasti
Leviticus15:23 Uka warmin ikiñapsa jan ukax mä kunapsa maynix llamkt'kani ukkhax jayp'thapiñapkamax q'añut uñt'atakipunïskaniwa.
Leviticus15:24 “Mä chachatix uka phaxsi wilan warmimpi ikintani ukkhax uka phaxsi wilapampi q'añuchjataw uñjasini
Leviticus15:25 “Mä warmitix jan phaxsi wilanïkasin walja urunak wila sarayasini
Leviticus15:26 “Kawkharutix uka wila apayasir warmix ikt'kani
Leviticus15:27 “Khititix uka yänak llamkt'kani ukasti q'añut uñt'atäxaniwa. Isip t'axsuqasxañapawa
Leviticus15:28 “Kunapachatix uka wilapax t'akt'xani ukkhatsti
Leviticus15:29 Kimsaqallqu ururusti pä qhurukutu jan ukax pä paloma chhiwchhinak apanini
Leviticus15:30 Sacerdotesti mayxa jucha luratat wilañcha luqtxani
Leviticus15:31 ukhamat jumanakax israelitanakarux q'añu lurañanakat jithiqtayapxäta. Jan ukhamäkani ukasti
Leviticus15:32 Aka iwxt'anakasti
Leviticus15:33 ukhamarak kawkïri warminakatix phaxsi wilanïpki
Leviticus16:1 Tatitux Moisesampiw parläna Aaronan yuqanakapan jiwarxatap qhipata
Leviticus16:2 Ukat Tatitux Moisesar säna: Aarón jilamarux akham sas yatiyam
Leviticus16:3 Aaronasti uka qullan chiqarux mä urqu vaca irpt'ataw mantañapa
Leviticus16:4 Kunatix sacerdoten isipäki uka isimpi isthapitaw mantani
Leviticus16:5 “Israelita jaqinakatsti
Leviticus16:6 Jupan kipka juchapat uka urqu vaca wilañchat luqtani
Leviticus16:7 Uka qhipatsti uka pä urqu cabrito Tatitur katuyxani Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa nayraqatana;
Leviticus16:8 ukxarusti uka pä cabritotxa
Leviticus16:9 Kawkïri cabritotix Tatitutaki satäkani uksti Aaronax jucha luratat wilañcha luqtxani
Leviticus16:10 ukampis kawkïri cabritotix Azazelatakïkani uksti
Leviticus16:11 “Uka qhipatsti Aaronax jucha luratat uka urqu vaca wilañcha luqtxani
Leviticus16:12 Ukxarusti altarxan Tatit nayraqatan jikxataski uka sank'anakampi phuqxatat incienso q'aphichañ aptani
Leviticus16:13 uka inciensompisti
Leviticus16:14 Ukatsti
Leviticus16:15 uka qhipatsti jaqinakan juchanakapat mä wilañchäkaspas ukham luqtañatakiw cabritorux jiwayxani
Leviticus16:16 Ukhamat uka qullan chiqa taqi uka q'añunakat q'umachxani
Leviticus16:17 “Janipuniw khitis Tatitump Jikisiñ Utäkis uka jak'ankañapäkiti
Leviticus16:18 kawkïri altaratix Tatitun nayraqatapankki ukar q'umachañatakiw mistunini. Uka vacan wilapata
Leviticus16:19 luk'anapampisti paqallqu kutiw altarar ch'allt'arakini. Ukhamat israelitanakan q'añu luratanakapax q'umachatäxani
Leviticus16:20 “Kunapachatix Aaronax uka qullan chiqa
Leviticus16:21 uka cabriton p'iqipxar amparap luqxatasasti
Leviticus16:22 Uka cabritosti
Leviticus16:23 Ukxarusti Aaronax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carparuw mantxani
Leviticus16:24 Ukatsti qullan chiqan umampi jariqasxani
Leviticus16:25 Kawkïr uywatix jucha luratat wilañcha luqtatäkän ukan lik'inakapsti altarxaruw nakt'ayxani;
Leviticus16:26 ukxarusti
Leviticus16:27 “Jucha luratat wilañcha luqtatäkän uka urqu vacampi
Leviticus16:28 Khititix taqi ukanak nakhantaykani ukasti
Leviticus16:29 “Aka kamachinakasti jumanakatakix wiñayatakïniwa: paqallqüri phaxsina tunka uru saraqatarusti jumanakax ayunapxätawa
Leviticus16:30 ukürurakiw jumanakax Tatitun nayraqatapan juchanakamat pampachatäñ jikxatapxäta
Leviticus16:31 Aka kamachisti wiñayatakiwa: uka urusti jumanakatakix samaraña mä jach'a urüniwa
Leviticus16:32 Kawkïri sacerdotetix ajllitäkani jupaw kuna luqtañanakatix juchat pampachatäñatak wakiski ukanak luqtani; jupasti linot lurat sacerdote isimpiw isthapisini
Leviticus16:33 juparakiw uka qullan chiqa
Leviticus16:34 “Aka kamachisti jumanakatakix wiñayatakïniwa: maran mä kutiw akanak lurapxäta

Leviticus17:5 Aka kamachisti kawkïri uywanaktix Israelitanakax pampan jiwayapki ukanak Tatitur luqtapxañapatakiwa
Leviticus17:6 Sacerdotesti kawkïritix Tatitump Jikisiña Carpa nayräxankki uka Tatitun altaraparuw wilampi ch'allsuni

Leviticus18:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw sarakïna:
Leviticus18:2 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: “Nayätwa Tatit Diosapaxa.
Leviticus18:3 “Egipto markan sarnaqäwinakaparjamax jan jakapxamti
Leviticus18:4 “Nayan arsutanakaxar phuqhapxam
Leviticus18:5 “Nayan arsutanakaxa
Leviticus18:6 “Janipuniw khiti chachasa pachpa wila masipankir warmiparux warmisiñapäkiti. Nayätwa Tatituxa.
Leviticus18:7 “Janirak taykamar warmisisax awkimar ñanqhachamti; ukhamarus taykamawa
Leviticus18:8 “Awkimarux jan ñanqhachamti warmipar warmisisaxa.
Leviticus18:9 “Janipuniw kullakamarux warmisïtati; awki tuqitsa jan ukax tayka tuqitsa kullakamäskpan; utamansa jan ukax yaqha chiqan yurirïpasa
Leviticus18:10 “Janipuniw khitis imill wawa allchhiparux warmisiñapäkiti
Leviticus18:11 “Janipuniw awkiman warmipan phuchhaparux warmisïtati. Jupax awkiman phuchhapawa
Leviticus18:12 “Janipuniw awkiman kullakaparux warmisïtati
Leviticus18:13 “Janirakiw taykaman kullakaparus warmisïtati
Leviticus18:14 “Tiomarux jan ñanqhachamti warmipar warmisisaxa
Leviticus18:15 “Yuxch'amarux jan warmisimti
Leviticus18:16 “Janirak jilamarus warmipar warmisisax ñanqhachamti.
Leviticus18:17 “Mä warmiru
Leviticus18:18 “Warmiman kullakaparux jan warmisimti
Leviticus18:19 “Phaxsi wilan warmirusti janipuniw warmisïtati.
Leviticus18:20 “Jaqi masiman warmiparusti janipuniw warmisïtati
Leviticus18:21 “Wawanakamsti janipun Moloc sat diosarux wilañchat luqtamti. Janirak ukham lurasax Diosan sutipsa ñanqhachamti. Nayakïtwa Tatituxa.
Leviticus18:22 “Jan mä chachampix warmimpjam ikintamti. Ukham chachapur ikintañax sinti jan wali q'añu luräwipuniwa.
Leviticus18:23 “Janirak animalanakampis wachuq jucha luramti
Leviticus18:24 “Janipun ukanakampix q'añuchjasipxamti. Kawkïr markanaktix nayax jumanak nayraqatat ananukkä ukanakasti uka luräwinakampiw q'añuchasipxäna
Leviticus18:25 uraqinakapas uka kipkarakiw q'añuchjat uñjasxarakïna
Leviticus18:26 Ukampisa jumanak israelitanaka
Leviticus18:27 kawkïr jaqinakatix jumanakat nayräxa aka uraqin jakapkän ukanakax
Leviticus18:28 ¡Uka uraqisti janirak jumanakarux apanukpati
Leviticus18:29 Khititix uka q'añu luräwinak luraskani ukasti
Leviticus18:30 Ukhamasti
Leviticus19:1 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa:
Leviticus19:2 “Israelitanakarux akham sarakim: “Jumanakasti qullanäpxam
Leviticus19:3 “Sapa maynisa awkiparu taykaparu yäqas sarnaqpan. “Nayan sábado urunakaxsa imapxarakim. Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa.
Leviticus19:4 “Janipun yaqha diosanakarux yupaychapxamti
Leviticus19:5 “Kunapachatix Tatitur sumankthapiñ wilañchanak luqtapkäta ukapachasti
Leviticus19:6 Luqtatäkani uka uywan aychapsti uka urpachaw manq'antatäxañapa
Leviticus19:7 Uka luqtat aychatix kimsa urkama manq'atakïskani ukasti
Leviticus19:8 khititix manq'kani ukasti juchap laykuw mutuyat uñjasini
Leviticus19:9 “Kunapachatix trigo yapuman achunakap apthapkäta ukkhasti
Leviticus19:10 Uva yapumatsti janiw taqpach apthapïtati
Leviticus19:11 “Jan lunthatasipxamti. Jan k'arisipxamsa
Leviticus19:12 “K'ari arsüwinak nayan sutixar jan luramti
Leviticus19:13 “Jan jaqi masimarux ch'amampiki saykatamti
Leviticus19:14 “Uqar jaqitsti jan phiskasimti. “Juykhun sarnaqañapäwjarusti janirak kuna jan walt'añanaksa liwisiñapatak uskumti. Tatit Diosamar axsartam. Nayätwa Tatituxa.
Leviticus19:15 “Kunapachatix mä jan walt'añ taripañas wakisini ukkhasti
Leviticus19:16 “Jaqinak taypinsti janipun arunak apnaqas sarnaqamti. “Jaqi jiwayañanakansa janirak chikachasimti. Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa.
Leviticus19:17 “Jilamar uñisiñanakxa chuymamar jan imxäsimti. “Kunapachatix jaqi masimar tuqinuqañax wakischi ukkhasti
Leviticus19:18 “Jaqi masimarux janipun kun luratas phuqsusimti
Leviticus19:19 “Nayan kamachinakaxsti phuqhapunim. “Uywanakamsti janipun yaqha uywanakampix katusiyamti. “Uraqimarus janipun yaqha jathanakamp ch'arqhuntasax yapuchamti. “Janirak kunayman telanakat lurat isinakampis isisimti.
Leviticus19:20 “Yaqha chachampi jaqichasiñatak churatäki uka uywatarutix maynix warmisini
Leviticus19:21 Uka jaqisti Tatiturux mä urqu oveja jucha luratat churani mä wilañchäkaspas ukhama
Leviticus19:22 Uka ovejsti wilañchat luqtasaw sacerdotex Tatitun juchat pampachañapatak mayini
Leviticus19:23 “Kunapachatix jumanakax uka uraqiru puripxäta
Leviticus19:24 Pusi mara purinxipansti taqi uka achunakax mä phunchhäwi urun Tatitur luqtatäxani
Leviticus19:25 phisqa mara purinxipan jumanakax uka achunak manq'xapxäta. Ukhamat uka quqax juk'ampi achunakanïni. Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa.
Leviticus19:26 “Janipun kunsa wilanpach manq'apxamti. “Janipun yatirïñ munapxamti
Leviticus19:27 “Jan ñik'utanakam muypach mururasipxamti
Leviticus19:28 “Mä jaqin jiwatapatxa
Leviticus19:29 “Phuchhamarus janipun chachanakampi sarnaqir tukuyamti
Leviticus19:30 “Sábado urunak imapxapunim. Nayan utaxatakisti wali axsartañax utjarakpan. Nayätwa Tatituxa.
Leviticus19:31 “Janipun layqanakan ukarusa
Leviticus19:32 “Kayut sayt'asisin chuyman jaqinakar mä suma yäqañampi uñjam. Tatit Diosamar axsartatamsa uñacht'ayarakim. Nayätwa Tatituxa.
Leviticus19:33 “Yaqha markat jutir jaqinakaru
Leviticus19:34 Jumanakat maynïrïkaspas ukham uñjapxam; jupanakarux jumanakjam jaqïtapat munasipxam. Ukhamarus jumanakax Egiptonxa

Leviticus23:1 Tatitux Moisesar akham sänwa:

Leviticus23:5 “Nayrïr phaxsina tunka pusini uru saraqat jayp'thapirux Tatitut amtasisin Pascua uruyañ qalltapxäta.
Leviticus23:6 “Uka pachpa phaxsina tunka phisqani uru saraqatarusti
Leviticus23:7 Qallta urusti mä qullan tantachasïwi lurapxäta. Uka urux janipuniw kuna ch'ama tukuñ irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati.
Leviticus23:8 Paqallqu urunakaw Tatiturux waxt'anak nakt'ayas luqtapxäta
Leviticus23:9 Tatitux Moisesaruw mayïna
Leviticus23:10 israelitanakar akham sañapataki: “Kunapachatix jumanakax kawkïr uraqtix churapkäma ukar mantapkäta ukkhaxa
Leviticus23:11 Samarañ uru qhipürusti sacerdotex Tatituruw mä suma q'apkir waxt'äkaspas ukham churxani
Leviticus23:12 Trigo marqa churapkäta uka pachpa urunsti
Leviticus23:13 Ukhamarus pusi kilo chikatani aceitempi chapt'ata suma jak'u apanipxarakïta
Leviticus23:14 Tatitun ukaru waxt'anakam apaniñkamasti
Leviticus23:15 “Kunürutix jumanakax uka trigo marqa apapkäta Tatitur mä suma waxt'äkaspas ukham luqtañataki
Leviticus23:16 Ukatsti sábado uru phuqhasxani ukampisti
Leviticus23:17 utanakamatsti suma trigot levadurani lurt'at pä t'ant'a apapxäta

Leviticus23:19 “Jucha luratanakatsti mä cabrito wilañchat luqtapxäta

Leviticus23:21 “Uka urusti jumanakax mä suma qullan tantachasïwi nayatakix lurapxäta
Leviticus23:22 “Kunapachatix achunak apthapkäta ukkhasti
Leviticus23:23 Tatitux Moisesaruw mayïna
Leviticus23:24 israelitanakar akham sañapataki: “Paqallqüri phaxsina nayrïr uru saraqatarux jumanakax samarañ uru uruyapxäta
Leviticus23:25 Uka urux jumanakax Tatituruw mä suma nakt'ata waxt'a luqtapxäta
Leviticus23:26 Tatitux Moisesarux akham sarakïnwa:
Leviticus23:27 “Uka pachpa paqallqüri phaxsina tunka uru saraqatarusti
Leviticus23:28 Uka urusti janipuniw kunanaksa irnaqapxätati juchat pampachatäña urütap layku
Leviticus23:29 Khititix uka samarañ urun jan ayunkani ukasti
Leviticus23:30 Ukhamarak khititix uka samarañ urun irnaqaskani ukasti
Leviticus23:31 “Janipun uka urux kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxamti. Kawkhansay jakasipkam
Leviticus23:32 Jumanakatakisti uka urux samaraña
Leviticus23:33 Tatitux Moisesaruw mayïna
Leviticus23:34 israelitanakar akham sañapataki: “Uka pachpa paqallqüri phaxsina
Leviticus23:35 qallta urunsti mä suma qullan tantachasïwi lurapxäta. Janirak uka urun kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxamti.
Leviticus23:36 Uka paqallqu urunakasti nakt'at luqtäwinak Tatitur churapxäta
Leviticus23:37 “Taqi uka urunakax Tatitutak satawa
Leviticus23:38 jumanakasti uka churäwinakxa
Leviticus23:39 “Uka paqallqüri phaxsina
Leviticus23:40 Qallta urusti kawkïri achunakatix quqanakan sumäkani ukanak apaqapxäta
Leviticus23:41 Sapa mararakiw paqallqu phaxsi saraqatarux paqallqu urunaka Tatitutaki mä phunchhäwi lurapxäta. Aka kamachisti jumanakatakisa
Leviticus23:42 Uka paqallqu urunakanxa jumanaka israelitanakax chhujllanakan jakapxäta
Leviticus23:43 ukhamat taqi wawanakamax yatipxani kunapachatix israelitanakar Egiptot irpsunkäyäta ukapachax nayax chhujllanakan jupanakar jakayäyäta. Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa.”
Leviticus23:44 Moisesax ukham israelitanakarux yatiyäna kuna urunakatix Tatitutak satäkis uka phunchhäwinak lurañ tuqitxa.

Leviticus25:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw Sinaí qullun
Leviticus25:2 israelitanakar akham sañapatak mayïna: “Kuna uraqtix jumanakar churapkäma ukar mantapkäta ukapachasti
Leviticus25:3 Yapunakamxa suxta maraw yapuchasipxäta. Uva yapunakamsa suxta maraw alinakap khuchhurapxäta
Leviticus25:4 ukampis paqallqu mara purinxipansti uka uraqix Tatitutakiw samarani; uka marasti janipuniw yapunakam yapuchapxätati
Leviticus25:5 Qhipa trigo achunak apthapitat jupapachpa külltanir trigo jan yawthapipxamti
Leviticus25:6 Kunatix uka samarañ maran uka uraqin jupapachpa achkani ukax jumanakana
Leviticus25:7 ukhamarak uywanakamatakisa
Leviticus25:8 “Jumanakasti paqallqu kutiw paqallqu mara jakt'apxäta
Leviticus25:9 uka marana paqallqu phaxsina tunka uru saraqatarusti
Leviticus25:10 Phisqa tunka mara purinxipansti jumanakax uka mararux qullan mara sasaw sapxäta; uka marasti qhispiyasiñ maräniwa
Leviticus25:11 Uka phisqa tunka marasti jumanakatakix qhispiyasiñ maräniwa
Leviticus25:12 uka maran qullan marätapata
Leviticus25:13 “Uka qhispiyasiñ maransti jumanakax taqiniw uraqinakam tumpasxapxäta.
Leviticus25:14 Maynitix mä uraqi aljani jan ukax khititsa alasini ukasti
Leviticus25:15 khititix alaskani ukasti
Leviticus25:16 walja maratix yapuchañatak utjaskchi ukkhasti
Leviticus25:17 “Jan khitis mayni masiparux jan wal lurpati. Tatit Diosarusti axsartapxapunim
Leviticus25:18 Nayan kamachinakaxarjam sarnaqapxam
Leviticus25:19 uraqix suma achunak churani
Leviticus25:20 “Inas jumanakax sapxarakchïta: ‘¿Ukhamasti kunarak manq'añänisti uka paqallqu mara purinin ukkhasti
Leviticus25:21 Nayaw jumanakarux suxtïri maräki ukkhax walja achunak apayasinipkäma
Leviticus25:22 ukhamat jumanakax kimsaqallqu maran yapuchasipkäta ukkhax uka imat trigot manq'asipkäta
Leviticus25:23 “Uraqisti janiw wiñayatak aljatäñapäkiti
Leviticus25:24 Ukhamasti kawkïr uraqinaktix jumanakax katupkta ukanaksti
Leviticus25:25 “Mayni marka masimatix aynacht'at uñjasini
Leviticus25:26 “Maynitix uka uraq kutsuyañatak jan jak'a wila masinïkani
Leviticus25:27 qawqha maranakas mäkipxatayna uka uraq aljatapatxa ukhamarjamaw amuyt'ani
Leviticus25:28 Ukampisa janitix uka uraq kutsuyasiñatak qawqha qullqitix munaski uk jikxatkani ukasti
Leviticus25:29 “Maynitix uyuchrantat markan mä uta aljani ukasti
Leviticus25:30 Ukampis uka utatix uka maran jan kutsuyatäkani ukapachasti
Leviticus25:31 Ukampisa
Leviticus25:32 “Levitanakasti kawkïri utanakatix jupanakan markanakapankki ukanak wasitat kutsuyasipxani.
Leviticus25:33 Maynitix levitanakan markapan mä uta alasini ukasti
Leviticus25:34 Kawkïr uywa awatisiñ uraqinakatix levitanakan markapan utjki ukanakax janipuniw aljatäkaspati
Leviticus25:35 “Mayni marka masimatix aynacht'at uñjasini
Leviticus25:36 Kuntix mayt'käta ukanakatsti janipuniw juk'amp jila mayïtati; jan ukasti
Leviticus25:37 Kuna qullqtix mayt'käta ukatsti janiw juk'amp jila mayïtati
Leviticus25:38 Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa
Leviticus25:39 “Mayni marka masimatix jumampïkasin aynacht'at uñjasini
Leviticus25:40 juparusti utaman irnaqirïkaspasa
Leviticus25:41 ukatsti qhispitaw jupasa
Leviticus25:42 jupanakasti nayan luqtirinakaxäpxiwa; nayaw jupanakarux Egiptot irpsunta
Leviticus25:43 Jan qhuru kankañamp jupanakarux uñjamti
Leviticus25:44 “Jumatix t'aqhisiyat jaqinakanïñ munsta ukasti
Leviticus25:45 Jan ukax kawkïrinakatix yaqha markat jutir jaqinakan wawanakapäki
Leviticus25:46 ukatsti kunapachatix jumanakax jiwxapxäta ukkhax wawanakaparuw mä tutïkaspas ukham jaytxapxäta; ukhamat luqtayasipxañamataki. Ukampis jumanakax janipuniw israelita masinakamarux t'aqhisiyapxañamäkiti.
Leviticus25:47 “Yaqha markat jutir jaqitix jumanak taypin qamiriptxani
Leviticus25:48 uka israelita jaqix wakisiw kutsuyatäñapaxa. Uksti pachpa wila masipaw ukham luraspa
Leviticus25:49 mä tiopa
Leviticus25:50 Jupampi alasiripampisti qawqha maräxisa jupan aljasitapata qhispiyasiñ marakamax uk sum jakt'apxani. Kutsuyasiñatakix qawqtix mä irnaqirix uka maranakan irnaqatapat katuqkaspa ukhamarjamaw kutsuyasiñapan alapax tantiyt'atäni.
Leviticus25:51 Walja maranakatix utjaskchi ukapachasti
Leviticus25:52 ukampis uka qhispiyasiñ maratakitix juk'a urunakakïxani ukkhasti
Leviticus25:53 Juparusti mä maratakis irnaqañapatak jawsatäkaspa ukhamarjamaw uñjatäni; janipuniw uka israelita masimarux qhuru kankañamp uñjayätati.
Leviticus25:54 “Uka maranakantix uka jaqix jan kutsuyatäkani ukkhasti
Leviticus25:55 israelitanakasti nayan luqtirinakaxawa; nayaw jupanakarux Egipto markat irpsunta. Nayätwa jupanakan Tatit Diosapaxa.

Leviticus26:2 Nayan qullan utaxsti sumpun yäqapxam
Leviticus26:3 “Jumanakatix nayan kamachinakaxarjam sarnaqapxäta
Leviticus26:4 nayax jallunakxa pachaparuw apayanipxäma
Leviticus26:5 trigosti jumanakatakix uvanak apthapiñkamaw utjani
Leviticus26:6 Jumanakarux uka uraqin samarañ churapxäma
Leviticus26:7 Jumanakasti uñisirinakamarux jaltayapxätawa
Leviticus26:8 jumanakat phisqanikiw patakanir chhuktayañatak munasini
Leviticus26:9 Jumanakarusti sum uñjapxäma
Leviticus26:10 Nayra mara imasit trigo manq'asipxäta
Leviticus26:11 “Nayaw jumanak taypin jakä
Leviticus26:12 jumanak taypinpun sarnaqasï
Leviticus26:13 Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa
Leviticus26:14 “Ukampis jumanakatix nayar jan ist'apkitäta
Leviticus26:15 jan ukasti
Leviticus26:16 nayax jumanakampix akanak lurarakï: axsarañanaka
Leviticus26:17 Nayasti jumanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw sayt'ä
Leviticus26:18 “Taqi akanak katuqasas janipun nayar jaysapkitäta ukapachasti
Leviticus26:19 Jumanakarux q'al jisk'achjapxäma
Leviticus26:20 Inamayakiw ch'amsa tukusipkäta
Leviticus26:21 “Jumanakatix nayar janipun ist'apkitäta ukasti
Leviticus26:22 Jumanakxarusti qullunkir qhuru animalanak antutanï
Leviticus26:23 “Taqi ukanak katuqkasinsa
Leviticus26:24 nayax jumanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw sartä
Leviticus26:25 Jumanakxarux mä nuwasiñ jutayä
Leviticus26:26 “Kunapachatix jumanakan trigo yapunakam q'al tukjkä ukapachasti
Leviticus26:27 “Taqi ukanak katuqkasinsa janipun nayar ist'apkitäta
Leviticus26:28 nayax jumanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw sartä
Leviticus26:29 Ukapachaw jumanakax imill wawanakamsa
Leviticus26:30 Nayaw jumanakan yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ altaranakam t'unthapï
Leviticus26:31 jumanakan markanakama
Leviticus26:32 “Jumanakan markanakamsti q'al t'unjä
Leviticus26:33 Jumanakarux markanak taypiruw ananukupxäma
Leviticus26:34 Ukhamasti uraqix ch'usa wasarar tukuta uñjasitäñapkamax samaraniwa
Leviticus26:35 Kunapachkamatix uka uraqix ch'usa wasar uñjasini ukapachkamaw uka uraqix samarani
Leviticus26:36 “Khitinakatix jumanakat uka uñisirin uraqipan jakasipkakini ukanakarusti
Leviticus26:37 nuwasiñatsa jaltxapkasma ukhamaw jan khitin arknaqat jumanakkam liwirtapxäta; ¡jumanakatsti janipuniw khitis uñisirinakapar saykatirjamäkaniti!
Leviticus26:38 Jumanakax yaqha markanak taypin jiwarayataw uñjasipxäta; uñisirinakaman jiwarayataw uñjasipxäta;
Leviticus26:39 khitinakatix uñisirinakaman uraqipan qhiparapkani ukanakasti
Leviticus26:40 “Jumanakax jucha luratanakamsa
Leviticus26:41 nayasti jumanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw uñisirinakaman markapar apayapxäma; ukan Diosar jan uñt'ir amuyumax jisk'achat uñjasini
Leviticus26:42 Ukapachaw nayax kuna arust'äwtix Jacobumpi
Leviticus26:43 kawkïr uraqtix jumanakax jaytaniwayapkäta ukkañkamasti uka uraqix samart'aniwa; ukampis jumanakax juchanakamat t'aqhisipxäta
Leviticus26:44 “Ukhamäkipansa
Leviticus26:45 Jan ukasti
Leviticus26:46 Akanakawa kamachinakaxa
Leviticus27:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw säna:
Leviticus27:2 “Israelitanakarux akham sarakim: Kunapachatix maynix Tatitur mä arsüwi phuqhañ munani ukasti
Leviticus27:3 mä chachatix pä tunkat suxta tunka marankamäni ukanakasti phisqa tunka qullqinak churañapawa
Leviticus27:4 mä warmitsti
Leviticus27:5 Kawkïr chachatix phisqa maranita pä tunka marankamäni ukanakasti
Leviticus27:6 Mä yuqall wawatix mä phaxsita phisqa marankamäni ukasti phisqa qullqi churañapawa
Leviticus27:7 Kawkïr jaqinakatix suxta tunka maranit amstarüni ukanakatsti
Leviticus27:8 Uka jaqitix t'aqhin jakani ukatsti janirak ukkha qullqi churañatak utjarapkani ukasti
Leviticus27:9 “Uywanak tuqitsti kawkïrinakatix Tatitur luqtatäkani ukanakax Tatitutakipunïniwa
Leviticus27:10 janirakiw yaqha uywampix turkakipatäkaspati
Leviticus27:11 “Mä q'añu uywatix Tatitur luqtañatak yaqhachatächi ukasti
Leviticus27:12 ukhamat sacerdotex qawqhänis uka uywan alapax uk sañapataki. Qawqtix sacerdotex churam siskani ukax jaysatäñapapuniwa
Leviticus27:13 jaqipatix uka uywa kutsuyasiñ munani ukkhasti
Leviticus27:14 “Maynitix Tatitur utap luqtani ukasti
Leviticus27:15 Ukampis khititix utap Tatitur luqtkäna uk kutsuyasxañ munani ukasti
Leviticus27:16 “Maynitix uraqipat mä chikata Tatitur luqtani ukasti
Leviticus27:17 Uka jaqitix qhispiyasiñ maran uraqip churani ukasti
Leviticus27:18 ukampis qhispiyasiñ mara qhipattix Tatitur luqtani ukkhasti
Leviticus27:19 “Maynitix luqtat uraqip kutsuyasxañ munani ukasti
Leviticus27:20 ukampis janitix uka uraqi kutsuyaskani
Leviticus27:21 Kunapachatix uka uraqix qhispiyasiñ maran qhispit uñjasxani ukkhasti
Leviticus27:22 “Maynitix wila masipan jan uraqipäkasin mä alat uraqi Tatitur churani ukkhasti
Leviticus27:23 qhispiyasiñ mara puriniñapkamax qawqha maräskis ukhamarjamaw sacerdotex uka uraqin alap sani
Leviticus27:24 Qhispiyasiñ maransti
Leviticus27:25 “Taqi alanakax kawkïr qullqitix qullan utan apnaqatäki ukhamarjam amuyt'atäniwa
Leviticus27:26 “Uywanakan nayrïr qallunakapasti
Leviticus27:27 Mä q'añu uywatix Tatitur luqtañatak yaqhachatächi ukasti
Leviticus27:28 “Maynitix Tatitur yänakapat luqtxani
Leviticus27:29 Kawkïr jaqitix jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäkän ukas janipuniw qhispiyatäkaspati
Leviticus27:30 “Taqi achunakata
Leviticus27:31 Maynitix uka tunkat maya churatäkän uk kutsuyasiñ munani ukkhasti
Leviticus27:32 “Uywanakatsti sapa tunkat mayax Tatitur luqtatapunïniwa
Leviticus27:33 kawkïritix sumäki
Leviticus27:34 Aka kamachi arunak Tatitux Moisesar Sinaí qullun israelitanakatak churäna.
Numbers1:1 Israelitanakax Sinaí wasarankasipkänwa
Numbers1:2 “Israelitanakar taqpachanir jakthapipxam
Numbers1:3 pä tunka maranit amstaru
Numbers1:4 sapaqat ayllut ajllita wila masinakan jilïripan yanapt'apampi.
Numbers1:5 Jumanakar yanapt'ir jilïrinakan sutinakapax akanakawa: “Rubén ayllutxa: Elisur sat Sedeúr chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:6 “Simeón ayllutxa: Salumiel sat Surisadai chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:7 “Judá ayllutxa: Nahasón sat Aminadab chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:8 “Isacar ayllutxa: Natanael sat Suar chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:9 “Zabulón ayllutxa: Eliab sat Helón chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:10 “Efraín ayllutxa
Numbers1:11 “Benjamín ayllutxa: Abidán sat Guidoní chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:12 “Dan ayllutxa: Ahiézer sat Amisadai chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:13 “Aser ayllutxa: Paguiel sat Ocrán chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:14 “Gad ayllutxa: Eliasaf sat Reuel chachan yuqapa.
Numbers1:15 “Neftalí ayllutxa: Ahirá sat Enán chachan yuqapa.”
Numbers1:16 Jupanakaw israelita marka taypita
Numbers1:17 Ukhamaw Moisesampi
Numbers1:18 ukatsti payïr phaxsina mä uru saraqataruw taqpach markar tantachthapipxäna. Uka urunsti jaqix mayat mayat jakthapitäpxänwa
Numbers1:19 kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar iwxkatayna ukhamarjamaw Sinaí wasaran jaqix jakthapisïna.
Numbers1:20 Kunapachatix jaqinakax ayllutkama
Numbers1:21 
Numbers1:22 Simeón ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka llätunkan waranqa kimsa patakani.
Numbers1:23 
Numbers1:24 Gad ayllunkiritxa: pusi tunka phisqan waranqa suxta patak phisqa tunkani.
Numbers1:25 
Numbers1:26 Judá ayllunkiritxa: paqallq tunka pusin waranqa suxta patakani.
Numbers1:27 
Numbers1:28 Isacar ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka pusin waranqa pusi patakani.
Numbers1:29 
Numbers1:30 Zabulón ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa pusi patakani.
Numbers1:31 
Numbers1:32 José chachan wawanakapa
Numbers1:33 
Numbers1:34 
Numbers1:35 
Numbers1:36 Benjamín ayllunkiritxa: kimsa tunka phisqan waranqa pusi patakani.
Numbers1:37 
Numbers1:38 Dan ayllunkiritxa: suxta tunka payan waranqa paqallq patakani.
Numbers1:39 
Numbers1:40 Aser ayllunkiritxa: pusi tunka mayan waranqa phisqa patakani.
Numbers1:41 
Numbers1:42 Neftalí ayllunkiritsti
Numbers1:43 
Numbers1:44 Taqi ukanakaw Israelan wawanakapan ayllutkama
Numbers1:45 Israelitanakat khitinakatix pä tunka maranit amstar jakhutäkäna
Numbers1:46 taqpachanix suxta patak kimsani waranqa phisqa pataka phisqa tunkan chachanakänwa.
Numbers1:47 Leví chachat saraqirinakax janiw mayni ayllunkirinakjamax nayra awkinakapan ayllunakap taypin jakhutäpkänti
Numbers1:48 Tatituw Moisesar satayna:
Numbers1:49 “Israelitanakar jakthapkäta ukkhaxa
Numbers1:50 Jupanakarux Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan luqtapxañapatakiw uchäta
Numbers1:51 Markax sarantkani ukapachasti
Numbers1:52 Israelan maynïr ayllunakapasti
Numbers1:53 Leví ayllunkirinakasti Tatitun arust'äwi qullan carpar muyuntasaw utjnuqtapxani
Numbers1:54 Israelitanakasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw lurapxäna.
Numbers2:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers2:2 “Israelitanakax Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpäkis ukkhat jaya chiqat muyuntasaw utjnuqtapxani
Numbers2:3 “Inti jalsu tuqirux Judá ayllun wiphalapanïki uka tamanakaw utjnuqtapxani. Judá ayllun ejercitopan jilïripasti Nahasón chachawa
Numbers2:4 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax paqallq tunka pusin waranqa suxta patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:5 Judá ayllunkirinakat kupi tuqirusti Isacar ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani
Numbers2:6 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka pusin waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:7 Ch'iqa tuqirusti
Numbers2:8 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:9 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Judá ayllunkir wiphalapar arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka kimsaqallq tunka suxtan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. Taqpachaniw israelita ejerciton nayraqatap sarantapxani.
Numbers2:10 “Aynach tuqirusti Rubén ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow utjnuqtani. Rubén ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Elisur chachawa
Numbers2:11 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunk suxtan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:12 Rubén ayllunkirinakat kupi tuqirusti Simeón ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani
Numbers2:13 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunk llätunkan waranqa kimsa patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:14 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Gad ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani
Numbers2:15 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka phisqan waranqa suxta patak phisqa tunkan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:16 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Rubén ayllunkir wiphalapar arkapxani. Taqpachasti pataka phisqa tunka mayan waranqa pusi patak phisqa tunkan chachanakawa; jupanakasti nayrïr tamar arktasaw taqpachan sarantapxani.
Numbers2:17 “Leví chachat saraqirinakax jupanak qhipat Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa apt'at sarantapxani. Uka pusi tamanakax mayat mayat sarantapxani
Numbers2:18 “Inti jalanta tuqirusti Efraín ayllunkirinakan wiphalapanïki uka ejercitonakaw utjnuqtapxani. Efraín ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Elisamá chachawa
Numbers2:19 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:20 Efraín ayllunkirit kupi tuqirusti Manasés ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtarakini
Numbers2:21 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax kimsa tunka payan waranqa pä patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:22 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Benjamín ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani
Numbers2:23 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax kimsa tunk phisqan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:24 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Efraín ayllunkir wiphalapanïki ukar arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka kimsaqallqun waranqa patakan chachanakawa; jupanakasti kimsïr t'aqa tamxaruw sarantapxani.
Numbers2:25 “Amsta tuqirusti Dan ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitonakaw utjnuqtani. Dan ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Ahiézer sat chachawa
Numbers2:26 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax suxta tunka payan waranqa paqallqu patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:27 Dan ayllunkirit kupirusti
Numbers2:28 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka mayan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:29 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Neftalí ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani
Numbers2:30 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka kimsan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa.
Numbers2:31 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Dan ayllun wiphalap arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa suxta patakan chachanakawa; jupanakaw taqi tamanakan qhipap wiphalapamp sarantapxani.”
Numbers2:32 Taqi israelita wila masinakat jakthapitax
Numbers2:33 Ukampis Leví chachat saraqirinakax janiw jakthapitäpkänti
Numbers2:34 Israelit jaqinakasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw taqpach lurapxäna: Sapaqat tamaw wiphalanakapamp utjnuqtapxäna

Numbers3:10 
Numbers3:11 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa:

Numbers3:13 taqi jilïr wawanakan nayankatap layku. Egipcionakan jilïr wawanakap jiwaraykäyät ukapachaw nayax
Numbers3:14 Tatitux Sinaí wasaran Moisesar parläna
Numbers3:15 “Leví chachat saraqirinakar jakthapim

Numbers3:18 Guersón chachan wawanakapax: Libní
Numbers3:19 Quehat chachan wawanakapax: Amram
Numbers3:20 Merarí chachan wawanakapax: Mahli
Numbers3:21 Guersón chachan wila masinakapax Libní
Numbers3:22 Taqpach yuqall wawanakapat mä phaxsinit amstaru qillqantatanakax
Numbers3:23 Uka tamanakasti
Numbers3:24 Guersón chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan jilïr irpiripax Eliasaf chachänwa
Numbers3:25 Jupanakaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan qullan chiqawja uñjapxäna
Numbers3:26 anqäxan utjir cortinanakapa
Numbers3:27 Quehat chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakax Amram
Numbers3:28 taqpach yuqall wawanakapat mä phaxsinit amstar qillqantatanakax
Numbers3:29 jupanakasti qullan chiqawjat aynach tuqin utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers3:30 Uka tamanakan jilïr irpiripax Elisafán sat chachänwa
Numbers3:31 Uka tamanakaw Tatitun arust'äwi arcap uñjapxäna
Numbers3:32 Levitanakan jilïr irpiripax Aarón sacerdoten yuqapa Eleazar chachänwa
Numbers3:33 Merarí chachan wila masinakapax Mahli
Numbers3:34 Taqpach yuqall wawanakapa mä phaxsinit amstar qillqantatanakasti
Numbers3:35 Jupanakan jilïr irpiripax Suriel sat chachänwa
Numbers3:36 Merarí chachan saraqirinakapax qullan chiqawjan utjir tablanak uñjapxäna
Numbers3:37 uka kipkaraki uta anqäxar muyuntki uka sayir lawanaka
Numbers3:38 Moisesampi
Numbers3:39 Moisesampi

Numbers3:41 Ukatsti Leví chachat saraqirinakar nayatak yaqhacharapita
Numbers3:42 Moisesasti kunjämtix Tatitux siskatayna
Numbers3:43 taqpachanisti mä phaxsinit amstaru qillqantat yuqall wawanakax

Numbers3:46 Ukampis israelitanakan jilïr yuqall wawanakapax
Numbers3:47 sapaqat jaqita phisqa qullqi mayïta
Numbers3:48 uka qullqsti Aaronampiru

Numbers3:50 waranqa kimsa patak suxta tunka phisqan qullqi apthapirakïna
Numbers3:51 Uka qullqinaksti Aaronampiru
Numbers4:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers4:2 “Quehat chachan wawanakapäki uka levitanakat wila masitkam jakthapim
Numbers4:3 kimsa tunka maranita
Numbers4:4 “Quehat chachan wawanakapan lurañanakapax wali qullanawa
Numbers4:5 Kunapachatix markax yaqha chiqar sarañatak sarxarkani ukkhax
Numbers4:6 Uka patxarusti suma lip'ichinakampiw imxatapxani
Numbers4:7 Ukatsti Tatitutak yaqhachat t'ant'anak uchañ patxarux
Numbers4:8 Taqi uka patxarusti wila telampiw janxatapxani
Numbers4:9 Ukatsti morado tela aptasin ukampiw candelero imxatapxani
Numbers4:10 Taqi ukanaksti suma lip'ichinakampiw llawuntapxani
Numbers4:11 “Qurit lurat altar patxarusti morado isi janatatapxani
Numbers4:12 Ukxarusti qullan utjäwin apnaqaski taqi uka yänak apthapisin
Numbers4:13 Ukatsti altarat qhillanak picharapxani
Numbers4:14 Uka patxarusti taqi kunanakatix altaran yupaychañatak wakiski ukanak uchapxani: nina sank'a nakhayañanaka
Numbers4:15 Aaronampi
Numbers4:16 Aarón sacerdoten Eleazar yuqapax lamparanak qhanayir aceite imañapa
Numbers4:17 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Numbers4:18 “Jan jumanakax munapxamti
Numbers4:19 Jan jupanakan qullan yänak llamkt'apxatap layku mutuyat uñjasis jiwasipkañapatakix
Numbers4:20 Ukhamat jupanakax kunatix qullanäki ukanak uñjir jan mantapkaniti
Numbers4:21 Tatitux Moisesar saskakïnwa:
Numbers4:22 “Guersón chachan wawanakapar jakthapirakim
Numbers4:23 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankam jakthapisa
Numbers4:24 “Guersón chachan wawanakapax akanak lurapxani:
Numbers4:25 Qullan utjäwin cortinanakap apapxani
Numbers4:26 uta anqäxan cortinanakapa
Numbers4:27 Aaronampi
Numbers4:28 Taqi ukanak Guersón chachan wawanakapax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurapxani
Numbers4:29 “Ukatsti Merarí chachan wawanakapar uka kipkarak jakthapim
Numbers4:30 Taqinin sutinakap qillqantam
Numbers4:31 Jupanakan lurañanakapasti Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpanxa
Numbers4:32 Ukatsti qullan utjäwir muyuntki uka sayir lawanakap apapxarakini
Numbers4:33 Taqi ukanakaw Merarí chachat saraqir wawanakapan lurañanakapaxa
Numbers4:34 Ukatsti Moisesampi
Numbers4:35 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankam yuqall wawanakaru
Numbers4:36 taqpachani qillqantatasti pä waranqa paqallqu patak phisqa tunkan yuqall wawanakänwa.
Numbers4:37 Quehat chachan saraqirinakapax taqi ukanakänwa
Numbers4:38 Guersón chachan wawanakapax saraqiripatkama
Numbers4:39 khitinakatix kimsa tunka maranit amstar phisqa tunka marankamäpkäna
Numbers4:40 ukanakasti
Numbers4:41 Guersón chachan saraqiripatkam jakthapit yuqall wawanakax taqi ukanakänwa
Numbers4:42 Merarí chachan wawanakapax saraqiripatkama
Numbers4:43 khitinakatix kimsa tunka maranit amstar phisqa tunka marankamäpkäna
Numbers4:44 ukanakax
Numbers4:45 Merarí chachan saraqiripatkam jakthapit yuqall wawanakax taqi ukanakänwa
Numbers4:46 Moisesampi
Numbers4:47 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankama
Numbers4:48 taqpachanisti kimsaqallq waranqa phisqa patak kimsaqallq tunkan yuqall wawanakänwa.
Numbers4:49 Uka jakthapïwisti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjamaw lurasïna. Ukhamaw Moisesax sapa maynir kuntix lurañapäki
Numbers5:1 Tatitux Moisesarux sänwa:
Numbers5:2 “Israelitanakar parlam
Numbers5:3 Chachäpasa
Numbers5:4 Israelitanakasti Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw jaysapxäna
Numbers5:5 Tatitux Moisesarux sänwa:
Numbers5:6 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Kunapachatix khiti jaqisa
Numbers5:7 uka jaqisti juchanakap arsusiñapawa
Numbers5:8 Ñanqhachat jaqitix jiwaspa
Numbers5:9 “Taqi churäwinakampi
Numbers5:10 Taqi kunanakatix Tatitutak yaqhachatäki
Numbers5:11 Tatitux Moisesar yaqha kamachi churäna
Numbers5:12 “Israelitanakar parlam
Numbers5:13 ukatsti chachapan jan yatkasin yaqha chachampi wachuq jucha luraspa
Numbers5:14 Inas chachapax warmin jan wal luratap amuyasin mayjt'aschispa
Numbers5:15 Ukhamäni ukapachasti
Numbers5:16 “Sacerdotex warmiru jak'apar irpkatasinxa
Numbers5:17 Ukxarusti Tatitur luqtat uma ñiq'i chatur aptanini
Numbers5:18 Ukatsti
Numbers5:19 Ukapachaw sacerdotex warmir mä juramento lurayani
Numbers5:20 Ukampis jumatix chachamar yaqha chachamp ikintas sallqjsta
Numbers5:21 ukapachasti
Numbers5:22 Ñanqhachäwi apanir uma umt'kät ukapachaw uka mutuyäwi katuqäta’ sasa. Warmisti saniwa: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa.
Numbers5:23 “Ukat sacerdotex uka ñanqhachäwi arunakxa mä papelaruw qillqantani
Numbers5:24 Uka qhipatsti uka k'allk'u uma warmir umantayani
Numbers5:25 warmisti amparapankki uka waxt'a sacerdoter churarakini
Numbers5:26 ukxarusti waña juyranak waxt'at mä jach'i aptasinxa
Numbers5:27 uka warmitix chachapar sallqjchïn ukapachaxa
Numbers5:28 Ukampis uka warmitix jan juchanïkchi ukkhaxa
Numbers5:29 “Aka kamachinakax kunapachatix mä warmix chachanïkasin yaqha chachanakamp sarnaqas sallqjkani ukatakiwa
Numbers5:30 jan ukax
Numbers5:31 Chachax janiw juchañchat uñjaskaniti
Numbers6:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna akham sasa:
Numbers6:2 “Israelitanakar parlam jupanakarusti sarakim: Maynitix chachäpasa
Numbers6:3 janiw kuna vinonaksa
Numbers6:4 Tatitur katuyasiñ arsüwip phuqhasiñapkamasti janiw uva achunakapat kunsa manq'añapäkiti.
Numbers6:5 Janirakiw ñik'utapsa mururaskaniti
Numbers6:6 Taqi uka urunakansti janirakiw kuna jiwatarus jak'achasiñapäkiti
Numbers6:7 jupan awkipasa
Numbers6:8 Arsutapan phuqhasiñapkamasti q'uma sayt'añapawa.
Numbers6:9 “Maynitix akatjamat jupa thiyar jiwani
Numbers6:10 Kimsaqallqür ururusti
Numbers6:11 Ukatsti sacerdotex ukanak luqtani; mayax jucha luratat wilañcha luqtäniwa
Numbers6:12 ukatsti Tatitur katuyasiñatak arsüwi urunakap machaqat jakhuñ qalltani. Nayra pacha katuyasit urunakax janiw jakhutäkxaniti
Numbers6:13 “Tatitur katuyasiñ urunak phuqhasxipansti
Numbers6:14 ukatsti Tatiturux jan kuna kamacht'at mä maran urqu oveja taqpach nakt'ayas luqtani; uka kipkaraki
Numbers6:15 Ukhamarus uka nazireo jaqix qullan utjäwir apañaparakiwa
Numbers6:16 Tatit nayraqatan sacerdotex jucha luratat wilañcha luqtani
Numbers6:17 ukatsti urqu oveja luqtarakini sumankthapiñ wilañcha luqtäwi
Numbers6:18 Uka nazireo jaqisti ñik'utap mururasini Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa mantañana
Numbers6:19 Uka qhipatsti
Numbers6:20 Ukatsti sacerdotew uka uywan jaraphipa
Numbers6:21 “Tatitur katuyasiñatak arsuri nazireo jaqix
Numbers6:22 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa:
Numbers6:23 “Aaronampiru
Numbers6:24 ‘Tatituy jumarux aski waxt'äwip churpan
Numbers6:25 Tatituy kusisiñamp jumar uñtanpan
Numbers6:26 Tatituy jumarux munasiñamp uñtanpan
Numbers6:27 “Ukham jupanakax israelitanak taypin sutix aytapxani
Numbers7:1 Kunürutix Moisesax qullan chiqawja sayt'ayañ tukuykän ukürux
Numbers7:2 Ukatsti ayllunakan jilïrinakapax
Numbers7:3 Tatituruw waxt'a luqtapxäna
Numbers7:4 Ukatsti Tatitux Moisesar akham sarakïna:
Numbers7:5 “Uka carretanakampi
Numbers7:6 Moisesasti carretanakampi
Numbers7:7 Guersón chachan wawanakaparux pä carretampi
Numbers7:8 Merarí chachan wawanakaparusti pusi carretampi
Numbers7:9 Ukampis Quehat chachan wawanakaparux janiw kuna carretanaksa
Numbers7:10 Kunürutix altarax qullanañchatäxän ukürusti
Numbers7:11 Ukat Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Sapaqat ayllut mä jilïrix
Numbers7:12 Nayrïr urux
Numbers7:13 Jupan waxt'apasti akänwa: qullqit lurat mä llataku
Numbers7:14 ukxarusti qurit lurat mä wislla
Numbers7:15 nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtañatakisti
Numbers7:16 jucha luratat wilañcha luqtañatakix
Numbers7:17 sumankañ luqta wilañchatakisti
Numbers7:18 Payïr urusti
Numbers7:19 jupasti Nahasón chachan waxt'ap kipkak pachpa waxt'anak luqtarakïna.
Numbers7:20 
Numbers7:21 
Numbers7:22 
Numbers7:23 
Numbers7:24 Kimsïr urusti

Numbers7:26 
Numbers7:27 
Numbers7:28 
Numbers7:29 
Numbers7:30 Pusïri urusti

Numbers7:32 
Numbers7:33 
Numbers7:34 
Numbers7:35 
Numbers7:36 Phisqïri urusti
Numbers7:37 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtarakïna.
Numbers7:38 
Numbers7:39 
Numbers7:40 
Numbers7:41 
Numbers7:42 Suxtïri urusti
Numbers7:43 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtäna.
Numbers7:44 
Numbers7:45 
Numbers7:46 
Numbers7:47 
Numbers7:48 Paqallqür urusti
Numbers7:49 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtäna.
Numbers7:50

Numbers7:73 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtäna.
