Numbers7:79 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtäna.
Numbers7:80 
Numbers7:81 
Numbers7:82 
Numbers7:83 
Numbers7:84 Ukhamaw kunapachatix altarax katuyatäxän ukkhax
Numbers7:85 Sapa qullqi llatakusti pusi patak kimsa tunkan gramonïnwa
Numbers7:86 Tunka payan quri wisllanakaw incienson phuqt'at utjarakïna
Numbers7:87 Nakt'ayat luqtäwitak uywanakax
Numbers7:88 Sumankxañ wilañcha luqtañataki uywanakax
Numbers7:89 Moisesax Tatitump parlañatak Jikisiñ Carpar mantkän ukapachasti
Numbers8:1 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa:
Numbers8:2 “Aaronamp parlam
Numbers8:3 Aaronasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw phuqhäna
Numbers8:4 Candelerox qurit luratänwa
Numbers8:5 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa:
Numbers8:6 “Israelitanak taypit Leví chachat saraqirinakar yaqhacham
Numbers8:7 Jupanakar q'umachañatakisti
Numbers8:8 Ukatsti mä vaca qallu katusin apapxpan
Numbers8:9 Jumarakiw levitanakar Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar jak'achayäta
Numbers8:10 Ukatsti levitanakar nayan nayraqataxaruw uñstayitäta
Numbers8:11 Aaronasti nayan nayraqataxaruw levitanakar uñstayani israelitanakan waxt'apjama
Numbers8:12 Ukatsti levitanakax vaca qallunakan p'iqipxaruw amparanakapamp luqxatapxani
Numbers8:13 Ukatsti levitanakarux Aaronampina
Numbers8:14 ukham lurasaw levitanakarux mayni israelitanak taypit nayankxañapatak yaqhachäta.
Numbers8:15 Ukatsti jupanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yanapiriw sarapxani. Jupanakarux q'umachata
Numbers8:16 taqi israelitanak taypit jupanakan nayar katuyatäpxatap layku. Nayaw jupanakar taqi israelitanakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakap lanti katuqta
Numbers8:17 israelitanakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakapax nayankituwa
Numbers8:18 Ukat nayax levitanakar jupanak lanti katusta.
Numbers8:19 Nayaw levitanakarux mayni israelitanak taypit ajllista
Numbers8:20 Ukatsti Moisesasa
Numbers8:21 Levitanakax q'umachasipxänwa
Numbers8:22 Taqi ukanak qhipatsti
Numbers8:23 Tatitux Moisesar akham sarakïna:
Numbers8:24 “Levitanakax pä tunka phisqan maranit Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan luräwinakap qalltapxañapa
Numbers8:25 phisqa tunka maranirusti
Numbers8:26 Uka maranak phuqhatatsti
Numbers9:1 Israelitanakan Egipto markat mistunipxatapatsti
Numbers9:2 “Israelitanakax Pascua uruyañxa
Numbers9:3 nayrïr phaxsina
Numbers9:4 Ukat Moisesax israelitanakar Pascua uruyapxañapatak säna
Numbers9:5 jupanakasti uka phaxsina
Numbers9:6 Ukampisa
Numbers9:7 Moisesarusti akham sapxäna: —Nanakax mä jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'apxta
Numbers9:8 Moisesasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Suyt'apxita
Numbers9:9 Tatitusti Moisesar akham sarakïna: “Israelitanakar akham säta:
Numbers9:10 Taqi jumanakawa
Numbers9:11 ukanakasti
Numbers9:12 janiw qhipärmanthitak kunas jilt'ayatäñapäkiti
Numbers9:13 Ukampis khititix q'uma jikxataskasina
Numbers9:14 “Jumanak taypin jakasir jaya markat jutir jaqinakax
Numbers9:15 Kunürutix Arust'äwi Carpa sayt'ayapkän uküruxa
Numbers9:16 Ukhamaw sapa kuti lurasïna: Urux qinayaw carpar imxattäna
Numbers9:17 Qinayax carpa patxat unxtkän ukkhasti
Numbers9:18 Tatitun aruparjamaw israelitanakax sarxarupxäna
Numbers9:19 Qinayatix walja urunak Arust'äwi Carpa patxan qhiparkän ukkhaxa
Numbers9:20 Qinayatix mä qawqha urunakak Arust'äwi Carpa patxan qhiparkän ukkhaxa
Numbers9:21 Yaqhip urun qinayax arumakiw qhiparäna
Numbers9:22 Qinayatix Arust'äwi Carpa patxan pä uru
Numbers9:23 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers10:1 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa:
Numbers10:2 “Qullqit pä trompetanak luram
Numbers10:3 Paypach trompeta phust'askan ukapachasti
Numbers10:4 Ukampis mä sapa trompetak phust'askani ukapachax
Numbers10:5 Trompetanak phust'atxaru
Numbers10:6 payïr phust'atxarusti
Numbers10:7 Jaqinakan tantachasiñapatakisti
Numbers10:8 Aarón chachat saraqir sacerdotenakakiw trompetanak phust'apxani. Aka kamachinakax jumanakatak wiñayatakïniwa.
Numbers10:9 “Nuwasïwi utjipantix
Numbers10:10 Kusisiñ urunakansa trompetanak phust'apxarakïta
Numbers10:11 Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa patxankkän uka qinayanakax
Numbers10:12 Ukürusti
Numbers10:13 
Numbers10:14 Nayraqat sarantirinakax Judá ayllun wiphalapanïkän uka ejercitow sarantäna
Numbers10:15 Isacar ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Natanael sat Suar chachan yuqapaw sarantäna
Numbers10:16 Zabulón ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Eliab sat Helón chachan yuqapaw sarantäna.
Numbers10:17 Ukapachasti
Numbers10:18 Ukxarusti Rubén ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow sarantäna; jilïr irpiripax Elisur chachänwa
Numbers10:19 Simeón ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Selumiel jilïr irpiripaw sarantäna
Numbers10:20 Gad ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti
Numbers10:21 Ukxarusti Quehat chachan saraqirinakapaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yänak apt'asit sarantapxäna. Utjnuqäwir puripxän ukkhasti
Numbers10:22 Ukxarusti Efraín ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow sarantäna
Numbers10:23 Manasés ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Gamaliel sat Pedasur chachan yuqapaw sarantäna.
Numbers10:24 Benjamín ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Abidán sat Guidoní chachan yuqapaw sarantäna.
Numbers10:25 Tukuyarusti
Numbers10:26 Aser ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Paguiel sat Ocrán chachan yuqapaw sarantäna.
Numbers10:27 Neftalí ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Ahirá sat Enán chachan yuqapaw sarantarakïna.
Numbers10:28 Ukhamaw israelitanakan ejercitonakapax thakhinjam tam tama sarantapxäna.
Numbers10:29 Mä urusti
Numbers10:30 Ukampis Hobab chachax jupar sänwa: —Janiw sarkiristti
Numbers10:31 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: —Jan jaytanukupxistati
Numbers10:32 Nanakamp chikatix sarätaxa
Numbers10:33 Ukhamaw jupanakax Tatitun qullupat sartawayxapxäna
Numbers10:34 Sarxarupkän ukapachasti
Numbers10:35 Arca apxarupkän ukkhasti
Numbers10:36 Arcax sayt'kän ukkhasti
Numbers11:1 Mä urusti
Numbers11:2 Jaqinakax jach'at wararisaw Moisesar yanap mayipxäna
Numbers11:3 Ukat uka chiqarux Taberá sas sutichapxäna
Numbers11:4 Israelitanak taypin yaqha markankir jaqinakaw utjatayna
Numbers11:5 ¡Egipto uraqin chawlla inak manq'atasasti kawkinkaraki! Ukatsti
Numbers11:6 Jichhasti manq'atjamaw jiwarasktan
Numbers11:7 Maná manq'asti cilantro quqan jathapar uñtatänwa; samipasti niyas q'illur uñtatarakïnwa
Numbers11:8 mallt'atasti aceitemp chaputa jak'ut lurat t'ant'jamänwa. Jaqinakax ukanak apthapiriw mistüna
Numbers11:9 Arumthapirusti
Numbers11:10 Moisesax israelitanakampi wila masinakapampi chhujlla mantañanakapan jachasipkatap ist'äna. Tatitusti wali q'apisitapunïnwa. Moisesax mayjt'asirakïnwa
Numbers11:11 ukat Tatitur akham jiskt'äna: —Nayax juman luqtirimätwa. ¿Kunatarak ukham jan wal luristasti? ¿Kunarak juchäxi nayan aka markamp akataq ch'am tukuñaxatakisti?
Numbers11:12 ¿Nayasti jupanakan awkipätti
Numbers11:13 Jupanakax jacht'asisaw nayan ukar jutapxitu: ‘Aycha manq'añatak churapxita’ sasa. ¿Kawkitarak akataq jaqinakar manq'ayañatak aycha apsüsti?
Numbers11:14 Janiw naya sapaki taqi aka jaqinakar irpirjamäkti; nayatakix wali ch'am tukuñawa.
Numbers11:15 Jumatix nayar ukham luraskakitätaxa
Numbers11:16 Tatitusti Moisesar sänwa: —Israelitanak taypit paqallq tunka jilïr chachanak tantacham
Numbers11:17 Nayax saraqanisin jumar parläma
Numbers11:18 Ukatsti jaqinakarux arumanthitak q'umachasir khitham
Numbers11:19 janiw mä urukiti
Numbers11:20 jan ukasti phaxspachaw aycha manq'apxani
Numbers11:21 Moisesasti sänwa: —Tatay
Numbers11:22 Nanakax apasinipkta uka vacanakampi
Numbers11:23 Ukampis Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: —¿Janis nayax ch'amanïkirista ukhamti amuyista? Jichhaw uñjäta
Numbers11:24 Ukatsti Moisesax kuntix Tatitux jupar siskatayna ukanak markar yatiyir saräna
Numbers11:25 Ukapachasti Tatitux qinayanjam saraqanisinxa
Numbers11:26 Uka paqallq tunk ajllitanak taypin pä chachaw utjäna
Numbers11:27 Ukapachaw mä waynax jalasin Moisesar yatiyäna
Numbers11:28 Ukat Josué sat Nun chachan yuqapa
Numbers11:29 Moisesasti jupar sänwa: —¿Kunatarak jumasti naya sapan parlañaxak muntasti? ¡Nayax Tatitun taqpach markapar ajayup churañapa
Numbers11:30 Uka qhipatsti
Numbers11:31 Tatitux jach'a quta tuqit wali ch'aman thaya thayt'ayanïna. Uka thayasti walja khullunak apanïna
Numbers11:32 Jaqinakasti uka uru
Numbers11:33 Ukampis israelitanakax khullun aychap manq'antapkän ukapachaw Tatitux jupanakatak q'apisïna
Numbers11:34 Ukat uka chiqawjarux Quibrot-hataavá sas sutichapxäna
Numbers11:35 Markasti Quibrot-hataavá chiqat sartasin
Numbers12:1 Mariampi
Numbers12:2 Ukhamarus sapxänwa: “Tatitux janiw Moisesampik parlkiti; jiwasampix parlarakiwa” sasa. Tatitusti uka parlatanakap ist'änwa.
Numbers12:3 Chiqpachansa
Numbers12:4 Ukat Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers12:5 Ukapachaw Tatitux qinay taypinjam saraqanïna
Numbers12:6 Tatitux jupanakaruw säna: “Ist'apxam kuntix sapkäm uka arunaka: Jumanak taypin mä profetax nayan arunakax yatiyir utjki ukapachax
Numbers12:7 ukampis Moisés luqtirixampix janiw ukham lurkti. Jupax taqpach luqtirinakaxat sipan aski jaqipuniwa
Numbers12:8 jupampisti ajanuy ajanuw parlta
Numbers12:9 Diosasti jupanakatak walpun q'apisïna
Numbers12:10 Qinayax qullan utjäwit jithiqtawayxän ukapachasti
Numbers12:11 Moisesarux sänwa: —Tata
Numbers12:12 Marian janchipax q'ala tukjatawa
Numbers12:13 Moisesasti Tatituruw achikt'asïna
Numbers12:14 Tatit Diosasti ukxarux sänwa: “Awkipatix ajanut thuskataspa ukkhax
Numbers12:15 Ukhamaw Mariax paqallq uru campamentot jaqunukut uñjasïna. Ukchañkamasti
Numbers12:16 Mariax jupanakamp chikäxän ukapachaw
Numbers13:1 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa:
Numbers13:2 “Mä qawqha jaqinak Canaán uraqir khitham
Numbers13:3 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Parán wasarat jupanakar khithäna. Uka jaqinakasti israelitanak taypin jilïr chachanakkamakïnwa.
Numbers13:4 Khithat jilïrinakasti akanakänwa: Rubén ayllutxa
Numbers13:5 Simeón ayllutxa
Numbers13:6 Judá ayllutxa
Numbers13:7 Isacar ayllutxa
Numbers13:8 Efraín ayllutxa
Numbers13:9 Benjamín ayllutxa
Numbers13:10 Zabulón ayllutxa
Numbers13:11 Manasés ayllutxa
Numbers13:12 Dan ayllutxa
Numbers13:13 Aser ayllutxa
Numbers13:14 Neftalí ayllutxa
Numbers13:15 Gad ayllutxa
Numbers13:16 Ukanakaw Moisesan khithat jilïr jaqinakan sutinakapaxa
Numbers13:17 Moisesax Canaán uraqir jupanak khitkän ukapachasti
Numbers13:18 Uka markax kunjämätaynas uk sum uñjanipxäta
Numbers13:19 Markanakapax chhujllanakat luratakiti
Numbers13:20 uraqix suma achur uraqiti
Numbers13:21 Uka chachanakasti sarasin uka uraq uñakipapxäna
Numbers13:22 Négueb wasaranjam mantasin Hebrón chiqakamaw puripxäna. Hebrón markax Soan sat egipcio marka utt'ayaskän ukat paqallq mara nayraw utt'ayasitayna. Uka markan Ahimán
Numbers13:23 Ukatsti mä jisk'a jawiraruw puripxäna; ukawjan jupanakax uva wayun alip khuchhuqapxäna
Numbers13:24 Uka jisk'a jawirarusti Escol sutimpiw sutichapxäna
Numbers13:25 Ukxarusti
Numbers13:26 Parán wasaran Cadés sat chiqaruw kuttanxapxäna. Ukan Moisesampi
Numbers13:27 Moisesarusti sapxänwa: —Khithapkista uka uraqiruw nanakax sarapxta. Chiqpachapuniw uka uraqin lechesa
Numbers13:28 Ukampis ukan jakir jaqinakax wali ch'amaninakawa
Numbers13:29 Négueb wasar tuqinxa amalecita jaqinakaw jakapxi
Numbers13:30 Jaqinakax Moisesatakiw arusipxäna
Numbers13:31 Ukampis jupamp chik saririnakax sapxänwa: —¡Janiw uka jaqinakampix nuwasksnati! Jupanakax jiwasat sipan juk'amp ch'amaniwa —sasa.
Numbers13:32 Ukatsti israelitanakarux uñaqanipkatayna uka uraqin jan walïtap sapxäna: —Uñakipir sarapkta uka uraqix
Numbers13:33 Jach'a tansa jaqinak uñjanipxarakta
Numbers14:1 Ukatsti israelitanakax warariñ qalltapxäna
Numbers14:2 Jupanakax taqpachaniw Moisesampitaki
Numbers14:3 ¿Kunatakirak Tatitusti aka uraqir irpanpachïstusti? ¿Jiwasan nuwasïwin jiwarañasataki
Numbers14:4 Ukatsti maynit maynikamaw parlarasipxäna: “Egiptor kuttxañatakix mä jilïr utt'ayasiñäni” sasa.
Numbers14:5 Ukapachasti Moisesampi
Numbers14:6 ukatsti Josué chachampi
Numbers14:7 jupanakasti israelitanakarux akham sapxarakïnwa: —¡Nanakax uñakipir sarapkta uka uraqix
Numbers14:8 Tatitutix khuyapayasistanixa
Numbers14:9 Janiy Tatitur qallasipxamti
Numbers14:10 Ukhamäkipansa
Numbers14:11 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa: —¿Kunapachkamarak aka markasti nayar jisk'achaskakitanisti? ¿Kunapachkamarak nayat pächasisipkakini
Numbers14:12 Nayaw jupanakar jiwarayir usu apayanï
Numbers14:13 Ukampis Moisesax Tatitur sänwa: —Jumaw aka markarux jach'a ch'amamampi Egipto markat irpsuntaxa. Kunapachatix egipcionakax kuntix lurkäta uk yatipxani ukkhasti
Numbers14:14 Canaán uraqinkir jaqinakaruw yatiyapxani. Jupanakax ist'apxarakiw juma
Numbers14:15 Jumatix aka markar may jawq'antasin jiwayäta ukkhax
Numbers14:16 “Diosasti kawkïri uraqtix churä siskatayna uka markarux janiw irpantkiti
Numbers14:17 Ukat jichhax Tatay
Numbers14:18 “Janiw jank'ak phiñasirïkti
Numbers14:19 Tatay
Numbers14:20 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: —Walikiwa
Numbers14:21 Ukampis naya layku
Numbers14:22 khitinakatix jach'a kankañax uñjkasinsa
Numbers14:23 janipuniw jupanakat maynis arsut uraqi uñjkaniti
Numbers14:24 Caleb luqtirixakiw jan mayninakjamäkiti
Numbers14:25 Amalecitanakampi
Numbers14:26 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Numbers14:27 —¿Kunapachkamarak aka ñanqhar jichuntat israelitanakan parlatanakap isch'ukïsti? Niyaw ist'ta nayxat jan wali parlatanakapa.
Numbers14:28 Niyakixay ‘mutuyapxituw’ sasa sarnaqapxchixa
Numbers14:29 Jaqinak jakthapïwin pä tunka maranit amstar qillqantatäpki jupanakata
Numbers14:30 Jumanakat janiw maynis jumanakar churañatak arskta uka uraqir mantkaniti
Numbers14:31 Ukatsipana
Numbers14:32 Jumanakan amayanakamasti
Numbers14:33 wawanakamasti pusi tunka maraw aka wasaran ovejanak awatis sarnaqapxani. Ukhamat jupanakax jumanakan jan iyawsatanakam phuqhapxani
Numbers14:34 Jumanakax pusi tunka uruw uraqinak uñakipasax sarnaqanipxtaxa; ukhamarakiw jichhax pusi tunka mara mutuyäwi phuqhapxäta
Numbers14:35 Naya
Numbers14:36 Moisesax uraq uñakipir khitkatayna uka chachanakax
Numbers14:37 
Numbers14:38 Uraqi uñakipir khithat taqpachani chachanakatxa
Numbers14:39 Moisesax kuntix Tatitux israelitanakar siskatayna taqi ukanak yatiykän ukapachasti
Numbers14:40 Qhipärmanthisti willjtat sartasin
Numbers14:41 Ukampis Moisesax jupanakar sänwa: —¿Kunatarak Tatitun arunakapar jan jaysapxtasti? ¡Uka amtäwix inaruw tukuni!
Numbers14:42 Jan sarasipkakimti
Numbers14:43 Jumanakax Tatitut saraqtapxtaxa
Numbers14:44 Ukham siskatpachasa
Numbers14:45 Ukapachaw uka chiqan jakir amalecita jaqinakampi
Numbers15:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parlän akham sasa:
Numbers15:2 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Nayax jumanakan jakapxañamatak churapkäma uka uraqir mantapkäta
Numbers15:3 ukatsti nayar jach'añchas mä urqu vaca
Numbers15:4 khititix waxt'a churkani ukax
Numbers15:5 Uka wilañchanakarusti mä litro vino waxt'ampi yapt'añapa
Numbers15:6 Wilañchatix mä urqu ovejächi ukax
Numbers15:7 mä litrot jilpacha vinompi
Numbers15:8 Wilañchatix mä vaca qallüchi
Numbers15:9 suxta kilo suma jak'ump yapt'ani
Numbers15:10 pä litro vinompi
Numbers15:11 Ukham lurani
Numbers15:12 Sapaqat uywa luqtaskan ukatxa
Numbers15:13 Taqi israelitanakaw aka kamachinakarjam phuqhañapa
Numbers15:14 “Yaqha markat jutir jaqitix jumanak taypin jakaspa
Numbers15:15 Uka pachpa kamachinakaw jumanakatakisa
Numbers15:16 Mä pachpa kamachikiw utji
Numbers15:17 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa:
Numbers15:18 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Nayax irpapkäm uka uraqir puripkäta
Numbers15:19 ukatsti ukan achur trigo apthapisin manq'añ qalltapkät ukapachasti
Numbers15:20 Kunjämatix nayrïr jawq'at trigot mä juk'a luqtapkistaxa
Numbers15:21 Uka waxt'a lurapxapunïtawa.
Numbers15:22 “Jumanakatix jan amuyasis nayrïr urutpach Moisesar arsut arunakarjam jan phuqhapkätaxa
Numbers15:23 
Numbers15:24 “Markpachatix jan amuyasis pantjasinixa
Numbers15:25 Ukatsti sacerdotew Israel markpachatak luqta katuyani
Numbers15:26 Nayaw taqpach Israel markaru
Numbers15:27 “Mä sapa jaqitix jan amuyasis jucha lurkani ukapachasti
Numbers15:28 Ukatsti sacerdotew nayan nayraqataxan uka jaqitak luqtäwi katuyani
Numbers15:29 Mä pachpa kamachikiw utji
Numbers15:30 “Ukampis mä jaqitix sum yatkasin juch lurani
Numbers15:31 nayan arunakax jisk'achatap layku
Numbers15:32 Israelitanakax wasaran jikxatasipkän ukapachax
Numbers15:33 Ukat uka jaqir Moisesampina
Numbers15:34 Jupanakasti uka jaqir katuntasin jak'atak uñch'ukipxäna
Numbers15:35 Ukapachaw Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Uka jaqix jiwañapawa. Taqpach marka jupar qalamp k'upjapxpan campamentot anqäxana” sasa.
Numbers15:36 Israelitanakasti uka jaqir campamentot anqäxar irpsusinxa
Numbers15:37 Uka qhipatsti
Numbers15:38 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Jumanakampi
Numbers15:39 Uka t'ikhachatanak uñjasin jumanakax nayan churat taqpach kamachi arunakat amtasipxäta
Numbers15:40 Ukhamat jumanakax taqi kamachinakaxat amtasipxäta
Numbers15:41 Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa
Numbers16:1 Mä levita chachaw utjäna Quehat chachan saraqiripata
Numbers16:2 Uka chachanakasti Moisesatakiw sayt'asipxäna
Numbers16:3 Taqpachaniw jupanakax tantachasisin Moisesampiru
Numbers16:4 Moisesasti uk ist'asinxa uraqir ajanup puriyañkamaw alt'äna
Numbers16:5 ukatsti Coré jaqimpiru
Numbers16:6 Akham lurapxam: Coré chachampina
Numbers16:7 ukarusti nina sank'anak uchapxam
Numbers16:8 Ukatsti Moisesax Coré chacharuw säna: —Levita jaqinaka
Numbers16:9 ¿Amuyatanakamat juk'akiti Diosan jumanakar israelitanak taypit Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan jupar luqtapxañamatak ajllitapasti?
Numbers16:10 Tatitux jupa jak'ankapxañamatakiw jumanakar ajllisipxtam. Jichhasti
Numbers16:11 Chiqpachansa janiw jumanakax Aaronatak arusipktati
Numbers16:12 Ukatsti Moisesax Datán
Numbers16:13 ¿Amuyatamatsti juk'akiti kawkha uraqintix lechesa
Numbers16:14 Janiw jumax lechempi
Numbers16:15 Moisesasti wali q'apisitaw Tatitur säna: —¡Jupanakan waxt'anakap jan katuqamti! Janiw nayax jupanakan mä asnopaksa mayirïkti
Numbers16:16 Ukatsti Moisesax Coré chacharuw säna: —Jumampi
Numbers16:17 Sapa mayni incienso q'aphichañap apaspan
Numbers16:18 Qhipärmanthisti
Numbers16:19 Coré chachasti niyaw Jikisiñ Carpa uñkatasin taqpach jaqinakapar tantachatayna
Numbers16:20 ukatsti Moisesampiru
Numbers16:21 —¡Aka jaqinakat jithiqtapxam
Numbers16:22 Moisesampi
Numbers16:23 Tatitusti Moisesarux akham sarakïna:
Numbers16:24 —Taqpach israelitanakar sanim
Numbers16:25 Moisesasti sayt'asisin Datán
Numbers16:26 Ukapachaw markar säna: —Uka ñanqha jaqinakan chhujllanakapat jithiqtapxam
Numbers16:27 Ukatsti taqpach jaqiw Coré
Numbers16:28 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: —Tatituw taqi akanak lurañaxatak nayar khithanitu
Numbers16:29 Aka jaqinakatix mayni jaqinakjam jiwañap jiwaskani ukaxa
Numbers16:30 ukampis Tatitutix mä jach'a muspharkañ lurani
Numbers16:31 Moisesax parlañ tukuyxän ukapachaw uraqix jist'artäna
Numbers16:32 ukatsti Coré chachar jaqkattapkatayna taqi uka chachanakaruw manq'antäna
Numbers16:33 Jupanakax jakaskirpachaw manqha pachar jalantapxäna
Numbers16:34 Uka jaqinakar wararir ist'asasti
Numbers16:35 Ukxarusti
Numbers16:36 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa:
Numbers16:37 “Aarón chachan Eleazar yuqapar khitham
Numbers16:38 Jucha luratapat uka jaqinakax jiwaraski
Numbers16:39 Ukatsti Eleazar sacerdotex uka jaqinakan broncet lurat incienso q'aphichañanakap apthapisin altarar muyuntayañatakiw sillp'ar tukuyayxäna.
Numbers16:40 Ukasti israelitanakan amtasiñapatakïnwa
Numbers16:41 Qhipärmanthisti Israel markpachaw Moisesampitaki
Numbers16:42 Taqpachaniw Moisesampiru
Numbers16:43 Ukhamasti Moisesampi
Numbers16:44 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa:
Numbers16:45 —Uka jaqinakat jithiqtapxam

Numbers17:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna
Numbers17:2 “Taqpach israelitanakar parlam

Numbers18:1 Tatitux Aaronaruw säna: “Kunapachatix israelitanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar ñanqhachañatak kuna juchsa lurapkani ukkhaxa
Numbers18:2 Ukampis Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurañanakanxa
Numbers18:3 Jupanakax juman yanapirinakamäniwa
Numbers18:4 Jupanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa luräwinakan
Numbers18:5 jumanakaw qullan utjäwimpina
Numbers18:6 Nayaw levita jilanakamarux israelitanak taypit yaqhachta
Numbers18:7 ukampis jumampi
Numbers18:8 Tatitusti Aaronarux sänwa: “Nayar luqtat waxt'anak uñjañamatakiw katuysma. Israelitanakax qullan waxt'anak churapkitu ukanaksti
Numbers18:9 Nakt'at wilañchanakatxa
Numbers18:10 Jumanak taypin utjir chachanakax aka waxt'anakat manq'asipkaspawa
Numbers18:11 “Ukatsti

Numbers18:13 Taqi kuntix uraqix achuyki
Numbers18:14 Kuna waxt'anaktix israelitanakax nayar luqtapkitan ukanakax jumatakïniwa.
Numbers18:15 “Taqi israelitanakan jilïr wawanakapampi
Numbers18:16 Uka kutsuyasiñasti wawax mä phaxsinïxani ukapachaw alapax churatäxañapa

Numbers18:18 Uka uywanakan aychapasa
Numbers18:19 Israelitanakax nayatak yaqhachapkani taqi uka churäwinaksti

Numbers18:21 Leví chachat saraqirinakarux
Numbers18:22 Mayni israelitanakax janiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar jak'achasipxañapäkiti
Numbers18:23 Levitanakakiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan luräwinakap phuqhapxani
Numbers18:24 Jupanakarux kuntix israelitanakax achunakapat sapa tunkat maya churapkitani ukanakxa

Numbers18:26 “Levitanakarux akham sätawa: Israelitanakan achunakapata
Numbers18:27 Ukaw jupanakan waxt'apäni

Numbers18:29 Taqi kunanaktix katuqapkan ukanakatxa

Numbers18:31 ukanaksti kawkhantix munapkani ukawjan wila masinakapamp chik manq'asipkani. Churäwipax ukäniwa
Numbers18:32 Nayatak sumäki uk yaqhachxasinsti
Numbers19:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers19:2 “Naya Tatituw akanak arsta: Israelitanakar parlam mä wila vaca juman ukar irpanipxpan
Numbers19:3 Jumanakax Eleazar sacerdoteruw uka vaca churapxäta
Numbers19:4 Eleazar sacerdotex luk'anapar mä juk'a wilar aytasin
Numbers19:5 Ukatsti uka vacxa jupan uñjkataw taqpach nakhantayapxani
Numbers19:6 Ukxarusti sacerdotex cedro lawampi
Numbers19:7 ukatsti sacerdotex isip t'axsusxani
Numbers19:8 Vaca nakhantayki uka jaqisti
Numbers19:9 Uka qhipatsti
Numbers19:10 Qhillanak apthapir jaqisti isip t'axsusxani
Numbers19:11 “Maynitix jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'anixa
Numbers19:12 Ukat kimsa ururu
Numbers19:13 Maynitix jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'asin jan q'umachaskanixa
Numbers19:14 “Kamachix akawa: Maynitix carpan jiwanixa
Numbers19:15 Uka carpan utjir jan qhuphintat phukhunakasa
Numbers19:16 “Maynitix mä pampan espadampi jiwayat jaqin amayap llamkt'ani
Numbers19:17 “Ukham q'añut uñt'at jaqir q'umachañatakix
Numbers19:18 Ukatsti mayni q'umat uñt'at jaqiw hisopo laymi aptasin umar juricht'ani
Numbers19:19 Q'umat uñt'at jaqix kimsïr uruna
Numbers19:20 Q'añuchat jaqitix jan q'umachaskanixa
Numbers19:21 Uka kamachisti wiñayatakïniwa. Q'umachasir umampi yaqha jaqir ch'allakipirixa
Numbers19:22 Taqi kunarutix q'añuchat jaqix llamkt'kan ukasti
Numbers20:1 Israelitanakax marat nayrïr phaxsi saraqataruw Sin sat wasarar puripxäna; ukatsti Cadés chiqan mä qawqha pacha qamarapxäna. Ukan Mariax jiwxäna
Numbers20:2 Uka chiqansti janiw jaqinakatak umax utjkänti
Numbers20:3 ukatsti Moisesaruw sapxäna: —¡Tatitux mayni israelitanakar jiwarayki ukanakamp chik jiwarapxiriskäyäta!
Numbers20:4 ¿Kunatakirak aka wasarar Tatitun markapar irpanipxtasti? ¿Nanakampi uywanakaxampi jiwarañapti munapxtasti?
Numbers20:5 ¿Kunatakis Egiptot irpsunipxista aka axsarkañ wasarar puriyaniñkamasti? Akan janiw kunas yapuchañjamäkiti; janiw higo quqanakasa
Numbers20:6 Moisesampi Aaronampisti jaqinakat jithiqtawayxapxänwa
Numbers20:7 Tatitux Moisesar akham säna:
Numbers20:8 —Thujrum ayxarum
Numbers20:9 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw luräna
Numbers20:10 ukxarusti Moisesampi Aaronampix taqpach jaqinakaruw qarqa nayräxar tantachthapipxäna
Numbers20:11 Uka arunak arsusasti
Numbers20:12 Ukampis Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers20:13 Ukasti Meribá chiqan lurasïna
Numbers20:14 Moisesax Cadés chiqatpach jaqinakar khithäna Edom markan reyipar akham sañapataki: “Israelit jilanakamax akham siriw khithanipxitu: ‘Jumax sum yatta nanakan wali ch'ama tukutanakaxa.
Numbers20:15 Nanakan nayra awkinakaxax Egiptoruw jakir sarxapxäna
Numbers20:16 ukat nanakax Tatitur yanap mayisipxta
Numbers20:17 Jichhasti uraqim chiqay sarakipt'ayapxita
Numbers20:18 Ukampis Edom markankir reyix sänwa: —¡Janiw uraqixanjam sarakipapkasmati
Numbers20:19 Israelitanakasti ukxaruw sapxäna: —Thakhim chiqak sarakipt'ayapxita
Numbers20:20 Ukampis Edom markankir reyix saskakïnwa: —¡Janiw uraqixanjam sarakipapkasmati! —sasa. Ukatsti reyix wali wakichrantat ejercitompiw mistsuwayäna
Numbers20:21 uraqipanjam jan sarakipayañataki. Israel markasti jan kamacht'irjamäsax
Numbers20:22 Israelitanakax Cadés chiqat sartawayasax
Numbers20:23 Edom uraqimpi qurpaski uka chiqan Tatitux Moisesampiru
Numbers20:24 —“Aaronax jiwxaniwa
Numbers20:25 Jumasti Moisés
Numbers20:26 Aaronax ukan jiwxani. Jiwxipansti
Numbers20:27 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw luräna. Taqpach israelitanakan uñjkataw Hor sat qullur makhatapxäna.
Numbers20:28 Aaronax jiwxän ukkhasti
Numbers20:29 Israelitanakasti Aaronan jiwatap yatisinxa

Numbers21:3 Tatitusti kuntix israelitanakax mayipkatayna ukarux ist'änwa
Numbers21:4 Israelitanakax Hor sat qullut mistuwayasax
Numbers21:5 ukat jupanakax Tatitutak arusiñ qalltapxäna
Numbers21:6 Ukat Tatitux mich'isir katarinak apayanïna
Numbers21:7 Ukat jaqinakax Moisesan ukar sarasin jupar sapxäna: —¡Tatitumpitaki jumampitak arusisax jucha lurapxta! ¡Jumay Tatitur mayim aka katarinak apanukuñapataki! —sasa. Moisesasti israelitanakar juchapat pampachañapatakiw Tatitur mayïna
Numbers21:8 Tatitusti jupar sänwa: —Uka katarinak kipka mä katari lurasim
Numbers21:9 Ukatsti Moisesax broncet mä katari luräna
Numbers21:10 Israelitanakax thakhinjam sarasipkakïnwa
Numbers21:11 Obot chiqat sartawayasinxa
Numbers21:12 Uka chiqat sartawayasinsti
Numbers21:13 Uka chiqat sartawayasin Arnón jawir khurkataruw utjnuqtapxarakïna. Uka jawirax

Numbers21:15 Ar sat uraqir purki uka jisk'a jawiranak muytawayapxta
Numbers21:16 Arnón jawiratsti
Numbers21:17 Ukürun israelitanakax akham jayllipxäna: “¡Phuch'ut umax jalspan! ¡Phuch'ur jayllipxam!
Numbers21:18 ¡Jilïrinakan allit phuch'u
Numbers21:19 Mataná chiqatxa
Numbers21:20 Bamot chiqatsti
Numbers21:21 Israelitanakax jaqinak khithäna amorreonakan Sehón reyipar akham sañapataki:
Numbers21:22 “Uraqim chiqa sarakipt'ayapxita. Janiw yapuchat yapunakamar mantapkäti
Numbers21:23 Ukampis Sehón reyix janiw israelitanakarux uraqipanjam sarakipayañ munkänti
Numbers21:24 Ukampis israelitanakax sayt'asipxänwa
Numbers21:25 Ukhamaw israelitanakax amorreonakan taqi uka markanakap katuntasipxäna
Numbers21:26 Amorreonakan Sihón sat reyipax Hesbón markan jakäna. Sihón reyix Moab uraqinkir nayrïr reyipampix nuwasiñankataynawa; ukatsti taqpach uka uraqi aparatayna
Numbers21:27 Ukat jayllirinakax sapxi: “¡Hesbón markar jutapxam
Numbers21:28 Hesbón markatpacha
Numbers21:29 ¡Moab marka
Numbers21:30 Hesbón markan ch'amapax t'unjatawa; Dibón uraqit Nófah uraqkamax laqayar tukutawa
Numbers21:31 Ukhamat israelitanakax amorreonakan uraqinakap katuntasipxäna.
Numbers21:32 Moisesax Jazer marka uñaqayir khitharakïnwa. Israelitanakasti uka marka katuntasipxäna
Numbers21:33 Uka qhipatsti Basán uraqiruw sarxapxäna

Numbers21:35 Israelitanakax ukham Og reyimpiru
Numbers22:1 Israelitanakax thakhinjam sarasipkakïnwa

Numbers22:3 Israelitanakan waljanïpxatap uñjasax
Numbers22:4 Ukat Moab markankir jaqinakax
Numbers22:5 Ukapachasti
Numbers22:6 Jichhpachay jutam
Numbers22:7 Ukatsti Moab

Numbers22:9 Uka arumasti Tatitux Balaam chachar uñstasin
Numbers22:10 Balaamasti sänwa: —Moab markat jutapxi; Balac reyin khithanakapawa.
Numbers22:11 Reyiw jupanakarux akar khithanitayna

Numbers22:13 Qhipärmanthisti Balaamax sartasisin
Numbers22:14 Moab uraqit jutir jilïrinakasti Balac reyin ukaruw kuttawayxapxäna

Numbers22:18 Ukampis
Numbers22:19 Ukampis jumanakax akan jichhärmax qhiparapxam
Numbers22:20 Uka arumasti
Numbers22:21 Qhipürusti
Numbers22:22 Balaamax qachu asnopar lat'xatataw saräna
Numbers22:23 Qachu asnosti Tatitun angelapar espadas ayt'asit chika thakhin sayt'at uñjasaxa
Numbers22:24 Ukxarusti Tatitun angelapax mä k'ullk'u chiqaruw sayt'asïna
Numbers22:25 Asnox Tatitun angelapar uñjasax
Numbers22:26 Ukatsti Tatitun angelapax jupanakat nayrst'asinxa
Numbers22:27 Qachu asnosti Tatitun angelapar uñjasax
Numbers22:28 Ukapachaw Tatitux qachu asnor parlayäna
Numbers22:29 Balaamasti sänwa: —Jumax nayat phiskasiskistaxa
Numbers22:30 Ukampis asnox sänwa: —¡Taqi jakäwiman nayax jumar khumunaqsma
Numbers22:31 Ukapachaw Tatitux Balaaman nayrap jist'ari
Numbers22:32 Tatitun angelapasti juparux sänwa: —¿Kunatarak qachu asnomar kimsa kuti jawq'jtasti? Nayaw jumar thakhit jark'antsma
Numbers22:33 Asnox nayar uñjituwa
Numbers22:34 Balaamasti Tatitun angelaparux sänwa: —Nayax juch lurta
Numbers22:35 Tatitun angelapasti sänwa: —Uka jaqinakamp chik saraskakim
Numbers22:36 Balac reyisti Balaaman jutaskatap yatisinxa
Numbers22:37 Balac reyisti Balaamarux sänwa: —Nayax walja kutiw jutañamatak jawsaysma; ¿kunatarak jan juttasti? ¿Janit nayasti jumar wali yäqañampi uñjkirismasti? —sasa.
Numbers22:38 Balaamasti sarakïnwa: —Akaxay
Numbers22:39 Ukatsti Balaamax Quiriat-husot tuqiruw Balac reyimp chik saräna.
Numbers22:40 Ukansti Balac reyix urqu vacanakampi
Numbers22:41 Qhipärmanthisti
Numbers23:1 Ukapachaw Balaamax Balac reyir säna: —Aka chiqar paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayarapita
Numbers23:2 Balac reyisti Balaaman aruparjamaw luräna
Numbers23:3 Ukxarusti Balaamax Balac reyir sänwa: —Jumax wilañcha luqtat jak'an qhiparam. Nayasti Tatitun jutañap suyañaxawa
Numbers23:4 Jupan uka chiqankañapkamasti
Numbers23:5 Tatitusti uka pachax
Numbers23:6 Balaamasti kutt'xasina
Numbers23:7 Ukapachaw Balaamax aka arunak arsüna: “Inti jalsu tuqi qullunakata
Numbers23:8 ¿Kamisarak nayasti
Numbers23:9 Aka jach'a qarqanak patat uñjta
Numbers23:10 Jupanakax laq'ar uñtatawa; ¿khitirak jupanakar jakt'aspasti? ¿Khitirak qawqhätapsa yatirakispasti? ¡Nayax uka aski jaqinakjam jiwañ munirista
Numbers23:11 Uk ist'asasti
Numbers23:12 Balaamasti sänwa: —Tatitux nayan arsuñax munki uka arunakak saskta —sasa.
Numbers23:13 Ukampis Balac reyix saskakïnwa: —Jutam
Numbers23:14 Ukatsti Balac reyix Sofim chiqaruw Balaamar irpäna
Numbers23:15 Ukatsti Balaamax Balac reyir sänwa: —Jumax akan suyt'ita
Numbers23:16 Tatitusti Balaamar uñstasin
Numbers23:17 Balaamasti kutt'xasina
Numbers23:18 Balaamasti aka arunak arsüna: “Balac
Numbers23:19 Tatitux janiw jiwir jaqinakjamäkiti: janiw k'ariskiti
Numbers23:20 Tatituw markapatak aski arunak arsuyitu; Tatituw ukham arsu
Numbers23:21 Tatitux Israel markan reyipawa. Jupax markap taypin jakaski. Tatitux janiw jupanakan jan walt'añap munkiti
Numbers23:22 Tatituw markaparux Egiptot qhispiyani
Numbers23:23 Tatitun markapar ñanqhachañatakix janiw layqasiñanakax kunäkisa. ¡Uñtapxam qawqha muspharkañ luräwinaksa Tatitux markap layku luri!
Numbers23:24 Aka markax axsarkañ leonar uñtataw sartasi
Numbers23:25 Ukapachaw Balac reyix Balaamar sarakïna: —¡Janitix aka markar ñanqhachirjamäkstaxa
Numbers23:26 Ukxaruw Balaamax sarakïna: —¿Janit nayasti sisksma
Numbers23:27 Ukat Balac reyix jupar säna: —Jutam
Numbers23:28 Ukhamaw Balac reyix Balaamar irpäna
Numbers23:29 Ukan Balaamax Balac reyir säna: —Aka chiqan paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayarapita

Numbers24:1 Israel markar jach'añchañax Tatitur kusisiyatap Balaamax uñjäna

Numbers28:5 Grano juyranakat waxt'ax mä litro oliva aceitempi chapuntata pä kilo suma jak'utäñapawa

Numbers31:47 Aka chikatat Moisesax sapa phisqa tunkat maya

Numbers33:7 Etam chiqat sartawayapxäna
Numbers33:8 Pi-hahirot chiqat sartawayasasti
Numbers33:9 Mará chiqat sartawayasax Elim chiqaruw puripxäna
Numbers33:10 Elim chiqat sartawayasasti Mar Rojo quta thiyaruw utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:11 Mar Rojo quta thiyat sartawayasax Sin sat wasararuw utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:12 Sin wasarat sartawayasasti Dofcá sat chiqaruw utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:13 Dofcá chiqat sartawayasasti Alús sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:14 Alús chiqat sartawayasasti Refidim sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:15 Refidim chiqat sartawayasasti Sinaí wasaran utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:16 Sinaí wasarat sartawayasasti Quibrot-hataavá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:17 Quibrot-hataavá chiqat sartawayasasti Haserot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:18 Haserot chiqat sartawayasasti Ritmá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:19 Ritmá chiqat sartawayasasti Rimón-peres sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:20 Rimón-peres chiqat sartawayasasti Libná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:21 Libná chiqat sartawayasasti Risá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:22 Risá chiqat sartawayasasti Quehelata sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:23 Quehelata chiqat sartawayasasti Séfer sat qullun utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:24 Séfer qullut sartawayasasti Haradá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:25 Haradá chiqat sartawayasasti Maquelot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:26 Maquelot chiqat sartawayasasti Táhat sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:27 Táhat chiqat sartawayasasti Térah sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:28 Térah chiqat sartawayasasti Mitcá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:29 Mitcá chiqat sartawayasasti Hasmoná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:30 Hasmoná chiqat sartawayasasti Moserot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:31 Moserot chiqat sartawayasasti Bené-jaacán sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:32 Bené-jaacán chiqat sartawayasasti Hor de Guidgad sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:33 Hor de Guidgad chiqat sartawayasasti Jotbata sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:34 Jotbata chiqawjat sartawayasasti Abroná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:35 Abroná chiqawjat sartawayasasti Esión-guéber sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:36 Esión-guéber chiqawjat sartawayasasti Cadés chiqan utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:37 Cadés chiqawjat sartawayasasti Hor sat qullun utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:38 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Aarón sacerdotex Hor sat qullur makhatäna
Numbers33:39 Aarón sacerdotex Hor sat qullun jiwxäna
Numbers33:40 Arad chiqankir cananeo reyix
Numbers33:41 Hor sat qullut sartawayasasti Salmoná chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:42 Salmoná chiqawjat sartawayasasti Punón sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:43 Punón chiqawjat sartawayasasti Obot sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:44 Obot chiqat sartawayasasti Iié-abarim sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:45 Iié-abarim chiqat sartawayasasti Dibón-Gad sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:46 Dibón-Gad chiqat sartawayasasti Almón-diblataim sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna.
Numbers33:47 Almón-diblataim sat chiqat sartawayasasti Abarim sat qullu patanakan utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:48 Abarim qullunakat sartawayasasti Moab pampanakan utjnuqtapxäna
Numbers33:49 Jupanakax Jordán jawira irananakan utjnuqtasipxäna
Numbers33:50 Moab uraqi pampanakana
Numbers33:51 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Jumanakax Jordán jawir makhatapkäta
Numbers33:52 uka uraqin jakir jaqinakaruw alisnukupxäta
Numbers33:53 Uka uraqi katuntapxam
Numbers33:54 Ukampis suerte jaqtasaw uraqi jaljapxäta
Numbers33:55 Jumanakatix uka uraqin jakir jaqinakar jan alisnukupkätaxa
Numbers33:56 ukapachaw nayax jumanakar kuntix uka jaqinakar lurañ amtkäyät ukanak lurä” sasa.
Numbers34:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw säna:
Numbers34:2 “Israelitanakar parlam jupanakarusti sarakim: Jumanakax Canaán uraqir mantañampïpxtawa. Aka uraqinakaw jumanakankani
Numbers34:3 “Aynach tuqirux Sin wasarampi
Numbers34:4 ukatsti aynach tuqirux Acrabim sat amsta chiqakamaw sarani
Numbers34:5 Asmón chiqatsti Egiptompi qurpaski uka jisk'a jawirkamaw sararakini
Numbers34:6 “Inti jalanta tuqirusti
Numbers34:7 “Amsta tuqi qurpax
Numbers34:8 Hor qullutsti Hamat uraqin mantañapkama
Numbers34:9 Sedad chiqatsti
Numbers34:10 “Inti jalsu tuqitakix
Numbers34:11 ukawjat Riblá sat chiqakamaw sarani
Numbers34:12 ukatsti Jordán jawiranjam sararakini
Numbers34:13 Moisesax israelitanakar sarakïnwa: —Aka uraqinak jumanakax suertetkam lakintasipxäta; Tatituw uka uraqinak churasiñapatak arsüna
Numbers34:14 Rubén ayllunkirinakampi
Numbers34:15

Numbers34:17 “Jumanak taypin uraqinak lakintapkani ukanakax
Numbers34:18 Uraq lakintañatakisti
Numbers34:19 Jawsapxañamäki uka chachanakan sutinakapax akanakawa: “Judá ayllutxa: Caleb sat Jefuné chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:20 “Simeón ayllutxa: Samuel
Numbers34:21 “Benjamín ayllutxa: Elidad sat Quislón chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:22 “Dan ayllutxa: Buquí jilïri
Numbers34:23 “Manasesan ayllunakapatxa: Haniel
Numbers34:24 Efraín ayllutxa: Quemuel sat Siftán chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:25 “Zabulón ayllutxa: Elisafán sat Parnac chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:26 “Isacar ayllutxa: Palatiel sat Azán chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:27 “Aser ayllutxa: Ahihud sat Selomí chachan yuqapa.
Numbers34:28 “Neftalí ayllutxa: Pedahel sat Amiud chachan yuqapa.”

Numbers35:2 “Israelitanakar parlam

Numbers35:4 Levitanakar churapkäta uka uywa awatisiñ uraqinakatxa
Numbers35:5 Taqpach uraqix pusi thiyanïniwa
Numbers35:6 “Levitanakar churapkäta uka markanakatxa

Numbers35:13 Markanakat churapkäta ukanakatxa

Numbers35:15 Uka suxta markasti imantasiñ markanakäniwa
Numbers35:16 “Maynitix masipar hierromp jawq'antasin usuchjani
Numbers35:17 “Maynitix masipar qalampi jaqt'asin jiwayanixa
Numbers35:18 “Maynitix masipar mä lawampi jawq'antasin jiwayanixa
Numbers35:19 Jiwayat jaqin jak'a wila masipaw jaqi jiwayirir jikxatasin jiwayani.
Numbers35:20 “Maynitix masipar uñisiñat nukt'ani
Numbers35:21 jan ukax

Numbers35:25 Jan munkasin jaqi masipar jiwayir jaqirux markaw arxatañapa
Numbers35:26 Ukampis juchañchat jaqitix imantasiñ markan qurpapat mistuwayanixa
Numbers35:27 jiwayat jaqin wila masipax jiwayaskaniwa
Numbers35:28 Jiwayki uka jaqix imantasiñ markan qhiparañapa. Sacerdotenakan jilïripan jiwatap qhipatsti
Numbers35:29 “Aka arunakasti jumanakatakix mä kamachïniwa
Numbers35:30 “Mä jaqi jiwayir jaqix walja uñjirinak qhanañchañatak utjchi ukapachakiw jiwañapatak juchañchat uñjasini. Mayni sapakix janiw askïkiti khitir jiwañapatak juchañchañatakisa.
Numbers35:31 “Jaqi jiwayatapat jiwañapatak juchañchat jaqix
Numbers35:32 “Jaltxasin imantasiñ markan jakir jaqix
Numbers35:33 “Jakapkäta uka uraqirux jan jaqi jiwayañanakamp q'añuchapxamti
Numbers35:34 “Jakapkät uka uraqir janiw ñanqhachapxätati

Deuteronomy26:2 uraqix achuyarapkätam uka taqi apthapitanakamat nayrïr achunak apaqäta
Deuteronomy26:3 Ukatsti ukawjan luqtir sacerdoter uñstasin säta: ‘Nayax Tatit Diosaxan nayraqatapan arsta: jichhürunxa
Deuteronomy26:4 Ukatsti sacerdotex amparamat uka canasta katuqätam
Deuteronomy26:5 jumasti aka arunak Diosam nayraqatan qhanañchäta: ‘Nayra awkinakaxax arameo muyuyku jaqinakänwa
Deuteronomy26:6 Ukampis egipcionakax janiw wal uñjapkitänti
Deuteronomy26:7 Ukapachasti nanakax awkinakaxan Tatit Diosaparuw mayipxäyäta nanakar yanapt'añapataki
Deuteronomy26:8 Diosax jach'a ch'amap uñacht'ayäna
Deuteronomy26:9 ukhamat aka uraqir irpantanipxitu
Deuteronomy26:10 Ukat jichhax apanta
Deuteronomy26:11 Uka qhipatsti mä phunchhäwi luräta taqi kuntix Diosamax jumampiru utamankirinakampir churktam ukanakat yuspagarasa. Ukatsti levitanakampi

Deuteronomy26:15 Jichhasti alaxpachatpach uñtanim

Deuteronomy34:2 ukhamarak Neftalí
Deuteronomy34:3 Uka chiqatpach Moisesax aynach tuqinkir wasar uñtäna
Deuteronomy34:4 Ukan Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Aka uraqinak nayax Israelar churä. Ukham nayax nayra awkinakamar arsuwayta
Deuteronomy34:5 Ukhamaw Tatitun luqtiripa Moisesax
Deuteronomy34:6 Ukatsti uka pachpan jupar imt'xapxäna Moab chiqan utjir mä qhirwana
Deuteronomy34:7 Moisesax pataka pä tunkan maranïkän ukkhaw jiwxäna. Jupasti suma k'umarakïskänwa
Deuteronomy34:8 Israelitanakax Moab wasaran kimsa tunka uruw Moisesat jachapxäna
Deuteronomy34:9 Janïr jiwkasasti
Deuteronomy34:10 Israel marka taypinsti
Deuteronomy34:11 Janipuniw khitis jupjamax muspharkay luräwinak uñacht'aykänti Diosan arsutaparjam Egipto markaru
Deuteronomy34:12 Janipuniw khitis Moisesat sipan juk'amp ch'amanix utjkänti
Joshua1:1 Tatitun luqtiripa Moisesan jiwxatapatxa
Joshua1:2 “Moisés luqtirixax jiwxiwa
Joshua1:3 Kunjämtix Moisesar arskäyäta uka arunakarjamaw
Joshua1:4 Jumanakarux wasarata
Joshua1:5 Juman jakañamkamax janiw khitis atipjkätamti
Joshua1:6 Jumasti wali ch'amani sayt'asim janirak axsaramti
Joshua1:7 Nayax ch'aman sayt'asiñamak maysma
Joshua1:8 Kuntix Tatitun kamachi qillqatapanxa siski ukanak amtasipunïtawa
Joshua1:9 Nayaw jumarux ch'amani sayt'asiñamatak sisma. Jan axsaramti
Joshua1:10 Ukatsti Josué chachax markankir jilïrinakaruw lurapxañapatak säna:
Joshua1:11 “Jumanakax campamentpacharu sarapxam
Joshua1:12 Josué chachax Rubén
Joshua1:13 —Tatitun luqtiripa Moisesan arunakapat amtasipxam: Tatitu Diosamax aka uraqi churasax samarañ jumanakarux churapxätam
Joshua1:14 Warminakamsa
Joshua1:15 Tatitun jupanakaru samaraña churañapkama
Joshua1:16 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Nanakax kuntix sapkista ukanak lurapxäwa
Joshua1:17 Kunjämtix nanakax Moisesar taqi kunan jaysapxäyäta
Joshua1:18 Khiti jaqitix arunakamar jan ist'kani ukax jiwaniwa. Nanakax ch'amampi
Joshua2:1 Josué chachax Sitim chiqat pani uñaqir jaqinak jamasat khithäna
Joshua2:2 Ukampis mayni jaqiw Jericó markan reyiparux uk yatiyäna akham sasa: —Israelit jaqinakaw jichha arumax markasar uñaqir mantanipxi —sasa.
Joshua2:3 Ukat reyix Rahab warmin ukar khithäna akham sañapataki: —Utamankki uka chachanakax mistunipxpan
Joshua2:4 Ukampis Rahab warmix uka pani chachanakar imantänwa
Joshua2:5 Niya ch'amakthapki
Joshua2:6 Ukampisa Rahab warmix uta pataruw uka pani chachanak irpkatatayna
Joshua2:7 Reyin soldadonakapasti Jordán jawir tuqir sarki uka thakhinjam arktapxäna. Jupanakan mistupxatap ukspachaw marka punkux jist'antasxäna.
Joshua2:8 Ukatsti uka uñaqa chachanakan janïr ikirkipan
Joshua2:9 —Nayasti Tatitun aka uraqi jumanakar churatap yattwa
Joshua2:10 Nanakax yatipxtwa
Joshua2:11 Ukanak ist'asax walpun axsarapxta
Joshua2:12 Ukat jichhax jumanakar mayipxsma
Joshua2:13 ukatsti awkixaru
Joshua2:14 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Jumatix nanakan jutataxa jan khitirus yatiykäta ukaxa
Joshua2:15 Rahab warmin utapax markar muyuntki uka pirqa patankänwa
Joshua2:16 Jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Qullunak tuqir sarxapxam
Joshua2:17 Uka chachanakasti sapxänwa: —Nanakax mayipkista uka juramentompix phuqhapxämawa.
Joshua2:18 Ukampis kunapachatix nanakax aka markaru mantanipkä ukkhaxa
Joshua2:19 Jupanakat maynitix utamat anqar mistuni ukasti jiwaniwa; nanakax janiw uka jiwatapat juchanïpkäti
Joshua2:20 Jumatix aka tuqit arsüta ukaxa
Joshua2:21 Warmisti sänwa: —Arunakamarux phuqhaspan —sasa. Ukatsti uka chachanakar khithanukusax
Joshua2:22 Uka pani uñaqanakasti qullunakar sarasin kimsa uruw ukan imantasipxäna
Joshua2:23 Ukatsti uka pani uñaqanakax qullunakat saraqanxapxäna
Joshua2:24 Juparusti sapxänwa: “Tatitux taqi uka uraqinak amparasaruw katuyistu
Joshua3:1 Qhipürusti
Joshua3:2 Kimsa uru saraqatarusti
Joshua3:3 ukatsti israelitanakarux akham sapxäna: “Kunapachatix Tatitun arust'äwi arcap levita sacerdotenakar apaskir uñjapkät ukkhaxa
Joshua3:4 ukhamat yatipxäta kawkha chiqtix sarapxañamäki uka
Joshua3:5 Josué chachasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Q'umachasipxam
Joshua3:6 Sacerdotenakarusti sarakïnwa: “Tatitun arust'äwi arcap aptawayapxam
Joshua3:7 Tatitusti Josué chacharux sänwa: “Jichhürut uksarux israelitanakan nayraqatapan jach'aruw tukuyäma
Joshua3:8 Jumasti Tatitun arcap apapki uka sacerdotenakarux akham säta: ‘Kunapachatix Jordán jawir thiyar puripkät ukkhaxa
Joshua3:9 Josué chachasti israelitanakarux sänwa: “Aksar jutapxam
Joshua3:10 Jakkir Diosan jumanak taypinkaskatapat chimpux akäniwa
Joshua3:11 Uñtapxam
Joshua3:12 Jichhax tunka payan chachanak ajllipxam
Joshua3:13 Kunapachatix sacerdotenakax taqi akapachankir Tatitun arust'äwi arcap apapkani
Joshua3:14 Israelitanakasti
Joshua3:15 
Joshua3:16 
Joshua3:17 Israel markasti taqpachaniw Jordán jawir wañanjamaki makhatapxäna
Joshua4:1 Kunapachatix israelit jaqinakax taqini Jordán jawir makhatxapxän ukkhaxa
Joshua4:2 “Israelan ayllupat tunka payan chachanak ajllim
Joshua4:3 jupanakarusti sarakim
Joshua4:4 Ukatsti Josué chachax ajllkatayna uka tunka payan jaqinakaruw jawsäna
Joshua4:5 jupanakarusti sänwa: “Jordán jawirar chika taypikam mantapxam
Joshua4:6 Uka qalanakasti jumanakatakix qhipürun amtasiñatakïniwa
Joshua4:7 jumanakasti akham sapxätawa: ‘Kunapachatix Tatitun arust'äwi arcapax Jordán jawir makhataskän ukkhaxa
Joshua4:8 Jupanakasti kunjämtix Josué chachax siskäna ukhamarjamaw lurapxäna
Joshua4:9 Ukhamarusa
Joshua4:10 Tatitun arust'äwi arcap apapkäna uka sacerdotenakasti Jordán jawir taypin qhiparapxäna
Joshua4:11 ukatsti kunapachatix taqini jawir khurkatankxapxän ukkhaxa
Joshua4:12 Ukatsti kunjämtix Moisesax arsuwaykatayna ukhamarjamaw Rubén
Joshua4:13 Niya pusi tunka waranqa chachanakaw nuwasiñatak wakicht'ata
Joshua4:14 Tatitusti uka urux Josué chachar taqpach Israel marka nayraqatan jach'añchi
Joshua4:15 Ukatsti Tatitux Josué chacharux sänwa:
Joshua4:16 “Arust'äwi arca apiri sacerdotenakax Jordán jawirat mistunxapxpan” sasa.
Joshua4:17 Josué chachasti sacerdotenakarux “mistunxapxam” sänwa
Joshua4:18 ukatsti kunapachatix sacerdotenakax Jordán jawirat mistunisin waña uraqir takt'apkän ukkhasti
Joshua4:19 Israelitanakax nayrïri phaxsita tunka uru saraqataruw Jordán jawirat mistunipxäna
Joshua4:20 Josué chachasti Guilgal chiqan
Joshua4:21 israelitanakarusti sänwa: “Kunapachatix wawanakamax qhipürun jiskt'apkätam: ‘¿Kunsa aka qalanakax uñacht'ayañ munistuxa?’ sasaxa
Joshua4:22 jumanakasti jupanakarux kunjämtix Israel markax Jordán jawir wañanjam makhatkäna uk yatiyapxäta
Joshua4:23 ukatsti kunjämtix Tatit Diosamax Jordán jawir wañt'aykäna jumanakan makhatapxañamataki
Joshua4:24 Ukhamat uraqinkir taqi markanakax kunja ch'amanïkitix Tatitux uk yatipxani
Joshua5:1 Jordán jawirat inti jalanta tuqinkiri amorreo reyinakasa
Joshua5:2 Ukapachaw Tatitux Josué chachar säna: “Jumax qalat cuchillonak lurasim
Joshua5:3 Josué chachasti cuchillonak luräna
Joshua5:4 Uka lurañasti wakisïnwa
Joshua5:5 Egipto markat mistunipkatayna uka chachanakasa
Joshua5:6 Israelitanakax pusi tunka mara wasaran sarnaqañkamax Egipto markat mistunkän uka nuwasir chachanakax taqiniw jiwarxapxatayna. Uka chachanakax janiw Tatiturux jaysapkänti
Joshua5:7 Ukat Josué chachax uka jaqinakan wawanakaparux circuncisión katuqayäna
Joshua5:8 Kunapachatix taqini circuncisión katuqatäxapxän ukkhaxa
Joshua5:9 Ukatsti Tatitux Josué chacharux sänwa: “Aka circuncisión lurañampix jumanakat Egipto markan p'inqachat uywatar tukupxatamat apaqapxsma” sasa. Ukat uka chiqax jichhürkam Guilgal sutimpi uñt'ata.
Joshua5:10 Israelitanakax Guilgal chiqaruw utjnuqtapxäna
Joshua5:11 Uka urusti jupanakax jan levaduran t'ant'ampi
Joshua5:12 Ukat uksarusti Diosax janiw mayampsa maná manq'xa apayankxänti
Joshua5:13 Mä urusti
Joshua5:14 Uka chachasti sänwa: —Janiw kawkirïktsa. Nayax Tatitun ejercitopan jilïripätwa
Joshua5:15 Tatitun ejercitopan jilïripasti sänwa: —Wiskhum apsusim
Joshua6:1 Jericó markarux janiw khitis mantkänti
Joshua6:2 Ukampis Tatitux Josué chacharux sänwa: “Nayaw jumarux Jericó marksa
Joshua6:3 Jumanakasti
Joshua6:4 Paqallqu sacerdotenakaw Tatitun arust'äwi arcap nayräxa sarani
Joshua6:5 Kunapachatix jumanakax trompetanakan mä suma phust'asitap ist'apkät ukkhaxa
Joshua6:6 Josué chachax sacerdotenakar jawsasinxa sänwa: “Tatitun arust'äwi arcap apapxam
Joshua6:7 Jaqinakarusti sarakïnwa: “Jumanakax marka muytapxam. Nuwasir chachanakax Tatitun arcap nayräxap sarapxpan” sasa.
Joshua6:8 Ukatsti taqiniw Josué chachan aruparjam lurapxäna. Paqallqu sacerdotenakasti Tatitun arcapa nayräxap sarapxäna
Joshua6:9 Nuwasir chachanakax sacerdotenakan nayräxap sarapxäna
Joshua6:10 Ukampis Josué chachax markar akham satayna: “Janiw kuna arus ist'asiñapäkiti
Joshua6:11 Josué chachax Tatitun arcap mä kutiw Jericó marka muytayäna. Ukatsti campamentoruw kuttanxapxäna
Joshua6:12 Qhipürusti
Joshua6:13 Uka paqallqu sacerdotenakasti Tatitun arcap nayräxap sarapxäna
Joshua6:14 Payïr urusti mä kutimpiw markar muytapxäna
Joshua6:15 Paqallqüri urusti willjtat sartasin wasitat Jericó marka muytapxäna
Joshua6:16 Kunapachatix sacerdotenakax paqallqu kuti trompetanak phust'apkän ukkhasti
Joshua6:17 Aka markampi
Joshua6:18 Jumanakasti janiw markan utjir yänakapat kunsa aptasipxätati
Joshua6:19 Ukampisa qurimpi
Joshua6:20 Jaqinakax jach'at art'asipxäna
Joshua6:21 Ukatsti espadampkamaw chachanakaru
Joshua6:22 Josué chachasti kawkïr chachanakatix uraq uñaqanipkatayna uka pani chacharux sänwa: “Uka Rahab warmin utapar sarapxam
Joshua6:23 Jupanakasti Rahab warmin utapar mantasax
Joshua6:24 Ukxarusti israelitanakax ninampiw Jericó markar phichhantapxäna
Joshua6:25 Josué chachax Rahab warmimpiru
Joshua6:26 Ukatsti Josué chachax aka juramento luräna: “Jericó marka wasitat sayt'ayañ munirix Tatitun axsarkay mutuyäwip katuqani. Tayna yuqall wawap apt'asiñ munirix
Joshua6:27 Tatitux Josué chacharux yanapänwa
Joshua7:1 Israel markax kuntix Diosax siskatayna ukanakxa
Joshua7:2 Josué chachax Jericó markatpach Ai chiqar mä chachanak khithäna
Joshua7:3 kuttanisasti Josué chacharux sapxänwa: “Ai markax janiw jach'äkiti
Joshua7:4 Ukatsti niya kimsa waranqa jaqinakaw Ai markar nuwantañataki makhatapxäna. Ukampisa Ai markankir jaqinakax israelitanakarux jaltayañkamaw atipjäna;
Joshua7:5 uka markankir jaqinakasti niya kimsa tunk suxtani israelit jaqinakaruw jiwarayapxäna
Joshua7:6 Josué chachampi
Joshua7:7 Josué chachasti sänwa: —¡Dios Tatay! ¿Kunatakirak aka markaru Jordán jawir makhatayantasti? ¿Amorreo markar katuyasat tukjañ munapxista? ¡Inas Jordán jawir khurkatar qhiparañax walïchisapäna!
Joshua7:8 ¡Dios Tatay! ¿Kamsarakïsti
Joshua7:9 Cananeonakasa
Joshua7:10 Tatitusti Josué chacharux sänwa: —Sayt'asim. ¿Kunatsa jumax uraqir alintat ukankaskta?
Joshua7:11 Israelitanakax jucharuw puripxi
Joshua7:12 Ukat israelitanakax uñisirinakapan nayraqatapan jan sayt'asipkaniti
Joshua7:13 Sartasim
Joshua7:14 Qharürux ayllunakatkam taqini akankapxam
Joshua7:15 Khitin amparapantix uñstkani kunatix tukjatäñapäkän ukaxa
Joshua7:16 Qhipürusti
Joshua7:17 Ukatsti Josué chachax Judá ayllunkiriruw sapa mayni wila masi tamanakap uñstayañapatak säna
Joshua7:18 Kunapachatix Zabdí utapankirinakan chachanakax maynit maynit jak'achasipkän ukkhaxa
Joshua7:19 Ukatsti Josué chachax Acán jaqirux sänwa: —Wawaxay
Joshua7:20 Acán chachasti sänwa: —Chiqpachansa
Joshua7:21 Jericó markat yänak apsunktan uka taypin
Joshua7:22 Josué chachasti ukspachaw mä qawqha jaqinakar Acán chachan chhujllapar khithäna
Joshua7:23 Acán jaqin chhujllapat apsunisax
Joshua7:24 Ukatsti Acán jaqirux Acor sat qhirwaruw irpapxäna
Joshua7:25 Josué chachasti Acán chacharux sänwa: —¿Kunatarak aka jan walt'añanakar puriyapxistasti? Jichhasti
Joshua7:26 Ukxarusti Acán chachan amayap patxarux walja qalanak phinxatapxäna
Joshua8:1 Tatitux Josué chacharux sänwa: “Jan axsaramti janirak mayjt'asimsa. Taqpach ejercitomampi Ai markar nuwantir sarxarum
Joshua8:2 jumasti kunjämtix Jericó markarusa
Joshua8:3 Josué chachasti taqpach soldadonakapampiw Ai markar sarañatak wakicht'asïna. Kimsa tunk waranqa nuwasir jaqinak ajllïna
Joshua8:4 “Sum ist'apxam: marka qhipäx tuqir sarapxam
Joshua8:5 Nayasti chikat jaqinakampiw markar jak'achasinï
Joshua8:6 Jupanakax nanakar markat jaltir uñjasax arktapxitaniwa
Joshua8:7 Ukapachaw jumanakax imantasipkta ukawjat mistunisin marka katuntapxäta
Joshua8:8 Marka katuntasinsti
Joshua8:9 Ukatsti Josué chachax sarapxam sasaw ejercitopar khithanuküna
Joshua8:10 Qhipürusti
Joshua8:11 Josué chachan soldadonakapax nayräx tuqit markarux jak'achasïna
Joshua8:12 Josué chachax niya phisqa waranqa jaqinak imantäna Betel
Joshua8:13 ukhamat mä tama soldadonakax markat alay tuqin imantasïna
Joshua8:14 Ai markan reyipasti uk uñjasin
Joshua8:15 Josué chachampi jaqinakapampisti atipjata uñjasipkaspas ukhamaw wasar tuqir sarki uka thakhinjam jaltxapxäna.
Joshua8:16 Ukatsti Ai markan ejercitopax jupanakar arktañatakiw mistuwayapxäna
Joshua8:17 Janiw mä jaqis Ai
Joshua8:18 Ukatsti Tatitux Josué chachar sänwa: “Ai marka tuqir lanzam aytam
Joshua8:19 Ukatsti imantasitäpkän uka tamanakax jank'akiw mistunipxäna
Joshua8:20 Kunapachatix Ai markankir jaqinakax qhipa tuqir uñtanipkän ukkhasti
Joshua8:21 Josué chachampi
Joshua8:22 Ukatsti
Joshua8:23 Ai markan reyiparukiw jan jiwayapkänti
Joshua8:24 Ukxarusti kawkïri jaqinakatix jupanakar qhipat arkanipkatayna ukanakarux taqiniruw espadampkam jiwarayapxäna
Joshua8:25 Uka urusti Ai markankirinakax tunka payan waranqaniw jiwarapxäna
Joshua8:26 Josué chachasti Ai markar q'al tukjañ amtäwipampix phuqhänwa.
Joshua8:27 Israelitanakax Ai markan utjir uywanakampi
Joshua8:28 ukatsti Josué chachax ninampiw Ai marka phhichhantäna
Joshua8:29 Josué chachax Ai markan reyiparux mä quqaruw warkkatayäna
Joshua8:30 Ukatsti Josué chachax mä altar Israelan Tatitu Diosapatakix Ebal qullun luräna
Joshua8:31 kunjämatix Tatitun luqtiripa Moisesax israelitanakar siskatayna
Joshua8:32 Ukxarusti Josué chachax israelitanakan uñjkataw altaran qalanakapar Moisesan churat kamachinakap qillqt'äna.
Joshua8:33 Ukatsti taqpach markampi
Joshua8:34 Ukatsti Josué chachax Tatitun kamachinakapat ullaräna
Joshua8:35 Josué chachax Israel marka nayraqatan kawkïr arunaktix Moisesax jaytawaykatayna uka arunak taqpach ullart'äna
Joshua9:1 Hititanakana
Joshua9:2 Ukatsti taqi jupanakax mä amtäwiru mantasin jaqthaptapxäna
Joshua9:3 Ukampisa
Joshua9:4 ukat jupanakax Josué chachar sallqjañ amtapxäna. Jupanakasti thantha costalanaka
Joshua9:5 jupanakax mirq'i isimpi
Joshua9:6 Kunapachatix Guilgal campamentor purxapxän ukkhasti
Joshua9:7 Israelitanakasti uka heveo jaqinakarux sänwa: —Inas jumanakax aka jak'anakan jakasipksta; ¿kunjämarak jumanakampi mä suma amtäwiru mantsnasti? —sasa.
Joshua9:8 Ukampis jupanakax Josué chacharux sapxänwa: —Nanakax juman luqtirinakamaw tukupxä —sasa. Ukat Josué chachax jupanakar jiskt'äna: —¿Khitïpxarakta jumanakasti? ¿Kawkhatarak jutapxtasti? —sasa.
Joshua9:9 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Nanakax wali jayat jutapxta
Joshua9:10 ukhamarak kuntix Jordán jawir khurkatankir pani amorreo reyinakaru lurki ukanaksa
Joshua9:11 Ukat nanakan jilïrinakaxasa
Joshua9:12 Kunapachatix jumanakar thaqhir mistunipkta ukkhaxa
Joshua9:13 Lip'ichi wayaqanakas vino uskunipkta ukkhax machaqäskänwa
Joshua9:14 Israelitanakasti gabaonita jaqinakan manq'añanakap mallt'apxäna
Joshua9:15 Ukatsti Josué chachax jupanakampi sumankañatakiw mä arust'äwi luräna
Joshua9:16 Kimsa uru qhipatsti
Joshua9:17 Ukatsti israelit jaqinakax Gabaonitanakar thaqhiriw mistuwayapxäna
Joshua9:18 Ukampis israelitanakax purisin janiw jupanakarux jiwaraykänti
Joshua9:19 ukampis jilïrinakapax sapxänwa: —Nanakax Israelan Tatitu Diosan sutipxaruw juramento lurapxta jupanakar jan jiwarayañataki
Joshua9:20 Janiw jiwayañasäkiti
Joshua9:21 Ukhamaw israelitanakan jilïrinakapax Gabaón markat jutir jaqinakan jakañanakapat khuyapt'ayasïna
Joshua9:22 Josué chachasti gabaonita jaqinakar jawsasin jiskt'äna: —¿Kunatarak nanakar sallqjapxista wali jayat jutapxta sasasti? Chiqpachansa jumanakax aka jak'an jakasipkatätaxa.
Joshua9:23 Ukat jichhax jumanakax ñanqhachat jakapxäta
Joshua9:24 Jupanakasti Josué chacharux sapxänwa: —Nanakax jumar axsarasaw uk lurapxta
Joshua9:25 Jichhasti nanakax juman amparamankapxtwa
Joshua9:26 Josué chachasti janiw israelitanakan gabaonita jaqinakar jiwayañap munkänti
Joshua9:27 ukampis uka jaqinakarux Israel markankirinakampitaki
Joshua10:1 Jerusalenan Adonisédec sat reyipax Josué chachan Ai markaru
Joshua10:2 
Joshua10:3 Ukat Adonisédec reyix yatiyäwi apayäna Hebrón markan Hoham reyiparu
Joshua10:4 “Nayan ukar jutapxam
Joshua10:5 Ukhamasti Jerusalén
Joshua10:6 Gabaón markan jakirinakasti Josué chachan Guilgal chiqankki uka campamentonkkipan mä yatiyäwi apayapxäna
Joshua10:7 Ukatsti Josué chachax jan axsarir soldadonakapampiw Guilgal chiqat mistuwayäna
Joshua10:8 Tatitusti Josué chacharux sänwa: “Jan jupanakar axsaramti
Joshua10:9 Josué chachax Guilgal chiqat mistuwayäna
Joshua10:10 Tatituw jupanakarux israelitanakan nayraqatapan wal mulljasiyäna
Joshua10:11 Amorreonakax israelitanakat jaltxasin Bet-horón sat aynacha jalaqasipkän ukkhasti
Joshua10:12 Kunapachatix Tatitux amorreonakar israelitanakan amparapar katuyxän ukkhaxa
Joshua10:13 Intimpi phaxsimpisti sayt'änwa
Joshua10:14 Uka urur uñtatax janipuniw utjkänti
Joshua10:15 Ukatsti Josué chachampi israelitanakampix Guilgal chiqankki uka campamentoruw kuttanxapxäna
Joshua10:16 uka phisqa reyinakax jaltxapxänwa
Joshua10:17 Ukampisa
Joshua10:18 Ukat Josué chachax jaqinakar khithäna akham sasa: “Jumanakax uka putun mantañapawjkam qalanak qurumt'ayapxam
Joshua10:19 Ukchañkamasti
Joshua10:20 Kunapachatix Josué chachampi israelitanakampix amorreonakar q'alpun atipjas waljanir jiwarayapkän ukkhaxa
Joshua10:21 Ukampis Israel markax jan kuna kamacht'ataw Maquedá chiqankir campamentor kuttxäna
Joshua10:22 Ukatsti Josué chachax sänwa: “Uka putu mantañ atiqapxam
Joshua10:23 Israelitanakasti ukham lurapxäna
Joshua10:24 Kunapachatix Josué chachan nayraqatapar puriyanipkän ukkhaxa
Joshua10:25 ukatsti Josué chachax jupanakarux sänwa: “Jan axsarapxamti
Joshua10:26 Uk arsusinsti Josué chachax uka reyinakaruw jiwarayäna
Joshua10:27 Kunapachatix intix niya jalantañampïxän ukkhasti
Joshua10:28 Uka pachpa urusti
Joshua10:29 Uka chiqatsti
Joshua10:30 Tatituw uka markampi
Joshua10:31 Ukatsti Josué chachampi israelitanakampix Libná chiqat Laquis markaruw sarapxäna
Joshua10:32 Pä uru qhipatsti Tatitux Laquis marka jupanakar katuyäna
Joshua10:33 Guézer markankir Horam reyix ejercitopampiw Laquis markar arxatirix mistüna
Joshua10:34 Ukatsti Josué chachampi israelitanakampix Laquis chiqat Eglón markaruw sarxapxäna
Joshua10:35 Uka pachpa uruw uka marka katuntapxäna
Joshua10:36 Eglón chiqatsti Hebrón markaruw sarapxäna
Joshua10:37 Kunapachatix katuntxapxän ukkhaxa
Joshua10:38 Uka chiqatsti
Joshua10:39 reyiparu
Joshua10:40 Ukhamaw Josué chachax taqi uka uraqinak katuntasïna. Jupax Négueb qullunkiri
Joshua10:41 Josué chachax mä kutinak reyinakarux atipjäna
Joshua10:42 
Joshua10:43 Ukatsti Josué chachax taqi israelitanakampi Guilgal chiqankki uka campamentor kuttxäna.
Joshua11:1 Kunapachatix Jabín sat Hasor markankir reyipax taqi ukanak yatkän ukkhaxa
Joshua11:2 ukhamarak alay tuqinkir qullunkapki uka reyinakampi; Galilea quta aynach tuqin Jordán qhirwankiri reyinakampi
Joshua11:3 inti jalsu
Joshua11:4 Taqi uka reyinakasti soldadonakapampi
Joshua11:5 Taqi jupanakaw mä suma amtäwiru mantapxäna
Joshua11:6 Ukampis Tatitux Josué chacharux sänwa: “Jan jupanakarux axsaramti
Joshua11:7 Ukatsti Josué chachax taqi nuwasir soldadonakapampiw akatjamat Merom sat uma thiyan uñisirinakapar katuntapxäna

Joshua11:9 Josué chachax Tatitun arsutaparjamaw phuqhäna
Joshua11:10 Ukatsti kuttanisax Hasor marka katuntäna
Joshua11:11 ukhamarak khitinakatix ukan jakapkän taqi jupanakaru. Taqi kun q'alpun tukjapxäna
Joshua11:12 Uka pachparaki kawkïr markanakatix uka arust'äwiru mantañataki jaysapkatayna uka markanakarux luräna: markanakar katuntasax reyinakaparuw jiwarayäna
Joshua11:13 Ukampisa

Joshua11:18 jupanakampisti walja maranakaw nuwasïna.

Judges7:4 Ukampis Tatitux Gedeonar saskakïnwa: “Jaqinakax waljanikïskiwa. Uma umt'ir jupanakar irpam
Judges7:5 Gedeonasti jaqinakarux um umt'iriw irpäna
Judges7:6 Ukatsti amparapar um phuxttasin anunakjam laxuntirinakax kimsa patak jaqinakänwa
Judges7:7 Ukat Tatitux Gedeonar säna: “Aka kimsa patak jaqinakampiw jumanakarux qhispiyapxäma
Judges7:8 Ukatsti Gedeonax mayninakarux chhujlla utanakaparuw khithanukxäna; janïr sarapkipansti wakullanakapa
Judges7:9 Uka arumasti Tatitux Gedeonar sänwa: “Sartasim
Judges7:10 Ukampis jumatix jupanakampi nuwasiñ axsarsta ukaxa
Judges7:11 ukat kuntix parlasipkani uk ist'äta. Ukatsti jan axsarasaw jupanakampi nuwasïta” sasa. Gedeonasti Purá uywatapampiw uñisirinakapan campamentopkama saraqäna.
Judges7:12 Madianitanaka
Judges7:13 Gedeonasti uñisirinakapan campamentopar jak'achaskasin ist'äna
Judges7:14 Ukat masipax säna: —Ukax Gedeón israelita chachan espadapäpachawa
Judges7:15 Ukhama uka samka yatiyatap ist'asina
Judges7:16 Ukatsti ukspachaw uka kimsa patak jaqinakapxa
Judges7:17 Ukat jupanakarux säna: —Kunapachatix nayax uñisirisan campamentop uñkatasir purkä ukkhaxa
Judges7:18 Kunapachatix nayasa
Judges7:19 Ukhamaw Gedeonampi patak jaqinakapampix campamento uñkatasir puripxäna
Judges7:20 uka kimsa tama jaqinakasti ukkharakiw oveja waxrat lurat pututunakat pututt'apxäna
Judges7:21 Israelitanakax janiw unxtapkänti
Judges7:22 ukchañkamasti uka kimsa patak israelitanakax pututunak pututt'asipkakïnwa
Judges7:23 Ukatsti Neftalí
Judges7:24 Ukatsti Gedeonax Efraín qullunkirinakaruw yatiyirinak khithäna
Judges7:25 ukhamarus madianitanakan pä jilïrip katuntapxäna Oreb

Judges8:12 Zébah

Judges8:16 Ukapachaw Gedeonax

Judges8:20 Ukatsti ukspachaw Jéter sat jilïr yuqapar säna: —¡Sartasim
Judges8:21 Ukat Zébah

Judges9:1 Gedeonan Abimélec yuqapax Siquem chiqaruw saräna
Judges9:2 —Jiwasan wila masinakan sutipxaruw achikt'asipxsma
Judges9:3 Abimélec chachax jupanakan wila masipänwa
Judges9:4 Ukhamarus Baal-berit diosan utapat paqallq tunka qullqi apsusin Abimélec chacharuw churapxäna. Uka qullqimpisti Abimélec chachax wali qhuru jaqinak mink'äna
Judges9:5 Ofrá sat markaru sarapxäna
Judges9:6 Uka qhipatsti Siquem chiqankiri
Judges9:7 Jotam chachasti
Judges9:8 “Mä urux quqanakax reyinïñ munapxäna
Judges9:9 Ukampis olivo quqax janiw munkänti
Judges9:10 “Ukatsti quqanakax higo aliruw reyipäñapatak mayipxäna.
Judges9:11 Ukampis higo alix janiw munkänti
Judges9:12 “Ukatsti quqanakax uva aliruw reyipäñapatak mayipxarakïna.
Judges9:13 Ukampis uva alix janiw munkänti
Judges9:14 “Ukhamasti quqanakax mä ch'aphi aliruw jupanakan reyipäñapatak mayipxäna.
Judges9:15 Ukampis ch'aphi alix jupanakar sänwa: ‘Jumanakatix chiqpachan nayaru jumanakan reyimäñataki munapxstaxa
Judges9:16 “Jichhasti
Judges9:17 Nayan awkixax jumanak layku nuwasisax
Judges9:18 ukampis jumanakax
Judges9:19 Ukampis jichhüruw nayax jumanakar sapxsma: Jumanakatix Gedeonarusa
Judges9:20 jan ukhamäkaspa ukasti
Judges9:21 Uka arunak sasinsti

Judges9:23 ukampis Diosaw Abimélec chachataki

Judges9:25 Siquem markankirinakat yaqhip jaqinakapax qullu patanakan imantasïna
Judges9:26 Mä urusti

Judges9:29 ¡Nayatix jumanakan jilïrimäristxa anchhichpachaw Abimélec chachar alisnukurista!” Jupar siristwa: “¡Abimélec

Judges9:32 Ukhamasti jumax
Judges9:33 Willjtarusti inti jalsunkipan markar katuntam
Judges9:34 Ukhamaw Abimélec chachax jaqinakapampi uka arumax mistüna
Judges9:35 Gáal chachax marka punkur mistunkän ukkhaxa
Judges9:36 Jupanakar uñjasasti
Judges9:37 Ukampis Gáal chachax saskakïnwa: —¡Sum uñtam! ¡Walja jaqinakaw ‘Aka uraqin kururupa’ satäki uka qullut saraqasinki! ¡Yaqha tamasti

Judges11:1 Jefté sat chachax

Judges11:4 Mä qawqha pachatsti amonitanakax israelitanakampi nuwasiñaruw mantapxäna
Judges11:5 Galaad chiqankir jilïrinakasti
Judges11:6 juparusti sapxänwa: —Jutam

Judges16:1 Mä urux Sansonax Gaza markaruw saräna. Ukansti jan wali sarnaqir mä warmiruw uñjäna
Judges16:2 Kunapachatix Gaza chiqankirinakax Sansonan markankatap yatipkän ukkhaxa
Judges16:3 Ukampis Sansonax chika arumkamakiw ikt'awayäna. Uka chika aruma sarthapisinsti
Judges16:4 Uka qhipatsti
Judges16:5 Filisteonakan jilïrinakapasti Dalilan ukaruw sarapxäna
Judges16:6 Ukatsti Dalilax Sansonarux sänwa: —Amp suma
Judges16:7 Sansonasti sänwa: —Jumanakatix paqallqu ch'uxña phalanakampi ñach'antapxitäta ukkhaxa
Judges16:8 Filisteonakan jilïrinakapasti
Judges16:9 Dalilax utapar mä qawqha jaqinak imantatayna
Judges16:10 Dalilasti Sansonar sänwa: —¡Jumax nayat phiskasistawa! ¡K'arintarakistawa! Jichhasti
Judges16:11 Sansonasti sänwa: —Jumanakatix jan apnaqat machaq wiskanakampi ñach'antapxitasmaxa
Judges16:12 Ukatsti Dalilax machaq wiskanakampiw ñach'antäna
Judges16:13 Dalilasti Sansonarux sänwa: —¡Sallqjaskakistawa! ¡Mayampsa k'arintaskakistawa! Sitaya
Judges16:14 ukatsti ch'akurur katt'ayasax uraqiruw liq'intäna
Judges16:15 Ukat Dalilax säna: —¡K'ari! ¿Kunatarak munsmaw sistasti? Akampix kimsa kutiw nayat sawkasistaxa
Judges16:16 Dalilax jan inakt'asapuniw jiskhïna
Judges16:17 ukat jupax kuntix Dalilar imt'kän uk arsxäna: —Nayarusti janipuniw kunapachas ñik'utax mururapkituti
Judges16:18 Dalilax jichha kutin Sansonan jupar chiqpach arsutap amuyxäna
Judges16:19 Dalilasti Sansonarux jarphipxaruw ikjayäna
Judges16:20 jach'at art'äna: —¡Sansón
Judges16:21 Filisteonakasti jupar katuntasin nayranakap apsupxäna
Judges16:22 Ukchañkamasti
Judges16:23 Filisteonakan jilïrinakapasti Sansonar atipt'apxatapat uruyañatakiw tantachasipxäna
Judges16:24 Ukatsti jaqinakax Sansonar uñjasinxa
Judges16:25 Jupanakasti sinti k'uchikiw jikxatasipxäna

Judges16:31 Uka qhipatsti

Judges19:4 Awkipax kusisiñampiw katuqt'äna

1Samuel1:1 Efraín qullunak taypin Ramá sat chiqan mä chachaw jakäna
1Samuel1:2 Elcaná chachax pä warminïnwa. Maynix Ana sutini
1Samuel1:3 Elcaná chachasti sapa maraw wila masinakapamp chika Siló chiqar sarirïna
1Samuel1:4 Kunapachatix Elcaná chachax wilañcha luqtirïkän ukkhaxa
1Samuel1:5 ukampis Anarux kunatix sumäki ukpun churirïna
1Samuel1:6 Ukat Peninax
1Samuel1:7 Sapa marapuniwa
1Samuel1:8 Elcaná chachapasti akham sasaw jiskt'irïna: “Ana
1Samuel1:9 Mä kutiwa
1Samuel1:10 Anasti jacht'asisa
1Samuel1:11 akham sasa: “Taqi ch'aman Tatay
1Samuel1:12 Anax wali jayaw Tatitut mayisiskäna
1Samuel1:13 ukampis Anax amukiw mayisiskäna
1Samuel1:14 ukat jupar sarakïna: —¿Kunapachkamas machatäskäta? ¡Uka machañ vino apanukum! —sasa.
1Samuel1:15 Anasti ukkharux sänwa: —Tatay
1Samuel1:16 Jan jumax nayan jan wali warmïtax amuyamti
1Samuel1:17 Ukatsti Elí sacerdotex sarakïnwa: —Jichhax jan llakisxamti
1Samuel1:18 Anasti sänwa: —Walikiw tatay
1Samuel1:19 Qhipürusti
1Samuel1:20 Ukhamat Ana warmix usur jaqiptxäna
1Samuel1:21 Qhipa marasti
1Samuel1:22 ukampis Anax janiw jupanakamp sarañ munkänti
1Samuel1:23 Elcaná chachapasti sänwa: —Kunjämatix jumatak wakiski ukhamay luram
1Samuel1:24 Kunapachatix ñuñut t'aqanukxän ukkhaxa
1Samuel1:25 Ukatsti mä vaca qallu wilañcha luqtasinxa
1Samuel1:26 Anasti sänwa: —Tatay
1Samuel1:27 Nayax Tatituruw aka wawa mayïyäta
1Samuel1:28 Nayax Tatituruw aka yuqall wawa katuyta
1Samuel2:1 Ukatsti Anax akham Tatiturux q'uchüna: “Tatay
1Samuel2:2 ¡Tatay
1Samuel2:3 Jan khitis jichhax jach'achasiñampi parlpati
1Samuel2:4 Ch'amaninakan mich'i antutt'añapsa tukjiwa
1Samuel2:5 Khitinakantix taqi kunas jilarkir utjkänxa
1Samuel2:6 Tatituw jakañ churistu juparakiw jiwañ apayanistu.
1Samuel2:7 Tatituw qamiriptayistu
1Samuel2:8 Diosaw pisi utjirinirux jan walt'añanakat apsu

1Samuel2:10 Tatituw uñisirinakaparux jisk'a jisk'a tukjani
1Samuel2:11 Ukatsti
1Samuel2:12 Elí sacerdoten wawanakapax jan wali jaqinakänwa
1Samuel2:13 janirakiw sacerdoten phuqhañapäki uksa markampix phuqhapkänti; kunapachatix maynix wilañcha luqtirïkän ukkhaxa
1Samuel2:14 phukhut uka aychanak sacerdoter churañatak waysurïna. Ukham jupanakax Siló sat chiqar purir israelitanakarux lurapxirïna.
1Samuel2:15 Ukhamarusa
1Samuel2:16 Ukatsti wilañcha luqtir jaqitix säna: “Nayraqatax lik'i nakhantayañaxawa

1Samuel3:1 Samuelusti Elí sacerdoten arsutanakap phuqhasaw Tatiturux luqtaskakïna. Uka urunakansti Tatitux janiw kuna arunaksa aliqaki khitirus yatiyirïkänti
1Samuel3:2 Mä urusti Elí sacerdotex niyapuniw juykhuptaskäna
1Samuel3:3 Samuelusti Tatitun utapan ikiskarakïna
1Samuel3:4 Ukapachaw Tatitux jupar jawsäna: —¡Samuel! —sasa. Samuelusti sarakïnwa: —¡Akankasktwa! —sasa.
1Samuel3:5 Ukatsti jank'akiw Elí sacerdoten ukar jaläna
1Samuel3:6 Ukampis Tatitux wasitat jawsäna: —¡Samuel! —sasa. Samuelusti sarthapisin wasitat Elí sacerdoten ukar saräna
1Samuel3:7 Samuelux janïraw Tatitur uñt'känti
1Samuel3:8 Ukampis Tatitux kimsa kutin Samuelurux jawsaskakïnwa
1Samuel3:9 Ukat Samuelurux säna: —Ikiñamar sarxam; Tatitutix jawsätamxa: “Tatay parlaskakim
1Samuel3:10 Uka qhipat Tatitux purinïna
1Samuel3:11 Tatitusti sänwa: —Nayax Israel markan may lurä
1Samuel3:12 Uka uruw kuntix Elí sacerdoter wila masinakapxat siskta uk phuqharakï.
1Samuel3:13 Jupax kunjämtix wawanakapax nayar ñanqhachapkitu uk yatïnwa; janiw kunsa wawanakapar kamsaskiti. Ukat jichhax wila masinakapar mutuyäxa
1Samuel3:14 Ukat nayax juramentompi Elí sacerdoten wila masinakapatak arsta
1Samuel3:15 Ukanak ist'asinsti
1Samuel3:16 ukampis Elí sacerdotex jawsasin säna: —¡Samuel
1Samuel3:17 Elí sacerdotex jiskt'arakïnwa: —¿Kuns Tatitux parlawaytam? Jan kuns imt'istati

1Samuel4:1 Samuelusti uka arunak Israel markpacharuw yatiyäna. Khä urunakansti filisteonakax israelitanakampi nuwasiñatakiw tantacht'asipxäna
1Samuel4:2 israelitanakar nuwantañatak wakicht'asisa
1Samuel4:3 Kunapachatix israelitanakan ejercitopax campamentor kutt'xän ukkhasti
1Samuel4:4 Ukatsti
1Samuel4:5 Kunapachatix Tatitun arust'äwi arcapa campamentor puriyanxapxän ukkhasti
1Samuel4:6 Filisteonakasti
1Samuel4:7 walpun axsarthapipxäna
1Samuel4:8 ¡Ay kunakïkan jiwasatakixa! ¿Khitirak jichhasti uka taqi ch'aman Diosan amparapat qhispiyistanisti? ¡Jupaw egipcionakarux wasaran kunayman mutuyäwinakamp tukjäna!
1Samuel4:9 ¡Filisteo soldadonaka
1Samuel4:10 Filisteonakasti israelitanakarux nuwantasin atipt'apxäna
1Samuel4:11 Ukatsti
1Samuel4:12 Ukampisa
1Samuel4:13 Kunapachatix uka soldadox purkän ukkhasti
1Samuel4:14 Elí sacerdotex uka uxtiri ist'asinxa jiskt'arakïnwa: —¿Kunatsa jaqinakax ukataq uxtapxi? —sasa. Uka jaqisti jank'akiw Elí sacerdoterux kunanakatix luraskatayna ukanakat yatiyarakïna
1Samuel4:15 uka urunakansti Elí sacerdotex llätunk tunka kimsaqallqun maranïxänwa
1Samuel4:16 Uka jaqisti Elí sacerdoterux sänwa: —Jichhakiw nuwasïwit jaltanisin purinta —sasa. Elí sacerdotex jiskt'änwa: —Waway
1Samuel4:17 Uka jaqisti sarakïnwa: —Filisteonakax nuwasïwin atipt'apxitu

1Samuel4:19 Elí sacerdoten yuxch'apasti

1Samuel5:1 Filisteonakax Diosan arcapa katuntasisinxa
1Samuel5:2 ukatsti Dagón sat diosan templopar apantasinxa
1Samuel5:3 Qhipärmanthisti

1Samuel5:7 Asdod chiqan utjasirinakasti ukanak uñjasinxa

1Samuel5:9 Ukampis Tatitun arcapa uka markar puripansti
1Samuel5:10 Ukhamïpansti filisteonakax Diosan arcap Ecrón markaruw apxapxäna; ukampis kunapachatix arcax uka markar purkäna ukkhasti

1Samuel6:1 Tatitun arust'äwi arcapax paqallqu phaxsiw filisteonakan uraqipankäna.
1Samuel6:2 Filisteo jaqinakasti
1Samuel6:3 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Jumanakatix Israelan Diosapan arust'äwi arcap kutt'ayañ munapxstaxa
1Samuel6:4 Filisteonakasti jiskt'apxarakïnwa: —¿Kuna waxt'äwirak khuyapayasiñapatak luqtapxiriststi? —sasa. Sacerdotenakasti sapxänwa: —Qurit lursupxam: janchi ch'uphunakar uñtata
1Samuel6:5 Uka layku
1Samuel6:6 Janiy jumanakax Egipton reyipjama
1Samuel6:7 Ukhamasti mä machaq carreta lurayapxam; ukatsti qalluni pä vacanak ajllipxam
1Samuel6:8 Ukatsti Tatitun arust'äwi arcap carretxar apxatapxam
1Samuel6:9 Ukampisa wal uñch'ukipxam: uka carretatix Bet-semes tuqir saranixa
1Samuel6:10 Ukatsti filisteonakax ukham lurapxäna. Uka carreta qatatiñatakix pä vacanak irptanipxäna
1Samuel6:11 Ukatsti Tatitun arust'äwi arcap carreta patxaruw apxatapxäna
1Samuel6:12 Vacanakasti Bet-semes sata thakhinjam warart'asisa chiqak sarapxäna
1Samuel6:13 Bet-semes chiqan utjasirinakasti trigo apthapisipkäna
1Samuel6:14 Kunapachatix uka carretax Bet-semes chiqan Josué chachan uraqipar purkän ukkhasti
1Samuel6:15 Levitanakasti Tatitun arcap apaqxapxänwa
1Samuel6:16 Ukanak uñjasinsti
1Samuel6:17 Kawkïr qurit lurat phisqa ch'uphunaktix filisteonakax pantjasitapat Tatitur luqtapkäna ukanakaxa
1Samuel6:18 qurit lurat achakunakasti filisteonakan phisqa jilïripan markanakapax qawqhäkäntix ukkharakïnwa
1Samuel6:19 Tatitusti Bet-semes chiqan utjasir paqallq tunka chachanakaruw jiwarayäna
1Samuel6:20 Ukatsti Bet-semes chiqan utjasirinakax sapxarakïnwa: “¿Khitirak Qullan Dios Tatitu nayraqatar uñstaspasti? Jichhasti
1Samuel6:21 Uka jak'an mä jisk'a markaw utjäna Quiriat-jearim sutini. Ukatsti uka markankirinakar yatiyiriw khithapxäna: “Filisteo jaqinakax Tatitun arust'äwi arcap kutt'ayanxapxiwa
1Samuel7:1 Ukhamasti Quiriat-jearim chiqan utjasir jaqinakaw jutasin Tatitun arcap apasxapxäna
1Samuel7:2 Arcax pä tunk maraw Quiriat-jearim chiqankäna
1Samuel7:3 Ukat Samuelux israelitanakar säna: “Jumanakatix chiqpachapun Tatitur jaysañ munapxsta ukaxa
1Samuel7:4 Israelitanakasti Baal
1Samuel7:5 Ukatsti Samuelux sarakïnwa: “Israelitanakar Mispá chiqar tantacht'apxam
1Samuel7:6 Israelitanakasti Mispá chiqaruw tantacht'asipxäna
1Samuel7:7 Filisteonakasti israelitanakan Mispá chiqan tantacht'atätap yatisinxa
1Samuel7:8 ukat Samuelur sapxäna: “Tatitu Diosat jiwasanakatak mayiskakim
1Samuel7:9 Samuelusti mä urqu ovej qallu katusin Tatituruw nakt'at wilañcha luqtäna; ukatsti Tatitut wal mayïna

1Samuel7:11 Israelitanakasti
1Samuel7:12 Ukatsti Samuelux mä qal ittasin Mispá
1Samuel7:13 Filisteo jaqinakax atipjat uñjasisin janiw mayampsa israelitanakan uraqiparux mantantapkänti; Samuelun jakañapkamasti Tatitux filisteonakatakiw sayt'asïna.

1Samuel7:15 Samuelux taqi jakäwipan Israel markan jilïripänwa
1Samuel7:16 sapa mararakiw Betel

1Samuel8:2 Jilïri yuqapasti Joel satänwa
1Samuel8:3 Ukampis Samuelun yuqanakapax janiw awkipjam sarnaqapkänti
1Samuel8:4 Ukatsti Israel markan taqpach jilïrinakapaw tantacht'asipxäna
1Samuel8:5 juparusti sapxarakïnwa: “Jumax sinti chuymanïxtawa
1Samuel8:6 Samuelutakisti ukham mä reyi markar apnaqañapatak mayipxatapax janiw walïkänti
1Samuel8:7 Tatitusti juparux sänwa: “Kuntix markax mayktam ukarux jaysaskakim
1Samuel8:8 Kuna urutix Egiptot apsunkta ukürut jichhakamax
1Samuel8:9 Ukhamasti kuntix mayipktam ukarux jaysaskakim; ukampisa nayraqatax qhan jupanakar yatiyam
1Samuel8:10 Samuelusti rey mayir markarux kuntix Tatitux siskatayna uka arunak yatiyäna
1Samuel8:11 sarakïnwa: —Jichhax kawkïr reyitix jumanakar apnaqapkätam ukampix akhamaw suyt'apxtam: Wawanakamar jawsthapisax nuwasiñ carronakaruw uchani
1Samuel8:12 Mayninakarusti waranqa
1Samuel8:13 Phuchhanakamsa jupar luqtiritakiw jawsayani
1Samuel8:14 Jumanakan suma uraqinakamsa
1Samuel8:15 Waña juyranakata
1Samuel8:16 Ukhamarakiw jumanakan uywatanakamsa
1Samuel8:17 Ukhamarus uywanakamatxa sapa tunkat mayäki uk katuntasipxani
1Samuel8:18 Ukampis kunürutix uka jumanakan ajllit reyitak arusipkät ukkhaxa

1Samuel8:20 jupan nanakar apnaqañapataki

1Samuel9:4 Saúl waynasti
1Samuel9:5 Suf chiqar purisinsti

1Samuel9:7 Saulusti sänwa: —Ukhamax sarañäniya
1Samuel9:8 Uywatasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Nayan mä jisk'a qullqikiw utjitu. Uk profetarux churañäni
1Samuel9:9 (Khä urunakanxa

1Samuel9:11 kunapachatix uka amstanjam markar makhatasipkäna ukkhasti
1Samuel9:12 Tawaqunakasti sapxänwa: —Jïsa
1Samuel9:13 Markar purisinsti
1Samuel9:14 Jupanakasti marka tuqir makhatasipkakïnwa. Niya markar purisipkän ukkhasti
1Samuel9:15 Saúl waynan puriniñap nayräx urusti

1Samuel9:18 Markar mantañ punkunkxasinsti
1Samuel9:19 Samuelusti sänwa: —Uñjirix nayätwa. Nayan nayraqatax qullan chiqawjar sarkam

1Samuel9:22 Ukhamasti Samuelux Saúl waynampiru

1Samuel10:1 Ukhamasti Samuel profetax aceiten wayucha katusinxa
1Samuel10:2 Jichhax akat sarxasinsti
1Samuel10:3 Juk'amp sarkasinsti
1Samuel10:4 Jupanakasti aruntapxätamwa
1Samuel10:5 Uka chiqatsti Diosan uraqipa Guibeá chiqaruw purirakïta
1Samuel10:6 Ukapachaw Tatitun ajayupax jumxaru jutani
1Samuel10:7 Kunapachatix taqi ukanakax jumamp luraskani ukkhasti
1Samuel10:8 Jichhasti Guilgal chiqar nayraqat sarkam
1Samuel10:9 Samuelun ukat sarxipansti
1Samuel10:10 Ukatsti Saúl waynampi uywatapampix Guibeá chiqar puripkäna ukkhaxa
1Samuel10:11 Ukampisa khitinakatix Saúl waynar nayratpach uñt'apkäna ukanakasti
1Samuel10:12 Ukat ukankirinakat maynix sarakïna: “¿Khitirak jupanakan awkipasti?” Ukatpï säwix utjixa: “¿Saúl waynax mä profetarakichä?” sasa.
1Samuel10:13 Profetjam parlaña tukuyasasti
1Samuel10:14 Ukansti tiopax jupampiru
1Samuel10:15 Tiopasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —¿Kamsapxaraktam Samuelusti? Yatiyapxitaya —sasa.
1Samuel10:16 Saúl waynasti tioparux sarakïnwa: —Qachu asnonakax uñstxiw sapxituwa —sasa. Ukampisa Saúl waynax janiw kuntix reyïña tuqit Samuelux parlkatayna ukanak jupar arskänti.
1Samuel10:17 Ukxarusti Samuelux israelitanakaruw Mispá chiqan Tatitur yupaychañatak jawsthapïna;
1Samuel10:18 ukansti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Israelan Tatitu Diosapax akham siwa: ‘Nayaw jumanak israelitanakarux Egipto markat irpsunipxsma
1Samuel10:19 Ukampis jichhax jumanakax Diosamarux jisk'achapxtawa
1Samuel10:20 Ukatsti Samuelux Israelan taqpach ayllunakaparuw jak'achasipxañapatak mayïna
1Samuel10:21 Uka qhipatsti Benjamín aylluruw jak'achasiñapatak mayïna
1Samuel10:22 ukat Tatiturux wasitat jiskt'apxäna
1Samuel10:23 Ukatsti kawkhantix imantasitäkän ukkhat irpsuriw jalapxäna. Kunapachatix Saúl waynax marka nayraqatan uñstkän ukkhaxa
1Samuel10:24 Samuelux taqiniruw jiskt'äna: —¿Jichhax kawkïrirutix Tatitux reyit ajlliski ukarux uñkatapxtati? ¡Janiw mä israelitas jupjamax utjkiti! —sasa. Israelitanakasti jach'at art'apxarakïna. —¡Jallalla reyi! —sasa.
1Samuel10:25 Ukspachaw Samuelux kuna kamachinaktix reyix phuqhañapäki ukanak yatiyäna

1Samuel10:27 Ukampis jan wali parliri jaqinakax utjapunïnwa
1Samuel11:1 Nahas sat Amón uraqin reyipasti

1Samuel11:3 Ukatsti Jabés markan utjir jilïri jaqinakax sapxarakïnwa: —Israel markaru khithanak khithañatakix paqallqu uru churapxita; ukat janitix khitis nanakar yanapt'iri jutkani ukkhasti
1Samuel11:4 Khithanakasti kawkhantix Saúl waynax jakkäna uka Guibeá chiqaruw puripxäna; jaqinakarusti kunatix luraskatayna ukanak yatiyapxäna. Uka arunak ist'asasti taqiniw wal jachapxäna.
1Samuel11:5 Ukhamäkipansti Saúl waynax urqu vacanak ant'ataw pampat kutt'asinkäna
1Samuel11:6 Ukanak ist'asinsti
1Samuel11:7 Ukatsti pä urqu vacanak katusin jisk'a jisk'a kharinuqäna
1Samuel11:8 Kunapachatix Saúl waynax Bézec chiqan jaqinakar yatiykän ukkhaxa
1Samuel11:9 Ukatsti purinipki uka khithatanakarux akham sänwa: —Jichhax Jabés chiqan utjiri jaqinakarux sapxam
1Samuel11:10 Nahas chacharusti sapxarakïnwa: —Qharüruw nanakax jumar katuyasxapxäma
1Samuel11:11 Qhipürusti
1Samuel11:12 Ukatsti yaqhip jaqinakax Samuelur sapxänwa: —¿Khitinakas Saúl waynan jiwasan reyisäñapat pächasipxäna? Uka jaqinakar jiwarayañatak nayar katuyapxita —sasa.

1Samuel12:3 jumanak nayraqatanktwa: Nayatix khitin urqu vacapsa

1Samuel12:6 Samuelusti markarux saskakïnwa: —Tatituw Moisés
1Samuel12:7 Ukhamasti jichhax wakichasipxam
1Samuel12:8 Kunapachatix Jacobumpi
1Samuel12:9 Ukampis jupanakax Tatitu Diosapat armasxapxänwa

1Samuel12:11 “Ukat Tatitux Jerubaal
1Samuel12:12 Ukampisa kunapachatix amonitanakan Nahas reyipax jumanakar nuwantir jutkän ukkhaxa
1Samuel12:13 Ukampis jichhax akaxay jumanakan ajllit reyixa. Tatitux kuna reytix mayipkta uk churapxtamwa.
1Samuel12:14 Jichhax jumanakaruw Tatitur yupaychapxañanakamax wakt'apxtam

1Samuel12:16 “Ukhamasti jichhax kawkhankapktatix ukkhat jan unxtapxamti

1Samuel12:22 Tatitusti sutipan sinti jach'ätap laykux janiw apanukupkätamti
