2Kings18:1 Kunapachatix Elá chachan Oseas yuqapax kimsa mara Israel marka apnaqkän ukkhaw

1Chronicles19:3 amonitanakan jilïrinakapax Hanún reyirux sapxänwa: “¿Davidax uka jaqinakapar juma Jach'a reyir chuymacht'iripunit khithanpacha? ¡Janiwa! ¡Chiqpachansa markar uñakipiri
1Chronicles19:4 Ukatsti Hanún reyix Davidan jaqinakaparuw katurayäna
1Chronicles19:5 Kunapachatix Davidar kunatix khä chachanakampi luraskatayna uk yatiyapxäna ukkhaxa
1Chronicles19:6 Amonitanakax Davidan phiñasitap amuyapxäna
1Chronicles19:7 ukatsti kimsa tunka payan waranq nuwasiñ carronak uka qullqimpix mink'apxäna
1Chronicles19:8 Ukampis Davidax yatïnwa
1Chronicles19:9 Amonitanakasti sarasax pachpa marka mantañawjan nuwasiñatakix wakichasipxäna. Kawkïr reyinakatix jutapkatayna ukanakax pamparuw qhiparapxäna.

2Chronicles36:9 Joaquín reyix tunka kimsaqallqun maranïkän ukkhaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna
2Chronicles36:10 Uka marana
2Chronicles36:11 Sedequías reyix pä tunka mayan maranïkän ukkhaw Judá marka apnaqañ qalltäna
2Chronicles36:12 Jupan luräwinakapasti Tatit Diosapan nayraqatapan janiw walïkänti. Jupax Dios tuqit parlir Jeremías profeta nayraqatanxa janiw jisk'ar tukt'känti.

2Chronicles36:19 Ukxarusti Diosan utap phichhantayäna

Nehemiah1:1 Nehemías chachan luräwinakapax akawa
Nehemiah1:2 ukapachasti Hananí mayni jilaxaw Judá uraqit mä qawqha chachanakamp purinïna. Nayasti jupanakarux Jerusalén markat jiskt'asta
Nehemiah1:3 Jupanakasti sapxituwa: “Khitinakatix jaya markar apatäñat jaltapki ukanakaxa
Nehemiah1:4 Uka arunak ist'asasti qunt'asisin jachta
Nehemiah1:5 Jupar akham sarakta: “Alaxpachankir Dios Tatay
Nehemiah1:6 jichhasti israelita luqtirinakamatak arumay uru mayisitaxar ist'itaya. Nanak israelitanakax juma tuq juchachasitanakax uñt'asipxtwa; ¡wila masinakaxasa
Nehemiah1:7 Juma nayraqatan sinti jan walinak lurapxta; arunakamar jan phuqhasaw sarnaqapxta
Nehemiah1:8 Moisesar yatiykäyäta uka arunakat amtasim
Nehemiah1:9 ukampis nanakatix jumar makhatxapxirisma
Nehemiah1:10 “Nanakax juman uywatanakamäpxtwa
Nehemiah1:11 Dios Tatay
Nehemiah2:1 Mä urusti
Nehemiah2:2 ukat jiskt'arakitu: —¿Kunats llakista? Wali llakit uñkatsma. Janirakiw usutjamäktasa
Nehemiah2:3 ukat reyir sista: —¡Wiñayataki reyix jakpan! ¿Kamisarak jan llakitäyästi
Nehemiah2:4 Reyisti jiskt'ituwa: —¿Kunsa jumatak luriristxa? —sasa. Alaxpachankir Tatitun yanapap mayisisaw
Nehemiah2:5 reyirux sarakta: —Juma reyitak askïchi
Nehemiah2:6 Reyisti jupa jak'an qunt'ata reinan ist'kañaw jiskt'itu: —¿Qawqha urus ukankäta? ¿Kunapachas kutt'anxäta? —sasa. Nayax qawqha urunakatix ukankañaxax wakiski uk jupar yatiyta
Nehemiah2:7 Ukhamarus nayax saraktwa: “Juma reyitak askïchi ukaxa
Nehemiah2:8 yaqha qillqatsti reyin ch'umip uñjir Asaf chachatak churawayarakita
Nehemiah2:9 Ukatsti reyix ejercitonkir jilïrinakaru
Nehemiah2:10 Ukampis kunapachatix Horón chiqankir Sambalat chachampi
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalén markar purisinsti
Nehemiah2:12 janiw khitirus kuntix Tatitux Jerusalén layku lurañ amuyt'aykitäna uk arskäyätti. Ukatsti arumaw sartasin mistuwayta
Nehemiah2:13 Uka arumpachaw Qhirwa tuqir mistuñäkis uka punkunjam mistuwayta
Nehemiah2:14 Ukatsti
Nehemiah2:15 Ukkhakamasti arumäskakïnwa. Ukatsti jawir thiyanjam makhatawayta
Nehemiah2:16 Marka apnaqirinakasti janiw yatipkänti nayan kawkiru sarataxsa
Nehemiah2:17 Ukat jupanakar sista: —Jumanakax askiw yatipxtaxa jiwasanakan jan walt'añan jikxatasipxatasxa
Nehemiah2:18 Ukatsti

Nehemiah4:7 Ukampis Sambalat

Nehemiah4:9 Ukatsti nanakax Tatituruw mayisipxta

Nehemiah11:4 Judá ayllunkir Ataías sat chacha
Nehemiah11:5 Maaseías chachan nayra awkinakapa: Baruc
Nehemiah11:6 Fares chachat saraqirinakax pusi pataka suxta tunk kimsaqallquni chachanakaw Jerusalenan jakapxäna

Nehemiah11:8 ukhamaraki Salú chachan Gabai

Nehemiah11:23 reyiw q'uchurinakan sapüru lurañanakapat arsurakitayna.

Nehemiah12:21 Hilquías wila masitxa

Nehemiah12:23 Levitanakan wila masipankir jilïr irpirinakapax crónicas qillqatan qillqantatäpxänwa
Nehemiah12:24 Levitanakan jilïri irpirinakapasti akanakänwa: Hasabías
Nehemiah12:25 Mantañäki uka punkunak uñjirinakasti akanakänwa: Matanías
Nehemiah12:26 Uka chachanakax Josué chachan Joacín yuqapan urunakapan jakapxäna. Kunapachatix Nehemiasax marka apnaqkän uka urunakana
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalén pirqa luqtañ urux purinxän ukkhasti
Nehemiah12:28 Q'uchuri levitanakasti Jerusalén marka thiyanakatpach jutapxäna
Nehemiah12:29 Guilgal chiqan utjkis uka utanakata
Nehemiah12:30 Ukapachasti sacerdotenakampi
Nehemiah12:31 Ukatxa pirqa patxaruw Judá marka apnaqir jilïrinakar makhatayta
Nehemiah12:32 Q'uchurinakan qhipapsti Hosaías chachaw saräna
Nehemiah12:33 ukanakasti: Azarías
Nehemiah12:34 Judá

Nehemiah12:37 Uma Jalsu punku satäki ukkhar purisasti

Nehemiah12:39 Efrainan punkup chiq sarakipawayapxta

Nehemiah12:46 Nayrapachaxa
Nehemiah12:47 Ukhamasti
Nehemiah13:1 Mä urusti
Nehemiah13:2 Uka jaqinakasti mä kutix
Nehemiah13:3 Ukhamasti
Nehemiah13:4 Uka nayraqatasti
Nehemiah13:5 Tobiasarux mä jach'a uta churatayna; kawkhantix nayrapachax waxt'äwinaka
Nehemiah13:6 Eliasib sacerdotex uk lurkatayna ukkhaxa
Nehemiah13:7 ukat Jerusalenar nayax kutt'anta. Ukhamat uñjta Eliasib ukan jan wali luratapa
Nehemiah13:8 Uka luratapasti janiw nayatak walïkänti
Nehemiah13:9 Ukatxa uka uta q'umachayta
Nehemiah13:10 Ukatsti kuntix levitanakaru churañax wakt'ki ukanak jan churapxatap yatirakta
Nehemiah13:11 Ukat jilïri irpirinakarux tuqinuqarakta
Nehemiah13:12 Judänkirinakasti sapa tunkat maya churäwi pirwanakar apanipxäna: trigo

Nehemiah13:31 lawa apanirinakaruw utt'ayta
Esther1:1 Asuero reyix Persia jach'a marka apnaqkäna uka urunakan taqi akanakax lurasïna. Uka markasti pataka pä tunka paqallquni suyunakanïnwa
Esther1:2 Asuero reyin marka apnaqañ jach'a utapax Susa markan utt'ayatänwa.
Esther1:3 Asuero reyix marka apnaqäwip kimsa mara phuqkasaxa
Esther1:4 Reyisti marka apnaqäwipan qamir kankañap uñacht'ayañ amtampiw uka phunchhäwi luräna
Esther1:5 tukuyasinsti
Esther1:6 Reyin jach'a utap anqäxasti suma k'achacht'atänwa
Esther1:7 Umañanakxa qurita lurat qirunakat umapxäna
Esther1:8 Ukampisa
Esther1:9 Asuero reyin utapanxa
Esther1:10 Phunchhäwin paqallq urüxipansti
Esther1:11 kankañ pillump ucht'at Vasti reinar irptanipxañapataki
Esther1:12 Ukampis reinaxa
Esther1:13 kamachinakxat yatxatatanakar jiskt'asïna
Esther1:14 Reyin yanapir jaqinakapax paqallqunïnwa: Carsená
Esther1:15 Reyisti jupanakarux jiskt'änwa: —Kamachi arunakarjamasti
Esther1:16 Ukatsti jach'a tantachasïwin jilïrinakap nayraqatan Memucán chachax reyir sarakïna: —Vasti reinax ukham luratapampix janiw juma reyiruki chuymam ust'aykiti
Esther1:17 Kuntix reinax lurki uksti taqi warminakaw yatipxani
Esther1:18 Persa
Esther1:19 Ukhamasti
Esther1:20 Aka kamachix taqpach markanakan yatiyatäñapawa
Esther1:21 Ukhamasti
Esther1:22 Ukatsti jach'a markapan utjir suyunakaruw qillqatanakap apayäna
Esther2:1 Ukat mä qawqha urunakatsti
Esther2:2 Jilïri yanapirinakapasti sapxänwa: —Reyitakix suma uñnaqt'an jiwa tawaqunak thaqhañaw wakisi.
Esther2:3 Reyix jach'a markapankir sapa suyutxa yanapirinak utt'aypan
Esther2:4 Kawkïr tawaqutix reyin chuymapar purkirjamächini uka tawaquw Vasti lanti reinan qunuñapan qunt'asini —sasa. Uka amuyusti reyitakix wali sumänwa
Esther2:5 Susa markan mä judío jaqiw jakasïna Mardoqueo sutini
Esther2:6 Mardoqueo chacharux Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyiw Jerusalenat apanukuyäna
Esther2:7 Mardoqueox mä prima kullakanïnwa
Esther2:8 Reyin kamachipax yatisxäna ukapachasti
Esther2:9 Hegai chachatakisti Ester tawaqux chuymapar purkirïnwa
Esther2:10 Ester tawaqux kuna markat jutatapsa
Esther2:11 Mardoqueosti sapüruw warminakan utap uñkatasin saranaqäna
Esther2:12 Uka tawaqunakax tunka payan phaxsiw jiwakïpxañapatak wakichasipxirïna. Suxta phaxsix mirrat apsut aceitempiw janchinakap jawisipxäna
Esther2:13 Sapa mayni tawaquw reyin utapar sarañatakix isinakat sipana
Esther2:14 Sapa tawaqusti arum tuqiruw reyin utapar sarirïna
Esther2:15 Kunapachatix Esteraru
Esther2:16 Ukatsti Tébet sata tunka phaxsi saraqataruw Ester tawaqurux Asuero reyin utapar irpapxäna
Esther2:17 Asuero reyix Ester tawaquruw mayni tawaqunakat sipan wal munäna
Esther2:18 Ukatsti Ester reinatakix mä jach'a manq'äwi wakichayäna
Esther2:19 Kunapachatix tawaqunakax warminakan utapat yaqha utar sarasipkäna uka uruxa
Esther2:20 Mardoqueon iwxataparjamasti
Esther2:21 Mardoqueox reyin utap punkun qunt'atäskänwa
Esther2:22 Ukham jan wali amtatanakap ist'asinsti Mardoqueox Ester reinaruw yatiyir saräna. Ester reinasti Mardoqueon sutipxaruw reyir yatiyarakïna.
Esther2:23 Reyisti uka jan wali amtatanakxat sum yatxatayäna. Chiqätap yatisinsti
Esther3:1 Ukat mä qawqha urunakatsti
Esther3:2 Reyin utapan luqtirinakasti reyin arsutap phuqhañatakix Amán chachan nayraqatapan killt'asipxäna
Esther3:3 Ukham uñjasinsti reyin taqi luqtirinakapax Mardoqueoruw jiskt'apxäna: “¿Kunats reyin arsutaparux jan jaysañ munkta?” sasa.
Esther3:4 Sapürus ukak juparux jiskhisipkäna
Esther3:5 Amán chachasti Mardoqueon jupataki jan killt'asitapa
Esther3:6 Mardoqueon judiötap yatisaxa
Esther3:7 Mara qallta Nisán sat phaxsina
Esther3:8 Ukatsti Amán chachax Asuero reyir akham säna: —Jach'a munañan rey
Esther3:9 Ukhamasti
Esther3:10 Ukatsti reyix amparapat surtijap apsusisin judionakar uñisir Amán chacharuw churäna
Esther3:11 akham sasa: —Qullqimax jumatakïskpan
Esther3:12 Mara qallta phaxsina tunka kimsani uru saraqatarusti reyix qillqirinakaparuw jawsayäna
Esther3:13 ukatsti
Esther3:14 Uka kamachisti taqpach suyunakan utjir markanakan yatiyasïna
Esther3:15 Qillqat apirinakasti jank'akiw reyir jaysasax apapxäna. Uka kamachix Susa markansa yatisirakïnwa
Esther4:1 Mardoqueox taqi kunatix utjkäna ukanak yatisinxa
Esther4:2 Ukhampachaw reyin utap punkurux purïna. Ukampis chhankha isimp isthapitax janiw reyin utapar mantañax wakiskänti.
Esther4:3 Kawkha suyunakarutix reyin qillqatapax purkäna ukkhanxa
Esther4:4 Ester reinar luqtirinakampi
Esther4:5 Ukat Ester reinax Hatac sat chachar jawsäna
Esther4:6 Hatac chachasti Mardoqueomp parliriw saräna. Jupax marka plazankaskänwa
Esther4:7 Mardoqueosti kunanakatix yatiskäna ukanak taqpach jupar yatiyäna
Esther4:8 Ukatsti Susa markan judionakar jiwarayañatak reyin arsutapa qillqatat waraqata Ester reinar churañapatak katuyäna
Esther4:9 Hatac chachasti kutt'xasin Ester reinaru kunanaktix Mardoqueox siskatayna ukanak yatiyäna.
Esther4:10 Ester reinasti wasitat Hatac chachar Mardoqueo ukar khithäna
Esther4:11 “Reyir luqtirinakasa
Esther4:12 Mardoqueosti Ester reinan yatiyäwip katuqasinxa
Esther4:13 reinarux akham iwxarakïna: “Ester
Esther4:14 Jichhatix jumax jan kuns kamskäta ukaxa
Esther4:15 Ester reinasti akham sasaw Mardoqueorux iwxarakïna:
Esther4:16 “Saram
Esther4:17 Mardoqueosti sarasinxa

Job1:1 Uz sat chiqan mä chachaw utjäna Job sutini. Jupasti aski
Job1:2 Job chachax paqallqu yuqani
Job1:3 jupax paqallqu waranqa ovejani
Job1:4 Job chachan yuqanakapax sapa mayniw urupan jach'a manq'äwinak utapan lurapxirïna
Job1:5 Uka manq'äwi qhipatsti
Job1:6 Mä urux Tatitun ukaruw uñstir jutapxäna alaxpachan luqtirinakapaxa
Job1:7 Tatitusti juchañchir angelaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Kawkitsa jumax jutta? —sasa. Juchañchir angelasti sänwa: —Nayax uraqi maysat maysa muytanïwit jutaskta —sasa.
Job1:8 Ukat Tatitux juchañchir angelar sarakïna: —¿Job luqtirixar uñjaniwaytati? Janiw khitis jupjamax uraqin utjkiti. Jupax chiqap jakiri aski jaqiwa
Job1:9 Ukxaruw juchañchir angelax sarakïna: —Jupax janiw inak jumar luqtktamti.
Job1:10 Jumax janiw khitin jupar llamkt'añapsa munktati
Job1:11 Kunanakapatix utjki ukanak apaqxam
Job1:12 Tatitusti juchañchir angelarux sarakïnwa: —Ukhamax walikiwa. Kunjämarutix jumax Job chachan taqi yänakapamp lurañ munkta ukhamar luram
Job1:13 Mä urusti
Job1:14 mä jaqiw Job chachan utapar purinïna akham sasa: —Nanakax vacanakampiw yapu qhullisipkäyäta
Job1:15 ukatsti akatjamat sabeo sat jaqinakax jutasin uywanak lunthatawayapxitu
Job1:16 Uka jaqix janïraw parlañsa tukuykänti
Job1:17 Uka jaqisti janïraw parlañsa tukuykänti
Job1:18 Ukham parlkipan maynix purinirakïna
Job1:19 ukhamaruw akatjamat wasar tuqit thayax thayt'anisin utar pusi tuqitpach unxtayi
Job1:20 Job chachasti uk ist'asin
Job1:21 Ukat säna: —Nayax taykaxan purakapat q'alalakiw yurta
Job1:22 Ukhamäkipansa
Job2:1 Yaqha urusti
Job2:2 Tatitusti juchañchir angelaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Kawkitsa jumax jutaskta? —sasa. Juchañchir angelasti sänwa: —Nayax uraqi maysat maysa muytanïwit jutaskta —sasa.
Job2:3 Ukat Tatitux juchañchir angelar jiskt'arakïna: —¿Job luqtirixar uñjaniwaytati? Janiw khitis uraqin jupjama chiqa
Job2:4 Ukat juchañchir angelax Tatitur sarakïna: —Mä jaqin jakañaptix jan khitis llamkt'kani ukaxa
Job2:5 Jichhasti janchipar llamkt'am
Job2:6 Diosasti juchañchir angelar sarakïnwa: —Walikiwa
Job2:7 Ukatsti juchañchir angelax Tatitun ukat mistuwayxasin
Job2:8 Ukat Job chachax qhilla taypir qunur saräna
Job2:9 Warmipasti jupar sänwa: —¿Jumax ukhampachas suma jaqïñ munaskaktati? ¡Diosar ñanqhacham
Job2:10 Job chachasti sarakïnwa: —¡Warmi
Job2:11 Job chachan kimsa jilat masinakapaw utjäna: Temán chiqankir Elifaz; Súah chiqankir Bildad; Naamat chiqankir Zofar ukanaka. Jupanakasti Job chachan ukham jan walt'añanakar puritap yatisin
Job2:12 Job chachan ukar purisinsti
Job2:13 Ukatsti Job chachamp chikaw qunt'asipxäna. Jupanakasti paqallqu urumpi paqallqu arumampiw ukankapxäna
Job3:1 Job chachax janiw amukïrjamäkxänti ukat arsusxäna
Job3:2 
Job3:3 ¡Nayax jakañ qalltkäyät uka arumax ñanqhachatäpan! ¡Nayax yurkta uka urus ñanqhachatarakïpan!
Job3:4 ¡Uka urux ch'amakar tukukisapäna
Job3:5 ¡Khä arumax ch'iyär qinay ch'amakan chhaqtakisapäna

Job29:24 Lart'asis jupanakar uñkatkäyät ukkhasti

Job30:1 Jichhasti sullka waynanakakiw nayat larusipxitu
Job30:2 ¿Kunatakis nayax ch'amap muniriskäyätxa? Jupanakax janiw kuna ch'amanïpkänsa
Job30:3 manq'atjam aynacht'atäpxatap layku
Job30:4 alinak taypit k'allk'u quranakak jik'iqasipxäna
Job30:5 Taqi jaqinakansa jupanakax uñisitaw sarnaqapxäna
Job30:6 qarqa putunakana
Job30:7 alinak taypin wararisa
Job30:8 Jan kunatak aski jaqinakäpxänwa
Job30:9 Ukampisa jichhax jupanakaw nayat sawkasipxi
Job30:10 Axtasisaw nayat jithiqtawayapxi
Job30:11 Jan yäqata
Job30:12 Jak'axaruw tantacht'asipxi
Job30:13 Thakhixsa nayar t'unjañatakiw jark'antapxi
Job30:14 P'iyantat pirqa chiqas jutantapkaspa ukhamaw jach'at warart'asis nayar chhukxatanipxitu.
Job30:15 Axsarañaw nayar khathatiyitu; nayan jaqi kankañaxax mä thayjamakiw sarawayxi
Job30:16 Janiw jakañatak ch'amaxax utjkxituti; llakisiñakiw nayarux katuntxitu.
Job30:17 Usuñax ch'akhakamaw puritu; arumanakas wal t'aqhisiyarakitu.
Job30:18 Diosax nayar kunkat katuntitu; ch'amampiw isixa ch'iyanuqaraki.
Job30:19 Ñiq'iruw liwintitu
Job30:20 Dios Tatay
Job30:21 Nayatakisti wali qhuruw tukxtaxa
Job30:22 Thayampiw apayista
Job30:23 juman nayar jiwañar apañ munatam yatistwa
Job30:24 ¿Janit nayasti pisin jakasir jaqir yanapkatätsti janit aynacht'at uñjasitapat yanapt'katätsti?
Job30:25 ¿Janit t'aqhisir jaqit jachkatätsti? ¿Janit pist'ayasir jaqit khuyapt'ayaskatätsti?
Job30:26 Nayax kusisiñ suyt'askäyäta
Job30:27 Chuymaxax walpun usutu; jan samart'asaw putuqitu
Job30:28 Sarnaqäwixax llakisiñakiwa
Job30:29 Qamaqinakan jilapäkiristsa ukhamätwa
Job30:30 Janchixas ch'iyäraw tukuwayxi
Job30:31 Arpanakana
Job31:1 Naya pachpaw chuymaxan amtasta
Job31:2 ¿Kunarak nayast alaxpachankir taqi ch'aman Diosat katuqtsti?
Job31:3 ¡Ñanqha jucharar jaqir wakt'ki uka t'aqhisiñaki!
Job31:4 Amuyatax Diosax janis uñjkitaspa ukhama janiraki luräwinakax uñjkaspa ukhamawa.
Job31:5 Nayax juramentompiw arsta
Job31:6 ¡Diosax nayar yant'itpan
Job31:7 Nayatix chiqa thakhit saranuksta
Job31:8 ukapachasti
Job31:9 Mä warmimpitix sallqjayastxa
Job31:10 warmixax yaqha jaqin uywatapar tukpan
Job31:11 Uka luräwinakax jach'a p'inqäspawa; mutuñ katuqañas wakisirakispawa.
Job31:12 Tukjir ninar uñtatäspawa
Job31:13 Uywatanakaxatix kunsa mayipkitän ukapachaxa
Job31:14 Jan ukasti
Job31:15 Pachpa Diosakiw taykasan purakapan irnuqasistu
Job31:16 Jan kunan jaqirux pist'ayasiñapan yanapt'apunïyätwa
Job31:17 Janipuniw naya sapaki manq'ataxax utjkiti wajchar manq'a jan waxt'asa.
Job31:18 Awkipäkiristsa ukhampun wajcharux uñjäyäta
Job31:19 Kunapachatix maynix jan isin uñjasïnxa
Job31:20 ovejanakaxan t'awrapat isi lurasin churirïyäta
Job31:21 Janipuniw kunapachas taripirinakamp sumankataxat wajcharux axsarayirïkti.
Job31:22 Uka arunakatix jan chiqäkchi ukaxa
Job31:23 Nayax Diosan mutuyäwip axsarayätwa; ¡Janiw ch'aman kankañaparus ch'urkhiskiriskäyätti!
Job31:24 Janipuniw qamir kankañar alkatasis sarnaqkäyätti.
Job31:25 Janipuniw walja qamir yänakäniñax kusisiñaxäkänti
Job31:26 Intin k'ajatap uñjta
Job31:27 ukampis janipuniw ukanakarux jamasansa qhanansa yupaychkti.
Job31:28 Uka lurañax mutuñ katuqañatakïsapänwa
Job31:29 Janipuniw uñisirixan aynacht'atapat kusiskäyätti
Job31:30 Janipuniw uñisirixarux ñanqhachkäyätti
Job31:31 Nayamp chika utjirinakatix jaya markat jutirinakar jan walinak lurañ munapxäna ukapachasti
Job31:32 nayax janipuniw uka jaqirux anqar ikiyirïkti. Thakhi saririnakarux utaxarupuniw katuqirïyäta.
Job31:33 Janipuniw mayninakjamax jucha luratanakax imantkäyätti
Job31:34 jaqinakar axsaratax layku. Janipuniw wila masinakaxamp jan jisk'achayasiñ laykux kunapachas ukanakxa jamasar imxäskäyätti.
Job31:35 ¡Khitikis nayar ist'itaspa! Arsutaxsti
Job31:36 ukanaksti taqi chuymaw katuqä
Job31:37 Nayax taqi lurataxat Diosar katuyä
Job31:38 Uraqinakaxax janiw nayatak arnaqasis alaxpachar mayipkiti
Job31:39 Ukampis maynirutix achunakap nayax lunthatsta
Job31:40 ¡uraqinakaxan trigo lantix ch'aphinak achpan

Job37:12 qhixu qhixunakasti q'iwi q'iwiw alaxpachanjam sari

Job38:1 Tatitusti Job chacharux mä jach'a thaya taypitpach parlanïna:
Job38:2 ¿Khitïtas jumax nayan yatiñ kankañaxat pächasiri
Job38:3 Jichhax jan axsarirïtam uñacht'ayita
Job38:4 Nayax aka uraqi utt'aykäyäta ukapachasti ¿kawkinkarakïyätasti? ¡Jumatix chiqpacha sum yatsta ukapachax sitaya!
Job38:5 ¿Khitirak aka uraqin ukch'äñapatak arsusti
Job38:6 ¿Kunxar utt'ayatas taqpach uraqixa? ¿Khitis thurxäsir qala uchantixa?
Job38:7 ¡Jumax janiw ukankkäyätati
Job38:8 Jach'a qutax uraqi manqhat mistunkän ukapachax
Job38:9 Nayaw ukarux mä isimpjam qinayanak muyuntayta
Job38:10 Nayaw jach'a qutarux qurpa uskta
Job38:11 Ukatsti qutarux saraktwa: “Akakamakiw purinïta
Job38:12 Jan ukax ¿kunapachach jumax uru qhanjtaytaxa
Job38:13 ¿Kunapachach jakañaman aka uraqir sista
Job38:14 Kunapachatix machaq urun qhanapax
Job38:15 ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw urun qhanapamp walt'asipkiti; ukapachaw ch'aman kankañapax tukusiwayxi.
Job38:16 ¿Jumax jach'a quta manqhanakkam manttati
Job38:17 ¿Kawkhankis axsarkay jiwañan punkupaxa
Job38:18 ¿Aka uraqin jach'ätapsa amuytati? ¡Chiqpachan taqi kun yatsta ukax
Job38:19 ¿Kawkin imatäskis qhanampi
Job38:20 ¿Jumasti ukanakar mä thiyakam puriyañ yattati
Job38:21 ¡Walja maranakanïxatam laykux jumax yatpachätawa
Job38:22 ¿Jumax purtati kawkharutix nayax khunumpi
Job38:23 Nayaw llaki pachanakatak taqi ukanak imta
Job38:24 ¿Qhixu qhixunakan kawsaru saratapsa yattati? ¿Inti jalsu thayan uraqir kunjäm thayt'atapsa yattati?
Job38:25 ¿Khitin jallu purxatayatapsa
Job38:26 ¿Khitin wasar uraqin jallu puriyatapsa
Job38:27 uka waña uraqinak qarpatapsa
Job38:28 ¿Khitirak jallumpiru
Job38:29 ¿Khitirak chhullunkhayampiru
Job38:30 ¿Khitirak umanak chhullunkt'ayisti
Job38:31 ¿Jumätati Pléyades warawaranakar tantachirixa
Job38:32 ¿Jumätati qhantati warawarar wakisitapar mistuyirixa? ¿Jumätati Osa Mayor
Job38:33 ¿Yattati jumax alaxpach apnaqäwi kamachinakxa? ¿Jumati uka kamachinakarjam aka uraqin apnaqaraktaxa?
Job38:34 ¿Jumasti qinayanakan ist'añapkam art'asismati jumaru umampi chhaqtayañapatakisti?
Job38:35 ¿Jumati qhixu qhixunakar sarañap uñacht'aytaxa? ¿Qhixu qhixusti “Akäsktwa” sasati jaysaraktamsti?
Job38:36 ¿Khitirak ibis jamach'ir yatiñ churi
Job38:37 ¿Khitirak wali ch'ikhi kankañani qinayanak jakht'añatakisti? ¿Khitirak uka qinayanakat jalluyanirakispa
Job38:38 laq'ax ñiq'ir tukuñapataki
Job38:39 ¿Jumat qachu leonanakatak manq'añ thaqharaptaxa
Job38:40 putunakapar imantasipki ukapacha
Job38:41 ¿Khitirak allqamarinakar manq'ayisti
Job39:1 ¿Kunapachas ch'uminkir cabritonakax qalluchapki uk yattati? ¿Qachu tarujanakan wawachasitap uñjaraktacha?
Job39:2 ¿Qawqha phaxsitsa wawachasipki uk yattati?
Job39:3 Wawachasiñatakix k'umthapipxiwa
Job39:4 Uka qallunakasti wali ch'amaniw jilarapxi
Job39:5 ¿Khitirak ch'uminkir asnor antutnukusti? ¿Khitirak ukham antutnukut sarnaqayisti?
Job39:6 Nayaw ukarux kawkhantix jakañapäki uk uñacht'ayta
Job39:7 Janiw ukanakax markan uxutanakaparux yäqkiti
Job39:8 Qullu patanakan quranak thaqhasaw sarnaqi
Job39:9 ¿Amuyatamat ch'uminkir urqu vacax jumar luqtiristamti
Job39:10 ¿Jumasti uka urqu vacar yapt'asina qhulliyasmati
Job39:11 ¿Jumasti uka urqu vacan ch'amanïtap layku alkatasismati
Job39:12 ¿Amuyatamat yapum apthapiñatak walikïspati
Job39:13 Uñtam
Job39:14 k'awnanakapsa ch'alla patarukiw apanukuwayi
Job39:15 Jupax janiw amuykiti mä khitinsa ukanakar takxatañapxa
Job39:16 Chhiwchhinakapatakix wali qhuruw tuku
Job39:17 Nayaw juparux amuyt'a jan churkti; suma amuyt'asiñsa jan churkaraktti.
Job39:18 Ukampis chhiqhanakap janatataski ukkhasti
Job39:19 ¿Jumat caballor ch'am churtasti
Job39:20 ¿Jumat caballor t'iju t'ijunakar uñtat thuqnaqaytasti
Job39:21 Wali jach'a tukuñampiw uraqin thawirasi
Job39:22 Janiw kunarus axsarkiti
Job39:23 Jupa patan anttut'añ mich'inakax suxuqiski
Job39:24 Janis kunäkasp ukhamak wali jaya thakhinak jalawayi; trompeta phust'asipansti janiw inakt'irjamäkiti.
Job39:25 Trompetan phust'atap ist'asasti qanchisiwa
Job39:26 ¿Jumasti wali yatiñanipunïtati pakalirus jalnaqañ yatichañataki
Job39:27 ¿Jumati pakali jach'a jamach'iru
Job39:28 Pakalix uruy arumaw jach'a qarqa patanakan jaki
Job39:29 Uka patatpach uñch'ukisini katuntkani ukar qhamisiyaraki.
Job39:30 Pakali qallunakapax wila juchhapxi
Job40:1 Jumax nayar taripäwi qalltañ munäyätaxa
Job40:2 
Job40:3 ¿Kunarak naya jan kunatak aski jaqisti arsusiriststi? Nayax amukt'xakïwa.
Job40:4 
Job40:5 Mayampi
Job40:6 Tatitux jach'a thaya taypitpach Job chachar wasitat parlxayani:
Job40:7 Jichhax jan axsarirïtam uñacht'ayita
Job40:8 ¿Jumax nayar jan chiqapätaxatti juchañchañ munista
Job40:9 ¿Jumax nayjam ch'amanïtati? ¿Jach'at arsutamas nayan arsutaxjamati?

Psalms37:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakar uñjasax jan q'apisimti
Psalms37:2 jupanakax jank'akiw alinakjam pharsupxi; ¡ch'uxña qurjamaw wañsupxi!
Psalms37:3 Tatitur taqi chuymamp alkatasax ask luram
Psalms37:4 Tatiturux suma chuymamp munasim
Psalms37:5 Tatitun amparapar sarnaqäwim katuyasim; jupar taqi chuymamp alkatam
Psalms37:6 Aski kankañam taqinin uñjkay qhantayani
Psalms37:7 Tatitun nayraqatapan amukt'am; jupan yanapap llamp'u chuymamp suyam. Ñanqha lurir jaqin nayrar sartatapat jan q'apisimti
Psalms37:8 Q'apisiñ apanukum
Psalms37:9 Ñanqha luririnakax markat jaqunukutäpxaniwa
Psalms37:10 Mä juk'a urunakatsti ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw utjkxaniti; jupanakar thaqkätasa
Psalms37:11 Llamp'u chuymaninakax suma uraqi katuqapxani
Psalms37:12 Ñanqha lurir jaqix
Psalms37:13 Tatitusti uka ñanqha jaqit larusiwa
Psalms37:14 Ñanqha jaqinakax espadanakap apsusipxi
Psalms37:15 Ukampis pachpa espadapaw chuymapar chhuqhuntani
Psalms37:16 Aski jaqin mä juk'ak utjatapaxa
Psalms37:17 Tatitux ñanqha jaqinakarux tukjaniwa
Psalms37:18 Tatitux aski jaqinakarux imasipuniwa
Psalms37:19 Jan wali urunakan manq'añax jan utjkani ukkhaxa
Psalms37:20 Ñanqha jaqinakax waña alinakar uñtataw nakhapxani
Psalms37:21 Ñanqha jaqix mayt'asisin janiw kutt'aykxiti
Psalms37:22 Tatitun qullanaptayat jaqinakax suma uraqi katuqasipxani
Psalms37:23 Tatitux jaqirux suma thakhinjam irpi
Psalms37:24 liwisin ukasa
Psalms37:25 Nayax waynäyätwa
Psalms37:26 Aski jaqix sapüruw khuyapayasi
Psalms37:27 Ñanqha lurañat jithiqtasim
Psalms37:28 Tatitux aski kankañar muniriwa
Psalms37:29 Aski jaqinakax suma uraqi katuqapxani
Psalms37:30 Aski jaqix yatiñ kankañampiw parli; chiqa jaqisti chiqap parli.

Psalms77:5 Nayra pacha urunak amthapta

Psalms77:9 ¿Diosax munasiñapat armasxpachati? jan ukax

Psalms105:10 Jacobutak kamachi utt'ayatapata

Psalms106:1 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur yuspagarapxam
Psalms106:2 ¿Khitirak Diosan muspharkañ luräwinakap arsuspasti? ¿Khitirak aytat kankañapat jach'añchaspasti?
Psalms106:3 Chiqa kankañar yäqirinakax kusisiñaniwa
Psalms106:4 Tatay
Psalms106:5 ajllitanakaman kusisiñap uñjañaxataki
Psalms106:6 Nayra awkinakaxar uñtataw jucha lurapxta; kunayman ñanqhanaka
Psalms106:7 Egipto markankapkäna ukkhaxa
Psalms106:8 Ukampis juma
Psalms106:9 Mar Rojo qutaruw tuqinuqäyätaxa
Psalms106:10 Ukham lurasaw uñisirin amparapat qhispiyäyätaxa
Psalms106:11 Jalxatirinakarux umaw axskatayäna
Psalms106:12 Ukat Diosan arunakapar iyawsapxäna
Psalms106:13 Ukampis mäkiw Diosan luräwinakap armasipxäna
Psalms106:14 Khä ch'usa wasaran Diosarux yant'apxäna
Psalms106:15 Ukat Diosax jupanakan mayitaparjam churäna
Psalms106:16 Chhujllanak taypin Moisesar uñisipxäna
Psalms106:17 Ukat uraqix jist'artäna
Psalms106:18 ¡Ninaw jupanakxarux nakhäna! ¡Nina lawrax ñanqha luririnakaruw nakhantäna!
Psalms106:19 Horeb qullun vaca qallu lursusipxäna
Psalms106:20 ¡qhapaq Tatit Dios lantix qura manq'ir vacan uñnaqap uchasipxäna!
Psalms106:21 Qhispiyir Diosapat armasipxäna
Psalms106:22 Cam uraqin muspharkañanak lurkipansa
Psalms106:23 Diosax jupanakar tukjañ munäna; jupan ajllit Moisesasti
Psalms106:24 Uka qhipatsti munkay uraqiruw jisk'achapxäna
Psalms106:25 utanakap taypin Tatitutak arusipxäna
Psalms106:26 Tatitusti jupanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw juramento luräna
Psalms106:27 wawanakapar jiwarayañataki
Psalms106:28 Pegor chiqan Baal diosan luqtiriparuw tukupxäna
Psalms106:29 Ñanqha luratanakapampix Diosaruw q'apisiyapxäna
Psalms106:30 Finees chachasti juchanirux juchap uñt'ayäna
Psalms106:31 Finees chachan aski luräwipatxa
Psalms106:32 Meribá umanak jak'an Tatiturux q'apisiyapxäna
Psalms106:33 jupan chuymap mayjt'ayapxäna
Psalms106:34 Tatitun aruparjamax janiw markanakar t'unjapkänti
Psalms106:35 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakampiw chikachasipxäna
Psalms106:36 diosanakaparuw yupaychapxäna
Psalms106:37 yuqanakapampi
Psalms106:38 Jan juchan jaqin wilap wartapxäna
Psalms106:39 luräwinakapampiw q'añuchasipxäna
Psalms106:40 Tatitux markapatakiw q'apisïna
Psalms106:41 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakaruw katxaruyäna
Psalms106:42 timanakapax t'aqhisiyänwa
Psalms106:43 Walja kutiw Tatitux jupanakar qhispiyäna: jupanakasti amtataparux saykatapxänwa
Psalms106:44 Ukampis Tatitux ayqupxatap uñtanïna
Psalms106:45 jupanakamp arust'äwi luratat amtasïna
Psalms106:46 jupanakar katuntirinakampis khuyapayasiñampiw uñjayäna.
Psalms106:47 ¡Tatit Diosaxay
Psalms106:48 Israelan Tatit Diosapax wiñayan wiñayapatak jach'añchatäpan. Taqpach markax sispan: “¡Ukhamäpan!” sasa. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!
Psalms107:1 Tatitur yuspagarapxam
Psalms107:2 Tatitun qhispiyatanakax arsupxpan
Psalms107:3 markanak taypit tantachthapitanaka
Psalms107:4 Jupanakax ch'usa wasaran muyupxäna
Psalms107:5 manq'at awtjayasipxäna
Psalms107:6 Ukampis t'aqhisiñankasin Tatitur art'asipxäna
Psalms107:7 Chiqa thakhiruw jupanakarux irpxatäna
Psalms107:8 Tatiturux khuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapxam
Psalms107:9 Umat pharjatanakaruw um churi
Psalms107:10 Jupanakax axsarkay ch'amakan jakapxäna
Psalms107:11 Tatitun arsutanakapar qallasipxatap laykuw t'aqhisipxäna
Psalms107:12 Diosax ch'ama tukuñ lurañanakampiw aynacht'ayäna; lanqtasisaw liwisipxäna
Psalms107:13 T'aqhisiñankasinsti Tatitut art'asipxäna
Psalms107:14 ch'amak laxa taypit irpsüna
Psalms107:15 Tatiturux munasiñapat yuspagarapxam
Psalms107:16 ¡Jupaw broncet lurat punkunak t'unjäna! ¡Jupaw hierrot lurat jist'añanak p'akiräna!
Psalms107:17 Ñanqha luratanakap laykuw usuntapxäna
Psalms107:18 manq'atakix axtasxapxänwa; ¡jiwan punkupan jikxatasipxäna!

Proverbs9:18 Ukampis uka pisi chuyman jaqinakax janiw yatipkiti

Proverbs19:2 Jan sum amuyt'as lurañax janiw walïkiti; mäki lurañanakanxa
Proverbs19:3 Jaqix jan amuyt'asirïtap laykuw aynacht'i
Proverbs19:4 Qamir yänakax walja masinak utjayi
Proverbs19:5 K'arisis irkatir jaqix
Proverbs19:6 Waxt'asir jaqirux
Proverbs19:7 Jan kunan jaqirux pachpa jilanakapas jisk'achiwa
Proverbs19:8 Yatiñ kankañ jikxatirixa
Proverbs19:9 K'arisis irkatir jaqix
Proverbs19:10 Jan amuyt'an jaqin qamirinakjam jakañapax janiw wakt'kiti
Proverbs19:11 Yatiñ kankañan jaqix janiw mäk mayjt'askiti
Proverbs19:12 Reyin q'apisitapax leonan wararitapjamawa; khuyapayasiñapasti
Proverbs19:13 Jan amuyt'an wawax awkipar t'aqhisiyiwa. Tuqisir warmisti jan sayt'as ch'aqir umjamawa.
Proverbs19:14 Utampi
Proverbs19:15 Jayrasiñax ikïk ikiyaski
Proverbs19:16 Kamachi arunak phuqhirix jakañap imasiski
Proverbs19:17 Jan kunan jaqir mayt'irix Tatituruw mayt'aski
Proverbs19:18 Wawamarux chiqachañjamäkipan chiqacham
Proverbs19:19 Sinti q'apisir jaqix mutuñ katuqani; jupar jan mutuyañasti
Proverbs19:20 Iwxa arunakar ist'am
Proverbs19:21 Jaqin amuyupan walja amtäwinakaw utji
Proverbs19:22 Mä jaqin suma chuymanïñapaw munasi; apjasir jaqïñat sipansa
Proverbs19:23 Tatitur axsartañax jakañaruw irpi; kusisitakiw maynix jakasi
Proverbs19:24 Jayra jaqix amparapamp chuwar luqantkasasa
Proverbs19:25 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix mutuyat uñjasisakiw yatiqi; yatiñan jaqisti mä sapa chiqachatakiw yatiqi.
Proverbs19:26 Awkir ñanqhachañasa
Proverbs19:27 Munat wawaxay
Proverbs19:28 K'arisis irkatir jaqix chiqa kankañat sawkasi; ñanqha lurir jaqin lakapasti jan walinak parli.
Proverbs19:29 Jan ist'asir jaqitakix

Proverbs20:5 Jaqin amtäwinakapax chuymapan
Proverbs20:6 Waljaniw suma aski jaqit uñt'ayasiñ munapxi
Proverbs20:7 Taqi kunansa askin sarnaqawayir jaqin wawanakapax
Proverbs20:8 Reyix juchanir taripañatak qunt'aski ukapachaxa
Proverbs20:9 ¿Khitirak saspa: “Chuymaxax q'umawa

Proverbs20:18 Amtäwinakax suma iwxa arunakampiw wakt'ayasi; nuwasïwir sarañatakis wali yatiñampi wakt'ayañawa.
Proverbs20:19 Arunak apnaqir jaqix janiw mä kuns imt'añ yatkiti
Proverbs20:20 Awkiparu
Proverbs20:21 Kunatix qalltan jasak jikxatatäki ukax
Proverbs20:22 Janiy samti: “Ukhamat
Proverbs20:23 Tatitux jan phuqhat tupuñanak uñisiwa
Proverbs20:24 Tatituw jaqin sarnaqäwip sarayaski; janiw khitis yatiskiti jupa pachpan tukuyäwipxa.
Proverbs20:25 Diosar mä kun churañataki arsuñaxa
Proverbs20:26 Yatiñan reyix jan ist'asiri ñanqha jaqinakarux
Proverbs20:27 Jaqin ajayupax Diosan qhanapawa; jaqin chuyma manqhip qhant'iri qhanawa.
Proverbs20:28 Reyix jaya maranakaw reyi qunuñapanki

Proverbs20:30 Nuwjañanakampi

Proverbs28:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqix jan khitin arknaqkataw jaltxi
Proverbs28:2 Markax jan wal sarnaqki ukapachaxa
Proverbs28:3 Jan kunaninakar t'aqhisiyir jaqix yapunak tukjir jach'a jallur uñtatawa.
Proverbs28:4 Kamachi arunak apanukurinakax
Proverbs28:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax chiqa kankañat janiw amuyt'apkiti
Proverbs28:6 Sallqjasir qamir jaqïñat sipansa
Proverbs28:7 Diosan kamachip phuqhirix
Proverbs28:8 Jila jalaqtampi qullqi mayt'as qamir yänak waljaptayir jaqix
Proverbs28:9 Diosan kamachipar jan ist'añ munir jaqirux
Proverbs28:10 Aski jaqinakaru jan wali thakhinjam irpir jaqirux
Proverbs28:11 Qamir jaqix wali yatiñaniw tuku; jan kunan jaqisti ch'ikhi kankañapampiw qamirin jan amuyt'asirïtap yati.
Proverbs28:12 Aski jaqinakax atipjapki ukapachax
Proverbs28:13 Juchap imt'asir jaqix
Proverbs28:14 Tatiturupun axsartir jaqix
Proverbs28:15 Jan wal apnaqir mä qhuru jilïrix
Proverbs28:16 Jan amuyt'ani mark apnaqirix
Proverbs28:17 Jaqi jiwayatapat arknaqat jaqix
Proverbs28:18 Chiqa aski jaqix qhispitaw uñjasini
Proverbs28:19 Uraqipana yapuchasir jaqin manq'añapax jilarkiriwa; jayra jaqinakamp sarnaqir jaqisti
Proverbs28:20 Chiqa aski jaqix jach'añchataw uñjasini; jank'aki qamiriptañ munir jaqisti
Proverbs28:21 Janiw jaqi masi ajlliñax walïkiti; ukhamat mä jisk'a t'ant'a laykus juchar puriñax utji.
Proverbs28:22 Juk'ampst'ir jaqix mäkiw qamiriptañ muni
Proverbs28:23 Jach'añchiri jaqit sipana
Proverbs28:24 Awkipar taykapar lunthatir jaqix; jan wali jaqinakan masipawa

Ecclesiastes11:1 T'ant'am umar jaquntam; ukat mä qawqha pachat jikxatäta.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Qawqhatix utjktam ukanak mayninakamp jaljasim
Ecclesiastes11:3 Qinayanakatix uman qinayächi ukaxa
Ecclesiastes11:4 Yapuchañ munasax jan thayak uñch'ukkamti
Ecclesiastes11:5 Janiw jumax thayan kawksar saratapsa yatktati
Ecclesiastes11:6 Jumax willjtasa
Ecclesiastes11:7 Lupi qhana uñjañax wali askiwa;

Ecclesiastes11:9 Waynäkas k'uchirtasim; kunatix askïki ukat kusisim. Chuymamax kunjämarutix munki
Ecclesiastes11:10 Chuymaman llakisiñanakapa

Ecclesiastes12:8 Naya
Ecclesiastes12:9 Arunak Yatiyirix juk'amp yatiñanïsax juk'amp yatiñanakxat jaqinakar yatichäna. Ukhamarak walja säwi arunak yatiqañaruw uchasïna
Ecclesiastes12:10 Taqi tuqit suma arunak jikxatañatakiw thaqhäna
Ecclesiastes12:11 Yatiñ kankañan jaqin säwi arunakapax mich'inakar uñtatawa

Ecclesiastes12:13 Parlañax tukusxiwa. Taqi kunaw satäxi. Diosar yupaycham
Ecclesiastes12:14 Diosax taqi luratanakasat wayt'istani

Isaiah24:11 Jaqinakasti marka thakhinakan vinon pist'atapat jachapxi; taqi kusisiñas tukusiwayxiwa
Isaiah24:12 Markasti q'ala tukjatapuniwa
Isaiah24:13 Aka uraqin utjir taqi markanakanxa ukhamarakïniwa
Isaiah24:14 Tatitun jach'a kankañap uñjasaxa
Isaiah24:15 Ukhamarakiw inti jalsu tuqinsa
Isaiah24:16 Uraqi tukuyapatpach q'uchutanakapax ist'asi: “Aski jaqix jach'ar aptatäpan” sasa. Ukampis nayax saraktwa: ¡Ay kunas akaxa
Isaiah24:17 Aka uraqin jakir jaqinakasti jiwayañ animalanakjam arknaqatäpxaniwa
Isaiah24:18 Jiwayirinakat jaltirixa
Isaiah24:19 Aka uraqisti axsarkañaw khathatini
Isaiah24:20 Mä machat jaqjamaw aytinkini
Isaiah24:21 Uka urunsti
Isaiah24:22 mayjaruw tantachthapini
Isaiah24:23 Kunapachatix taqi ch'aman Tatitux reyjama taqi kunsa lurkan ukkhaxa
Isaiah25:1 Tatay
Isaiah25:2 Markanaksti qala chhaxwanak tukuytaxa
Isaiah25:3 Jichhax qhuru jaqinakax jach'añchäwi churaraktamxa.
Isaiah25:4 Jumax jan kunaninakaruw arxattaxa
Isaiah25:5 jan ukax waña uraqin wali lupir uñtatawa. Uñisirinakan ch'amampi sartatapsti jumax t'unjtawa kunjämtix lupin junt'uparux mä ch'iwimpi samaraykta ukhama. Qhuru jaqinakarusti amukt'ayaraktawa.
Isaiah25:6 Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti
Isaiah25:7 Uka markan Tatitux taqi markanakan llakisiñanakap apaqxani.
Isaiah25:8 Tatitux wiñayatakiw jiwañarux t'unjani

Isaiah25:12 Tatitusti uka jach'a alay thuru pirqanakap liwisiyaniwa; uraqir tinkurayat apanukuwayani.

Isaiah27:1 Israel markan uñisirinakapax lamar qutan axsarkañ laq'ur uñtatäpxiwa

Isaiah27:4 Janiw jupatakix phiñasitäkxti; ukampis jan ist'asirinakax utjaskakiwa

Isaiah33:1 ¡Ay
Isaiah33:2 Tatay

Isaiah33:5 Tatitux jach'a munañaniwa
Isaiah33:6 Jerusalenarusti imapuniniwa. Yatiñ kankañamampi yatxatañamampix mä suma qamir yänakjam qhispiyiriwa; Tatitur axsartañasti qamir kankañat sipansa juk'amp sumawa.

Isaiah36:5 Nuwasïwin atipjañatakix janiw arunakampik atipjkasmati

Isaiah37:1 Kunapachatix Ezequías reyix uka arunak ist'kän ukkhaxa
Isaiah37:2 Ukatsti Eliaquim chacharu

Isaiah37:4 Añchakit Tatitu Diosax ist'ki kuna jan wali arunaktix uka asirio oficialax siski Dios tuqitxa
Isaiah37:5 Ezequías reyin yanapirinakapasti Isaías profetar uñjiriw sarapxäna.
Isaiah37:6 Isaías profetasti akham sasaw Ezequiasarux iwxa arunak apayäna: “Tatitux siwa: ‘Kuntix asirionakax nayataki jan wali arunak arski uka arunakat jan axsaramti.
Isaiah37:7 Akax nayaw sarä
Isaiah37:8 Asirio oficialasti yatxatarakïnwa Senaquerib reyipax Laquis siski uka chiqat sarxatapa. Ukat Jerusalenat sarxäna; reyirusti Libná markar nuwantaskir jikxatarakïna.
Isaiah37:9 Ukan Senaquerib sata Asiriankir reyix mä aru ist'atayna
Isaiah37:10 “Kawkïri Diosamarutix jumax katuyaskta uka Diosamax janiw Jerusalén markax nayan amparaxar purkaniti sistamwa
Isaiah37:11 Kuntix taqi markanakampi Asiriankir reyix lurki uk jumax sum yattaxa. ¿Ukatti jumas qhispismasti?

Isaiah37:13 ¿Kawkinkaraki Hamat

Isaiah37:15 akham sas Diosat mayisïna:
Isaiah37:16 “Taqi ch'amani
Isaiah37:17 Tatay
Isaiah37:18 Chiqpachansa Tatay
Isaiah37:19 diosanakapsa ninampiw nakhantayapxi
Isaiah37:20 Nanakan Dios Tatituxay
Isaiah37:21 Ukapachaw Isaías profetax Ezequías reyirux aka yatiyäwi apayarakïna: “Israelan Tatitu Diosapax akham siwa: ‘Nayax mayisitam ist'twa
Isaiah37:22 Tatitusti Asiriankir reyitxa akham sarakiwa: “Senaquerib
Isaiah37:23 ¿Khitirus arunakamampix ñanqhachtaxa? ¿Khititakis ukataq arustaxa
Isaiah37:24 Juman yanapirinakam tuqiw Tatiturux jisk'achtaxa. Saraktawa: ‘Nuwasir sarir walja carronakaxampiw wali alay Líbano qullunakar makhatta. Jach'a cedro quqanakapa
Isaiah37:25 Jaya uraqinakan uma phuch'unak allsusta
Isaiah37:26 Ukampisa
Isaiah37:27 Ukatpï uka markan jakir jaqinakarux jan ch'amani tukuytaxa
Isaiah37:28 Nayax taqi sarnaqatamxa
Isaiah37:29 Wali q'apisitamsa
Isaiah37:30 Ukapachaw Isaías profetax Ezequías reyir saraki: “Kunäkanitix ukat akäniw mä chimpuxa: Jichha maraxa
Isaiah37:31 Judá markan jilt'ir jaqinakasti suma saphintat quqanakar uñtatäniwa
Isaiah37:32 Jerusalén markanxa janiw taqinis manq'atjam jiwarapkaniti
Isaiah37:33 “Asiria reyi tuqitsti Tatitux siwa: ‘Janiw jupax Jerusalenar mantankaniti
Isaiah37:34 Kawki thakhinjamtix jutki uka pachpa thakhinjam kutt'awayxani; janiw aka markarux mantankaniti. Naya Tatituw uka arunak arsta.
Isaiah37:35 Nayaw aka markarux arxatä
Isaiah37:36 Uka arumasti Tatitun angelapax sarasin pataka kimsaqallq tunka phisqani waranqa jaqinaka asirionakan campamentopan jiwarayäna

Isaiah37:38 Mä urusti
Isaiah38:1 Uka urunakansti Ezequías reyix walpun usuntäna
Isaiah38:2 Ukatsti Ezequiasax pirqa tuqir uñkatasaw Tatitur akham sasa mayisïna:
Isaiah38:3 “Tatay
Isaiah38:4 Tatitusti Isaías profetan
Isaiah38:5 Ezequiasan ukar sarañapatakiw mayïna akham yatiyiri: “David awkiman Tatitu Diosapax siwa: ‘Nayax mayisitam ist'twa
Isaiah38:6 Jumarusa
Isaiah38:7 Isaías profetasti sarakïnwa: —Tatitun chimpupax akäniwa

Isaiah52:5 Jichhasti ¿kunarak uñjtsti? Markaxarux ina ch'usat Babiloniarux apasxapxi. Atipjirinakasti wali jach'a jach'ar tukt'asaw arnaqasipxi
Isaiah52:6 Ukampis mä urux purininiwa
Isaiah52:7 ¡Kunja kusiskañas qullu patanakanjam jutaskir uñjañaxa
Isaiah52:8 Ist'am
Isaiah52:9 ¡Jerusalén markan t'unjatanaka

Isaiah52:12 Ukampis janiw mäki mistunipxañamäkiti

Isaiah52:14 Ajanupas q'ala mayjt'at uñjasaxa

Jeremiah25:21 Edom
Jeremiah25:22 Tiro
Jeremiah25:23 Dedán

Jeremiah25:25 Zimri
Jeremiah25:26 amsta tuqinkir taqi reyinakarusa kawkïrinakatix jak'a pura jakapki ukanakarusa. Taqi akapachan utjir markanakaruw umañapatak churta. Qhiparusti Babiloniankir reyiw umt'arakini.

Jeremiah52:22 Sapa maya pilarasti alay tuqirux broncet lurat mä t'ikhampi apxatatänwa

Lamentations1:1 ¡Walja jaqinakan markax kunja sapakis uñjasxi! ¡Markanakan jilïripa markax mä ijma warmir uñtatakïxiwa! ¡Uñtkañ suma markaxa ch'ama irnaqañanakamp t'aqhisiyataw uñjasxi!
Lamentations1:2 Arumanakax jachkäwiw tukusiski; ajanupansti jachakiw jalaski. Munirinakapatsti janiw maynis jupar chuymachirix utjkiti. Taqi masinakapasti maysa uñtxapxi
Lamentations1:3 T'aqhisiñanakampitsa
Lamentations1:4 ¡Jerusalén markan thakhinakapax llakiskayawa! ¡Janiw khitis phunchhäwinakar kusisir jutirix utjkxiti! Markan punkunakapasti ch'usa wasarar tukutawa; sacerdotenakax wal jachapxi
Lamentations1:5 Uñisirinakapaw jupar apnaqapxi
Lamentations1:6 ¡Jerusalén markan jiwakïtapas jichhax chhaqatawa! Jilïri irpirinakapasti jan ch'amaniw uñjasxapxi
Lamentations1:7 Jerusalén markax khaya urunakat amtasi
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalenax sintipuniw juchañchjasi
Lamentations1:9 Isipasti q'ala q'añuchjatapuniwa; ukhamar puriñ janiw amuykänti. Aynacht'atapasti jan amuyt'kayapuniwa; janiw jichhax khiti chuymachiris utjkiti. ¡Tatay
Lamentations1:10 Uñisirinakaw Jerusalén markan suma yänakap katuntasxi. Markasti
Lamentations1:11 Taqi markachirinakapaw jichhax wal jachapxi
Lamentations1:12 ¡Jumanaka
Lamentations1:13 Tatitux alaxpachatpach mä nina apayani ukasti ch'akhanakkam nayarux naksutu; saräwixarusti mä sipit uskuraki
Lamentations1:14 Tatituw nayan juchanakax uñji; jupa kipkarakiw uka juchanak chinkatitu
Lamentations1:15 Tatitux khitinakatix ch'amampi nayar arxatapkitäna ukanakarux jayaruw apanuku. Nayar nuwantañatakisti mä ejército khithanukuni
Lamentations1:16 Taqi ukanakasti nayaruw jachayitu. Nayraxasti jachampi phuqhantatawa
Lamentations1:17 Jerusalenasti yanap mayisaw amparap luqtani

Lamentations1:19 Munirinakaxaruw yanap mayta

Lamentations2:1 ¡Tatitun phiñasiñapax sinti jach'apuniwa

Lamentations2:3 Tatitusti phiñasiñapan atipjataxa
Lamentations2:4 Tatitux mä uñisirïkaspas ukhamaw mich'ip antutt'añatak wakicht'asi; awqäkaspas ukhamarakiw taqi kunatix sumäki ukanak t'unjawayi; phiñasiñapxa mä ninjamaw ukkha suma Jerusalén markxar jaqxatani.
Lamentations2:5 Tatitux uñisirïkaspas ukham uñjistu: Israel markarux q'al tukji; reyin utanakapsti taqpach t'unthapi

Lamentations2:12 Wawanakasti taykanakaparux sapxänwa: “¡Janiw t'ant'asa
Lamentations2:13 Suma munkañ Jerusalén marka

Lamentations2:15 Thakhi sarir jaqinakasti jumar uñjasaxa
Lamentations2:16 Taqi uñisirinakamaw jichhax jumatak arsu. Lakanakapsa t'ururt'asisaw axsarayañ arunak sapxi: “¡Q'alpun t'unjtanxa. Akpun suyaskäyätanxa; kunjämtix uñjañ munkäyätan

Lamentations3:1 Nayaw jach'a t'aqhisiñanak katuqta
Lamentations3:2 Tatitux ch'amak tuqinakaruw irpitu
Lamentations3:3 nayar mutuyañatakix sapa kutiw mayamp mayampi amparap ayti.
Lamentations3:4 Janchixsa q'ala chuymankipstayxi
Lamentations3:5 nayarusti t'aqhisiñampi jachañanakampiw mä pirqampjam muyuntayitu;
Lamentations3:6 ch'amak tuqinakan utjayitu
Lamentations3:7 Jan mistuñani pirqampiw muyuntayitu; jathi cadenanakamp chinuntasaw t'aqhisiyitu;
Lamentations3:8 yanap mayisa arnaqaskchïyäta ukasa
Lamentations3:9 qala pirqampiw sarañaxar jark'antitu
Lamentations3:10 Tatitusti nayatakix mä imantasit leonjamänwa
Lamentations3:11 Thakhit maysaruw saranukuyitu
Lamentations3:12 ¡Mich'inakap wakicht'asisasti
Lamentations3:13 Tatitun antutt'ata mich'inakapaxa
Lamentations3:14 Jaqinakaxax taqiniw nayat larusipxitu; sapa kutis jupanakan larusiñakïtwa.
Lamentations3:15 Tatitux jachañanakampiw phuqhantitu; k'allk'u uma umañ churitu.
Lamentations3:16 Laka ch'akhanakaxsa uraqir liwnuqasaw williritu; laq'a jallq'ayarakitu.
Lamentations3:17 Sumankañas nayat jayarst'xiwa
Lamentations3:18 Amuyatax Tatitut janjamakiw kuns katuqxäti.
Lamentations3:19 Llakisitanakaxsa
Lamentations3:20 ukanakat amthapisisasti
Lamentations3:21 Ukampis nayax may chuymaxan amtasiñ munta
Lamentations3:22 Tatitun munasiñapax jan tukuskiriwa
Lamentations3:23 Sapärmanthiw machaqar tukuraki; ¡kunja jach'as Tatitun chiqapätapaxa!
Lamentations3:24 Naya pachpas sasiraktwa: “¡Nayatakix Tatitukiw taqi kunasa; ukatpï jupar iyawsaraktxa!” sasa.
Lamentations3:25 Tatitux jupar iyawsirinakatakix askiwa
Lamentations3:26 Tatitur llamp'u chuymamp suyt'añaw wakisi
Lamentations3:27 Jaqix waynatpacha t'aqhisiñanak katuqañ yatiqañapa.
Lamentations3:28 Jaqix sapaki

Ezekiel10:13 Naya kipkaw ist'ta uka muyuri muruq'unakaru “carronaka” sasaraki sutichiri.
Ezekiel10:14 Uka chhiqhaninakasti sapa maynix pusi ajanunkamänwa: Nayrïr ajanux mä urqu vacan ajanupjamänwa; payïr ajanusti mä jaqin ajanupjamänwa; kimsïr ajanusti mä leonan ajanupjamänwa; pusïr ajanusti mä jach'a pakan ajanupjamarakïnwa.

Ezekiel11:9 Aka chiqatsti jumanakarux jaqunukupxämawa
Ezekiel11:10 Espadampi jiwarayataw uñjasipxäta. Israel markan qurpanakapan nayaw luräwinakamarjam taripapxäma
Ezekiel11:11 Aka markasti jumanakatakix janiw mä phukhükaspas ukhamäkaniti
Ezekiel11:12 ukapachaw jumanakax yatipxäta
Ezekiel11:13 Tatitun sutipxar nayan ukham parlañkamasti
Ezekiel11:14 Tatitux nayaruw parlxayitu
Ezekiel11:15 “Jerusalén markan jakir jaqinakasti
Ezekiel11:16 Jichhax Babilonian jakir israelitanakarux sarakim: ‘Naya
Ezekiel11:17 Jupanakarux saskakim: ‘Tatitux siwa: Nayaw jupanakarux kawkha uraqinakar ananukutatix uñjasipki uka jaya markanakat kuttayanxä
Ezekiel11:18 Jupanakax markapar kuttanxasinsti
Ezekiel11:19 Nayasti jupanakat uka qala chuymap apaqäwa
Ezekiel11:20 Ukapachaw jupanakax nayan kamachinakarjama
Ezekiel11:21 Ukampis khitinakatix uka axtaskañ luräwinakar chuyma churat jakapxani ukanakarusti
Ezekiel11:22 Uka pusi chhiqhaninakax thuqtawayxapxiwa
Ezekiel11:23 sartxarakïna
Ezekiel11:24 Ukatsti Tatitun ch'amapaw nayar aptawayasax Babiloniar kuttayitu
Ezekiel11:25 ukatsti nayax taqi kuntix Tatitux uñachaykitu ukanak Babiloniar apanukutanakaru yatiyarakta.
Ezekiel12:1 Tatitux nayaruw parlxayitu
Ezekiel12:2 “Ezequiel
Ezekiel12:3 Ukhamax jaya markar apayatäñatak kunatix wakiski ukanak wakicht'asim
Ezekiel12:4 Jichhax urpacha
Ezekiel12:5 Ukatsti pirqarux taqinin uñjkata mä jach'a p'iya p'iysum
Ezekiel12:6 Ch'amakthapxani ukkhasti
Ezekiel12:7 Nayasti Tatitun arunakaparjamaw yänakax wakichasxta
Ezekiel12:8 Qhipärmanthisti Tatitux nayaruw parlxayitu
Ezekiel12:9 “Uka qallasir israelita jaqinakax
Ezekiel12:10 Jichhasti nayan sutixampi jupanakarux saskakim
Ezekiel12:11 Jupanakarusti sarakim
Ezekiel12:12 Jupanakan jilïripasti q'ipip q'ipt'asitaw uka ch'amakthapix pirqa p'iyanjam mistuwayxañaparaki. P'inqapatsa markar jan uñjañatakix ajanup imt'asisin sarxani.

Ezekiel12:14 Juparu muyuntata uñjiri soldadonakarusti
Ezekiel12:15 Yaqha markanak taypin ananukut uñjasipkani ukapachaw yatipxani
Ezekiel12:16 Ukampis nayaw mä qawqha jaqinakar jilt'ayä
Ezekiel12:17 Tatitux wasitat nayar parlxayitu
Ezekiel12:18 “Ezequiel
Ezekiel12:19 Aka uraqin jakir jaqinakaru
Ezekiel12:20 Jaqinakan phuqt'ata markanakax q'ala t'unjatäniwa; aka markasti ch'usa wasarar tukuyatarakïniwa. Ukapachaw jumanakax yatipxäta

Ezekiel12:25 naya

Ezekiel16:2 “Ezequiel

Ezekiel16:4 Yurïwim urux janiw kururum khariqapktamti
Ezekiel16:5 Janiw khitis jumat llakkänti
Ezekiel16:6 Juma jak'a sarakipkasasti

Ezekiel16:9 Nayasti jumarux jariqsmawa

Ezekiel16:30 Naya
Ezekiel16:31 Jumax taqi thakhi tukuyanakaru
Ezekiel16:32 “ ‘Chachapatak jan askïki uka wamix
Ezekiel16:33 Walja chachanakampi q'añu lurañan sarnaqir warminakarux qullqi churatawa
Ezekiel16:34 Uka wachuqa jucha luräwinakamasti yaqha warminakat sipan jumax mayja lurtaxa: janiw khitis jumarux wachuqa jucha lurañatak thaqktamti
Ezekiel16:35 “ ‘Wachuqa jucha lurañanakan sarnaqir warmi
Ezekiel16:36 Naya
Ezekiel16:37 Ukatpï jichhax juma jak'ar tantacht'äxa
Ezekiel16:38 Chachanakampi wachuqa jucha lurañanakan sarnaqatanakamata
Ezekiel16:39 Jupanakan amparaparuw katuyäma
Ezekiel16:40 Markankir jaqinakarusti jumar jan walt'ayañatakiw amtayapxani

Ezekiel16:43 Jumax tawaqu kankañ urunakamat armasxtawa
Ezekiel16:44 “ ‘Jaqinakax jumampiw aka säwix phuqhasi sapxaniwa: ‘Kunäkitix taykaxa

Ezekiel16:46 Jilïr kullakamasti amsta tuqinkir Samaria markawa
Ezekiel16:47 Jumasti
Ezekiel16:48 Naya

Ezekiel16:53 “ ‘Nayaw Sodoma markampiru

Ezekiel18:2 “Israel markankirinakasti sapa kutipuniw aka säwi parlapxi: ‘Awkinakan luratanakapxa
Ezekiel18:3 Naya
Ezekiel18:4 Taqi jaqinakax nayankiwa
Ezekiel18:5 “Aski jaqisti kunatix chiqapäki
Ezekiel18:6 qullu patanakan diosanakar yupaychasa utjiri manq'äwinakat jithiqtiwa
Ezekiel18:7 janiw khitirus t'aqhisiykiti
Ezekiel18:8 qullqipsa janiw walja jalaqta katuqañ layku mayt'kiti; janiw khitirus ñanqhachkiti; kunapachatix pani ch'axwir jaqinakar ch'axwatanakap t'aqki ukapachasti chiqaparupuniw t'aqjaraki;
Ezekiel18:9 kamachinakaxar phuqhasaw kunsa luri. Uka jaqix chiqätapat jakaskapuniniwa. Naya
Ezekiel18:10 “Ukampis uka aski jaqitix jaqi jiwayiri mä qhuru yuqanïni
Ezekiel18:11 kuntix awkipax jan lurkän ukanaksa lurani
Ezekiel18:12 pist'añan jakir jaqirus t'aqhisiyani
Ezekiel18:13 qullqipsa juk'ampi walja qullqi jikxatañ layku mayt'ani; uka jaqisti jiwaniwa. Nayataki axtaskiri taqi ukanak luratapatsti jiwaniwa
Ezekiel18:14 “Uka jaqitix mä yuqanïxaspa
Ezekiel18:15 janirak uka qullu patanakan diosanakar yupaychas manq'äwinakarus sarkaniti
Ezekiel18:16 janirak khitirus t'aqhisiykani; jupat mä kunsa mayt'asipkani ukkhasti janirak kunsa maykaniti; janirak khititsa lunthatkaniti
Ezekiel18:17 janirak khitirus kuna ñanqhsa lurkaniti
Ezekiel18:18 “Ukampis awkipax
Ezekiel18:19 Jumanakasti jiskt'apxitätawa: ‘¿Kunatarak wawasti awkipan juchanakap layku jan mutuyatäkisti?’ sasa. Nayasti sapxämawa: Wawax kunatix chiqapäki
Ezekiel18:20 Jucha lurir jaqiw jiwaskani. Wawax janiw awkin juchapat mutuyatäkaniti
Ezekiel18:21 “Ñanqha lurir jaqitix taqi ñanqha juchanak lurkän ukanaka apanukxani
Ezekiel18:22 Nayasti janiw mayampsa uka jucha luratanakapat amtaskxäti
Ezekiel18:23 Janiw nayax ñanqha jaqin jiwañap munkti
Ezekiel18:24 “Ukampis
Ezekiel18:25 Jumanakax sapxätawa: ‘Tatitux janiw chiqapar uñjkiti’ sasa
Ezekiel18:26 Aski jaqitix aski luräwinakap apanukusin ñanqha luräwinak lurxchi ukasti
Ezekiel18:27 Ukampis mä ñanqha jaqitix ñanqha luräwinakap apanukxchi
Ezekiel18:28 Jupatix sum amuyt'asini
Ezekiel18:29 “Ukampis Israel markax saskakiniwa: ‘Tatitux janiw chiqapar uñjkiti’ sasa. ¿Janit Israel markaki jan walinak lurkpacha?
Ezekiel18:30 Israelita jaqinaka
Ezekiel18:31 Naya nayraqatan lurapkta uka ñanqhanaksti mäpit apanukupxam
Ezekiel18:32 Janiw nayax khitin jiwañapsa munkti. Ñanqha luräwinakamat jithiqtxapxam

Ezekiel19:5 Uka tayka leonasti ukham suyt'äwipa ina ch'usar tukutap uñjasinxa

Ezekiel20:2 Tatitusti nayaruw akham sarakitu:
Ezekiel20:3 “Ezequiel
Ezekiel20:4 Ezequiel
Ezekiel20:5 Jupanakar sarakim: ‘Tatitux akham siwa: Israelar ajlliskäyät ukapachasti
Ezekiel20:6 Uka urusti nayax Egipto uraqit jupanakar irpsxañatakiw arsurakta
Ezekiel20:7 Nayasti taqpachaniruw sarakta uka axtaskañ diosanakap apanukxañapataki
Ezekiel20:8 “ ‘Ukampis jupanakax kutkatasipxituwa
Ezekiel20:9 Ukampis sutixan jach'ätap laykuw Egiptot irpsunta
Ezekiel20:10 Nayaw jupanakarux Egiptot irpsunta
Ezekiel20:11 ukan jupanakarux kamachinakaxampi
Ezekiel20:12 Ukhamarakiw jupanakarux sábado urunakaxat yatiyta
Ezekiel20:13 Ukampis jupanakax wasar tuqin nayatakiw sayt'asxapxi
Ezekiel20:14 ukampis sutixan jach'ätap laykuw uk jan lurkti
Ezekiel20:15 “ ‘Wasaran jupanakarux juramentompi arsurakta
Ezekiel20:16 Jupanakasti kamachinakaxar ist'añ lantxa
Ezekiel20:17 Ukampis jupanakax wasaran llakkañaw sarnaqapxarakïna
Ezekiel20:18 Ukat wawanakaparux mayirakta awkinakapan luräwinakapa jan lurapxañapataki
Ezekiel20:19 Jupanakarusti sarakïyätwa: Nayätwa jumanakan Tatitu Diosamaxa
Ezekiel20:20 nayan samarañ sábado urunakaxsti wali axsart'añampi uñjapxam
Ezekiel20:21 “ ‘Ukampis jupanakan wawanakapax nayatakix sayt'asipxarakikïnwa. Janiw kamachinakaxsa arsutanakaxsa jaysapkänti; jakañ churiri arunakaxarjamas sarnaqapkänti
Ezekiel20:22 ukampis sutixan jach'ätap laykuw uk jan lurkti
Ezekiel20:23 Wasaransti jupanakarux juramentompiw arsurakïyäta
Ezekiel20:24 kamachinakaxar jan ist'añ munapxatap layku
Ezekiel20:25 Ukatsti jupanakarux jan askïki uka kamachinak churarakta
Ezekiel20:26 Jupanakarusti
Ezekiel20:27 “Jichhasti jumax israelitanakar sarakim: ‘Tatitux akham siwa: Awkinakamax nayar jan taqi chuymampi arkapxatapampiw ñanqhachapxitu.
Ezekiel20:28 Nayax jupanakar churañataki arsuta uraqiru puriyanxta ukkhasti
Ezekiel20:29 Nayasti jupanakarux jiskt'araktwa: ¿Kuna yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ altarasa
Ezekiel20:30 “Israel markarux sarakim: ‘Tatitux akham siwa: ¿Kunatarak jumanakasti nayra awkinakamjam q'añuchasiñ munapxtasti? ¿Kunatarak nayar taqi chuymampi jan arkasa uka axtaskañ diosanakar yupaychapxtasti?
Ezekiel20:31 Jumanakax wawanakamar ninampi nakhantayasin wilañcha luqtasax
Ezekiel20:32 Jumanakasti
Ezekiel20:33 Naya
Ezekiel20:34 Nayaw kawkïr markanak taypintix ananukut jikxatasipkta ukanakatxa
Ezekiel20:35 Kunjämatix nayra awkinakamarux Egiptonkir wasaran mutuykäyätxa
Ezekiel20:36 
Ezekiel20:37 Nayaw jumanakarux kunjämatix mä awatirix ovejanakapar sum uñakipki ukham uñakipapxarakïma
Ezekiel20:38 Jumanak taypitsti nayatak sayt'asiri
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘Israelitanaka
Ezekiel20:40 Taqpach Israel markaw nayan qullan qulluxan yupaychapxitani
Ezekiel20:41 Kunapachatix nayax uka yaqha markanakata
Ezekiel20:42 “ ‘Ukatsti kunapachatix nayax Israel uraqir puriyxapxäma

Ezekiel40:2 
Ezekiel40:3 Tatitusti ukaruw irpitu
Ezekiel40:4 Uka jaqisti sarakituwa: “Jichhax wal wali uñtam
Ezekiel40:5 Tatitun utapasti mä pirqampi muyuntatänwa. Uka jaqix amparapan tupuñ lawa ayt'atänwa
Ezekiel40:6 Ukatsti inti jalsu tuqinkkis uka punkuruw saräna
Ezekiel40:7 Mantañawjansti utanakaw puraparux utjäna
Ezekiel40:8 Uka jaqisti kawkïr punkutix Tatitun utapar mantki uk tupt'araki
Ezekiel40:9 
Ezekiel40:10 Inti jalsu tuqinkir mantañawjansti kimsa utanakaw purapäxan utjäna
Ezekiel40:11 Ukatsti uka jaqix mantañ punku tupt'arakïna: ukasti iramarux phisqa metroni
Ezekiel40:12 Uka utanak uñkatasinsti mä jisk'a pirqaw utjäna
Ezekiel40:13 Ukatsti uka mantañawja tupt'äna
Ezekiel40:14 Ukxarusti mantañawja tupt'arakïna
Ezekiel40:15 Uka mantañasti anqäxat manqhakamax pä tunka phisqan metronïnwa.
Ezekiel40:16 Ukankir utanakan pirqanakapax manqhäxat rejanakani ventananakampi muytatänwa. Mantañ utasa manqha tuqit ventananakampi muytatarakïnwa. Uka pirqanakansti palmerar uñtasitanakampi qillqkatataw utjarakïna.
Ezekiel40:17 Ukatsti uka jaqix uta anqäxaruw irpitu. Uka uta anqäxan thiyanakapasti qalanakampi suk'sutänwa
Ezekiel40:18 Qalanakampi suk'sutäki ukax uta anqa muytatänwa
Ezekiel40:19 Uka jaqisti uka punku uñkatasi manqhatpacha
Ezekiel40:20 Ukatsti uka jaqix amsta tuqir mistuñ punku tupt'arakïna; saya tuqiru
Ezekiel40:21 Puraparusti pilaranakani kimsa utanakanïnwa
Ezekiel40:22 Uta mantañanakasa
Ezekiel40:23 Inti jalsu tuqitsa
Ezekiel40:24 Ukatsti uka jaqix aynach tuqiruw irparakitu
Ezekiel40:25 Uka utar mantañäki ukasti
Ezekiel40:26 Ukansti paqallqu patillpatillanakapaw utjarakïna
Ezekiel40:27 Manqhankir uta anqäxasti aynach tuqirux mä punkunïnwa. Ukat uka jaqix aynach tuqinkir pä punkutxa
Ezekiel40:28 Ukatsti jank'akiw aynach tuqinkir mantañäkis ukawjar irpitu
Ezekiel40:29 Utanakapasa
Ezekiel40:30 
Ezekiel40:31 Uka utar mantañawjapasti anqäx tuqir uñtatänwa. Pilaranakasa palmera alinakar uñtat qillqt'atänwa. Uka punkurusti kimsaqallqu patillpatillanakanjam makhatañänwa.
Ezekiel40:32 Ukatsti manqha tuqinkir uta anqäxaruw inti jalsu tuqinjam irpitu
Ezekiel40:33 Utanakapasa
Ezekiel40:34 Uka utar mantañawjapasti anqäx tuqir uñtatänwa. Pilaranakasa palmera alinakar uñtat qillqt'atänwa. Uka punkurusti kimsaqallqu patillpatillanakanjam makhatañänwa.
Ezekiel40:35 Ukatsti uka jaqix amsta tuqit mantaniñ punkükis uksaruw irparakitu
Ezekiel40:36 utanakapasa
Ezekiel40:37 Uka utar mantañawjapasti anqäx tuqir uñtatänwa. Pilaranakasa palmera alinakar uñtat qillqt'atänwa. Uka punkurusti kimsaqallqu patillpatillanakanjam makhatañänwa.
Ezekiel40:38 Mä utaw utjarakïna
Ezekiel40:39 Mantañ tuqinkir utansti pusi mesanakaw utjäna

Amos4:2 Tatitux qullan kankañapan juramentompiw arsu: “Chinuñanakampi chinuntat apapkätam uka urux jutaskiwa; wawanakamas chawlla katuñampi katuntat apatäpxaniwa.

Obadiah1:1 Tatitux mä unañchäwi tuqiw Abdías profetar yatiyäna. Tatitun mä yatiyäwip ist'apxta; mä yatiyiriw markanakar yatiyir sari: “¡Sartasipxam! ¡Edom markar nuwantir sarañäni!” sasa. Tatitusti Edom markarux siwa:
Obadiah1:2 “Taqi markanak taypin jisk'aruw tukuyäma
Obadiah1:3 Jach'a jach'a tukutamaw sallqjtamxa. ‘Janiw khitis liwiqkitaspati sistawa: Nayax qarqa p'iyanakan jakasta
Obadiah1:4 Ukampis mä pakar uñtatasay alayar makhataskam
Obadiah1:5 “Lunthatanakatix arum jutasin lunthatsupxiristamxa
Obadiah1:6 ¡Jumarusti Esaú

Obadiah1:8 Tatitux siwa: “Edom markar mutuykä uka urux
Obadiah1:9 Temán sat markan nuwasir jaqinakapasti axsarañatsa khathatipxaniwa
Obadiah1:10 “Jumasti Edom
Obadiah1:11 Kunapachatix uñisirinakax markan qamir yänakap q'ipsupkäna
Obadiah1:12 Jilamax chijir purkän uka urux janiw kusisiñamäkänti
Obadiah1:13 T'aqhisiñ urupansti markaxarux janiw mantañamäkänti. Chijir puritapatsa
Obadiah1:14 Janirakiw thakhi p'allqanakansa
Obadiah1:15 “Kunjämtix mayninakar lurkta ukham luratarakiw uñjasïta; ¡luratamatjam jichhax katuqäta! “Tatitun urupax niya jak'ankxiwa

Micah7:1 ¡Ay kunakïkan nayatakixa! Achunak apthapitat jilt'anak thaqhasir jaqjamätwa
Micah7:2 Aka uraqinxa janiw maynis Diosatakjam chiqap sarnaqirix utjkxiti; taqinis nuwasiñampi jiwarayasiñampik suyt'asipki; maynit maynikamarakiw aynacht'ayasisipki.
Micah7:3 Ñanqhanak lurañatakisti kust'atapunïpxiwa; marka apnaqirinakan yanapirinakapasti qullqik munasipki
Micah7:4 Jupanakat walïki ukasti mä ch'aphi alir uñtatawa; chiq lurirïki ukasti yaqha ch'aphi alir uñtatarakiwa. Ukampis luräwinakapat wayt'añ urux jutaskiwa

Nahum1:1 Aka yatiyäwisti Nínive markatakiwa
Nahum1:2 Tatitux taqinin jupar chiqa arkañas muni; khitinakatix jupar saykatapki
Nahum1:3 Dios Tatitux wali llamp'u chuymaniwa
Nahum1:4 Jach'a qutarusti tuqintasin wañt'ayi; taqi jawiranaksa wañt'ayarakiwa. Basán tuqinkir pampa uraqinakapasa
Nahum1:5 Jupa nayraqatanxa qullunakas khathatiwa; nayräxapansti jisk'a qullunakas chullutatawayxakiwa. Taqi aka uraqpachan jakirinakasa jupar uñjasax wal khathatipxi.
Nahum1:6 ¿Khitirak q'apisitap nayraqatan sayt'aspasti? ¿Khitirak phiñasitapar qallkataspasti? Q'apisiñapax ninjamaw aqatati

Zechariah5:11 Jupasti sarakituwa: “Babilonia markaruw apasipki. Uka markan mä uta utachapxani. Uka utax tukutäkani ukkhaw mä altar patxar uka tupuñ uchapxani” sasa.
Zechariah6:1 Ukatsti yaqha unañchäwimp uñjta. Nuwasïwir sarir pusi carronak pä bronce qullunak taypit uñstasinkir uñjarakta.

Zechariah6:7 Ch'ikhu caballonakasti jank'akiw aka uraqpach muytir misttanipxäna. Angelasti caballonakar sänwa: “¡Taqi aka uraqpach muytanipxam!” sasa. Caballonakasti jaysapxarakïnwa.

Malachi1:1 Tatitux Malaquías profeta tuqiw Israel markar aka arunak yatiyäna:
Malachi1:2 Tatitux siwa: “Nayax jumanakar munasipxsmawa” sasa. Jumanakasti sapxtawa: “¿Kunjämatsa yatipxirista juman nanakar munatamxa?” sasa. ¿Janit Esaú chachasti Jacob chachan jilapäkänsti? Ukampisa
Malachi1:3 Esaú chacharusti uñisiyätwa
Malachi1:4 Esaú chachan saraqirinakapäki uka Edomitanakatix sapxaspa: “Markasax t'unjatawa
Malachi1:5 Jumanakax pachpa nayranakamampiw uñjapxarakïta

Malachi1:7 Jumanakax altaraxar q'añu t'ant'anak apanipxtaxa
Malachi1:8 nayax janis kuna yäqañäkiristsa ukham nayar luqtañatak apanipxtaxa: juykhu uywanaka
Malachi1:9 Jumanakasti jichhax Diosaruy mayisipxam
Malachi1:10 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “¡Walïspaw jumanakat kawkïrisa utaxan punkunakap jist'antaspa ukaxa
Malachi1:11 Taqi akapach uraqin nayarux jach'añchapxitu
Malachi1:12 Ukampis jumanakax ñanqhachapxistawa. Altaraxax jisk'achañäkaspas ukham amuyapxtaxa
Malachi1:13 Jumanakax sapxtawa: ‘¡Taqi akanak lurkäwix qaritäxapxtwa!’ sasa. Ukatsti jisk'achapxistawa. Nayax uka lunthatata
Malachi1:14 Kawkïr jaqitix suma k'umar uywa nayar luqtañatak yaqhachkasina

Matthew4:3 Supayasti Jesusar yant'añatakiw jak'achasïna
Matthew4:4 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Diosan qillqatapax siwa: ‘Janiw jaqix t'ant'a sapampikit jakkani
Matthew4:5 Ukatsti supayax Jerusalén qullan markaruw irpäna
Matthew4:6 sarakïnwa: —Jumatix Diosan yuqapästaxa
Matthew4:7 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —Diosan arupan qillqatarakiwa: ‘Janiw Tatitu Diosamarux yant'ätati’ —sasa.
Matthew4:8 Tukuyarusti supayax mä jach'a qullu pataruw Jesusar irpäna
Matthew4:9 akham sasa: —Jumatix killt'asisin nayar yupaychitäta ukax taqi aka markanak churäma —sasa.
Matthew4:10 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Saraqit nayat supaya
Matthew4:11 Ukat supayax sarawayxäna
Matthew4:12 Bautisir Juanan carcelankatap ist'asinxa
Matthew4:13 Ukampis janiw Nazaret markar qhiparkänti
Matthew4:14 Taqi akanakasti
Matthew4:15 “Zabulón uraqi
Matthew4:16 Ch'amakankir jaqinakax mä jach'a qhan uñjapxi; mä suma qhanaw qhanti jiwañ ch'amakan jakapki ukanakataki” sasa.
Matthew4:17 Jesusax ukapachat Diosan arunakap parlañ qalltäna: “Diosan ukar kuttanxapxam
Matthew4:18 Ukatsti Jesusax Galilea quta thiyanjam sarkasaw pani jila sullkar uñjäna: maynïrix Simón Pedro satänwa
Matthew4:19 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayar arkapxita
Matthew4:20 Jupanakasti ukspachaw qänanak jaytarpäwayasax Jesusar arkxapxäna.
Matthew4:21 Mä juk'a nayrar sartasinsti
Matthew4:22 ukspachaw awkipampiru
Matthew4:23 Jesusax Galilea uraqpach muytäna
Matthew4:24 Jesusan luratapasti Siria uraqpachan yatisïna
Matthew4:25 Walja jaqinakaw juparux arkapxäna
Matthew5:1 Jesusax walja jaqinak uñjasinxa
Matthew5:2 Jesusasti akham sasaw yatichañ qalltäna:
Matthew5:3 “Kusisiñanïpxiw Tatitur taqi chuyma alkatirinakaxa
Matthew5:4 “Kusisiñanïpxiw t'aqhisirinakaxa
Matthew5:5 “Kusisiñanïpxiw llamp'u chuymaninakaxa
Matthew5:6 “Kusisiñanïpxiw aski kankañ utjañap munirinakaxa

Matthew5:8 “Kusisiñanïpxiw q'uma chuymaninakaxa
Matthew5:9 “Kusisiñanïpxiw sumankañ utjañapatak ch'amachirinakaxa
Matthew5:10 “Kusisiñanïpxiw aski kankañ layku t'aqhisirinakaxa
Matthew5:11 “Kusisipxam kunapachatix jaqinakax nayar arkapxatam layku tuqipxätam
Matthew5:12 Kusisitak jakasipxam
Matthew5:13 “Jumanakax akapach jayüpxtawa. Ukampis jayutix ch'aphaqar tukuspaxa
Matthew5:14 “Jumanakax akapach qhanäpxtawa. Mä qullu patankir markax janiw imantaskaspati.
Matthew5:15 Janirakiw mä micha qhanas jamas manqhar uchañatak aqtayatäkaspati
Matthew5:16 Uka pachpay jumanakan qhanamax jaqinak nayraqatan qhantpan
Matthew5:17 “Jan jumanakax amuyapxamti
Matthew5:18 Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew5:19 Ukatpï sapxsmaxa
Matthew5:20 “Nayax sapxsmawa: Janitix sarnaqäwinakamax kamachi yatichirinakata
Matthew5:21 “Jumanakax nayra awkinakamar akham satäkänsa uk ist'apxtawa: ‘Janiw jiwayätati
Matthew5:22 Nayasti sapxsmawa
Matthew5:23 “Ukhamasti
Matthew5:24 uka luqtäwim altar nayraqatar jaytawayasin jilamampi sumankthapir saram. Ukat uka luqtäwim altaran churir kutt'anïta.
Matthew5:25 “Maynitix ‘jan wal lurista’ sas tumpantätam ukaxa
Matthew5:26 Qhanak sisma
Matthew5:27 “Jumanakasti ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Janiw wachuq jucha lurätati’ satäkänsa ukxa.
Matthew5:28 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa
Matthew5:29 “Ukhamasti
Matthew5:30 Jan ukax kupi amparamatix jan walir puriyirjamästamxa
Matthew5:31 “Satarakïnwa: ‘Khititix warmipampi jaljtanixa
Matthew5:32 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa
Matthew5:33 “Jumanakax nayra awkinakamar satäkatayna uk ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Kuntix lurañatak Tatitu nayraqatan juramentompi arskta uk phuqhapunim’ sasa.
Matthew5:34 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa
Matthew5:35 akapach laykusa
Matthew5:36 Janipun p'iqim laykus juramento luramti
Matthew5:37 Jumanakan arsuñamax akakïñapawa
Matthew5:38 “Kunatix satäkän uk ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Uñkatatax
Matthew5:39 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa: Jan wal lurktam uka jaqirux
Matthew5:40 Maynitix ch'axwampi isim aparañ munstamxa
Matthew5:41 Mä soldadotix khayakam q'ipirapita sätamxa
Matthew5:42 Mä kunsa maynix mayïtam ukarux churam; jumat mayt'asiñ muniritakisti

Matthew8:2 Ukapachaw mä lepra usun jaqix Jesusar jak'achasïna

Matthew8:4 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Jan khitirus uk yatiyamti

Matthew8:7 Jesusasti sänwa: —Nayaw jupar k'umaraptayir sarä —sasa.
Matthew8:8 Capitanasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Tatay
Matthew8:9 Nayasti jilïrinakan arsutaparuw sarnaqta
Matthew8:10 Jesusasti uk ist'asin wali musphataw uñjasïna
Matthew8:11 Nayasti sapxsmawa
Matthew8:12 ukampis khitinakatix uka suma markankañapäki ukanakax

Matthew8:14 Jesusax Pedron utaparuw saräna
Matthew8:15 Jesusasti amparapat llamkt'äna
Matthew8:16 Jayp'u tuqirusti ñanqha ajayun mantat jaqinak irpanipxäna; Jesusasti mä sapa arsutapampikiw uka ñanqha ajayunakarux alissüna

Matthew8:18 Jesusasti walja jaqinak uñjasinxa
Matthew8:19 Ukapachaw kamachi yatichirinakat maynix Jesusar jak'achasisin säna: —Yatichiri
Matthew8:20 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Qamaqinakax putunakaniwa
Matthew8:21 Maynïr yatiqiripasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Tatay

Matthew8:24 Qutanjam sarapkipansti
Matthew8:25 Yatiqirinakapasti juparuw sartayapxäna

Matthew8:27 Jupanakasti wali muspharataw jiskt'asipxäna: —¿Khitïpachas jupaxa? ¡Qutas thayas juparux ist'akirakisä! —sasa.
Matthew8:28 Kunapachatix Jesusax quta khurkatankki uka Gadara chiqar purxän ukkhasti
Matthew8:29 jupanakasti wali jach'at art'apxäna: —¡Jesús
Matthew8:30 Uka jak'ansti mä tama khuchhiw manq'askäna

Matthew8:33 Khuchhi awatirinakasti wali mulljataw jaltxapxäna

Matthew9:1 Uka qhipatsti Jesusax boter mantasin quta khurkataruw makhatxäna
Matthew9:2 Ukansti

Matthew9:4 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakan lup'itap amuyänwa
Matthew9:5 ¿Kun sañas jasakïspaxa: ‘Juchanakamax pampachatawa’ sañati
Matthew9:6 Jichhasti Jaqin Yuqapan akapachan juchanak pampachañatak munañanïtap uñacht'ayapxäma —sasa. Ukat suchu jaqirux säna: —Sartasim
Matthew9:7 Uka suchu jaqisti ukspachaw sarthapïna
Matthew9:8 Uk uñjasinsti
Matthew9:9 Jesusasti ukawjat sartasinxa
Matthew9:10 Uka qhipatsti
Matthew9:11 Uk uñjasinsti
Matthew9:12 Jesusasti uk ist'asin sänwa: —K'umar jaqinakax janiw mä qullir munapkiti
Matthew9:13 Sarapxam
Matthew9:14 Ukatsti Bautisir Juanan arkirinakapaw Jesusar jak'achasisin jiskt'apxäna: —Nanakampi fariseonakampix wal ayunapxta

Matthew9:18 Jesusan ukham parlkipan

Matthew9:28 Kunapachatix Jesusax utar mantxäna ukkhaxa
Matthew9:29 Ukat Jesusax nayranakap llamkt'äna
Matthew9:30 Ukatsti nayranakapax k'umaräxänwa. Jesusasti jupanakarux akham sasaw iwxt'äna: —Jan khitirus uk yatiyapxamti —sasa.
Matthew9:31 Ukampis jupanakax mistus ukspachaw taqi uksa tuqinakan kuntix Jesusax lurkatayna uk yatiyapxäna.

Matthew9:35 Jesusasti jach'a markanaka
Matthew9:36 Walja jaqinak uñjasinsti
Matthew9:37 Yatiqirinakaparusti Jesusax sänwa: —Chiqpachansa
Matthew9:38 Ukhamax yapuniruy irnaqirinak khithaniñapatak mayipxam —sasa.

Matthew12:1 Jesusax khä urunakan yatiqirinakapampiw sábado urun trigo yapunak taypi saraskäna. Yatiqirinakapasti manq'at awtjayasipxäna
Matthew12:2 Fariseonakasti uk uñjasin Jesusaruw sapxäna: —Uñjam
Matthew12:3 Jupasti ukxarux sänwa: ¿Janit jumanakax yatipkta kuntix Davidax masinakapamp manq'at awtjatax lurkatayna ukxa?
Matthew12:4 Diosan utapar mantasinxa
Matthew12:5 ¿Janirakit jumanakax Moisesan kamachip ullarapkta
Matthew12:6 Nayasti sapxsmawa
Matthew12:7 Jumanakax janiw amuyapktati kuntix aka arunakax sañ munki uka: ‘Nayax jumanakan khuyapt'ayasirïpxañam munta
Matthew12:8 Ukhamasti
Matthew12:9 Ukawjat sarxasinsti
Matthew12:10 Ukansti ampar pharsut mä jaqiw ukankaskäna; Jesusar aynacht'ayañatakiw akham sas jiskt'apxäna: —¿Sábado urun mä usutar k'umaraptayañax walikïskiti? —sasa.
Matthew12:11 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanakan mä ovejatix sábado urun mä p'iyar jalantaspa ukaxa
Matthew12:12 Ukhamasti
Matthew12:13 Uka jaqirusti sarakïnwa: —Amparam luqatatam —sasa. Jaqisti ukspachaw amparap luqatatäna
Matthew12:14 Fariseonakasti sinagogat mistusinxa
Matthew12:15 Jesusasti uk yatisinxa
Matthew12:16 ukatsti jupxat jan khitirus yatiyapxañapatakiw mayïna.
Matthew12:17 Taqi akanakasti Isaías profetan arsutaparjamaw phuqhasiskäna:
Matthew12:18 “¡Uñkatapxam nayan ajllitaxaru
Matthew12:19 Janiw ch'axwkaniti
Matthew12:20 Usuchjatanakarux janiw juk'amp usuchjkaniti
Matthew12:21 Markanakasti jupar iyawsasaw suyt'apxani”.
Matthew12:22 Jesusan ukarusti mä amut juykhu jaqiruw irpanipxäna
Matthew12:23 Jaqinakasti wali muspharataw jiskt'asipxäna: “¿Jupasti Davidan yuqapäpachati?” sasa.
Matthew12:24 Ukham ist'asinsti
Matthew12:25 Jesusasti kuntix fariseonakax lup'ipkän uk yatisin
Matthew12:26 Ukhamarakipï
Matthew12:27 Jumanakax sapxtawa: Beelzebun ch'amapampiw uka ñanqha ajayunakarux jaqsu
Matthew12:28 Nayatix uka ñanqha ajayunakar Diosan Ajayupan ch'amapampi alisnuksta ukaxa
Matthew12:29 “Maynitix mä wali ch'aman jaqin yänakap utapat lunthatsuñ munaspa ukaxa
Matthew12:30 “Khititix jan nayampïki ukax nayar jan walt'ayañatakiw sayt'i; nayampi chik jan apthapiristi
Matthew12:31 “Ukatpï sapxsmaxa
Matthew12:32 Khititix jaqin Yuqapatak jan wal arskani ukarux pampachakiniwa; ukampis khititix Qullan Ajayur ñanqhachañatak jan wal parlkani juparux
Matthew12:33 “Mä suma quqax suma achunak churi; jan suma quqasti
Matthew12:34 ¡Katari jaqinaka! ¿Kamisarak jan wali jaqïkasin suma arunak arsupxasmasti? Kunatix chuymanakaman phuqhantatäki
Matthew12:35 Mä suma jaqix sumanak arsu
Matthew12:36 Nayasti sapxsmawa
Matthew12:37 Jumasti arsutamarjamaw taripatäyäta
Matthew12:38 Ukatsti
Matthew12:39 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Ñanqha lurir aka jaqinakax mä unañcha mayipxi; ukampis janiw mayampis Jonasan unañchapat sipan yaqha unañchax churaskxaniti.
Matthew12:40 Kunjämtix Jonasax kimsa urumpi kimsa arumampix mä jach'a chawllan purakapankänxa
Matthew12:41 Nínive markankir jaqinakasti
Matthew12:42 Uka kipkarakiw Sabá markankir reinas taripäwi urunxa
Matthew12:43 “Kunapachatix mä ñanqha ajayux mä jaqit mistuxa
Matthew12:44 ‘Kawkittix mistunkta ukar kutt'xä’ sasa. Kunapachatix kutt'anxi ukkhasti
Matthew12:45 Ukatsti jupax jupat juk'ampi yaqha paqallqu ñanqha ajayunak tantachi
Matthew12:46 Jesusan jaqinakar ukham parlkipansti
Matthew12:47 mayniw Jesusarux yatiyäna: —Taykamampi
Matthew12:48 Jupasti uk yatiyirirux sänwa: —¿Khitirak taykaxampi
Matthew12:49 Yatiqirinakapar amparampi uñachayasin sarakïna: —Jupanakaw nayan taykaxasa
Matthew12:50 Khititix alaxpachankir Awkixan munañap lurki
Matthew13:1 Jesusax uka pachpa uruw utat mistusin quta lakan qunt'asïna.
Matthew13:2 Walja jaqinakan tantthaptanipansti
Matthew13:3 Ukatsti Jesusax uñtasïwinak tuqiw walja yatichäwinak yatichäna. Jupanakarux sarakïnwa: “Mä yapuchir jaqiw phawir mistüna.
Matthew13:4 Phawkasinsti
Matthew13:5 Mä yaqhip jathasti
Matthew13:6 inti lupt'anipansti
Matthew13:7 Yaqhip jathasti
Matthew13:8 Ukampis ukat ukxar jathax suma laq'awjaruw purïna
Matthew13:9 ¡Jumanakatix ist'añ munapxstaxa
Matthew13:10 Jesusan yatiqirinakapasti jupar jak'achasisin jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kunatarak uñtasïwinak tuqi jaqinakar yatichtasti? —sasa.
Matthew13:11 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Diosax jumanakar kunanakatix alaxpachan imantatäki ukanak yatiyapxtam
Matthew13:12 Khitinakatix utjirinïki ukanakarux juk'ampiw churasini
Matthew13:13 Ukat jumanakarux uñtasïwinak tuqi yatichapxsma; jupanakasti uñjkasinsa janiw uñjapkaniti
Matthew13:14 Ukhamasti
Matthew13:15 Aka jaqinakan chuymapax qalaratawa
Matthew13:16 “Ukampis jumanakax kusisiñanïpxtawa
Matthew13:17 Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew13:18 “Jichhasti kuntix uka uñtasïwix sañ munki uk ist'apxam.
Matthew13:19 Khitinakatix Diosan suma yatiyäwip ist'apki ukat janirak amuyt'apki
Matthew13:20 Qalawjar purki uka jathaxa
Matthew13:21 jan suma saphinïpxatap laykusti
Matthew13:22 Ch'aphi taypir purir jathasti
Matthew13:23 Ukampis suma laq'ar purir jathax
Matthew13:24 Ukatsti Jesusax yaqha uñtasïwit jupanakar parlt'äna: “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämatix mä jaqix yapupar suma jathampi phawantki ukar uñtatawa;
Matthew13:25 ukampis taqinin ikiñapkamaw mä uñisir jaqix jutasin jan wali qura jathampi trigo yapur phawantawayi.
Matthew13:26 Kunapachatix trigox alsunisin puqurxäna ukkhasti
Matthew13:27 Ukapachaw yapuchirinakax yapunir sapxäna: ‘Phawanktas ukax suma jathänwa. ¿Kawkitarak uka jan wali qurasti uñstisti?’ sasa.
Matthew13:28 Yapunisti jupanakarux sänwa: ‘Mä uñisir jaqiw uk lurpacha’ sasa. Yapuchirinakasti jiskt'asipkakïnwa: ‘¿Uka jan wali qura jik'irir sarapxiristti?’ sasa.
Matthew13:29 Yapunisti sänwa: ‘Janiwa
Matthew13:30 Paypach aliskpan sama
Matthew13:31 Jesusasti yaqha uñtasïwit jupanakarux yatichäna: “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämatix mä jaqix yapupar mostaza jatha satantki ukar uñtatawa.
Matthew13:32 Chiqpachansa mostaza jathax taqi jathanakat sipan sinti jisk'akiwa; ukampis alsunisin jiltki ukkhasti
Matthew13:33 Ukatsti yaqha uñtasïwit jupanakarux parlarakïna: “Diosan qhapaq markapax mä levadurjamawa
Matthew13:34 Jesusax taqi ukanakatxa
Matthew13:35 Taqi akanakasti kunjämtix profetax qillqkatayna ukarjamaw phuqhasiskäna: “Uñtasïwinak tuqiw parlä; kunanakatix uraqi qalltäwitpach imantatäkän ukanak yatiyä.”
Matthew13:36 Taqi jaqinakar khithanukxasinsti
Matthew13:37 Ukapachaw Jesusax jupanakarux säna: “Suma jatha satirix Jaqin Yuqapawa
Matthew13:38 yapusti aka uraqiwa. Suma jathasti Diosan ajllit wawanakapawa
Matthew13:39 jan wali jathampi phawantirix pachpa supayawa. Yawthapiñ pachasti akapach tukuskan uka uruwa
Matthew13:40 Kamisatix jan wali quranakax apthapisin ninar phichhantataxa
Matthew13:41 Jaqin Yuqapasti angelanakaparuw khithanini
Matthew13:42 Jupanakarux nina aqkir hornoruw jaquntapxani
Matthew13:43 Diosan munañap phuqhirinakasti
Matthew13:44 “Diosan qhapaq markapax uraqin imantat qurir uñtatawa. Mä jaqix uka imantat quri jikxati
Matthew13:45 “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämatix mä alakipa jaqix suma llijkir qalanak thaqki ukamp sasiwa;
Matthew13:46 kunapachatix wali jila alan llijkir mä qala jikxatki ukkhasti
Matthew13:47 “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämatix mä qänax qutar jaquntatax kunayman chawllanak katsuxa ukamp sasiwa.
Matthew13:48 Chawllan phuqhantat qänarusti
Matthew13:49 Uka pachparakiw akapachan tukusiñap urun lurasini: angelanakaw aski jaqinakampi
Matthew13:50 jan wali jaqinakarusti nina aqkir hornoruw jaquntapxani. Ukapachaw wararipxani laka ch'aksa t'urusipxani.”
Matthew13:51 Jesusasti jupanakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Jumanakax taqi ukanak amuyapxtati? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Amuyapxtwa —sasa.
Matthew13:52 Ukat Jesusax jupanakar säna: —Kunapachatix kamachi yatichirix Diosan qhapaq markapat sum yatxi ukkhaxa
Matthew13:53 Kunapachatix Jesusax uñtasïwinak tuqi yatichañ tukuyxän ukkhasti
Matthew13:54 ukatsti Nazaret markaparuw purxäna
Matthew13:55 ¿Janit jupasti José k'ullu khithun yuqapäkisti? ¿Janit taykapasti María satäkisti? ¿Janit jupasti Santiago
Matthew13:56 ¿Janirakit kullakanakapasti jiwasanak taypin jakapkisti? ¿Kawkitpunirak taqi akanaksti yatiqanpachasti? —sasa.
Matthew13:57 Jupanakasti janiw Jesusan yatichatanakap ist'añ munapkänti. Ukat Jesusax jupanakar säna: —Taqi chiqan mä profetarux sum katuqapxi
Matthew13:58 Jaqinakan jupar jan iyawsapxatap laykusti
Matthew14:1 Uka urunakanxa
Matthew14:2 jupan luqtirinakaparusti sänwa: “Jupax Bautisiri Juanawa
Matthew14:3 Herodes reyipï Bautisir Juanarux katuntayasin carcelar apantayataynaxa. Ukham lurañapatakisti Herodías warmiw juchanïna
Matthew14:4 Juanasti Herodesaruw akham satayna: “Janiw jilaman warmipampi utjasiñamax wakisktamti” sasa.
Matthew14:5 Herodesasti Juanar jiwayañ munäna
Matthew14:6 Herodesan urupansti
Matthew14:7 ukat jupax juramento lurasa tawaqurux säna: —Kuntix munkta uk mayita —sasa.
Matthew14:8 Tawaqusti taykapan amtayataw Herodesarux säna: —Bautisir Juanan p'iqip mä plator churita —sasa.
Matthew14:9 Ukham ist'asasti Herodesax wal llakt'asïna; ukampis jawsatanak nayraqatan juramento luratap laykusti
Matthew14:10 Ukat Bautisiri Juanar p'iqip carcelan khariqaniñapatak arsüna;
Matthew14:11 ukspachaw Juanan p'iqip mä plator apanïna
Matthew14:12 Juanan arkirinakapasti
Matthew14:13 Kunapachatix Jesusax uk yatkän ukkhax
Matthew14:14 Botet mistusinsti
Matthew14:15 Niya jayp'untxipansti
Matthew14:16 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Janiw sarxapxañapax wakiskiti
Matthew14:17 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Phisqa t'ant'ampi pä chawllampikiw utjapxitu —sasa.
Matthew14:18 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Akar apanipxam —sasa.
Matthew14:19 Ukxarusti Jesusax jaqinakan ch'ijir qunurañapatakiw mayïna. Ukatsti phisqa t'ant'ampi pä chawllampi katusin alaxpach uñtasaw Diosar yuspagaräna. T'ant'a pachjasinsti yatiqirinakaparuw churäna taqi jaqinakar lakintapxañapataki.
Matthew14:20 Taqiniw sist'asiñkam manq'apxäna; ukatsti puchunak tunka payan walaya apthapipxäna.
Matthew14:21 Manq'irinakasti niya phisqa waranqa chachanakänwa
Matthew14:22 Uka qhipatsti
Matthew14:23 Jaqinak khithanukxasinsti
Matthew14:24 Ukchañkamasti botex chika qutankxänwa
Matthew14:25 Willjtarusti
Matthew14:26 Ukham uma patanjam jutaskir uñjasinxa
Matthew14:27 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakarux sänwa: —Jan axsarapxamti
Matthew14:28 Pedrosti juparux sarakïnwa: —Tatay
Matthew14:29 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Jutaskakim —sasa. Pedrosti botet saraqasinxa
Matthew14:30 Ukham sarkasinsti
Matthew14:31 Ukspachaw Jesusax amparapat katusin Pedrorux waysüna
Matthew14:32 Boter makhatxapxatapatsti
Matthew14:33 Ukapachaw botenkirinakax killt'asisin Jesusarux sapxäna: —¡Jumax chiqpachapuniw Diosan Yuqapätaxa! —sasa.
Matthew14:34 Quta makhatasinsti
Matthew14:35 Ukankir jaqinakasti Jesusar uñt'xapxänwa
Matthew14:36 juparusti thiya isipaksa llamkt'añatakiw achikt'asipxäna; isip llamkt'irinakasti
Matthew15:1 Fariseonakampi
Matthew15:2 —¿Kunatarak juman yatiqirinakamasti nayra awkinakasan yatichäwipar jan yäqapkisti? ¿Kunatarak manq'añatak amparanakap jan jariqasipkisti? —sasa.
Matthew15:3 Jesusasti jupanakarux jiskt'arakïnwa: —¿Kunatarak jumanakasti yatichäwimarjam phuqhañatak Diosan arsutap jan phuqhapktasti?
Matthew15:4 Diosax siwa: ‘Awkimar taykamar jach'añcham. Khititix awkiparu
Matthew15:5 Ukampis jumanakax sapxtawa: Mayni jaqix awkiparusa
Matthew15:6 ukham siristi
Matthew15:7 ¡K'ari chuyman jaqinaka! Ukatpun Isaías profetax jumanakat sataynaxa:
Matthew15:8 ‘Aka jaqinakax lakapampikiw jach'añchitu
Matthew15:9 Inamayaw nayarux yupaychasipkitu; yatichäwinakapax jaqin yatichäwipakiwa’ —sasa.
Matthew15:10 Jesusasti jaqinakar jawsthapisin akham sänwa: —Ist'apxam
Matthew15:11 Kunatix jaqin purakapar mantki ukax janiw jaqirux q'añuchkiti. Jan ukasti
Matthew15:12 Yatiqirinakapasti Jesusar jak'achasisin jiskt'apxäna: —¿Amuyastati? Fariseonakax arunakam ist'asax wal mayjt'asipxi —sasa.
Matthew15:13 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Alaxpachankir Awkixan jan ayrut alix saphitpach jik'sutäniwa.
Matthew15:14 Jan yäqapxamti
Matthew15:15 Ukapachaw Pedrox Jesusar sarakïna: —Uka yatichäwit qhanañcht'apxitaya —sasa.
Matthew15:16 Jesusasti sänwa: —¿Janirakit jumanakas amuyt'apktasti?
Matthew15:17 Taqi kuntix manq'ktan
Matthew15:18 Ukampis lakat mistki ukax chuyma manqhat juti
Matthew15:19 Chuyma manqhat mistu: jan wali amtañanaka
Matthew15:20 Taqi ukanakaw jaqirux q'añuchi; ukampis jan jariqasis manq'añäki ukax janiw q'añuchkiti.
Matthew15:21 Jesusasti
Matthew15:22 Ukatsti Canaán uraqinkir mä warmiw Jesusan ukarux wal arnaqt'asis jutäna: —¡Tatay
Matthew15:23 Jesusasti juparux janiw kamskänsa. Ukat yatiqirinakapax jupar jak'achasisin achikt'apxäna: —Uka warmirux yanapt'am
Matthew15:24 Jesusasti sänwa: —Diosax Israel markan chhaqhatäkis uka ovejanakar thaqhirikiw khithanitu —sasa.
Matthew15:25 Uka warmisti killt'asisin Jesusarux achikt'asiskakïnwa: —¡Tatay
Matthew15:26 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Janiw walïkiti wawanakat t'ant'a apaqasin anunakar churañaxa —sasa.
Matthew15:27 Warmisti Jesusarux saskakïnwa: —Tatay
Matthew15:28 Ukat Jesusax jupar säna: —Warmi
Matthew15:29 Ukawjat mistusinsti
Matthew15:30 Kawkhankkäntix Jesusax ukkharux walja jaqiw tantachasïna. Ukarusti kayu usutanaka
Matthew15:31 Jaqinakasti uk uñjasin wal muspharapxäna
Matthew15:32 Jesusasti yatiqirinakaparuw jawsäna
Matthew15:33 Yatiqirinakapasti juparux sapxänwa: —Aka chiqan janiw khitis jakkiti. ¿Kawkitarak ukataq jaqitak manq'añ jikxatanipxästi? —sasa.
Matthew15:34 Jesusasti jupanakarux jiskt'askakïnwa: —¿Qawqha t'ant'as utjapxtam? —sasa. —Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Paqallqu t'ant'ampi
Matthew15:35 Ukatsti jaqinakan ukawjar qunurañapatakiw mayïna
Matthew15:36 ukatsti paqallq t'ant'ampi
Matthew15:37 Taqiniw sist'asiñkam manq'apxäna
Matthew15:38 Manq'irinakasti niya pusi waranqa chachanakänwa
Matthew15:39 Ukatsti Jesusax jaqinakar khithanukxänwa

Matthew16:3 willjtarusti sapxaraktawa: ‘Alaxpachax wali qinayrantatawa
Matthew16:4 Dios nayraqatan jan wali sarnaqir aka jaqinakax mä unañcha mayipxi; ukampis janiw yaqha unañchax Jonasan unañchapat sipan churaskxaniti” sasa. Uk sasinsti

Matthew16:9 ¿Janit amuyapktasti
Matthew16:10 ¿Janirakit amtasipktasti paqallqu t'ant'at pusi waranqa jaqir churataxsti

Matthew16:13 Jesusasti Cesarea de Filipo sat chiqar purisinxa
Matthew16:14 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Yaqhipanakax ‘Bautisiri Juanaw’ sapxiwa; yaqhipanakasti ‘Eliasaw’ sapxiwa

Matthew18:24 Kunapachatix jakthapiñ qalltkäna ukkhasti

Matthew18:32 Reyisti uk yatisin juparuw jawsayäna

Matthew19:2 Walja jaqinakaw juparux arkäna
Matthew19:3 Ukapachaw fariseonakat mayninakax
