Matthew19:6 Ukhamasti
Matthew19:7 Jupanakasti jiskt'asipkakïnwa: —¿Kunatarak Moisesasti jaljtañ qillqat warmir luqtasin jaytanukuñ yatichänsti? —sasa.
Matthew19:8 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Jumanakan qala chuymanïtam laykuw Moisesax warmimp jaljtañ jaytawayapxtam; ukampis qalltanxa
Matthew19:9 Nayasti sapxsmawa
Matthew19:10 Yatiqirinakapasti Jesusarux sapxänwa: —Ukarutix mä chacha warmix purchi ukaxa
Matthew19:11 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Janiw taqinis uk amuyapkiti
Matthew19:12 Kunayman amuyunakaw jaqin jan jaqichasiñapatakix utji: yaqhip chachanakax jan jaqichasiñatakiw yuri
Matthew19:13 Ukatsti wawanakaruw Jesusan ukar irpanipxäna
Matthew19:14 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Wawanakax nayan ukar jutasipkpan sama
Matthew19:15 Jesusasti amparapampiw wawanakar luqxatäna
Matthew19:16 Ukapachax mä waynaw Jesusan ukar jutäna
Matthew19:17 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —¿Kunatsa kunatix askïki ukxat jiskt'ista? Dios sapakiw askix utji. Ukampis wiñay jakañarutix mantañ munstaxa
Matthew19:18 Waynasti sarakïnwa: —¿Kawkïr kamachinaksa? —sasa. Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —‘Jan jiwayamti
Matthew19:19 awkimaru
Matthew19:20 Waynasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Taqi uka kamachinak phuqhasktwa. ¿Kunamp lurañaxas wakisi? —sasa.
Matthew19:21 Jesusasti sänwa: —Jumatix chiqap jaqïñ munstaxa
Matthew19:22 Waynasti uka arunak ist'asin
Matthew19:23 Jesusasti yatiqirinakaparux sarakïnwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew19:24 Sapxaraksmawa
Matthew19:25 Uk ist'asinsti
Matthew19:26 Jesusasti jupanakar uñtasin säna: —Jaqinakatakix taqi kunas wali ch'amawa
Matthew19:27 Pedrosti ukxarux sänwa: —Tatay
Matthew19:28 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew19:29 Ukatsti taqi khitinakatix naya layku jaytanukuni: utanakapa
Matthew19:30 Ukampis khitinakatix jichhürun nayrankki jupanakatxa
Matthew20:1 “Diosan qhapaq markapax mä jach'a yapunimpi sasiwa
Matthew20:2 Irnaqirinakampi parlt'asasti
Matthew20:3 Yapunisti niya chika uru jak'aw wasitat mistüna
Matthew20:4 Jupanakarusti sänwa: ‘Jumanakax uva yapuxar irnaqir sarasipkam
Matthew20:5 Yapunisti niya chika uruw wasitat mistüna
Matthew20:6 Niy jayp'untxän ukkhasti
Matthew20:7 Yapunirusti sapxänwa: ‘Janiw khitis irnaqir achikasipkituti’ sasa. Ukat yapunix jupanakar säna: ‘Ukhamax uva yapuxar irnaqir sarasipkam’ sasa.
Matthew20:8 “Niya ch'amakthapi jayp'urusti
Matthew20:9 Ukapachaw jayp'u tuqir irnaqiri mantirinakax jutapxäna
Matthew20:10 Ukatsti
Matthew20:11 Ukham katuqasisasti
Matthew20:12 akham sasa: ‘Qhipa tuqir purinipki uka irnaqirinakax mä juk'akixay irnaqapxchixa
Matthew20:13 Ukampis yapunix jupanakat maynïrirux sänwa: ‘Jilata
Matthew20:14 Irnaqatamat qullqi katuqasisin jank'ak sarxam. Nayaw ukham lurañ munta qhip irnaqir jutkis ukarux jumarjam churaña
Matthew20:15 ¿Janit qullqixampix kuntix nayax munkta uk lurañaxax wakiskitu? Jan ukax
Matthew20:16 “Ukhamasti qhipankirinakax nayrankaniwa; nayrankirinakasti qhipankarakiniwa. Jawsatanakax waljaniwa
Matthew20:17 Jerusalenar sarkasinsti
Matthew20:18 —Jumanakax uñjapxtawa
Matthew20:19 juparusti yaqha markankir jaqinakaruw katuyapxani
Matthew20:20 Ukapachasti Zebedeon yuqanakapan taykapaw pani yuqapampi Jesusan ukar jak'achasïna
Matthew20:21 Jesusasti juparux jiskt'änwa: —¿Kuns munta? —sasa. Jupasti sänwa: —Jumax reyit qunt'askäta ukkhax
Matthew20:22 Jesusasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanakax janiw yatipktati kuntix mayipkta ukxa. ¿Kawkïr k'allk'u umtix umt'kä uk umt'apxasmati? Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Umt'apxiristwa —sasa.
Matthew20:23 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Chiqpachansa jumanakax umt'apxätawa
Matthew20:24 Tunka yatiqirinakasti
Matthew20:25 Jesusasti jupanakar jawsasin sänwa: —Jumanakax yatipxtawa
Matthew20:26 Ukampis jumanak taypin janiw ukhamäñapäkiti. Jan ukasti
Matthew20:27 khititix jumanak taypin jilankañ munchixa
Matthew20:28 Jaqin Yuqapax janiw luqtayasir jutkiti
Matthew20:29 Kunapachatix Jesusax yatiqirinakapampi Jericó markat mistkän ukkhax
Matthew20:30 Pani juykhu jaqinakaw thakhin qunt'atäsipkäna
Matthew20:31 Jaqinakasti ukham arnaqapxipan amukt'apxañapatakiw tuqinuqapxäna
Matthew20:32 Jesusasti ukawjaruw sayt'äna
Matthew20:33 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Tatay
Matthew20:34 Jesusasti jupanakat khuyapt'ayasisin
Matthew21:1 Kunapachatix Jerusalén marka jak'ankxapxän ukkhasti
Matthew21:2 akham sasa: —Khä uñkatasi jisk'a markar sarapxam. Ukansti
Matthew21:3 Ukat khitisa kun sapxätamxa
Matthew21:4 Taqi akanakasti kunjämtix Zacarías profetax qillqawaykatayna ukarjamaw phuqhasiskäna:
Matthew21:5 “Jerusalén markarux sapxam: ‘Uñtapxam
Matthew21:6 Yatiqirinakapasti
Matthew21:7 Uka qachu asnorusti qallupamppach irpanipxäna. Jupanakasti isinakapampiw asnorux janxatapxäna
Matthew21:8 Jaqix waljapunïnwa. Mayninakax isinakap thakhirux jant'akt'apxäna
Matthew21:9 Jesusan nayrapa
Matthew21:10 Kunapachatix Jesusax Jerusalenar mantkän ukkhasti
Matthew21:11 Jaqinakasti sapxänwa: —Galilea uraqina
Matthew21:12 Jesusasti Diosan utapar mantasin taqi ukan aljirinakampiru
Matthew21:13 ukat sarakïna: —Qillqatanxa siwa: ‘Utaxasti Diosat mayisiñ uta satäniwa’
Matthew21:14 Ukansti
Matthew21:15 Ukampis sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew21:16 ukat Jesusarux sapxäna: —¿Uka wawanakan arnaqasitap ist'tati? —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jïsa
Matthew21:17 Ukatsti Jesusax Jerusalén markat Betania markaruw sarxäna
Matthew21:18 Qhipärmanthisti Jerusalenar kutinkasaw Jesusax manq'at awtjayasïna.
Matthew21:19 Thakhi jak'an mä higo quqa uñjäna
Matthew21:20 Ukham uñjasinsti
Matthew21:21 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew21:22 Taqi kuntix iyawsañ chuymampi Diosar mayisipkäta ukxa
Matthew21:23 Uka qhipatsti
Matthew21:24 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayax mä jiskt'a jumanakar jiskt'apxarakïma. ¿Khitis Juanarux bautisañapatak khithani
Matthew21:25 
Matthew21:26 Jaqinakar axsaratasatsti
Matthew21:27 Ukat Jesusarux sapxäna: —Janiw nanakax yatipkti —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Janirakiw nayas sapkirismati kuna munañanïñampitix akanak lurkta uka —sasa.
Matthew21:28 Jesusasti jupanakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Jumanakax kamsapxasmasa? Mä jaqix pani yuqanïnwa; ukat maynïrirux säna: ‘Waway
Matthew21:29 Yuqapasti juparux sänwa: ‘¡Janiw sarkiristti!’ sasa. Ukampis qhipat amuyt'asisin saräna.
Matthew21:30 Uka qhipatsti sullka yuqaruw uka kipka sarakïna. Jupasti awkiparux sänwa: ‘Saräwa’ sasa. Ukatsti janiw sarkänti.
Matthew21:31 Uka paninitxa
Matthew21:32 Bautisiri Juanax aski jakañ thakhi yatichiriw juti
Matthew21:33 “Ist'apxam aka yaqha amuyt'äwi: Mä jaqiw utjäna
Matthew21:34 Kunapachatix yapu apthapiñ pachax purinkän ukkhasti
Matthew21:35 Yapuchirinakasti khithat uywatanakarux katuntapxänwa: maynirux nuwjapxänwa
Matthew21:36 Yapunisti nayrïrit sipansa walja uywatanakampi khithäna; yapuchirinakasti jupanakarux uka kipka lurapxarakïna.
Matthew21:37 “Ukatsti yapunix jupan yuqaparuw khithäna: ‘Yuqaxarux axsarapxaniwa’ sasa.
Matthew21:38 Yuqapar uñjasasti
Matthew21:39 Jupanakasti ukspachaw yapunin yuqaparux katuntapxäna
Matthew21:40 Jesusasti jupanakaruw jiskt'äna: “Jichhasti
Matthew21:41 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Jan khuyapt'ayasisaw uka ñanqha jaqinakarux jiwarayani
Matthew21:42 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Janipunit kunapachas qillqatanak ullarapkta? Uka qillqatanakasti siwa: ‘Utachirinakan apanukut qalax aski qalaruw tukxi. Tatituw ukham luri
Matthew21:43 Ukatpï sapxsmaxa
Matthew21:44 Uka qalxar liwxattirix t'unjatäniwa; ukampis qalatix khitirus jalxattanixa
Matthew21:45 Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew21:46 Jupanakasti Jesusarux katuntañ munapxäna
Matthew22:1 Jesusasti wasitat uñtasïwi tuqit jupanakarux yatichañ qalltäna. Sarakïnwa:
Matthew22:2 “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämatix mä reyix yuqapar jaqichañatak mä manq'äwi wakichayki ukar uñtatawa.
Matthew22:3 Uywatanakaparuw jaqichasïwir jawsayatanak jawsir khithäna
Matthew22:4 Yaqha uywatanakaparuw wasitat khithäna akham iwxt'asa: ‘Jawsayatanakar sapxam
Matthew22:5 Ukampis jawsayatanakax janiw ist'asipkänti. Jupanakat maynïrix yapup uñjiriw sarxäna
Matthew22:6 mayninakasti reyin uywatanakaparux katuntasin jiwayañkamaw nuwjapxäna.
Matthew22:7 Uk yatisinxa
Matthew22:8 Ukatsti uywatanakaparux sarakïnwa: ‘Jaqichasïwitakix taqi kunaw wakichata
Matthew22:9 Ukhamasti
Matthew22:10 Uywatanakasti thakhinakaruw mistupxäna
Matthew22:11 “Reyisti jawsayatanakar uñjiriw utar mantäna
Matthew22:12 Juparusti sänwa: ‘Jilata
Matthew22:13 Ukatsti reyix uywatanakaparuw säna: ‘Kayumpita
Matthew22:14 Waljaniw jawsatanakaxa
Matthew22:15 Uka qhipatsti
Matthew22:16 Ukatsti Jesusan ukaruw khithapxäna mä qawqha fariseonakampi
Matthew22:17 Jichhax sapxitaya: ¿Cesarar qullqi churañax walikïskiti
Matthew22:18 Jesusasti jupanakan jan wali amtañanïpxatap amuyasin
Matthew22:19 Impuesto churañ qullqi uñacht'ayapxita —sasa. Jupanakasti mä qullqi churapxäna.
Matthew22:20 Jesusasti jupanakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Khitin ajanupasa
Matthew22:21 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Cesarankiwa —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Cesarankki ukxa
Matthew22:22 Fariseonakasti uk ist'asin wal muspharapxäna; ukatsti sarawayxapxänwa.
Matthew22:23 Ukürurakiw saduceonakat yaqhipanakax Jesusan ukar jutapxäna. Jupanakasti janiw jiwatanakan jaktañap iyawsapkänti
Matthew22:24 —Yatichiri
Matthew22:25 Nanak taypinxa
Matthew22:26 Payïr jilampix pachparakiw lurasïna
Matthew22:27 Uka qhipatsti uka warmix jiwxarakïnwa.
Matthew22:28 Jiwatanakax jaktkani uka urusti
Matthew22:29 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jumanakax wali pantjatäpxtawa
Matthew22:30 Kunapachatix jiwatanakax jaktkan ukkhaxa
Matthew22:31 Jiwatanakan jaktañapatsti
Matthew22:32 “Nayax Abrahamana
Matthew22:33 Taqi ukanak ist'asinsti
Matthew22:34 Fariseonakasti Jesusan saduceonakar amukt'ayatap yatisinxa
Matthew22:35 jupanakat maynïrix kamachi yatichirïnwa
Matthew22:36 —Yatichiri
Matthew22:37 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —‘Tatit Diosamaruw munäta: taqi chuymamampi
Matthew22:38 Akïriw taqit sipansa wakiskir jach'a kamachixa.
Matthew22:39 Payïr kamachisti ukar uñtatarakiwa: ‘Jaqi masimarux juma kipkarjam munasim.’
Matthew22:40 Aka pä kamachi arunakxar utt'ayataw Moisesan yatichäwipasa
Matthew22:41 Fariseonakan tantacht'atäsipkipan
Matthew22:42 Jesusax jupanakar jiskt'äna: —¿Khitiw Cristox sapxtas jumanakaxa? ¿Khitit jutiriw sapxtasa? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —David reyin wila masipat jutiriwa —sasa.
Matthew22:43 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —¿Kunatsa Davidax Qullan Ajayun amuyt'ayatax “Tatitu” sänxa? Davidax akham sänwa:
Matthew22:44 “Tatitux Tatituxarux siwa: Kupïxaxar qunt'asim
Matthew22:45 Davidatix juparux Tatay
Matthew22:46 Ukarux janiw khitis mä arsa arskxapxänti

Matthew24:1 Jesusax Tatitun utapat mistusinkän ukapachaw yatiqirinakapax jupar jak'achasisin uka utanak uñacht'ayapxäna.
Matthew24:2 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Taqi ukanak uñjapxtati? Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew24:3 Ukatsti Olivos qulluruw sarxapxäna. Ukan Jesusax qunt'asïna
Matthew24:4 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Wal amuyasipxam
Matthew24:5 Waljaniw nayan sutixar jutapxani: “Nayätwa Cristoxa” sasa
Matthew24:6 Jumanakasti
Matthew24:7 Mä jach'a markax yaqha jach'a markampiw nuwasini
Matthew24:8 Taqi ukanakasti jach'a t'aqhisiñan qalltapakïskiwa.
Matthew24:9 “Jumanakarusti
Matthew24:10 Uka urunakansti waljaniw nayar iyawsatanakap chhaqtayasipxani
Matthew24:11 Walja k'ari profetanakaw sartani
Matthew24:12 Ñanqhan wal mirantatap laykusti
Matthew24:13 Ukampis khititix tukuykam sayt'kani ukakiw qhispiyatäni.
Matthew24:14 Diosan qhapaq markapat suma yatiyäwix taqi uraqpachan yatiyasini
Matthew24:15 “Daniel profetax kuna jan wali luräwitix Tatitun utapan luraskani uka tuqit qillqäna. Kunapachatix jumanakax Daniel profetan qillqataparjam Qullan Chiqana ñanqha luririn utjantasir uñjapkäta ukkhaxa
Matthew24:16 Judeankirinakax qullunakar jaltxapxpan;
Matthew24:17 uta patankiristi
Matthew24:18 pampankiristi
Matthew24:19 ¡Kunja llakkañänisa ukürunakan usur jaqi warminakatakixa
Matthew24:20 Jumanakax Diosat mayipxam
Matthew24:21 ukürunakanxa jach'a t'aqhisiñanakaw utjani
Matthew24:22 Diosatix uka urunak jan jisk'aptaykaspa ukaxa
Matthew24:23 “Ukampis maynitix jumanakar sapxiristam: ‘Akaxay Cristoxa’ jan ukax ‘khayaxay Cristoxa’ sasaxa
Matthew24:24 Ukürunakanxa walja k'ari cristonaka
Matthew24:25 Jumanakarusti taqi akanak janïräkipan yatiyapxsma.
Matthew24:26 Jumanakarutix sapxätamxa: ‘Cristox wasarankiwa’ sasaxa
Matthew24:27 Kunjämatix lliju llijux inti jalsut inti jalantkam llijtkixa
Matthew24:28 Mä arunxa: Kawkhantix jaqi jiwatax utjkixa
Matthew24:29 “Uka llakisiñ urunak tukusxipansti
Matthew24:30 Ukapachaw Jaqin Yuqapat alaxpachan mä unañchäwix uñstani
Matthew24:31 Jupaw angelanakapar khithanini
Matthew24:32 “Higo quqat yatiqasipxam: Kunapachatix uka alin layminakapax ch'uxñatati
Matthew24:33 Uka pachparakiy jumanakax taqi ukanak uñjapkäta ukkhax
Matthew24:34 Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew24:35 Alaxpachampi akapachampix tukusiniwa
Matthew24:36 “Ukampis kuna pachäkanitixa
Matthew24:37 “Kunjämatix Noen urunakapan luraskatayna ukhamarakiw Jaqin Yuqapax jutkani ukkhax lurasini.
Matthew24:38 Uma juicio janïr purinkän uka urunakanxa
Matthew24:39 Ukapachaw jupanakan jan amuykayak uma juiciox purinïna
Matthew24:40 Ukapachasti pani chachaw yapunkasipkani
Matthew24:41 Pani warmiw mä piqañan piqaskani
Matthew24:42 “Jumanakax suyapxapunim
Matthew24:43 Ak yatipxam
Matthew24:44 Ukhamasti jumanakax wakicht'atäpxam; Jaqin Yuqapasti kunapachatix jan amuyasipkäta
Matthew24:45 “¿Khitirak aski amuyt'an suma uywatasti? Juparuw uywiripax utapankirinakar wakisitaparjam manq'a churañapatak jayti.
Matthew24:46 Uywiripampi sum phuqkir jikxatayaski uka uywatax
Matthew24:47 Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew24:48 Ukampis
Matthew24:49 ukat mayni uywat masinakapar t'aqhisiyaspa
Matthew24:50 kunürutix utanin puriniñap jan suykani

Matthew25:1 “Diosan qhapaq markapax aka uñtasïwimpi sasiwa. Tunka tawaqux aceitempi nakhir lamparanakapas apt'ataw jaqichasir waynar katuqir mistupxäna.
Matthew25:2 Uka tunkanit phisqanix pisi amuyunïnwa
Matthew25:3 Pisi amuyun tawaqunakasti
Matthew25:4 suma amuyt'an tawaqunakasti
Matthew25:5 Jaqichasir waynan jan jank'a purinipansti
Matthew25:6 Niya chika arumaruw mä arux ist'asïna: ‘¡Jaqichasir waynax jutiwa! ¡Katuqañatak mistunipxam!’ sasa.
Matthew25:7 Tawaqunakasti sarthapisin taqpachaniw lamparanakap wakicht'asipxäna.
Matthew25:8 Jupanakat phisqanïkis uka pisi amuyt'aninakasti
Matthew25:9 Amuyt'an tawaqunakasti jupanakarux sänwa: ‘Aceitex janiw jumanakamppachatak utjkiti
Matthew25:10 Jupanakan aceite alir sarañapkamasti
Matthew25:11 Uka qhipatsti pisi amuyt'an tawaqunakaw uka chiqar kutt'anipxäna
Matthew25:12 Jaqichasir waynasti uta manqhat akham sanïna: ‘Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew25:13 “Ukapachaw Jesusax yatiqirinakapar säna: Jumanakax p'arxtatapun suyapxam
Matthew25:14 “Diosan qhapaq markapax
Matthew25:15 Sapa mayniruw ch'amaparjam katuyawayi: Maynirux phisqa waranqa qullqi
Matthew25:16 Phisqa waranqa qullqi katuqiristi
Matthew25:17 Pä waranqa qullqi katuqiristi uka pachparak luräna
Matthew25:18 Mä waranqa qullqi katuqiristi
Matthew25:19 “Irnaqirinakan jilïripasti jaypachat kutt'anxäna
Matthew25:20 Nayraqatax khititix phisqa waranqa qullqi katuqkatayna ukaw purinïna. Jupasti jilïriparux yaqha phisqa waranqa qullqi jikxatkatayna uk churxäna
Matthew25:21 Uka jilïristi juparux sänwa: ‘Walikiwa
Matthew25:22 Ukxarusti pä waranqa qullqi katuqiriw purinïna
Matthew25:23 Uywiripasti uk ist'asin sarakïnwa: ‘Walikiwa
Matthew25:24 “Qhiparusti mä waranqa katuqiriw purinirakïna
Matthew25:25 Ukat nayax axsaräyäsma
Matthew25:26 Uywiripasti juparux sänwa: ‘Jumax jan wali irnaqir jayra jaqïtawa
Matthew25:27 ¿kunatarak qullqixa bancor jan ucharapistasti? Ukhäm lurasamänxa
Matthew25:28 Ukat mayni yanapirinakaparux sarakïna: ‘Uka waranqa qullqi aparapxam
Matthew25:29 Khititix utjirinïki ukarux juk'ampiw churasini
Matthew25:30 Aka jan wali irnaqirirusti
Matthew25:31 “Kunapachatix Jaqin Yuqapax munañan kankañampi
Matthew25:32 Taqi markankir jaqinakaw jupan nayraqatapan tantacht'asipxani
Matthew25:33 Ovejanakarusti kupïxaparuw uchani
Matthew25:34 Ukapachaw Reyix kupïxapankirinakar sani: ‘Jumanakax jutapxam
Matthew25:35 Nayax manq'at awtjatäskäyätwa
Matthew25:36 Jan isinïyätwa
Matthew25:37 Ukapachaw aski jaqinakax jiskt'apxani: ‘Tatay
Matthew25:38 ¿Kunapacharak qurpachasiñ uta thaqhir uñjapxsma
Matthew25:39 ¿Kunapacharak usut uñjapxsma
Matthew25:40 Reyisti jupanakarux saniwa: ‘Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew25:41 “Ukatsti ch'iqäxapankirinakaruw sarakini: ‘Ñanqhachatanaka
Matthew25:42 Nayax manq'at awtjatäskäyätwa
Matthew25:43 qurpachasiñ thaqhaskäyäta
Matthew25:44 Ukapachaw jupanakax jiskt'apxani: ‘Tatay
Matthew25:45 Reyisti jupanakarux saniwa: ‘Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew25:46 Uka jaqinakasti wiñay t'aqhisiñaruw sarapxani
Matthew26:1 Uka yatichäwinak arsuñ tukuyasinsti
Matthew26:2 —Jumanakax niy yatipxtawa
Matthew26:3 Ukapachasti sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew26:4 jupanakasti k'arimpiw Jesusar katuntañ amtapxäna
Matthew26:5 Ukampis sapxänwa: —Aka jach'a urunakan jan juparux katuntkañäniti
Matthew26:6 Jesusax Betania markan jikxatasïna
Matthew26:7 ukan manq'kipansti
Matthew26:8 Yatiqirinakapasti uk uñjasin wal thithipxäna
Matthew26:9 Ukax walja qullqiruw aljasisapäna
Matthew26:10 Jesusasti uk ist'asin jupanakaruw säna: —¿Kunatarak aka warmitak arusipxtasti? Jupan luratapax nayatak askiwa.
Matthew26:11 T'aqhin jakirinakax jumanak taypin utjapuniniwa
Matthew26:12 Aka warmin q'apkir qullampi p'iqixar warxatatapampix
Matthew26:13 Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew26:14 Tunka payan yatiqirinak taypin mayniw utjäna
Matthew26:15 ukatsti sarakïnwa: —Jesusar katuyapxirisma ukax
Matthew26:16 Judasasti ukürutpach Jesusar kunjämat katuntayañatak thaqhaskäna.
Matthew26:17 Jan levaduran t'ant'a manq'añ Pascua qallta urünwa
Matthew26:18 Jupasti sänwa: —Markar sarapxam
Matthew26:19 Yatiqirinakapasti Jesusan arsutaparjamaw lurapxäna
Matthew26:20 Arumjarusti Jesusax tunka payan yatiqiripampiw manq'añatak qunt'asïna;
Matthew26:21 manq'kasasti jupanakaruw säna: —Qhanak sapxsma
Matthew26:22 Yatiqirinakapasti wali llakt'ataw uñjasipxäna
Matthew26:23 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Nayamp chika chuwar t'ant'a chilltaski ukaw katuyitani.
Matthew26:24 Jaqin Yuqapax Qillqatarjamaw phuqhaski
Matthew26:25 Aljantkani uka Judasasti
Matthew26:26 Manq'apkipansti
Matthew26:27 Ukxarusti mä qiru astäna
Matthew26:28 akax machaq arust'äwi wilaxawa
Matthew26:29 Nayax sapxsmawa
Matthew26:30 Mä q'uchu q'ucht'asinsti
Matthew26:31 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Taqpach jumanakaw jichhärmax nayat mayjt'asipxäta. Qillqatanakax siwa: ‘Awatiriruw jiwayä
Matthew26:32 Ukampis jakatatkä ukkhasti
Matthew26:33 Pedrosti Jesusarux akham sänwa: —Taqpachanis jumarux jaytanukusipkpan
Matthew26:34 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Qhanak sisma
Matthew26:35 Pedrosti saskakïnwa: —Jumampi chika jiwañaxas wakischinixa
Matthew26:36 Jesusasti Getsemaní sat chiqaruw yatiqirinakapamp saräna
Matthew26:37 Ukatsti Pedrompiru
Matthew26:38 Ukat jupanakarux sarakïna: —Ajayuxax llakisiñatsa tukusirjamawa. Jumanakax akawjar qhiparapxam
Matthew26:39 Jesusasti mä juk'a nayraqatar sartasinxa
Matthew26:40 Ukatsti Jesusax yatiqirinakapan ukaruw kutt'anïna
Matthew26:41 Jichhax jan ikipxamti
Matthew26:42 Wasitat sararakikïnwa
Matthew26:43 Mayampi kutinisinsti
Matthew26:44 Jupanakar jaytawayasinsti kimsïr kutiw Diosat mayisir saräna
Matthew26:45 Ukatsti Jesusax yatiqirinakapan ukaruw kuttanxäna
Matthew26:46 Sartapxam
Matthew26:47 Jesusax parlaskän ukhamaruw Judasax purinïna
Matthew26:48 Jesusar aljantir Judasasti jupanakarux akham yatichanitayna: “Khitirutix nayax jamp'atkä
Matthew26:49 Jesusar jak'achasisinsti
Matthew26:50 Jesusasti Judasarux sänwa: —Jilata
Matthew26:51 Jesusampïpkän jupanakat maynïriw espadap apsusin jilïr sacerdoten uywatapan jinchup thuquqayäna.
Matthew26:52 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Uchañapar espadam imam. Espadampi nuwasirix
Matthew26:53 ¿Janit yatkta nayatix munirista ukax
Matthew26:54 Ukhamäspa ukasti
Matthew26:55 Ukapachaw Jesusax jaqinakar jiskt'äna: —¿Kunatarak jumanakasti mä lunthatarjam espadanakampi
Matthew26:56 Ukampis taqi akanakax profetanakan arsutanakap phuqhasiñapatakiw lurasi —sasa. Ukapachaw yatiqirinakax Jesusar sapak jaytawayasin jaltxapxäna.
Matthew26:57 Jesusar katuntirinakasti
Matthew26:58 Pedrosti jayatak Jesusarux arkäna
Matthew26:59 Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew26:60 ukampis walja k'ari jaqinak irkatkipansa
Matthew26:61 jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Aka jaqix siwa: “Nayax Diosan utap t'unjirista
Matthew26:62 Sacerdotenakan jilïripasti sayt'asisin Jesusarux säna: —¿Janit kuns arskäta? ¿Kunatarak jumat ukham sapxisti? —sasa.
Matthew26:63 Jesusasti janiw kuns arskänti. Ukat sacerdotenakan jilïripax jupar säna: —Jakkir Diosan sutipxaruw chiq arsuñamatak maysma. Sapxita: ¿Jumax Diosan Yuqapa Cristötati? —sasa.
Matthew26:64 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Jumaw uk sasktaxa. Nayasti sapxaraksmawa
Matthew26:65 Sacerdotenakan jilïripasti uk ist'asin mayjt'asiñat isinakap ch'iyanuqasïna
Matthew26:66 ¿Jumanakax kamsapxtasa? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Jupax juchaniwa
Matthew26:67 Ukatsti ajanut thuskatapxäna
Matthew26:68 akham sasa: —Niyakixay jumax Cristöstaxa
Matthew26:69 Ukchañkamasti Pedrox uta anqäxan qunt'atäskänwa
Matthew26:70 Pedrosti taqi jaqinak nayraqatan jan uñt'iriw tuküna
Matthew26:71 Ukatsti punku tuqir mistkipan yaqha uywat tawaqux jupar uñjasin ukankirinakan nayraqatapan sarakïna: —Aka jaqix Nazaretankir Jesusampi sarnaqiriwa —sasa.
Matthew26:72 Pedrosti juramento lurasaw wasitat jan uñt'ir tuküna: —¡Janiw uka jaqirux uñt'kti! —sasa.
Matthew26:73 Mä juk'ampjarusti
Matthew26:74 Ukapachaw jupax juramento luräna
Matthew26:75 Pedrosti ukkhakiw kunjämtix Jesusax siskatayna uk amtasïna: “Wallpax janïr art'kipana
Matthew27:1 Niy willjtanipansti
Matthew27:2 Juparusti ñach'antat irpapxäna
Matthew27:3 Jesusar aljantir Judasasti
Matthew27:4 akham sasa: —Jan juchan jaqir jiwayañatak katuyasaw juchan uñjasta —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —¿Kamachapxarakï nanakasti? ¡Jumay kunarus tukuskamxa! —sasa.
Matthew27:5 Judasasti qullqinak Tatitun utapar willintawayasaw sarawayxäna
Matthew27:6 Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapasti uka qullqi apthapisinxa
Matthew27:7 Jupanakkam aruskipasinsti
Matthew27:8 Ukatpï uka uraqix jichhürkam “Wila Uraqi” sataxa.
Matthew27:9 Ukhamat Jeremías profetan arsutapax phuqhasïna: “Uka kimsa tunka qullqi katupxi
Matthew27:10 uka qullqimpiw sañu luririn uraqip alapxi
Matthew27:11 Ukatsti Jesusax marka apnaqirin nayraqatapar irpatänwa
Matthew27:12 Kunapachatix sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew27:13 Ukat Pilatox Jesusar jiskt'äna: —¿Janit ist'kta taqi kuntix jumatak arusipki uksti? —sasa.
Matthew27:14 Ukampis Jesusax janiw kuna jiskt'arus jayskänti
Matthew27:15 Pascua jach'a uruna
Matthew27:16 Uka urunakansti Jesús Barrabás sutini jan wali jaqiw carcelan katuntatäskäna;
Matthew27:17 Pilatosti ukan tantachatäpkän uka jaqinakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Khitir antutañaxsa munapxta
Matthew27:18 Pilatox amuyänwa uka jaqinakan uñisiñat Jesusar katuntayatapa.
Matthew27:19 Ukatsti Pilaton taripañ qunuñapan qunt'atäskiriruw warmipax maynir khithatayna jupar akham siri: “Jan kuns uka jan juchan jaqimpix luramti
Matthew27:20 Ukampis sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew27:21 Marka apnaqirix wasitat jupanakarux jiskt'äna: —¿Jumanakax khitirus aka paninit antutañax munapxta? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —¡Barrabasaru! —sasa.
Matthew27:22 Pilatosti jupanakarux wasitat jiskt'äna: —Ukhamax ¿kun lurañaxsa munapxta Cristo satäkis uka Jesusampixa? —sasa. Ukarux taqiniw mayak sapxäna: —¡Ch'akkatam! —sasa.
Matthew27:23 Pilatosti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Kuna jan walpunrak luristi? —sasa. Jaqinakasti wasitat art'asipkakïnwa: —¡Ch'akkatam! —sasa.
Matthew27:24 Pilatosti jaqir inamay arxayatap amuyasïna
Matthew27:25 Jaqinakasti ukxarux sapxänwa: —¡Uka jaqin jiwatapatxa
Matthew27:26 Ukhamasti Pilatox Barrabasaruw antutxäna
Matthew27:27 Marka apnaqirin soldadonakapasti reyin utap anqäxaparuw Jesusarux irpapxäna
Matthew27:28 Isinakap apsusinsti
Matthew27:29 p'iqiparusti ch'aphit lurat pillumpiw uskupxäna
Matthew27:30 Thuskatapxänwa
Matthew27:31 Jupat phiskasiñ tukuyasinsti
Matthew27:32 Markat mistkasinxa
Matthew27:33 Gólgota chiqar purisinsti
Matthew27:34 mullampi kittat vino umt'añapatakiw churapxäna
Matthew27:35 Ch'akkatatäxän ukkhasti
Matthew27:36 Ukatsti jupar uñch'ukiriw qunt'asipxäna.
Matthew27:37 P'iqip patxarusti
Matthew27:38 Jupamp chikasti pani lunthataruw ch'akkatapxäna
Matthew27:39 Uka chiq saririnakasti p'iqinakap khiwisisaw wal tuqipxäna
Matthew27:40 akham sasa: —¡Jumax Tatitun utap t'unjasax kimsürun sayt'ayañ munäyätaxa! ¡Diosan Yuqapästa ukax
Matthew27:41 Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
Matthew27:42 —Yaqhanakarux qhispiyiwa
Matthew27:43 Diosaruxay jupax alkatchixa
Matthew27:44 Jupampi chika ch'akkatatäkän uka lunthatanakas Jesusarux tuqipxarakïnwa.
Matthew27:45 Ukapachasti chikürut chika jayp'ukamaw taqpach uraqix ch'amakt'äna.
Matthew27:46 Jesusasti ukapachaw wali jach'at art'asïna: “Elí
Matthew27:47 Ukankirinakat mä qawqhanix
Matthew27:48 Ukspachaw jupanakat maynix mä esponja thaqtir jaltasïna
Matthew27:49 Mayninakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Suyt'am
Matthew27:50 Jesusasti wasitat jach'at art'asïna
Matthew27:51 Ukapachaw Tatitun utapankir jach'a cortinax payar ch'iyjtäna
Matthew27:52 amay imäwinakax jist'artänwa; Diosar iyawsas jiwirinakas jakatatapxarakïnwa.
Matthew27:53 Jesusan jaktatap qhipatsti
Matthew27:54 Jesusar uñjir capitanampi
Matthew27:55 Ukawjansti
Matthew27:56 Uka warminak chikasti
Matthew27:57 Jayp'thapirusti
Matthew27:58 Jupasti Pilaton ukaruw mantäna
Matthew27:59 Ukatsti Joseax Jesusan amayap mä q'uma isimpiw llawuntäna
Matthew27:60 ukatsti jupankïr machaq amay imañaruw imxäna
Matthew27:61 Magdalankir Mariampi
Matthew27:62 Sábado urusti
Matthew27:63 sapxarakïnwa: —Tata
Matthew27:64 Jichhasti kimsürpachatakiy amay imäwi punku uñjir khitham
Matthew27:65 Pilatosti jupanakarux sänwa: —Akax uñjir soldadonakaxa. Sarapxam
Matthew27:66 Jupanakasti sarasin atkatatäkän uka qalaruw chimpuntapxäna; ukatsti soldadonakaruw amay imäwi punku uñjañapatak jaytanipxäna.
Matthew28:1 Sábado uru qhipata
Matthew28:2 Ukatsti akatjamat uraq khathatix sartäna. Tatitun angelapaw alaxpachat saraqanitayna
Matthew28:3 Angelasti lliju llijur uñtataw k'ajäna
Matthew28:4 Angelar uñjasinsti
Matthew28:5 Angelasti warminakarux sarakïnwa: —Jan axsarapxamti. Nayax yattwa ch'akkatatäkän uka Jesusar thaqhasipkatama.
Matthew28:6 Janiw akankxiti
Matthew28:7 Jank'ak sarapxam
Matthew28:8 Warminakasti uk ist'asin wal mulljasipxäna
Matthew28:9 Ukhamaruw Jesusax jupanakar uñstäna
Matthew28:10 jupasti sarakïnwa: —Jan axsarapxamti. Yatiqirinakaxar yatiyir sarapxam
Matthew28:11 Warminakan sarañapkamasti
Matthew28:12 Uka sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapasti jilïr jaqinakan ukaruw jupanakamp arust'asiñatak sarapxäna. Soldadonakarux walja qullqi churapxäna
Matthew28:13 jupanakarusti sapxarakïnwa: —Jumanakax jaqinakarux akham sapxäta: “Ikiñkamaw yatiqirinakapax arum jutasin Jesusan amayap lunthatsuwayapxatayna” sasa.
Matthew28:14 Uktix marka apnaqirix yatinixa
Matthew28:15 Soldadonakasti qullqi katuqasinxa
Matthew28:16 Ukatsti tunka mayan yatiqirix Galilearuw sarxapxäna
Matthew28:17 Jesusar uñjasinsti
Matthew28:18 Jesusasti jupanakar jak'achasisin säna: —Diosax munañan kankañ churitu
Matthew28:19 Jichhasti taqi akapachankir jaqinakar nayan arkirinakax tukuyapxam; jupanakarusti Dios Awkina
Matthew28:20 Taqi kuntix nayax jumanakar yatichapksma ukanak phuqhañ yatichapxam. Nayasti sapürupuniw akapachan tukusiñapkam jumanakampïskä —sasa.
Mark1:1 Diosan Jesucristo Yuqapxata suma yatiyäwi arunakax akhamat qallti.
Mark1:2 Kamisatix Diosax Isaías profeta tuqi akham yatiykatayna: “Nayan qhanañchirixwa juman nayraqatam khitta
Mark1:3 Maynin art'atapaw wasaran ist'asi: ‘Tatitutak thakhi wakichapxam; mä chiqap thakhi jist'arapxam’ ” sasa.
Mark1:4 Khä urunakan Bautisir Juanax wasaran uñstäna; taqiniruw parläna akham sasa: “Tatitur kutikipstxapxam
Mark1:5 Taqi Judeankiri
Mark1:6 Juanan isipax camello t'awrat luratänwa; wak'apasti lip'ichit luratänwa; manq'apasti t'iju t'ijunakampi
Mark1:7 Jaqinakarusti sarakïnwa: “Nayan qhipaxat mayniw jutaski
Mark1:8 Nayax jumanakarux umampiw bautisapxsma
Mark1:9 Ukürunakan Jesusax Galilea uraqinkir Nazaret markat jutäna
Mark1:10 Umat mistkasinsti
Mark1:11 Ukatsti mä aruw alaxpachat ist'asïna: “Jumätaw nayan munat Wawaxaxa
Mark1:12 Uka qhipatsti Qullan Ajayux wasararuw Jesusar irpäna.
Mark1:13 Jupasti pusi tunka uruw axsarkañ animalanakampi wasaran jakäna
Mark1:14 Juanar carcelt'apkän uka qhipatsti
Mark1:15 Sarakïnwa: “Pachax phuqhasxiwa. Diosan qhapaq luräwipasti jak'ankxiwa. Juchan sarnaqañanak apanukupxam
Mark1:16 Jesusax Galilea quta thiya sarkasinxa
Mark1:17 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayar arkapxita; nayasti jumanakarux jaqi katur tukuyapxäma —sasa.
Mark1:18 Ukatsti jupanakax jank'akiw qänanakap jaytawayxasin Jesusamp chik sarxapxäna.
Mark1:19 Ukawjat mä juk'amp sartasinsti
Mark1:20 Jesusasti jupanakarux jawsarakïnwa
Mark1:21 Ukatsti Cafarnaúm markaruw puripxäna. Sábado urunsti Jesusax sinagogar mantasin yatichañ qalltäna.
Mark1:22 Jaqinakasti Jesusan yatichäwinakapat wal muspharapxäna
Mark1:23 Sinagoga tantachasïwinsti ñanqha ajayun mantat mä jaqiw ukankaskäna. Jupasti Jesusar uñjasax jach'at art'äna:
Mark1:24 —¡Nazaretankir Jesús! ¿Kuna lurañamas nanakamp utji? ¿Nanakar t'unjirit jutta? Nayax uñt'smawa
Mark1:25 Jesusasti uka ñanqha ajayurux tuqinuqänwa: —¡Amukt'am
Mark1:26 Ñanqha ajayusti uka jaqitxa t'uku usjam jupar thalayasin jach'at wararis mistuwayxäna.
Mark1:27 Uk uñjasinsti taqiniw muspharapxäna
Mark1:28 Ukatsti mäkirakiw Galilea uraqpachan jaqinakax Jesusan luratapat yatipxäna.
Mark1:29 Sinagogat mistusinsti
Mark1:30 Simonan taykch'ipasti usuntataw ikiñankaskäna. Ukspachaw Jesusar yatiyapxäna
Mark1:31 ukat Jesusax jak'achasisin usutarux amparat waytäna; uka usupasti ukspachaw chhaqtawayxäna
Mark1:32 Inti jalanta sujsthapirusti
Mark1:33 markankir taqi jaqinakasti uta punkuruw tantacht'asipxäna.
Mark1:34 Jesusasti kunayman usutanakaruw k'umaraptayäna
Mark1:35 Willjtanxipansti
Mark1:36 Mä juk'a qhipatsti
Mark1:37 jikxatasinsti jupar sapxänwa: —Taqiniw thaqhasipktam —sasa.
Mark1:38 Jesusasti sänwa: —Yaqha jak'ankir chiqanakar sarapxañäni; ukan Diosan arunakap parlañaxaw wakt'itu
Mark1:39 Jesusasti taqi Galilea uraqpach muytäna
Mark1:40 Lepra usun mä jaqiw Jesusar jak'achasinïna
Mark1:41 Jesusasti jupat khuyapt'ayasisin amparapampiw luqxatäna
Mark1:42 Ukspachaw lepra usux uka jaqit chhaqtawayxäna
Mark1:43 Jesusasti juparux wal wal iwxt'asin khitxäna
Mark1:44 —Ist'am
Mark1:45 Ukampis uka jaqix sarxasinxa
Mark2:1 Mä qawqha urunakatsti
Mark2:2 mäkiw phuqthaptanipxäna
Mark2:3 Ukapachasti pusi jaqinakaw mä suchu jaqi kallt'at purinipxäna.
Mark2:4 Jaqin phuqhätap layku Jesusar jan jak'achasiñjamïpansti
Mark2:5 Jesusasti jupanakan iyawsañanïpxatap yatisinxa
Mark2:6 Ukansti kamachinak yatichirinakaw qunt'atäsipkäna
Mark2:7 “¿Kamisarak aka jaqisti ukham parlxanisti? Uka arunakapax Diosar ñanqhachir arunakawa. Dios sapakiw juchanak pampachaspaxa” sasa.
Mark2:8 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakan lup'itanakap mäkiw amuyäna
Mark2:9 Aka usut jaqirux ¿kun sañas jasakïspa: “Juchanakamax pampachatäxiwa” sañati
Mark2:10 Ukhamasti nayax uñacht'ayapxämawa Jaqin Yuqapan munañanïtapa akapachan juchanak pampachañataki —sasa. Ukham sasinsti Jesusax suchu jaqirux sänwa:
Mark2:11 —Jumaruw sisma
Mark2:12 Suchu jaqisti ukspachaw sartasin ikiñap apthapisïna
Mark2:13 Uka qhipatsti Jesusax wasitat quta thiyar saräna
Mark2:14 Uka chiq sarkasinsti
Mark2:15 Uka qhipatsti Jesusampi yatiqirinakapampix Mateon utapan manq'asipkäna
Mark2:16 Kamachi yatichirinakata
Mark2:17 Jesusasti uk ist'asin jupanakaruw säna: —K'umaranakatakix janiw qullirix munaskiti
Mark2:18 Kunapachatix Bautisir Juanan arkirinakapasa
Mark2:19 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Kunjämarak jaqichasïwir jawsayat jaqinakasti ayunaspasti
Mark2:20 Ukampis mä uruw jaqichasir waynax jan jupanakampïkxaniti
Mark2:21 Janiw khitis mä mirq'i isirux machaq isimpi ch'ukxatkaspati
Mark2:22 Janirakiw khiti jaqis chhuyu vino mä mirq'i lip'ich wayaqar warantkaspati
Mark2:23 Jesusax mä sábado urun yapu taypi saraskäna
Mark2:24 Fariseonakasti uk uñjasin Jesusarux sapxänwa: —Uñjam
Mark2:25 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Janipunit kunapachas jumanakax qillqat ullart'apkta
Mark2:26 Abiatar chachax jilïr sacerdotëkän ukkhaxa
Mark2:27 Jesusasti saskakïnwa: —Sábado urux jaqitak uchatawa

Mark3:1 Jesusax wasitat mä sinagogar mantäna
Mark3:2 Jesusar uñisirinakasti jamasat uñch'ukisipkäna sábado urun qullanit janicha
Mark3:3 Jesusasti ampar pharsut jaqirux sänwa: —Sartam
Mark3:4 Ukatsti Jesusax mayninakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Kuna lurañas wakisi sábado urunxa
Mark3:5 Jesusax phiñasitaw jupanakar uñkatäna
Mark3:6 Fariseonakasti sinagogat mistusinxa
Mark3:7 Jesusax yatiqirinakapampiw quta thiyar saräna
Mark3:8 Jesusan muspharkañ luräwinakap yatisinxa
Mark3:9 Ukat Jesusax yatiqirinakapar iwxt'äna: Jaqinakamp jan ñiqjayasiñatak mä bote wakicht'apxam
Mark3:10 Jupasti waljaniruw k'umaraptayäna
Mark3:11 Ñanqha ajayunakasti Jesusar uñjasinxa
Mark3:12 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakarux tuqinuqänwa jupxat jan kunsa parlapxañapataki.
Mark3:13 Ukatsti Jesusax mä qulluruw makhatäna
Mark3:14 tunka payaniruw utt'ayasïna jupamp chikäpxañapataki
Mark3:15 ukatsti jupanakarux ñanqha ajayunakar alissupxañapatakiw ch'am churäna.
Mark3:16 Tunka payan ajllitanakasti akïrinakawa: Simón
Mark3:17 Santiago
Mark3:18 Ukxarusti Andrés
Mark3:19 Judas Iscariote
Mark3:20 Uka qhipatsti Jesusax utaruw kuttanxäna. Jaqinakasti wasitat tantachasipxäna
Mark3:21 Uk yatisinsti Jesusan wila masinakapax jupar irpxañatakiw jutapxäna: “Luqhiptxataynawa” sasa.
Mark3:22 Jerusalenat jutir kamachi yatichirinakasti sapxarakïnwa: “Aka jaqix Beelzebú jilïr ñanqha ajayun mantatäpachawa
Mark3:23 Ukat Jesusax jupanakar jawsasin uñtasïwinak tuqi qhanañchäna: “¿Kunjämarak supayasti jupapachpar jaqunukuspasti?
Mark3:24 Mä markan jakirinakapatix payar t'aqjtatäspaxa
Mark3:25 mä utantix wila masinakax jaljtatäpxaspa ukaxa
Mark3:26 Uka kipkaraki
Mark3:27 “Janiw khitis mä ch'aman jaqin utapar mantasin yänakap lunthatkaspati
Mark3:28 “Qhanak sapxsma
Mark3:29 ukampis khititix Qullan Ajayur arunakapamp ñanqhachkani ukaxa
Mark3:30 Ukham Jesusax arsüna
Mark3:31 Ukhamäkipan Jesusan taykapampi jilanakapampix purinipxäna
Mark3:32 Jesús jak'an qunt'atäpkän ukanakasti
Mark3:33 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Khitirak taykaxampi
Mark3:34 Uk sasinsti jupamp chik qunt'atäpkän ukanakar uñkatasin säna: —Jupanakaw taykaxasa
Mark3:35 Khitinakatix Diosan munañap phuqhapki ukanakaw jilaxasa
Mark4:1 Yaqha urusti Jesusax wasitat Galilea quta thiyan yatichañ qalltäna. Ukatsti walja jaqinakarakiw ukar tantachasipxäna
Mark4:2 Jesusasti kunayman uñtasïwinak tuqiw yatichäna. Sarakïnwa:
Mark4:3 “Ak sum ist'apxam: Mä yapuchir jaqiw trigo phawir mistüna.
Mark4:4 Phawantki ukkhax yaqhip jathanakax thakhiruw willnuqtäna
Mark4:5 Yaqhip jathanakasti juk'a laq'ani qalanak taypiruw purïna. Uka jathanakasti juk'a laq'anïtap laykux mäkiw misturanïna;
Mark4:6 kunapachatix lupix lupt'ankän ukkhasti
Mark4:7 Yaqhip jathanakax ch'aphinak taypiruw purïna. Ch'aphinakasti jiltasin q'al chhaqtayäna
Mark4:8 Ukampis yaqhip jathanakax suma laq'awjaruw purïna
Mark4:9 Ukatsti Jesusax jupanakarux sänwa: “Jumanakatix ist'añ munapxsta ukaxa
Mark4:10 Uka qhipatxa
Mark4:11 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Jumanakarupï qhanpach yatiyataxa jan amuyt'kaya Diosan qhapaq markapatxa; ukampis mayninakarux taqi kunas uñtasïwinak tuqikiw yatiyasi
Mark4:12 uñjkasinsa jan uñjapxañapataki
Mark4:13 Ukatsti saskakïnwa: “¿Janit jumanakax uka yatichäw amuyt'apkta? Ukhamasti ¿kunjämarak yaqha yatichäwinak amuyt'apxasmasti?
Mark4:14 Phawir jaqixa
Mark4:15 Yaqhip jaqinakax thakhir purkis uka jathanakar uñtatawa. Diosan arunakap ist'apkis ukspachaw supayax jutasin chuymanakapat uka arunak q'al lunthatsuwayi.
Mark4:16 Yaqhipanakasti qalanak taypir purkis uka jathanakar uñtatawa. Diosan arunakap ist'asax mäkiw kusisiñamp katuqapxi
Mark4:17 ukampis jan suma saphintatätap laykux jan ch'amaniw sayt'asipxi; kunapachatix Diosan arunakap layku t'aqhisipki
Mark4:18 Yaqhipanakax ch'aphinak taypir purkis uka jathanakar uñtatawa. Diosan arunakap ist'asinxa
Mark4:19 jupanakax akapach yänakaruw sinti munapxi
Mark4:20 Ukatsipan mayninakax Diosan arunakap ist'asin sum katuqapxi
Mark4:21 Ukxarusti sarakïnwa: “¿Ukhamasti qhanaskir michax phukhu manqhar uchañatakiti
Mark4:22 Uka kipkapï
Mark4:23 Jumanakatix ist'añ munapxstaxa
Mark4:24 Ukxarusti saskakïnwa: “¡Sum ist'apxam! Qawqhtix jumanakax mayninakar churapkäta ukkharak Diosax jumanakar churapxätam
Mark4:25 Utjirinirusti
Mark4:26 Jesusasti saskakïnwa: “Diosan qhapaq markapax kunjämtix mä jaqix uraqir jatha phawantki ukhamar uñtasitawa.
Mark4:27 Phawantir jaqix utapar ikiris saraskpan
Mark4:28 Jathax uraqin jupapachaw jilaski; nayraqatax aliw mistu
Mark4:29 Kunapachatix achux suma puquratäxi ukkhasti
Mark4:30 Jesusasti saskakiwa: “¿Kunar uñtasitas Diosan qhapaq markapaxa? Jan ukax ¿kuna uñtasïwimpich qhanañchsnaxa?
Mark4:31 Diosan qhapaq markapax uraqir phawantat mostaza jathar uñtatawa. Uka jathax akapachan utjir taqi jathanakat sipan juk'amp jisk'akiwa
Mark4:32 phawantatatsti
Mark4:33 Jesusax Diosan arunakapat ukham yatichäna
Mark4:34 Janiw kunsa ukhamak parlkänti
Mark4:35 Uka pachpa uru jayp'thapirusti
Mark4:36 Jaqinakar jaytjawayasinsti Jesusarux kawkïr botenkkäntix uka pachpat irpapxäna
Mark4:37 Ukatsti mä jach'a thayaw sartäna; mathapisti boterux umampiw chhaqtayirjamäna.
Mark4:38 Jesusasti qhipäx k'uchun ch'ijmt'asisin ikiskäna. Yatiqirinakapasti jupar sartayasinxa
Mark4:39 Jesusasti sartasin thayarux tuqinuqäna
Mark4:40 Ukat Jesusax yatiqirinakaparux säna: —¿Kunatsa ukataq mulljasipxta? ¿Kunatarak jan iyawsañanïpxtasti? —sasa.
Mark4:41 Yatiqirinakapasti wal axsarapxäna
Mark5:1 Quta khurkatar makhatasinsti
Mark5:2 Jesusax botet saraqkän ukkhasti
Mark5:3 ukan jakarakïna. Janirakiw khitis cadenanakampi ñach'jañatak ch'amanïkänti.
Mark5:4 Walja kutiw juparux cadenanakampi amparanakata
Mark5:5 Uruy arumaw qullunakana
Mark5:6 Jesusar jayat uñtasinsti
Mark5:7 ukatsti
Mark5:8 Ukham sasaw ñanqha ajayux säna
Mark5:9 Jesusax jiskt'änwa: —¿Kunas sutimaxa? —sasa. Ñanqha ajayusti sarakïnwa: —Legión satätwa
Mark5:10 Jupasti Jesusar wal achikt'asïna uksa tuqinakat jan alisnukuyasiñataki.
Mark5:11 Uka chiqan walja khuchhinakaw qullu jak'an manq'asipkäna
Mark5:12 ñanqha ajayunakasti Jesusaruw achikt'asipxäna: —Khuchhinakaruy khitxapxita
Mark5:13 Jesusasti achikt'asitaparux walikiw
Mark5:14 Khuchhi awatirinakasti wali mulljataw jaltxapxäna
Mark5:15 Jesusan ukar purinisinsti
Mark5:16 uñjirinakasti kunatix ñanqha ajayun mantat jaqimpi
Mark5:17 Uk yatisinsti
Mark5:18 Jesusan boter mantxatapatsti
Mark5:19 Ukampis Jesusax janiw munkänti
Mark5:20 Uka jaqisti iyawsasaw sarxäna
Mark5:21 Kunapachatix Jesusax botet quta khurkatar kutkatxän ukkhaxa
Mark5:22 Ukatsti mä jaqiw jutäna
Mark5:23 ukatsti juparux walpun achikt'asïna: —Phuchhaxaw jiwirjama. Sarakiñäniya
Mark5:24 Jesusasti iyawsasaw jupamp chik saräna
Mark5:25 Uka jaqinak taypin mä warmiw utjäna
Mark5:26 Walja qullirinakampiw qullayasitayna
Mark5:27 Jesusat parlir ist'asinsti
Mark5:28 Chuymapansti sarakïnwa: “Isipak llamkt'irista
Mark5:29 Ukspachaw wila apa usupax t'akt'xäna
Mark5:30 Jesusasti ch'amap mistur amuyasisinxa
Mark5:31 Yatiqirinakapasti juparux sapxänwa: —Jaqinakarakis ñiqjasktamxä. Ukatti jiskt'apxista: “¿Khitis llamkt'itu sasasti?” —sasa.
Mark5:32 Ukampis Jesusax taqi tuqi uñatatasiskakïnwa khitis isipat llamkt'pacha uk yatiñataki.
Mark5:33 Ukat warmix axsarañat khathatt'asisaw Jesusan nayraqatapar killt'asïna
Mark5:34 Jesusasti sänwa: —Wawa
Mark5:35 Ukham parlkiriruw
Mark5:36 Jesusasti ukham parlir ist'asinxa
Mark5:37 Jesusasti janiw taqinimp sarañ munkänti
Mark5:38 Sinagogan jilïrïkis ukan utapar purkasinsti
Mark5:39 utar mantasinsti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Kunatarak ukataq uxusipkta
Mark5:40 Uk ist'asinsti jaqinakax jupat larusipxänwa. Ukatsti Jesusax taqiniruw anqar ananuküna. Imill wawan awkipampi
Mark5:41 Ukatsti amparat katusin Jesusax arameo arut säna: —¡Talitá
Mark5:42 Ukspachaw uka imill wawax sartäna
Mark5:43 Ukampis Jesusax walpun jupanakarux iwxt'äna ukxat jan khitir kunsa arsupxañapataki
Mark6:1 Jesusax uka chiqat markaparuw kuttawayxäna
Mark6:2 Sábado uru purinipansti
Mark6:3 ¿Janit akasti Marian k'ullu khithu yuqapäkisti
Mark6:4 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakarux sänwa: —Mä profetax taqi chiqan jach'ar aptatawa
Mark6:5 Ukansti janiw kuna muspharkañ luräwinaksa lurkänti
Mark6:6 Jesusasti jupanakan jan iyawsapxatapat llakt'ataw jikxatasïna. Uka qhipat Jesusax uka jak'ankir jisk'a markanakan yatichasaw sarnaqäna.
Mark6:7 Tunka payan yatiqiripar jawsasinsti
Mark6:8 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Thakhitakix janiw t'ant'sa
Mark6:9 Wiskhu wiskt'asiwayapxäta
Mark6:10 Ukatsti saskakïnwa: —Mä markar puripxäta ukkhaxa
Mark6:11 Kawkhantix jan katuqañ munapkätam
Mark6:12 Ukatsti yatiqirinakapax jaqinakaruw parlir sarapxäna juchanakap jaytanukusin Diosar kutikipstapxañapataki.
Mark6:13 Ukhamarak walja ñanqha ajayunak jaqinakat alissupxäna
Mark6:14 Jesusan luratapasti taqi tuqin yatisïna
Mark6:15 Mayninakasti: “Elías profetawa” sapxänwa. Yaqhipanakasti: “Mä profetäpachawa
Mark6:16 Ukanak ist'asinsti Herodes reyix sänwa: —Aka jaqix Juanawa. Naya pachpa p'iqip khariqaykta ukawa
Mark6:17 Herodes reyix
Mark6:18 Ukatpï Juanax Herodesarux sataynaxa: “Janiw jilaman warmipampïñamax wakiskiti” sasa.
Mark6:19 Ukat Herodías warmix Juanar uñisïna
Mark6:20 Herodesasti Juanan aski jaqïtap yatïna
Mark6:21 Ukampis Herodías warmitakix suykän uka urux purinïnwa. Ukasti Herodes reyin urupänwa
Mark6:22 Herodiasan phuchhapasti manq'apkänsa ukkhar mantanisin wali sum thuqt'äna
Mark6:23 Ukatsti juramento lurarapïna akham sasa: “Kuntix maykitäta uk churämawa
Mark6:24 Tawaqusti mistuwayasin taykaparuw jiskt'asïna: —¿Kuns mayiristxa? —sasa. Taykapasti sänwa: —Bautisir Juanan p'iqip mayim —sasa.
Mark6:25 Tawaqusti reyin ukar mantasin sänwa: —Bautisiri Juanan p'iqip jichhpach mä plator churita —sasa.
Mark6:26 Reyisti uk ist'asinxa
Mark6:27 Reyix ukspachaw Juanan p'iqip apaniñapatak mä soldador khithäna. Soldadosti carcelar purisin Juanan p'iqip khariqäna
Mark6:28 ukatsti mä platoruw apanïna. Reyisti tawaquruw uk churäna
Mark6:29 Juanan arkirinakapasti uk yatisinxa
Mark6:30 Uka qhipatsti
Mark6:31 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jutapxam
Mark6:32 Ukhamasti Jesusampi yatiqirinakapampix mä botet ch'usa chiqawjaruw sarxapxäna.
Mark6:33 Ukampis walja jaqinakaw Jesusampiru
Mark6:34 Jesusax botet saraqasin
Mark6:35 Jayp'untxipansti yatiqirinakapax Jesusar jak'achasisin sapxäna: —Jayp'üxiwa
Mark6:36 Jaqinakar khithanukxam
Mark6:37 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jumanakay manq'añ churapxamxa —sasa. Yatiqirinakapasti ukxarux sapxänwa: —Janiw taqpach jaqitak t'ant'a alanipkiristti. Ukatakix mä mara irnaqatat paylläwiw munasispa —sasa.
Mark6:38 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Qawqha t'ant'as utjapxtam? Uñjanipxam —sasa. Jupanakasti uñjasin sapxiwa: —Phisqa t'ant'ampi pä chawllampikiw utjapxitu —sasa.
Mark6:39 Jesusasti jupanakarux jaqinakar tam tama ch'ijir qunurayapxañapatakiw mayïna.
Mark6:40 Jaqinakasti tam tamaw qunurapxäna
Mark6:41 Jesusasti phisqa t'ant'ampi pä chawllampi apxarüna
Mark6:42 Ukatsti taqiniw sist'asiñkam manq'asipxäna;
Mark6:43 t'ant'a puchunakampi
Mark6:44 Manq'apkän ukanakasti phisqa waranqa chachanakat juk'ampïnwa.
Mark6:45 Uka qhipatsti
Mark6:46 Jaqinakar khithanukxasinsti
Mark6:47 Arumjarusti botex chika qutankxänwa. Jesusasti sapakiw wañan qhiparatayna
Mark6:48 ukatsti yatiqirinakapar wali ch'amampi chawuskir uñjäna
Mark6:49 Yatiqirinakapasti uma patanjam jutaskir uñjasinxa
Mark6:50 taqpachaniw uñjapxäna
Mark6:51 Jesusasti jupanakar jak'achasisin botxar mistüna
Mark6:52 jupanakax janiw amuyt'apkataynati kuna muspharañatix t'ant'anakamp luraskän ukxa
Mark6:53 Quta khurkatar makhatasinsti
Mark6:54 Jupanakax botet saraqapkän ukspachaw jaqinakax Jesusätap amuyapxäna.
Mark6:55 Ukatsti jupanakax taqi uka chiqanakar yatiyiriw jalapxäna
Mark6:56 Kawki chiqarutix Jesusax purkäna
Mark7:1 Fariseonakaw Jesusarux jak'achasipxäna
Mark7:2 Jupanakasti Jesusan yaqhip yatiqirinakaparux q'añu amparanakapamp manq'ir uñjapxäna
Mark7:3 (Fariseonakampi taqpach judionakampix awkinakapan saräwinakaparjamaw phuqhapxi
Mark7:4 Qhathut kutt'anisinxa
Mark7:5 Ukatpï fariseonakampi kamachi yatichirinakampix Jesusar jiskt'apxänxa: —¿Kunatsa yatiqirinakamax nayra awkinakasan sarnaqäwinakaparjam jan phuqhapki? ¿Kunatarak manq'añatakisti amparanakap jan jariqasipkisti? —sasa.
Mark7:6 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Isaías profetax chiq arsüna jumanakan pä amtañan jaqïpxatamat qhanañchasaxa: ‘Aka jaqinakax lakampikiw yupaychapxitu
Mark7:7 Inamayakiw nayar yupaychatapaxa
Mark7:8 Jumanakax jaqinakan sarnaqäwinakapar phuqhañatakix Diosan kamachi arunakap apanukupxtawa —sasa.
Mark7:9 Jesusasti saskakïnwa: —Sarnaqäwinakamar phuqhañatakix Diosan kamachip mä tuqiruw apanukupxtaxa.
Mark7:10 Moisesax sänwa: ‘Awkimar taykamar jach'añcham’. ‘Khititix awkipar taykapar ñanqhachanixa
Mark7:11 Ukampis jumanakax sapxtawa: ‘Mä jaqix awkipar taykapar jan yanapañ laykux saskaspawa: Janiw yanapkirismati
Mark7:12 ukatsa sasipkaktawa
Mark7:13 Ukhamat jumanakax nayra awkinakaman sarnaqäwiparjamax Diosan arup ina ch'usar tukuyapxtaxa
Mark7:14 Jesusasti wasitat jaqinakar jawsasin säna: —Taqin ist'apxita
Mark7:15 Kuna manq'atix lakat jaqin purakapar mantki ukax janiw jaqirux q'añuchkaspati
Mark7:16 Jumanakatix ist'añ munapxstaxa
Mark7:17 Ukatsti jaqinakar jaytanukxasin Jesusax utaruw mantxäna
Mark7:18 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Jumanakamppachat jan amuyapkta? Kunatix anqat mantki ukax janiw jaqirux Diosan nayraqatapan q'añu tukuykiti.
Mark7:19 Kuntix manq'antki ukax janiw chuymapar mantkiti
Mark7:20 Ukatsti saskakïnwa: —Kunatix jaqin chuymapat mistki ukaw jaqirux q'añuchi.
Mark7:21 Jaqin chuymapatsti jan wali amuyunakaw mistu: wachuqa jucha luraña
Mark7:22 lunthatasiña
Mark7:23 Taqi ukanakaw chuymat mistu
Mark7:24 Jesusasti uka chiqat mistuwayxasinxa
Mark7:25 Mä warmisti Jesusan ukankatap ist'asinxa
Mark7:26 Uka warmix janiw judía warmïkänti
Mark7:27 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Wawanakay nayraqat manq'asipxpan
Mark7:28 Warmisti Jesusarux sarakïnwa: —¡Tatay
Mark7:29 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —¡Warmi
Mark7:30 Warmisti utapar purisinxa
Mark7:31 Jesusax Tiro markat mistxasinxa
Mark7:32 Jesusan ukarusti mä uqar amutu jaqiruw irpanipxäna
Mark7:33 Jesusasti uka jaqirux jaqinak taypit yaqhawjar irpaqasaw ampar luk'anampi jinchupat luqantäna
Mark7:34 Ukatsti alaxpach tuqi uñtasaw jach'at samsüna
Mark7:35 Ukspachaw uqarax ist'xäna
Mark7:36 Jesusasti jaqinakarux jan khitirus arsupxañapatakiw iwxt'äna; ukampis iwxt'katpachas yaqhanakarux yatiyasipkakïnwa.
Mark7:37 Jupanakasti wali muspharataw sapxarakïna: “Taqi kunsa sumpun luri. ¡Uqaranakas ist'xiwa
Mark8:1 Ukürunakansti walja jaqinakaw wasitat tantachasipxäna
Mark8:2 —Aka jaqinakat walpun khuyapt'ayasta
Mark8:3 Jan manq'atpach utanakapar khithanukxirista ukaxa
Mark8:4 Yatiqirinakapasti Jesusarux sapxänwa: —Aka chiqan janiw khitis jakkiti. ¿Kawkitarak ukataq jaqitak manq'añ jikxatanipxästi? —sasa.
Mark8:5 Jesusasti jupanakarux jiskt'arakïnwa: —¿Qawqha t'ant'as jumanakan utjapxtam? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Paqallqu t'ant'akiw utjapxitu —sasa.
Mark8:6 Ukatsti Jesusax jaqinakan qunurapxañapatakiw mayïna. Paqallqu t'ant'a apxarusinsti
Mark8:7 Mä qawqha chawllanakarakiw jupanakan utjäna; Jesusasti Diosar yuspagarasin uka chawllanak jaqinakaruw lakirayäna.
Mark8:8 Taqiniw sist'asiñkam manq'apxäna
Mark8:9 Manq'apkän ukanakasti niya pusi waranqa jaqinakänwa. Jesusasti jupanakarux utanakaparuw khithanukxäna
Mark8:10 mä boter mantasinsti Jesusax yatiqirinakapampi Dalmanuta uksa tuqiruw sarxäna.
Mark8:11 Fariseonakax Jesusan ukar purinisax jupampiw jiskhintasipxäna. Jesusar yant'añatakisti
Mark8:12 Jesusasti chuymapan llakt'asisin sänwa: —¿Kunatsa aka jaqinakax mä unañcha mayipxi? Qhanak sapxsma
Mark8:13 Ukatsti jupanakar jaytjawayasin
Mark8:14 Yatiqirinakapax manq'a apasiñ armasiwayapxatayna
Mark8:15 Jesusasti jupanakarux iwxt'änwa: —Fariseonakana
Mark8:16 Yatiqirinakapasti jupanakkamaw parlakipasipxäna: —Jan t'ant'anïtas laykuw ukham sispacha —sasa.
Mark8:17 Jesusasti jupanakan parlapxatap amuyasinxa sänwa: —¿Kunatsa jumanakax: “Janiw t'ant'ax utjkiti” sas parlasipkta? ¿Janïrat amuyt'asipkta? ¿Chuymanakamax qalaratacha?
Mark8:18 ¿Nayranïkasat jan uñjapkta
Mark8:19 Kunapachatix phisqa t'ant'ata
Mark8:20 —Kunapachatix paqallqu t'ant'ata
Mark8:21 Ukatsti Jesusax sänwa: —¿Ukhamasti jichhakamat jan amuyt'asipkta? —sasa.
Mark8:22 Ukatsti Betsaida markaruw puripxäna
Mark8:23 Jesusasti juykhurux amparat irpsuwayasaw markat anqäxar irpäna. Ukatsti thusunqayampiw nayrapat jawt'äna
Mark8:24 Juykhusti uñatatasinxa sänwa: —Jaqinakarux quqanakas sarnaqkaspa ukham uñjta —sasa.
Mark8:25 Jesusasti wasitat amparapampi nayranakapar llamkt'äna
Mark8:26 Ukatsti Jesusax utaparuw khitxäna
Mark8:27 Uka qhipatsti Jesusax yatiqirinakapampi Filipo uraqinkir Cesarea tuqinakaruw saräna. Thakhin sarkasasti Jesusax yatiqirinakaparuw jiskt'äna: —Jaqinakax nayat ¿khitiw sapxitusa? —sasa.
Mark8:28 Jupanakasti ukxarux sapxänwa: —Yaqhipanakax “Bautisir Juanaw” sapxtamwa
Mark8:29 Jesusasti ukxarux jiskt'askakïnwa: —Jumanakasti ¿khitiw sapxistasa? —sasa. Pedrosti ukxarux sänwa: —Jumax Cristötawa —sasa.
Mark8:30 Ukampis Jesusax jupxat jan khitir arsupxañapatakiw jupanakar iwxt'äna.
Mark8:31 Ukxarusti Jesusax yatiqirinakaparuw yatiyañ qalltäna
Mark8:32 Uksti Jesusax qhanpach arsüna. Ukatsti Pedrox yaqhawjar irpaqasaw juparux tuqinuqäna.
Mark8:33 Jesusasti qhipäxa uñakipstanisaw yatiqirinakaparux uñkatäna
Mark8:34 Ukatsti Jesusax yatiqirinakapampiru
Mark8:35 Khititix jakañap qhispiyasiñ munki ukax apt'asiniwa
Mark8:36 ¿Kuna askïspas jaqitakixa
Mark8:37 Mä jaqix janiw kun churasas jakañap qhispiyaskaspati.
Mark8:38 Maynitix nayatsa
Mark9:1 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
Mark9:2 Ukat suxtür saraqatarusti
Mark9:3 Isinakapas k'ajkir khunjam suma janq'uruw tuküna
Mark9:4 Ukatsti Eliasampiru
Mark9:5 Ukat Pedrox Jesusar säna: —Yatichiri
Mark9:6 Jupanakasti wali mulljatäpxänwa
Mark9:7 Ukapachaw mä qinayax jupanakar ch'iwxattäna. Uka qinay taypitsti mä aruw ist'asïna: “Akaw nayan munat Wawaxaxa. Jupar ist'apxam” sasa.
Mark9:8 Uñatatasiñkamasti mayninakax chhaqhatäxänwa
Mark9:9 Qullut saraqankasasti
Mark9:10 Jupanakasti amukiw chuyma manqhapar kuntix uñjapkän uk imxäsipxäna
Mark9:11 Ukat Jesusarux jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kunatarak kamachi yatichirinakasti “Eliasaw nayraqat jutañapa” sapxisti? —sasa.
Mark9:12 Jupasti ukxarux sänwa: —Ukax chiqapunïskiwa
Mark9:13 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa
Mark9:14 Ukatsti mayni yatiqirinakapan ukar kutt'anxasin jupanakar walja jaqinakamp muyuntat uñjapxäna
Mark9:15 Jesusar uñjasinsti taqiniw muspharapxäna
Mark9:16 Ukatsti Jesusax jupanakaruw jiskt'äna: —¿Kunxatsa jumanakax jupanakampi ch'axwasipkta? —sasa.
Mark9:17 Jaqinak taypit mayniw arsüna: —Yatichiri
Mark9:18 Kawkhansa uka ñanqha ajayux uraqir liwnuqaskakiwa; lakapat jupuquw juti
Mark9:19 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¡Jan iyawsañan jaqinaka! ¿Kunapachkamas jumanakampikïskäxa? ¿Kunapachkamas jumanakax ch'am tukuyapxitäta? Irptanipxam uka waynaru —sasa.
Mark9:20 Ukat uka waynarux Jesusan ukar irptanipxäna. Kunapachatix uka ñanqha ajayux Jesusar uñjkän ukkhaxa
Mark9:21 Jesusasti uka waynan awkiparuw jiskt'äna: —¿Kunapachatsa ukham lurasi? —sasa. Awkipasti sänwa: —Wawatpachaw ukhama.
Mark9:22 Walja kutirakiw ñanqha ajayux ninarus umarus jupar jiwayañatak jaqunti. Qullt'arapitasma ukax walïspawa
Mark9:23 Jesusasti sänwa: —Jumatix iyawsasmaxa
Mark9:24 Uka waynan awkipasti ukspachaw jach'at arsüna: —Iyawstwa. ¡Juk'amp iyawsañaxatak yanapt'itaya! —sasa.
Mark9:25 Jesusasti walja jaqinak muyuntanir uñjasinxa
Mark9:26 Ukatsti ñanqha ajayux warart'asisaw ch'amamp thalasiyäna. Ukat uka waynat mistuwayxäna jiwatjam jaqunukuwayasa. Waljanirakiw: “Jiwatawa” sapxäna.
Mark9:27 Ukampis Jesusax amparat waytasin sayt'ayäna
Mark9:28 Ukxarusti Jesusax mä utaruw mantäna
Mark9:29 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Ukham ñanqha ajayunakarux
Mark9:30 Uka chiqat sarxasinsti
Mark9:31 yatiqirinakapar yatichaskatap layku. Ukat säna: —Jaqin Yuqapax jaqinakan amparapar katuyatäniwa; jupanakasti jiwayapxaniwa
Mark9:32 Yatiqirinakasti Jesusan parlatap janiw amuyt'apkänti
Mark9:33 Ukatsti Cafarnaúm markaruw puripxäna. Utankxapxän ukkhasti
Mark9:34 Jupanakasti janiw arsuñ munapkänti
Mark9:35 Ukatsti Jesusax qunt'asisin tunka payan yatiqiriparuw jawsäna
Mark9:36 Ukatsti Jesusax mä yuqall wawaruw jupanak taypir sayt'ayäna
Mark9:37 —Khititix akham wawaru nayan sutixan katuqki ukaxa
Mark9:38 Juanasti Jesusarux sänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark9:39 Jesusasti sänwa: —Jan jark'apxamti
Mark9:40 Khititix jiwasar jan uñiskistu ukaxa
Mark9:41 Khititix jumanakar Cristonkapxatam layku mä juk'a umaksa waxt'apxätamxa
Mark9:42 “Khititix nayar iyawsir jisk'a wawanakar juchar puriyaspa ukkhaxa
Mark9:43 Amparamatix juchar puriyañ munstamxa
Mark9:44 
Mark9:45 Kayumatix juchar puriyañ munstamxa
Mark9:46 
Mark9:47 Nayramatix juchar puriyañ munstamxa
Mark9:48 kawkhantix laq'unakas jan jiwarki
Mark9:49 “Diosax taqiniruw q'umachani
Mark9:50 Jayux sumawa; jayutix ch'aphaqsuspaxa
Mark10:1 Jesusax Cafarnaúm markat mistusinxa
Mark10:2 Fariseonakasti Jesusar jak'achasisin jupar pantjayañatakiw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Wakisiti mä chachax warmipampi jaljtañapaxa? —sasa.
Mark10:3 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Kun lurapxäta sapxtamsa Moisesaxa? —sasa.
Mark10:4 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Moisesax: ‘Jaljtañ qillqat churasin warmir apanukuñax wakisiskiwa’ sapxituwa —sasa.
Mark10:5 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —Moisesax qala chuymanïpxatam laykuw uka kamachi arunak jaytawayapxtam.
Mark10:6 Ukampis taqi kunan qalltapanxa
Mark10:7 Ukatpï chachax awkipsa
Mark10:8 panpachanisti mä sapa janchïpkaspas ukhamäniwa’. Ukhamasti janiw panïkxiti
Mark10:9 Ukhamasti
Mark10:10 Utankxapxän ukkhasti
Mark10:11 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Khititix warmipampi jaljtasin yaqhampi jaqichaschi ukaxa
Mark10:12 ukampis warmitix chachapar apanukusin yaqhampi jaqichaschi ukaxa
Mark10:13 Ukxarusti wawanak Jesusan ukar irpanipxäna
Mark10:14 Jesusasti uk uñjasax phiñasïnwa
Mark10:15 Qhanak sapxsma
Mark10:16 Wawanakar qhumantasinsti
Mark10:17 Kunapachatix Jesusax ukawjat sartawayañampïxän ukkhaxa
Mark10:18 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —¿Kunatsa “Suma” sistasti? Janiw khitis sumäkiti
Mark10:19 Kamachi arunak yattawa: ‘Janiw jiwayätati
Mark10:20 Uka jaqisti ukxarux sänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark10:21 Jesusasti juparux munasiñampiw uñkatäna
Mark10:22 Jaqisti uk ist'asinxa wal llakthapisïna; ukham llakt'atarakiw sarawayxäna
Mark10:23 Jesusasti taqi tuqi uñatatasinxa
Mark10:24 Yatiqirinakapasti uk ist'asax muspharapxänwa
Mark10:25 Juk'amp jasakiwa mä aguja nayra chiqa mä camellon mistuñapaxa
Mark10:26 Uk ist'asinsti yatiqirinakapax juk'ampiw muspharapxäna
Mark10:27 Jesusasti jupanakar uñkatasinxa
Mark10:28 Pedrosti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Tatay
Mark10:29 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
Mark10:30 uka jaqix patakatsa juk'amp jila akapachan katuqxani: utanaka
Mark10:31 Khitinakatix jichhürun nayrankki jupanakatxa
Mark10:32 Jerusalén markaruw sarasipkäna
Mark10:33 “Kunjämtix jumanakax uñjapkta
Mark10:34 Jupatxa larusipxaniwa; thuskatapxaniwa
Mark10:35 Ukxarusti Santiagompi Juanampiw Jesusar makhatapxäna
Mark10:36 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Kuns jumanakax munapxta? —sasa.
Mark10:37 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Qhapaq markamanxa
Mark10:38 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jumanakax janiw yatipktati kuntix mayipkista ukxa. ¿Jumanakax kuna t'aqhisiñatix nayatak jutki uk t'aqhisipxasmati? —sasa.
Mark10:39 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —T'aqhisipxiristwa —sasa. Jesusasti sänwa: —Jïsa
Mark10:40 Ukampis nayan kupïxaxaru ch'iqäxaxaru qunt'ayañax janiw nayan churañaxax wakiskiti
Mark10:41 Tunka yatiqiripasti
Mark10:42 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakar jawsasin sänwa: —Jumanakax yatipxtawa
Mark10:43 Jumanakampisti janiw ukhamäñapäkiti. Ukatsipana jumanak taypin jilïrïñ munirix mayninakar luqtirïñapawa.
Mark10:44 Jumanak taypit nayrankañ munirixa
Mark10:45 Jaqin Yuqapasti janiw luqtayasir jutkiti
Mark10:46 Ukatsti Jericó markaruw puripxäna. Mä juk'ampjarusti Jesusax yatiqirinakapampi walja jaqinakamp chikt'ataw uka markat mistuskäna
Mark10:47 Uka juykhusti Nazaretankir Jesusätap ist'asinxa
Mark10:48 Uk ist'asinsti waljaniw amukt'añapatak tuqinuqapxäna. Ukampis juykhux juk'amp jach'at art'askakïnwa: —¡Davidan yuqapa
Mark10:49 Jesusasti uk ist'asin pachparuw sayt'äna
Mark10:50 Juykhusti isip liwinukusin mäkiw sayt'asi
Mark10:51 Jesusasti juparux jiskt'änwa: —¿Kuna lurañaxsa munta? —sasa. Juykhusti sänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark10:52 Ukxarusti Jesusax sänwa: —Sarxam; iyawsatam laykuw k'umaräxtaxa —sasa. Juykhusti ukspachaw nayrat waliptasax wasitat uñjxäna
Mark11:1 Jerusalén jak'ankxapxän ukkhasti
Mark11:2 akham sasa: —Khaykatankkis uka jisk'a markar sarapxam
Mark11:3 Khitis jiskt'apxätam: “¿Kunatsa jararapxta?” sasaxa
Mark11:4 Jupanakasti sarasinxa asnorux thakhi thiyan chint'at jikxatapxäna
Mark11:5 Ukankirinakat yaqhipanakasti yatiqirinakaparux sapxänwa: —¿Kuns lurapxta? ¿Kunatakis asno jararapxta? —sasa.
Mark11:6 Ukatsti jupanakax Jesusan yatichataparjamaw sapxäna; ukat asno irpxaruyanipxäna.
Mark11:7 Jesusan ukar irpanisinsti
Mark11:8 Waljanirakiw isinakap thakhir jant'akupxäna
Mark11:9 Jesusan nayräxap qhipäxap saririnakasti jach'at art'asipxäna: —¡Qhispiyapxita! ¡Qullanäpan Tatitun sutipar jutirixa!
Mark11:10 ¡Diosax jach'añchpan David awkisan jutir marka apnaqäwipxaruxa! ¡Alaxpachankir Tatitu
Mark11:11 Jesusasti Jerusalenar mantasinxa
Mark11:12 Qhipürusti
Mark11:13 Ukatsti laphinakan mä higo quqa jayat uñtasaw achu apaqasiñatak jak'achasïna
Mark11:14 Jesusasti uka higo quqarux sänwa: —Jichhat uksarux janipun khitis achumat manq'pati —sasa. Yatiqirinakapasti uk arsur sum ist'apxäna.
Mark11:15 Ukatsti Jerusalén markaruw puripxäna
Mark11:16 janirakiw khitirus Tatitun utap chiqxa kuna aljañ apt'atsa sarnaqaykänti.
Mark11:17 Ukat jupanakarux yatichäna: —Diosan Arunakapan qillqatawa: “Utaxax taqi markanakataki Diosat mayisiñ utäniwa” sasa
Mark11:18 Ukanak ist'asinsti
Mark11:19 Jayp'üxipansti
Mark11:20 Qhipärmanthisti wasitat higo quqäkis uka chiq sarapxäna
Mark11:21 Pedrosti amtasinxa Jesusarux sänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark11:22 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Diosar iyawsirïpxam.
Mark11:23 Qhanak sapxsma
Mark11:24 Ukatpï sapxsmaxa
Mark11:25 Diosat mayiskasasti
Mark11:26 Jumanakatix jaqi masimar jan pampachapkätaxa
Mark11:27 Uka qhipatsti jupanakax Jerusalenaruw kuttanxapxäna. Jesusax Tatitun utapan sarnaqaskäna ukkhaw jilïr sacerdotenakampi
Mark11:28 ukatsti Jesusaruw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kuna munañanïñampis jumax akanak lurtaxa? ¿Khitis ukanak lurañamatak ch'am churtam? —sasa.
Mark11:29 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Nayax may jiskt'apxarakïma. ¿Khitis Juanarux bautisañapatak khithani
Mark11:30 
Mark11:31 Ukham jiskt'atasti jupanakkamaw parlakipasipxäna: ¿Kamachañänisa? “Diosaw khithani” sañänixa
Mark11:32 jan ukax: “Jaqinakan khithanitakiwa sañänicha” sasa. Jupanakax jaqinakaruw axsarapxäna

Mark12:1 Jesusax uñtasïwinak tuqiw parlañ qalltäna: “Mä jaqiw utjäna
Mark12:2 Yapu apthapiñ pacha purinipansti
Mark12:3 Yapuchirinakasti uka uywatar nuwjasin jan kunan alispayapxäna.
Mark12:4 Uraqinisti wasitat yaqha uywataruw khithäna
Mark12:5 Uraqini jaqisti mayampsa yaqharux khithaskakïnwa
Mark12:6 “Ukampis maynikiw khithañatak utjxäna
Mark12:7 Ukampis yapuchirinakax jupanakkamaw arust'asipxäna: ‘Akaxay uraq katuqirixa
Mark12:8 Jupanakasti uraqinin yuqaparux katuntasin jiwayapxäna
Mark12:9 Ukat Jesusax jiskt'arakïna: “Yapun jaqisti ¿kamachpachänisa? Jutasinxa uka yapuchirinakarux q'al jiwarayani
Mark12:10 Jesusasti saskakïnwa: “¿Janit jumanakax Diosan Arunakap ullarapkta?: ‘Utachirinakan jisk'achat qalax suma qalat uchatäxiwa.
Mark12:11 Tatituw ukham luri. Jiwasanakatakix muspharkañawa’ ” sasa.
Mark12:12 Uk ist'asinsti jilïrinakax Jesusarux katuntañ munapxäna
Mark12:13 Ukxarusti Jesusan ukaruw khithapxäna mä qawqha fariseonakampi
Mark12:14 Jupanakasti purinisinxa sapxänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark12:15 Jesusasti jan wali amtañampi sapxatap yatisinxa
Mark12:16 Jupanakasti qullqi churapxäna
Mark12:17 Ukxarusti Jesusax jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Cesarankki uk Cesarar churapxam
Mark12:18 Ukxarusti Saduceonakaw Jesusan ukarux sarapxäna. Jupanakasti: “Janiw khitis jiwatat jaktkaspati” sasaw yatichapxäna; ukat Jesusarux jiskt'apxäna:
Mark12:19 —Yatichiri
Mark12:20 Mä kutix paqallqu jila sullkaw utjäna
Mark12:21 Ukxankir jilasti uka ijma warmimpiw jaqichasïna
Mark12:22 ukhamaw uka paqallqu jila sullkax uka ijma warmimpix jaqichasipxäna
Mark12:23 Khä jutir urun jupanakax jiwatat jaktapkan ukkhasti
Mark12:24 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jumanakax pantjasipxtawa
Mark12:25 Kunapachatix jiwatat jaktapxani ukkhaxa
Mark12:26 Jiwatanakan jaktañapatsti
Mark12:27 Diosax janiw jiwatanakan Diosapäkiti
Mark12:28 Jesusan saduceonakar taqi uka jiskt'anakar sum arusxatatap yatisinxa
Mark12:29 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Taqi kamachinakat wakiskirïki ukax akhamawa: “Ist'am Israel
Mark12:30 Tatit Diosamaruw taqi chuymamamp munäta
Mark12:31 Ukxarüki uka kamachisti akham siwa: “Jaqi masimarux juma kipkarjamaw munasïta”. Ukanakat sipan janiw kawkïr kamachis juk'amp wakiskirix utjkiti —sasa.
Mark12:32 Qillqatanak yatichiristi Jesusarux sänwa: —Yatichiri
Mark12:33 Jupar taqi chuymampi munañasti
Mark12:34 Jesusasti uka jaqin sum arsutap ist'asinxa sänwa: —Diosan qhapaq markapat janiw jayankktati —sasa. Ukatsti janiw khitis jupar juk'amp jiskt'añ munkxänti.
Mark12:35 Jesusasti Tatitun utapan yatichkasax jiskt'änwa: —¿Kunatsa kamachi yatichirinakax “Cristox Davidan wawapaw” sapxisti?
Mark12:36 Ukampis David kipkaw Qullan Ajayun qhant'atäsin sixa: “Tatitux Tatit Cristoxarux siwa: Kupïxaxar qunt'asim
Mark12:37 ¿Kunjämarak Cristosti Davidan wawapäspasti? David kipkaxay Cristorux “Tatitu” sischixa —sasa. Ukansti walja jaqinakaw utjäna
Mark12:38 Jesusax yatichkasin sänwa: “Kamachi yatichirinakat amuyasipxam
Mark12:39 Sinagoganakansti suma qunuñanak thaqhapxi
Mark12:40 ijma warminakat yänakap aparapxi

Mark12:44 mayninakasti jilt'äkis ukatak churapxi

Mark13:2 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —¿Aka jach'a utanak uñjtati? Mä urux aka utanakax q'ala tinkuyataw uñjasini —sasa.
Mark13:3 Ukatsti Tatitun utap uñkatasinkki uka Olivos qulluruw sarapxäna. Jesusax ukkharuw qunt'asïna
Mark13:4 —Tatay
Mark13:5 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Wal amuyasipxam
Mark13:6 Waljaniw nayan sutixar jutapxani: ‘Nayätwa Cristox’ sasa. Jupanakasti waljaniruw sallqjapxani.
Mark13:7 “Kunapachatix ch'axwanakat ist'apxäta
Mark13:8 Mä jach'a markax yaqha jach'a markampiw ch'axwantani
Mark13:9 “Ukampis jumanakax amuyasipxam; markan jilïrinakaparuw jumanakarux katuyapxätam
Mark13:10 Akapach janïr tukuskipansti
Mark13:11 Kunapachatix jilïrinakar katuyapkätam ukkhaxa
Mark13:12 Mä jilax jilaparuw jiwayañatak aljantani
Mark13:13 Naya laykux taqinin uñisit sarnaqapxäta
Mark13:14 “Kunapachatix jumanakax ukham ñanqha lurañanak jan wakiskir chiqan uñjapkät ukkhaxa
Mark13:15 khititix uta patankaskani ukasti
Mark13:16 pampankiristi janirak isip aptasiris utapar kuttanpati.
Mark13:17 ¡Ay
Mark13:18 Diosatay mayisipxam uka jan wali urunakax jan jallupachäñapataki
Mark13:19 ukürunakax sinti t'aqhisiñ urunakäniwa
Mark13:20 Tatitutix uka urunak jan jisk'aptaykaspaxa
Mark13:21 “Maynitix jumanakar sapxätam: ‘Uñtapxam
Mark13:22 K'ari cristonakampi
Mark13:23 ¡Wal amuyasipxam! Ukanak janïr luraskipan taqi kun yatiyapxsma.
Mark13:24 “Khä urunakansti uka t'aqhisiñanak qhipatxa
Mark13:25 warawaranakasti alaxpachat williqtanxaniwa
Mark13:26 Ukapachaw Jaqin Yuqaparux qinay taypin jutaskir uñjasini
Mark13:27 Jupasti angelanakaruw khithanini
Mark13:28 “Higo quqat yatiqasipxam: Kunapachatix layminakapax ch'uxñatatki
Mark13:29 Ukhamarakiw jumanakax taqi ukanak phuqhasir uñjasinxa
Mark13:30 Qhanak sapxsma
Mark13:31 Alaxpachampi akapachampix tukusiniwa
Mark13:32 “Ukampis uka urumpita
Mark13:33 “Ukhamasti jumanakax amuyasipxam
Mark13:34 Ukax akhamar uñtatawa: Sañäni
Mark13:35 Ukatsti jupanakax wali amuyumpiw sarnaqapxi
