John7:6 Ukat Jesusax jupanakar säna: —Janïraw pachaxax purinkiti
John7:7 Akapachankirinakax janiw jumanakar uñisipkiristamti; ukampis nayarux uñisipxituwa
John7:8 Jumanakax phunchhäwir sarasipkakim; nayax janiw sarkäti. Janïraw pachäkiti nayax khitïtsa uk yatipxañapataki —sasa.

John7:11 Judionakasti ukan thaqhapxäna

John7:18 Khititix jupa pachpat parlki ukax

John7:26 Ukaxay taqin uñjkañaw parlaski
John7:27 Ukampis jiwasanakax yatipxtanwa aka jaqin kawkit jutatapsa; Cristox jutkani ukapachax janiw khitis kawkit jutatapsa yatkaniti —sasa.

John8:11 Warmisti sarakïnwa: —Tatay

John8:14 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Naya pachpatsay parlaskä

John8:16 nayatix juchañchiristxa

John8:18 Ukhamasti

John8:22 Judionakasti sapxarakïnwa: —¿Jiwayaspachäniti ukatti sispacha: “Kawkirutix sarkä ukarux jumanakax janiw jutapkasmati” sasasti?
John8:23 Jesusax jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanakax akapachankirïpxtawa
John8:24 Ukatpï sapxsmaxa: “Juchanakaman jiwarapxäta” sasaxa; jumanakatix jan iyawsapkitäta nayax khitïktix ukxa
John8:25 Ukat juparux jiskt'apxäna: —¿Khitirakït jumasti? —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Janiw kunat parlañaxas jumanakamp utjkiti.
John8:26 Ukampis jumanakan jan wali luratanakamat sañaxaw utjaskitu; khititix khithankitu ukax chiq arsu
John8:27 Ukampis jupanakax janiw Awkit parlatap amuyapkänti.
John8:28 Ukat Jesusax jupanakar säna: —Kunapachatix jumanakax Jaqin Yuqapar cruzar ch'akkatapkäta ukkhaw khitïktix nayax uk yatipxäta
John8:29 Khititix nayar khithankitu ukax nayampïskiwa; Awkixax janiw sapak jaytkituti
John8:30 Jesusan uka arunak arsutapatsti
John8:31 Jupar iyawsapkatayna uka judionakarux Jesusax sänwa: —Jumanakatix nayan yatichäwinakaxar jaysapxäta ukaxa
John8:32 chiqa kankañ uñt'apxäta

John8:34 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
John8:35 Mä uywatax janiw wiñayatak utankirinakamp qhiparkiti
John8:36 Ukhamasti
John8:37 Nayax yattwa jumanakan Abrahaman wawanakapäpxatama
John8:38 Kuntix Awkixax uñacht'aykitu uk nayax yatiyta; jumanakasti kuntix Awkit ist'apkta uk lurapxarakim.
John8:39 Jupanakasti Jesusarux sapxarakïnwa: —Nanakan awkixax Abrahamawa —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jumanakatix chiqpachan Abrahaman wawanakapäpxasmaxa
John8:40 Ukampis jichhax
John8:41 Jumanakax awkiman luräwinakap lurapxtaxa —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Nanakax janiw q'axat wawanakäpkti; mä sapa awkinikïpxtwa
John8:42 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Chiqpachan Diosatix awkimäspa ukaxa
John8:43 Jumanakax janiw arsutanakax amuyt'añ munapktati
John8:44 Jumanakan awkimax supayawa
John8:45 Ukampis nayax kunatix chiqäki uk arsta
John8:46 ¿Jumanakat khitirak juchax irkatitaspasti? Arsutaxatix chiqächisti
John8:47 Khititix Diosankirïki ukax
John8:48 Judionakat yaqhipanakax juparuw sapxäna: —Chiqak sasipksma
John8:49 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Janiw nayax ñanqha ajayun mantatäkti. Jan ukasti
John8:50 Janiw nayax jach'achatäñ thaqkti; jan ukasti
John8:51 Qhanak sapxsma
John8:52 Judionakasti juparux sapxarakïnwa: —Jichhakuchapï ñanqha ajayunïtam yatxapxtxa. Abrahamasa
John8:53 ¿Jumasti Abraham awkisat juk'ampïtati? Jupax jiwxiwa
John8:54 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Naya pachpatix jach'añchasiristxa
John8:55 Ukampis jumanakax janiw uñt'apktati
John8:56 Jumanakan Abraham awkimasti
John8:57 Judionakasti Jesusarux sapxarakïnwa: —Janïraw phisqa tunka maranïktasa
John8:58 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Qhanak sapxsma
John8:59 Uk ist'asinsti
John9:1 Jesusax Tatitun utapat mistuwaykän ukkhasti
John9:2 Yatiqirinakapasti Jesusarux jiskt'apxänwa: —Yatichiri
John9:3 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Janiw jupan juchap laykut ukham yurki
John9:4 Nayar khithankitu ukan luräwinakap urükipan lurañaxaw wakisi; aruma purinipansti
John9:5 Akapachankkasinxa
John9:6 Uk arsusinsti
John9:7 Ukat juykhurux sarakïna: —Siloé uma püñar jariqasir saram —sasa. (Ukax “Khithata” sañ muni.) Juykhusti sarasin jariqasïnwa; kutt'anxän ukkhasti uñjxänwa.
John9:8 Ukatsti uta jak'anakapaxa
John9:9 Mayninakasti sapxänwa: —Jïsa
John9:10 Ukatsti jiskt'apxarakïnwa: —¿Kunjämatarak jichhasti uñjxtasti? —sasa.
John9:11 Jupasti sänwa: —Jesús sata jaqiw ñiq'i lurt'i
John9:12 Ukatsti juparuw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kawkinkarak uka jaqisti? —sasa. Jupasti sarakïnwa: —Janiw yatkti —sasa.
John9:13 Kunürutix Jesusax ñiq'i lurt'asin juykhur k'umaraptaykatayna uka urux sábado urünwa. Ukat juykhükän uka jaqirux fariseonakan ukar irpapxäna
John9:14 
John9:15 fariseonakasti uka jaqiruw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kunjämatarak uñjxtasti? —sasa. Jupasti sarakïnwa: —Ñiq'impiw nayrat jawintitu
John9:16 Mayni fariseonakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Khititix ak lurki ukax janiw Diosankirïkaspati
John9:17 ukatsti wasitatampiw juykhükän uka jaqir jiskt'apxäna: —Jumasti
John9:18 Ukampis judionakax janiw iyawsañ munapkänti
John9:19 ukatsti jupanakaruw jiskt'apxarakïna: —¿Jupax yuqamati? ¿Chiqapunit juykhu yuristi? ¿Kunjämatarak jichhasti uñjxisti? —sasa.
John9:20 Awkipampi taykapampisti sapxänwa: —Aka wawax juykhupuniw yurïna;
John9:21 ukampis janiw yatipkti kunjämat jichhax uñjatapsa
John9:22 Awkipampi
John9:23 Ukat awkipampi
John9:24 Judionakasti wasitatampiw juykhükän uka jaqir jawsanipxi
John9:25 Jupasti sarakïnwa: —Janiw nayax jupan juchararätapsa
John9:26 Ukatsti wasitat jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kamachtamsa? ¿Kunjämatarak nayram qulltamsti? —sasa.
John9:27 Jupax saskakïnwa: —Niy sapxsmawa
John9:28 Ukatsti uka jilïr judionakax akham sasaw jisk'achapxäna: —Jumax uka jaqin arkiripäskam
John9:29 Nanakax yatipxtwa Diosan Moisesar parlatapa
John9:30 Uka jaqisti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —¡Akax muspharkañawa! Jumanakax janiw yatipktati kawkit jutatapsa
John9:31 Yatitawa
John9:32 Janiw kunapachas khiti jaqitsa ist'asirïkiti: “Yurïwipatpach juykhu jaqiruw qullatayna” siri.
John9:33 Aka jaqitix Diosat jan jutkaspaxa
John9:34 Ukatsti juparux sapxarakïnwa: —Jumax juchan phuqt'ataw yurtaxa
John9:35 Jesusax uka juykhur jaqunukupxatap yatïna; jupamp jikisisinsti
John9:36 Uka jaqisti sänwa: —Tatay
John9:37 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Niy jupar uñjtawa: nayätwa
John9:38 Uk ist'asinsti
John9:39 Ukatsti Jesusax sänwa: —Nayax akapachar taripañatakiw jutta
John9:40 Jupampïpkän uka fariseonakat yaqhipanakasti
John9:41 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanakatix juykhüpxasmaxa
John10:1 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Qhanak sapxsma
John10:2 Ukampis khititix punku chiqa mantki ukax
John10:3 Punku uñjiristi
John10:4 ovejanakan uyut taqpach mistxipansti
John10:5 Ukampis mä jan uñt'atarux janiw arkapkiti
John10:6 Jesusasti aka uñtasïwimpiw amuyt'ayañ munäna
John10:7 Ukatsti Jesusax wasitatampiw sarakïna: “Qhanak sapxsma
John10:8 Khitinakatix nayat nayra jutapkän ukanakax jalxatir lunthatanakäpxiwa
John10:9 Nayätwa punkuxa; naya tuqi mantirix qhispiyatäniwa. Kunjämatix mä ovejax uyuru manti
John10:10 “Lunthatax lunthatsuñataki
John10:11 Nayätwa suma awatirixa. Suma awatirix jakañap ovejanakap laykux apt'asi;
John10:12 ukampis khititix qullqi laykuk awatki ukax
John10:13 Uka jaqix qullqi laykukiw awatïna
John10:14 “Nayätwa suma awatirixa. Kamisatix Awkixax nayar uñt'kituxa
John10:15 
John10:16 Yaqha ovejanakax utjarakituwa; ukanakasti janiw aka tamankirïkiti; ukanakarux anakiniñaxarakiwa. Jupanakax ist'apxitaniwa
John10:17 “Nayax jakañax churta
John10:18 Janiw khitis jakañax apaqkituti
John10:19 Judionakax uka arunak ist'asin
John10:20 Jupanakat waljaniw sapxäna: —¿Kunatarak jupar yäqasipktasti? Jupax ñanqha ajayun luqhi jaqiwa —sasa.
John10:21 Mayninakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Janiw khiti ñanqha ajayunis ukham parlkaspati. Janirakiw ñanqha ajayunix mä juykhur nayrap qullkaspati —sasa.
John10:22 Thaya pachänwa
John10:23 Jesusasti Tatitun utapan sarnaqaskäna
John10:24 Judionakasti Jesusar muyuntasaw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kunapachkamarak pächasiyapxitätasti? Jumatix Cristösta ukax
John10:25 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Nayax niyaw sapxsma
John10:26 ukampis jumanakax janiw iyawsapktati
John10:27 Ovejanakaxasti nayan arux sum uñt'i
John10:28 Nayax wiñay jakañ churta
John10:29 Kuntix Awkixax churkitu ukax taqi kunat sipan juk'ampiwa
John10:30 Awkimpi nayampix mayakïpxtwa —sasa.
John10:31 Judionakasti qalanak irtasisin wasitatampiw k'upjañ munapxäna
John10:32 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanak nayraqatan Awkixan ch'amapampix askinak lurta; ¿kawkïr lurataxatarak qalampi k'upjañ munapxistasti? —sasa.
John10:33 Judionakasti Jesusarux sapxarakïnwa: —Janiw aski luratanakamat qalampi k'upjapkämati
John10:34 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —Jumanakan kamachiman qillqatawa: “Jumanakax diosanakäpxtawa” sasa.
John10:35 Kuntix Qillqatan siski uk sum yattanxa
John10:36 Dios pachpatix nayar ajllisin akapachar khithanchitu ukaxa
John10:37 Janitix nayax Awkixan luräwinakap lurksta ukax
John10:38 Ukampis luräwinakap lurstxa ukax
John10:39 Jaqinakasti wasitatampiw katuntañ munapxäna
John10:40 Jesusasti Jordán jawir khurkataruw kutt'awayxäna
John10:41 Ukawjarusti walja jaqipuniw Jesusar uñjir sarapxäna
John10:42 Ukawjansti waljaniw Jesusar iyawsapxäna.
John11:1 Mä usutaw utjäna
John11:2 Lazaron aka María kullakapaw Tatitun kayupar suma q'apkir qullamp warxatäna
John11:3 Aka pani kullakaw Jesusar yatiyäna. —Tatay
John11:4 Jesusasti uk ist'asin sänwa: —Aka usux janiw jiwañatakïkiti
John11:5 Jesusax Martaru
John11:6 kunapachatix “Lazarox usutaw” sas yatiyapkän ukkhasti
John11:7 Ukatsti yatiqirinakaparux sänwa: —Judea uraqir wasitat sarañäni —sasa.
John11:8 Yatiqirinakapasti sapxänwa: —Yatichiri
John11:9 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —¿Janit mä urusti tunka payan pachanïkisti? Khititix uru qhanan sarnaqki ukax janiw lanktaskiti

John11:12 Yatiqirinakapasti sapxarakïnwa: —Tatay

John11:15 Nayan jan ukankataxat kusista
John11:16 Ukapachaw Tomasix

John11:21 Martasti Jesusarux sänwa: —Tatay

John11:25 Ukat Jesusax sarakïna: —Nayätwa jiwatat jaktañasa
John11:26 khititix jakaski
John11:27 Martasti sarakïnwa: —Jïsa Tatay
John11:28 Uk arsusinsti
John11:29 Uk ist'asinsti
John11:30 Jesusasti janïraw utar purkataynati
John11:31 Mariar chuymachapkän uka judionakasti
John11:32 Mariasti Jesusar jikxatasin
John11:33 Jesusasti

John11:35 Jesusasti jachänwa.
John11:36 Judionakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Uñtapxam
John11:37 Jupanakat yaqhipanakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Jupax juykhurus uñjaychixaya
John11:38 Jesusax wasitat chuymap ch'allxtayasisaw imäwir jak'achasïna. Ukasti mä putünwa
John11:39 Jesusasti sänwa: —Uka qal atiqapxam —sasa. Martasti
John11:40 Ukampis Jesusax saskakïnwa: —¿Janit nayasti sisksma
John11:41 Ukat qala atiqapxäna. Jesusasti alaxpach uñtasin arsüna: —Awkixay
John11:42 Jumax ist'apunistawa
John11:43 Ukanak sasinsti
John11:44 Jiwatasti ukspachaw mistunïna

John11:46 Mayni judionakasti
John11:47 Uk yatisinsti

John12:1 Pascua jach'a urutak suxtürükipan Jesusax Betania markaruw saräna
John12:2 Ukan Jesusar manq'ayañatak wakichapxäna; Lazarosti Jesusamp chikaw manq'añatak qunt'atäskäna
John12:3 María kullakapasti
John12:4 Ukatsti yatiqirinakapat maynïri
John12:5 —Aka q'apkir qullax jan utjirininakar yanapt'añatak kimsa patak qullqir aljatäñapaw wakisïna —sasa.
John12:6 Judasax janiw jan utjirininakat khuyapayasisin arskänti
John12:7 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Juparux jan kunsa kamsamti
John12:8 Jumanak taypin jan utjirininakax utjapuniniwa
John12:9 Judionakat waljaniw Jesusan Betaniankatap yatipxäna
John12:10 Ukatsti sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapax Lazarompiruw jiwayañ amtapxäna

John12:12 Walja jaqipuniw Pascua urutak Jerusalén markar sarapxäna. Qhipürusti
John12:13 Ukatsti palmerat layminak khuchhurasin Jesusar katuqiriw mistunipxäna
John12:14 Jesusax mä asno jikxatäna
John12:15 “Sión marka
John12:16 Yatiqirinakapax akanak janiw qalltan amuyt'apkänti; kunapachatix Jesusax alaxpachar aptatäxän ukkhakiw taqi akanakat jupxat qillqatäskatapa
John12:17 Jesusax Lazaror amay imäwit jach'at art'asin jiwatat jaktaykäna uk uñjir jaqinakasti
John12:18 Ukat jaqinakax Jesusar jikxatir mistunipxäna
John12:19 Ukatsti fariseonakax jupanakkamaw sasipxäna: —Jumanakax uñjxapxtawa
John12:20 Jerusalenar Pascua urun yupaychir sarapkatayna uka jaqinakatxa
John12:21 Jupanakasti Feliperuw jikxatapxäna
John12:22 Felipesti Andresaruw yatiyäna
John12:23 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Jaqin Yuqapan jach'añchatäñap urux purinxiwa.
John12:24 Qhanak sapxsma
John12:25 Khititix jakañapar munki ukax apt'asiniwa; khititix akapachan jakañapar jan yäqki ukasti
John12:26 Maynitix luqtañ munchituxa
John12:27 “Jichhax wali llakt'atätwa; ¿kamsarakïsti? ¿‘Awkixay
John12:28 Awkixay
John12:29 Ukawjan ist'ir jaqinakasti sapxänwa: Qhixu qhixuwa

John12:31 Jichhapï akapachax taripatänixa
John12:32 Kunapachatix cruzar ch'akkatasin aptapkitani ukkhasti
John12:33 Jesusan ukham satapampix
John12:34 Jaqinakasti sapxarakïnwa: —¿Kunatarak Jaqin Yuqapax cruzan ch'akkatas aptatäniwa sistasti? ¿Khitirak Jaqin Yuqapasti? Kamachi tuqiw nanakax yatipxta Criston wiñayatak jakañapa —sasa.
John12:35 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Mä juk'a urunakakiw qhanax jumanak taypinkani. Qhana utjkipan sarnaqapxam
John12:36 Qhanankir jaqïpxañamatakix qhana utjkipan
John12:37 Jesusax walja muspharkañanak jupanak nayraqatan lurkchïn ukasa

John12:41 Isaías profetasti
John12:42 Ukhamäkipansa
John12:43 Jupanakax jaqimp aytayasiñak munapxäna

John12:50 Nayax yattwa

John15:2 Layminakaxat maynitix achu jan churkanixa

John15:4 Jumanakax nayampipunïpxam
John15:5 “Nayätwa uva alixa
John15:6 Khititix jan nayampïkan ukax
John15:7 “Jumanakatix nayampi mayakïsipkätaxa
John15:8 Jumanakatix walja achu churasa
John15:9 Kamisatix Awkix nayar munaskitu
John15:10 Nayan kamachinakaxtix phuqhapxätaxa
John15:11 “Aksti jumanakaruw ukham sapxsma
John15:12 Nayan kamachixax akawa: Maynit maynikam munasipxam
John15:13 Khititix jila masip layku jakañap apt'aski ukakiw jach'a munasiñanïspaxa.
John15:14 Kuntix nayax jumanakar sapksma uktix lurapxätaxa
John15:15 Janiw nayax jumanakar “uywatanaka” sas sutichapksmati
John15:16 Janiw jumanakax nayar ajllisipkistati
John15:17 Ak jumanakar mayipxsma: Maynit maynikam munasipxam.
John15:18 “Akapachankirinakatix jumanakar uñisipxstamxa
John15:19 Jumanakatix akapachankirïpxasmaxa
John15:20 Kuntix sapkäyäsma uk amtasipxam: ‘Janiw khiti uywatas uywiripat sipan juk'ampïkiti’ sasa. Nayarux uñisipxituwa
John15:21 Taqi akanaksti
John15:22 “Janitix nayax jupanakar parlir jutkiriskäyätxa
John15:23 khitinakatix nayar uñisipkitu ukanakax Awkixarux uñisirakiwa.
John15:24 Janitix nayax jupanak taypin jan khitis lurki ukanak jan lurkiriskäyätxa
John15:25 Ukampis ukax phuqhasiskiwa
John15:26 “Nayaw Awkixat jutki uka Ajay khithanipxäma
John15:27 Jumanakasti nayxat arsupxarakïta
John16:1 “Akanaksti jumanakarux jan mayjt'asipxañamatakiw sapxsma.
John16:2 Jumanakarux sinagoganakat jaqunukupxätam
John16:3 Awkirus
John16:4 Aksti sapxsmawa
John16:5 Jichhasti khititix khithankitu ukaruw sarxä; jumanakat janiw khitis jiskt'kituti
John16:6 jan ukasti
John16:7 Ukampis kunatix chiqäki uk sapxsma: jumanakatakix nayan sarxañaxax askiwa. Nayatix jan sarkiristxa
John16:8 Kunapachatix Qullan Ajayux jutkan ukkhaxa
John16:9 ¿Khitirak juchararasti? Nayar jan iyawsiriw juchararaxa;
John16:10 ¿khitirak jan juchanïki ukasti? Naya
John16:11 ¿khitirak Diosan taripäwip katuqanisti? Khititix akapach apnaqki ukawa
John16:12 “Juk'ampinakaw jumanakar arsuñaxax utjaskitu
John16:13 Kunapachatix Qullan Ajayux jutkan ukkhasti
John16:14 Jupaw nayan kankañax uñacht'ayani
John16:15 Kunatix Awkin utjki ukax nayankiwa; ukat sista: ‘Qullan Ajayux nayankki uk katuqani
John16:16 “Akat mä qawqha urunakatxa
John16:17 Yatiqirinakapat yaqhipasti jupanakkamaw jiskt'asipxäna
John16:18 ¿Kamsañarak munpachasti: “Akat mä qawqha urunakata” sasasti? Janiw kunat parlatapsa amuyktanti —sasa.
John16:19 Jesusasti kuntix yatiqirinakapax jupar jiskt'asiñ munapkän uk amuyäna
John16:20 Qhanak sapxsma
John16:21 Kunapachatix usur warmix wawachasiski ukkhax wal t'aqhisi; ukampis wawax yurxi uka qhipatsti
John16:22 Jichhasti jumanakax llakisipxtawa; ukampis nayax wasitat jumanakar uñjapxäma ukapachasti
John16:23 “Uka urunsti janiw kunsa jiskt'xapxitätati. Qhanak sapxsma
John16:24 Jichhakamasti
John16:25 “Jichhakamasti taqi akanakxa uñacht'äwinak tuqiw sapxsma; ukampis pachax purininiwa
John16:26 Khä urunxa
John16:27 pachpa Awkin jumanakar munatap layku. Diosax jumanakarux munasipxtamwa
John16:28 Nayax Awkixan jak'apat akapachar jutañatak mistunta; jichhasti Awkixan ukar kutt'xañatakiw akapach jaytawayxta” sasa.
John16:29 Yatiqirinakapasti sapxarakïnwa: —Jichhakuchapï jan uñacht'äwimpik qhan arsupxistaxa.
John16:30 Jichhax taqi kun yatitam yatipxta
John16:31 Jesusasti jupanakarux sarakïnwa: —¿Jichhakit iyawsapxtasti?
John16:32 Ukhamax pachax purinxiwa
John16:33 Taqi akanaksti sapxsmawa
John17:1 Taqi ukanak arsusinsti

John17:3 Uka wiñay jakañasti juma sapa chiqpach Diosar uñt'añan utji
John17:4 “Nayax aka uraqin jach'añchsmawa
John17:5 Jichhax Awkixay
John17:6 “Nayar arkirinak churkista ukanakarux khitïktatix jumax uk yatiyta. Jupanakax jumankirïnwa

John17:8 jupanakarusti juman arunakam churta

John17:10 Taqi kunatix nayankki ukax jumankiwa
John17:11 “Qullan Awkixay

John17:20 “Ukampis janiw nayax jupanakatakik mayksmati

John18:1 Tatitur mayisiñ tukuyatatsti
John18:2 Aljantir Judasax uka chiq sum uñjarakïna
John18:3 Judasasti mä tama soldadonakampiw ukawjar purinïna
John18:4 Jesusasti kunatix jupampi lurasiñapäkän uk yatïnwa
John18:5 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Nazaretankir Jesusaruw thaqhapxta —sasa. Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayätwa —sasa. Aljantir Judasasti jupanakampïnwa.
John18:6 Jesusan jupanakar “Nayätwa” satapatxa
John18:7 Jesusasti wasitat jupanakar jiskt'äna: —¿Khitirus thaqhapxta? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Nazaretankir Jesusaruw thaqhapxta —sasa.
John18:8 Ukatsti Jesusax sänwa: —Niy sapxsmawa: “Nayätwa” sasa. Nayar thaqhapxchista ukax
John18:9 Ukasti
John18:10 Ukatsti
John18:11 Jesusasti uk uñjasin Pedrorux sänwa: —Imañapar espadam uskum. Awkixax kuna t'aqhisiñtix churkitu uk ¿janit t'aqhisiñaxäkisti? —sasa.
John18:12 Ukatsti tama soldadonakampi
John18:13 Ukatsti Anasan utaparuw nayraqat irpapxäna
John18:14 Aka pachpa Caifasaw mä urux judionakar satayna: “Mä sapa chachakiw markpach lanti jiwañapax wakisispa” sasa.
John18:15 Simón Pedrompi
John18:16 Pedrosti uta punku anqäxarukiw qhiparäna. Ukat sacerdotenakan jilïripan uñt'at yatiqiripax mistunisin uta uñjir warmimpi parläna
John18:17 Punku uñjir warmisti Pedroruw jiskt'äna: —¿Janit jumax aka jaqin maynïr yatiqiripäktasti? —sasa. Pedrosti sänwa: —Janiwa
John18:18 Uywatanakampi
John18:19 Sacerdotenakan jilïripasti
John18:20 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Nayax taqinin uñjkataw parläyäta
John18:21 ¿Kunatarak nayarusti jiskhistasti? Khitinakatix nayar ist'apkitu ukanakaruy jiskt'amxa
John18:22 Jesusan ukham satapatxa
John18:23 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Jan wali arsutaxatix utjchixa
John18:24 Ukatsti Anasax sacerdotenakan jilïripa Caifasan ukaruw Jesusarux ñach'antat irpayäna.
John18:25 Ukchañkamasti
John18:26 Ukxarusti
John18:27 Pedrosti wasitatampiw jan uñt'ir tuküna
John18:28 Ukatsti Jesusarux Caifasan utapat marka apnaqirin utaparuw irpapxäna. Ukapachax niyaw willjtanxäna
John18:29 Ukat Pilatox jupanakamp parlir mistunïna
John18:30 Jupanakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Janitix jach'a juchanïkaspa ukaxa
John18:31 Pilatox jupanakar sarakïnwa: —Irpasxapxam
John18:32 Ukhamaw Jesusan arsutapax phuqhasïna
John18:33 Pilatosti wasitatampiw utapar mantäna
John18:34 Jesusasti yaqha jiskt'ampiw arusxatäna: —¿Jumakit uk jiskt'ista
John18:35 Pilatosti sarakïnwa: —Nayax janiw judiökti; marka masinakamampi
John18:36 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Nayan markaxax janiw akapachankirïkiti. Ukhamäspa ukasti
John18:37 Ukatsti Pilatox Jesusar jiskt'änwa: —¿Ukhamasti jumax Reyïtati? —sasa. Jesusasti sänwa: —Jumaw nayan Reyïtax arsusktaxa. Nayax ukatakiw yurta
John18:38 Pilatox ukxarux sarakïnwa: —¿Kunarak chiqasti? —sasa. Uk arsusinsti
John18:39 Jumanakan saramarjamasti
John18:40 Ukatsti taqiniw jach'at art'apxäna: —¡Uka jaqirux janiwa! ¡Barrabasar antutam! —sasa. Barrabasasti mä lunthat jaqïnwa.
John19:1 Ukatsti Pilatox Jesusar jawq'jayañatakiw mayïna.
John19:2 Soldadonakasti ch'aphinakat mä pillu lurapxäna
John19:3 Ukatsti jupar jak'achasisin sapxarakïna: —¡Jallalla judionakan Reyipa! —sasa. Ukatsti ajanut nuwantapxäna.
John19:4 Pilatosti wasitampiw mistunïna
John19:5 Jesusasti
John19:6 Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapampi
John19:7 Judeankir jilïr jaqinakasti sapxarakïnwa: —Mä kamachiw nanakan utjapxitu
John19:8 Pilatox uk ist'asin juk'ampiw axsaräna.
John19:9 Taripäwi chiqar wasitat mantasinsti
John19:10 Ukat Pilatox säna: —¿Janit nayarux jayskitäta? ¿Janit nayax jumar ch'akkatañataki
John19:11 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Janiw nayatak kuna munañanïkasmasa
John19:12 Pilatosti ukapachatpach Jesusar antutañ munäna; ukampis judionakax jach'at art'apxäna: —¡Aka jaqirutix antutnukütaxa
John19:13 Pilatosti uk ist'asinxa
John19:14 Pascua urun puriniñapatakix mä urukïxänwa
John19:15 Judionakasti juk'ampiw art'apxäna: —¡Cruzar ch'akkatam! ¡Cruzar ch'akkatam! —sasa. Pilatosti jupanakarux jiskt'änwa: —¿Jumanakan reyimarut ch'akkatästi? —sasa. Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapasti sapxarakïnwa: —Nanakan reyixax Cesarakiwa
John19:16 Ukatsti Pilatox Jesusar ch'akkatañapatakiw judionakar katuyxäna
John19:17 Jesusasti cruzap q'ipt'ataw Calavera sat chiqar sarañatak mistuwayäna
John19:18 Uka chiqan Jesusarux ch'akkatapxäna
John19:19 Pilatosti cruzar uskuyañatak mä qillqat luratayna
John19:20 Walja judionakaw uka qillqat ullarapxäna
John19:21 Ukat sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapax Pilator sapxäna: —“Judionakan Reyipa” sasax jan qillqamti
John19:22 Pilatosti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayan qillqatäki ukax janipuniw mayjt'ayatäkaniti —sasa.
John19:23 Soldadonakasti Jesusar ch'akkatxasinxa
John19:24 soldadonakasti jupanak puraw sasipxäna: —Jan ch'iyjkañäniti
John19:25 Cruza jak'ansti
John19:26 Jesusasti
John19:27 Yatiqiriparusti sarakïnwa: —Ukaxay taykamaxa —sasa. Yatiqiristi
John19:28 Ukanak qhipatsti
John19:29 Ukawjansti mä chatuw k'allk'u vinompi phuqhantat utjäna
John19:30 Jesusasti uka k'allk'u vino mallt'äna
John19:31 Pascuatakix mä urukïxänwa. Judionakax janiw sábado urun amayanakan cruzan qhiparañap munapkänti
John19:32 Soldadonakasti sarasin Jesusamp chika ch'akkatatäpkän ukanakarux
John19:33 Ukampis Jesusar jak'achaskasinsti
John19:34 Ukampis maynïr soldadox ch'illapat lanzampiw jununtäna
John19:35 Uk uñjiriw akham arsüna
John19:36 Akanakax Qillqatan phuqhasiñapatakiw lurasïna: “Janiw kayu ch'akhapsa p'akjapkaniti” sasa.
John19:37 Yaqhawjansti Qillqatax sarakiwa: “Chhuxriñchjataruw uñjapxani” sasa.

John19:40 Ukhamasti Joseampi Nicodemompix Jesusan amayaparux uka q'apkir qullampi jawsut ch'uqañanakampiw llawuntapxäna
John19:41 Jesusar ch'akkatapkän uka chiqan mä uyuw utjäna
John19:42 Ukaruw Jesusan amayap imapxäna

John21:13 Jesusasti jupanakar jak'achasisin t'ant'a irtäna

Acts2:6 Jach'a thayjam thayt'anitap ist'asinsti
Acts2:7 Ukatsti wali muspharat jikxatasisinsti
Acts2:8 ¿Kamisarak jiwasanakan yurïwisatpach yatit arunakasat parlapxisti?

Acts2:10 Frigia

Acts2:22 “Israelitanaka

Acts2:24 Ukampis Diosax Jesusar jaktayiwa

Acts2:27 janiw ajayuxar manqhapachan qhiparaykätati janirakiw qullan luqtiriman janchipan ñusjañapsa munkätati.
Acts2:28 Jakañar irpir thakhi uñacht'ayista
Acts2:29 “Jilatanaka

Acts2:31 Davidax Criston jaktäwip janïräkipan uñjäna

Acts2:33 Jesusax Diosan kupïxapankañatak aptatänwa
Acts2:34 Janiw Davidax alaxpachar makhatkänti
Acts2:35 uñisirinakamar kayumampi takxataykä ukapachkama” sasa.

Acts2:40 Pedrosti uka arunakampi

Acts3:2 Tatitun utap punkunsti
Acts3:3 Uka suchu jaqix
Acts3:4 Jupanakasti wal wal uka jaqir uñkatapxi
Acts3:5 Uka suchu jaqisti jupanakaruw uñkati

Acts10:36 Diosax Israelan wawanakaparuw parläna

Acts10:38 Diosaw Qullan Ajayun ch'amap jupar churarakïna. Jesusax askinak lurasaw sarnaqäna
Acts10:39 Taqi kuntix Jesusax Judea uraqina
Acts10:40 Ukampis Diosaw kimsürut jupar jiwatat jaktayäna
Acts10:41 Janiw taqpach markar Jesusax uñstkänti
Acts10:42 Uka Tatit Jesusaw nanakarux jaqinakar yatiyir khithapxitu: “Diosax Jesusaruw akapachan Taripiripat utt'ayi
Acts10:43 Taqpach profetanakaw Jesusxat arsupxäna
Acts10:44 Pedron parlkipansti
Acts10:45 Pedrompi chik Jope markat jutapkatayna uka judío iyawsirinakasti muspharataw uñjasipxäna
Acts10:46 Jupanakarusti jan uñt'at arunakat parlir ist'apxäna
Acts10:47 Ukat Pedrox masinakapar säna: —Diosax Qullan Ajayu khithani yaqha markanakankir jaqinakan jakäwip sarayañataki
Acts10:48 Uk sasinsti
Acts11:1 Judeankir apostolunakampi iyawsirinakampix
Acts11:2 Kunapachatix Pedrox Jerusalenar kuttankän ukapachasti
Acts11:3 Juparusti jiskt'apxarakïnwa: —¿Kunatarak jumasti jan judiöpkis uka jaqinakar tumpir sartasti
Acts11:4 Pedrosti taqi kunatix luraskatayna ukanakxat qalltatpach jupanakar yatiyäna. Sarakïnwa:
Acts11:5 —Mä uruxa
Acts11:6 Nayasti wal wali uñtta
Acts11:7 Ukatsti mä aru ist'ta
Acts11:8 Nayasti ukxaruw sista: “Janiw Tata. Janipuniw kunapachas kuna jan manq'añ q'añu animalanaksa manq'irïkti” sasa.
Acts11:9 Ukat wasitat alaxpachat uka arux nayar sanitu: “Kuntix Diosax q'umachki ukxa
Acts11:10 Ukasti kimsa kutiw ukham lurasi
Acts11:11 Ukapacharakiw kimsa chachax jikxataskäyät uka utar purinipxäna. Jupanakarusti Cesarea markatpach nayar thaqhiri khithanipxatayna.
Acts11:12 Ukapachaw Qullan Ajayux nayar situ: “Jupanakamp chik jan pächasis saram” sasa. Uka suxta jilatanakasti nayamp chikaw sarapxäna. Cesarea markar purisasti
Acts11:13 Jupasti kunjämtix utapan Tatitun angelapax jupar uñstkatayna uk yatiyapxitu
Acts11:14 jupaw yatiyätam jumampi
Acts11:15 Nayax yatiyañ qalltaskäyät ukapachaw akatjamat Qullan Ajayux jupanakxar saraqanïna
Acts11:16 Ukapachaw nayax Tatitun uka arunakapat amtasta: “Juanax chiqpachansa umampiw bautisäna
Acts11:17 Ukat nayax lup'ista: “Diosax aka jaqinakar jiwas judionakar churkistu uka pachpa waxt'äwi churaraki
Acts11:18 Jerusalenankir jilatanakasti ukanak ist'asin amukt'apxiwa
Acts11:19 Estebanan jiwatap qhipatsti
Acts11:20 Ukampisa
Acts11:21 Tatitun ch'amapax jupanakampïnwa
Acts11:22 Jerusalén iglesiankirinakasti ukanak yatisinxa
Acts11:23 Antioquiar purisinsti
Acts11:24 Bernabeax aski jaqïnwa
Acts11:25 Uka qhipatsti
Acts11:26 Jupanakasti marpachaw ukankapxäna
Acts11:27 Ukürunakansti mä qawqha profetanakaw Jerusalenat Antioquía markar puripxäna.
Acts11:28 Uka profetanakat maynïriw utjäna Agabo sutini. Jupasti jilatanak taypin sayt'asisin Qullan Ajayu tuqi jupanakar yatiyäna: “Mä jach'a mach'aw taqpach uraqin utjani” sasa. Ukasti Claudio sat jach'a jilïrix marka apnaqkän ukapachaw phuqhasïna.
Acts11:29 Ukat Antioquiankir iyawsirinakax Judea uraqin jakir jilatanakar mä yanap apayañ amtapxäna
Acts11:30 Apthapisinsti
Acts12:1 Uka urunakansti Herodes reyix iglesiankir yaqhip arkirinakaruw t'aqhisiyañ qalltäna.

Acts13:21 Ukapachasti jupanakax mä rey mayipxäna jupanakar apnaqañapataki. Diosasti iyawsasaw jupanakarux mä rey churäna. Uka reyisti Benjamín ayllunkir Quis sat chachan Saúl yuqapänwa. Saúl reyisti pusi tunka maraw marka apnaqäna.

Acts15:1 Uka urunakansti yaqhip jaqinakaw Judea chiqat Antioquía markar puripxatayna. Uka jaqinakasti jilatanakaruw yatichañ qalltapxäna: “Qhispiyasiñatakix wakisiw Moisesan kamachiparjam circuncisión katuqañaxa” sasa.
Acts15:2 Pablompi Bernabeampisti ukxat uka jaqinakamp wal ch'axwapxäna. Ukat Antioquía iglesiankirinakax Pablompiru
Acts15:3 Jerusalenar sarkasinsti
Acts15:4 Pablompi Bernabeampix Jerusalenar puripkän ukapachasti
Acts15:5 Ukampis Tatitur iyawsir yaqhip fariseonakax
Acts15:6 Ukat apostolunakampi jilïri jilatanakampix tantacht'asipxäna ukxat sum amuykipt'añataki.
Acts15:7 Wali jaya ukxat aruskipasinsti
Acts15:8 Jaqinakan chuymap uñt'ir Diosasti jan judiöpkis uka jaqinakar katuqatap uñacht'ayiwa
Acts15:9 Diosax janiw jupanakarusa
Acts15:10 Jichhasti
Acts15:11 Ukatsipana

Acts15:13 Arsuñ tukuyxasinsti
Acts15:14 Simón Pedrox kunjämsa Diosax qalltatpach jan judiöpkis jupanakar sum uñjkäna

Acts15:16 “Aka qhipat kuttanïwa
Acts15:17 Ukapachasti
Acts15:18 Nayaw Tatit Diosamätxa. Nayaw nayratpach taqi ukanak arsuwayta” sasa.
Acts15:19 Santiagosti saskakïnwa: “Uka arunakarjamax amuyataxat janiw wakiskit Diosar kutikipstir jan judío jaqinakar mayjt'ayañaxa.
Acts15:20 Jan ukasti jupanakar mä qillqat apayañaw wakisispa: ‘Idolonakar luqtat manq'anak jan manq'apxañapataki. Janirak axskatas jiwat uywanak manq'apxañapataki
Acts15:21 Nayratpach Moisesan kamachipat parlirinakax taqi markanakan utji
Acts15:22 Ukatsti apostolunakampi

Acts15:25 Ukham yatisin

Acts15:28 Qullan Ajayutakisa

Acts15:31 Qillqat ullart'asinsti

Acts16:7 Misia qurpar purisinsti

Acts17:13 Ukampis Tesalónica markankir judionakaxa

Acts17:22 Pablosti Areópago sat chiqan jupanak taypin sayt'asisin

Acts17:31 Diosax mä uru wakichxi
Acts17:32 Jiwatanakan jakatatañapxat parlir ist'asinsti
Acts17:33 Ukham sapxatapat Pablox jupanak taypit mistuwayxäna.

Acts18:15 ukampis aliq arunakakïchi

Acts23:26 “Naya

Acts25:1 Ukapachasti Festo chachax marka apnaqirit mantañatakiw Cesarea markar purïna. Kimsür saraqatatsti Jerusalén markaruw makhatäna.
Acts25:2 Ukansti
Acts25:3 Jupanakasti jan wali amtañampiw Festo jilïrir achikt'apxäna
Acts25:4 Ukampis marka apnaqir Festo jilïrix jupanakar sänwa: —Janiwa; Pablox Cesarea markan katuntatäskiwa
Acts25:5 
Acts25:6 Festo jilïristi mä kimsaqallqu urüchi
Acts25:7 Pablo mantanipansti Jerusalenat purinipkatayna uka judionakax jupar jak'achasisin jan wali luratanakat juchañchapxäna
Acts25:8 Ukxaruw Pablox arsusirakïna: —Nayax janiw kuna jan walsa lurkti
Acts25:9 Festo jilïristi judionakamp sumankañ munasaw Pablorux jiskt'äna: —¿Janit jumax Jerusalenar sarañ munkasma
Acts25:10 Pablosti ukxaruw säna: —Roma apnaqirin taripañ utapax akankiwa
Acts25:11 Nayan jan wali luratax laykutix jiwañaxax wakischixa
Acts25:12 Uk ist'asinsti Festo jilïrix amuyt'ayirinakapampiw ukxat parlt'añatak tantacht'asïna. Ukat Pablorux sarakïna: —Jumax marka apnaqir Cesarampiw taripayasiñ maytaxa
Acts25:13 Ukat mä qawqha urunakatsti
Acts25:14 Jupanakan mä qawqha urunak ukan qhiparapxatapat
Acts25:15 Nayax Jerusalenankaskäyät ukkhaxa
Acts25:16 Nayasti jupanakarux sistwa: Nanak romano apnaqirinakax janiw khitirus jiwayañatak juchañchañ yatipkti
Acts25:17 Ukat jupanak purinipxipan
Acts25:18 Ukampis jupar juchañchañatak uñstanirinakaxa
Acts25:19 Juparusti Diosar iyawsañ tuqitak juchañchapxäna
Acts25:20 Nayax janiw kunjämatsa ukanakxat yatxatañ yatkäyätti
Acts25:21 Ukampis Roma marka apnaqir jilïrimpi taripayasiñ mayitap laykuw nayax katutakïskpan sista
Acts25:22 Agripa reyisti ukham ist'asin Festo jilïrirux säna: —Nayax uka chachar ist'añ munarakirista —sasa. Festo jilïristi ukxaruw sarakïna: —Qharürpachaw jupar ist'äta —sasa.
Acts25:23 Qhipürusti Agripampi
Acts25:24 ukat sarakïna: —Agripa reyi
Acts25:25 ukampis nayan amuyataxat
Acts25:26 Ukampis marka apnaqir jach'a jilïrixar aka jaqxat qillqañatakix janiw kunjäm sañaxas utjkituti
Acts25:27 Nayan amuyataxat mä katuntat jaqin juchap jan sum yatxatkas irpayañax inamayakïspawa —sasa.
Acts26:1 Agripa reyisti Pabloruw säna: —Arsusiskakim —sasa. Pablosti ampar aytasin parlañ qalltäna:
Acts26:2 “Agripa reyi
Acts26:3 Juk'ampis juma jilïrix judionakan saranakap sum yattaxa
Acts26:4 “Judionakax taqpachaniw nayar wawatpach uñt'apxitu. Kamisatix nayax markaxampin Jerusalenampin jakkäyäta uk askiw yatipxi.
Acts26:5 Nayan fariseo jaqïtax jupanakax yatipxaraki
Acts26:6 Jichhasti
Acts26:7 Israelan tunka payan wawanakapat sartir markanakasti uka pachparakiw arsutap Diosan phuqhañap suyt'asipki
Acts26:8 Jumanakasti ¿kunatarak Diosan jiwatanakar jaktayañap jan iyawsapktasti?
Acts26:9 “Nayrax
Acts26:10 Ukham nayax Jerusalenan lurta. Sacerdotenakan jilïrinakapan arsutanakapampix nayax Tatitur iyawsir jaqinakat
Acts26:11 Walja kutirakiw nayax jupanakar jawq'jayta
Acts26:12 “Uka amtäwimpiw nayax Damasco markar saraskäyäta
Acts26:13 Agripa reyixay
Acts26:14 Ukatsti taqiniw uraqir liwirtapxta. Nayasti mä aru ist'arakta
Acts26:15 Uk ist'asinsti nayax sistwa: ‘Tatay
Acts26:16 Jichhasti sayt'asimaya
Acts26:17 Nayaw judío jaqinakan amparapata
Acts26:18 Jupanakan nayranakap jist'arañamataki
Acts26:19 “Agripa reyixay
Acts26:20 Ukatsti
Acts26:21 Ukham parlatax laykuw judionakax nayar Tatitun utapan katuntapxitu
Acts26:22 Ukampis Diosan yanapapampix jichhakamaw juparux jan pächasis arkaskta
Acts26:23 “Cristo Tatitux jiwañapapunïnwa
Acts26:24 Pablox arsusiñ tukuyxän ukapachasti
Acts26:25 Pablosti ukxaruw säna: —Jach'a jilïr tata Festo
Acts26:26 Agripa reyix akankaskiwa
Acts26:27 Agripa reyixay

Acts27:1 Italia markar nanak khithañatak amtapkän ukapachasti
Acts27:2 Adramitio sat puertoruw irpapxitu. Ukansti mä barcox niy mistuñampïskänwa
Acts27:3 Qhipürusti Sidón sat puertoruw puripxta. Julio capitanax Pablor suma chuymampiw uñjäna
Acts27:4 Sidonat mistusinsti
Acts27:5 Ukatsti Cilicia marka
Acts27:6 Ukansti soldadonakan capitanapax mä barco jikxati. Uka barcosti Alejandría markankirïnwa
Acts27:7 Mä qawqha urunakaw k'achak sarapxta
Acts27:8 Quta thiyanjam sarasinsti
Acts27:9 Qutanjam saraskakiñax axsarkayänwa
Acts27:10 —Tatanaka
Acts27:11 Soldadonakan capitanapasti Pablor ist'kpachaxa
Acts27:12 Janiw uka puerton thaya pachax ukankañjamäkänti; ukat taqiniw uka chiqat sarxañak amuyt'apxäna
Acts27:13 Ukapachasti mä juk'a thayaw aynach tuqit thayt'anïna. Ukat capitanampi
Acts27:14 Ukampis mistuwayxatat mä juk'ampirusti
Acts27:15 uka thayasti barcorux munañaparuw apnaqäna. Wal thayt'anitap laykusti janiw juk'amp nayrar sarañjamäkxänti
Acts27:16 Ukatsti Cauda sat mä jisk'a wat'a qhipäx chiq sarakipapxta
Acts27:17 Barco patar uk apkatasinsti
Acts27:18 Qhipürusti thayax juk'amp ch'amampiw thayt'anïna
Acts27:19 Ukat kimsïr uru qhipatsti kipka amparanakapampiw barco apnaqañ taqpach phalanak qutar willintapxarakïna.
Acts27:20 Walja urunakaw intsa warawaranaksa jan uñjkxapxti. Ukham uka jach'a thayamp apnaqat uñjasisinsti sapxarakïyätwa: “Jiwxakchiñäniya” sasa.
Acts27:21 Walja urunakaw jan manq'at uñjasipxta
Acts27:22 Ukampis jichhax jan llakisipxamti
Acts27:23 Jichha arumax Diosan khithanit mä angelaw uñstitu
Acts27:24 Uka angelasti situwa: “Pablo
Acts27:25 Ukhamasti tatanaka
Acts27:26 Ukampis thayax mä wat'aruw apsustani —sasa.
Acts27:27 Tunka pusin urunak Adriático sat lamar qutan sarkasinsti
Acts27:28 Jupanakasti quta manqha tupt'añanak jaquntapxäna
Acts27:29 Qarqanakar jan thuqt'añatakiw pusi ancla barco qhipäxat umar jaquntapxäna
Acts27:30 Ukhamäkipansa barco apnaqir jaqinakax barcot jaltxañ munapxäna. Uka amtäwimpiw qhispiñ jisk'a botëki uk nayräxat umar apaqañatak wakichasipxäna
Acts27:31 Ukampis Pablox jupanakan amtäwinakap amuyasin capitanapampiru
Acts27:32 Uk ist'asinsti soldadonakax qhispiñ jisk'a boten chinuñanakap khariqapxäna
Acts27:33 Qhanjtanxipansti Pablox taqpachanin mä kunaksa manqt'asipxañap munäna. Ukat sarakïna: —Niya tunka pusin urunakaw kunäkanitix ukanakat llakisisin jan manq'atäpxtaxa.
Acts27:34 Jumanakatix qhispiñ munapxstaxa
Acts27:35 Uk sasinsti
Acts27:36 Uk uñjasax taqiniw kusisis manq'apxarakïna.
Acts27:37 Uka barcon saririnakasti taqpachanix pä patak paqallq tunka suxtan jaqinakapxäyätwa.
Acts27:38 Taqinin manqt'asxatapatsti
Acts27:39 Willjtanxipansti barco apnaqirinakax janiw uka chiqanak uñt'apkänti
Acts27:40 Ukatsti anclanakar chinuntat phalanak khariqasinsti
Acts27:41 Ukampis barcox ch'allaruw achuntxäna. Ukham sayantxasinsti nayräx tuqit janiw juk'amp unxtirjamäkxänti
Acts27:42 Ukhamäxipansti soldadonakax katuntat jaqinakar jiwarayañ amtxapxäna
Acts27:43 Ukampis soldadonakan capitanapax Pablor qhispiyañ munasin
Acts27:44 jan yatirinakasti
Acts28:1 Kunapachatix taqpachan wañar mistxapxta
Acts28:2 Uka wat'an jakirinakasti wali sum taqinir katuqapxitu
Acts28:3 Ukapachasti Pablox waña lawanak mä juk'anak apthapitayna
Acts28:4 Uka wat'an jakirinakasti Pablon amparapan katari warkusir uñjasinxa
Acts28:5 Pablosti nina patxaruw amparapat katarir thalaqasïna
Acts28:6 Taqiniw Pablon amparap p'usuntañap suyasipkäna
Acts28:7 Ukawja jak'ansti Publio sat chachan uraqinakapaw utjäna
Acts28:8 Ukapachasti Publio chachan tatapax wali usutaw ikiñankaskäna
Acts28:9 Uk yatisinsti
Acts28:10 Nanakarusti wali sumpun jupanakax uñjapxitu
Acts28:11 Kimsa phaxsi uka wat'ankasinsti
Acts28:12 Ukatsti Siracusa sat puertoruw puripxta
Acts28:13 Ukat sartasinsti
Acts28:14 Ukansti iglesiankir mä qawqha jilatanakaruw jikxatapxta
Acts28:15 Romankir jilatanakasti nanakan puriñax yatipxarakïnwa; ukat jupanakax nanak katuqir thakhir jutapxäna
Acts28:16 Roma markar purisinsti
Acts28:17 Pablox puritapat kimsüruruw Romankir judionakan jilïrinakapar jawsayäna. Taqpachan tantthaptipansti
Acts28:18 Jupanakasti wal wal jiskt'asin janiw kuna juchsa jikxatapkitänti nayar jiwayañatakjama
Acts28:19 Ukampis judionakax nayan antutatäñax janiw munapkänti
Acts28:20 Ukat jichhax jumanakar jawsayapxsma
Acts28:21 Uk ist'asinsti jupanakax Pablorux sapxänwa: —Nanakax janiw jumxat yatiyas kuna qillqatsa Judea markat katuqapkti. Janirakiw Jerusalenat jutir kawkïr judío jilatanakas jumxat kuna jan wals yatiyapkarakituti.
Acts28:22 Ukampis nanakax juman amuyum ist'añ munapxirista; taqi chiqan aka machaq tamat jan walinak arsupxatap nanakax yatipxta —sasa.
Acts28:23 Ukatsti jilïrinakax mä urutakiw wasitat tantacht'asiñ amtapxäna. Ukürusti Pablox qurpachaskän uka utarux walja judionakaw purinipxäna. Pablosti willjtat jayp'ukamaw Diosan qhapaq markapat jupanakar parläna. Jesusat amuyt'ayañ munäna Moisesan kamachinakap tuqi
Acts28:24 Yaqhipanakax Pablon arsutapar iyawsapxänwa
Acts28:25 Jupanakkamasti janiw mä amtañar purirjamäpkänti
Acts28:26 “Saram uka markaru
Acts28:27 Aka markan chuymapax qalaratäxiwa
Acts28:28 Yatipxam

Acts28:30 Pablox pä mara phuqhataw mayt'at utan utjasïna
Acts28:31 Jan axsartasaw jupax Diosan qhapaq markapat yatiyäna

Romans1:7

Romans1:15 ukat nayax Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap jank'ak yatiyañ munta
Romans1:16 Janiw nayax Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakapat p'inqaskti
Romans1:17 Ukampis Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakapax kunjäm tuqis Diosax aski jaqinakar tukuyistaspa uk uñacht'ayistu: qalltat tukuykamax iyawsäwi tuqikiwa. Qillqatanakax akham siwa: “Aski jaqix iyawsäwi laykukiw jakani” sasa.
Romans1:18 Ukampis Diosax alaxpachatpach q'apisiñap uñacht'ayi
Romans1:19 Kuntix Dios tuqit uñt'ksnaxa
Romans1:20 ukampis Diosat jan yatiñjamäki ukxa jupan luräwinakap tuqikiw uñt'sna. Ukhamasti
Romans1:21 Diosar ukham uñt'kasasa

Romans1:27 uka kipkarakiw chachanakas jan warmimpïñ munkxiti

Romans1:29 Jupanakasti jan chiqapar uñjañampi
Romans1:30 Mayninakat jan walinak parlapxi
Romans1:31 janiw amuyt'asiñ munapkiti

Romans3:13 Mallq'apas jist'artat amay imäwir uñtatawa

Romans3:25 Diosasti Criston wila wartatap tuqiw juchat pampachasiñ utjayi. Juchat pampachatäñsti iyawsäwi tuqikiw jikxatsna. Diosax ukham tuqiw aski jaqïtas uñacht'ayañ munäna: nayra pachan juchanak lurkäyätan uk pampachasa
Romans3:26 jupan llamp'u chuymanïtap layku. Diosax jichha pachan kamisatix aski jaqir tukuykistaspa uk uñacht'ayañ munäna; ukampix jupax kunjäm askïkitix ukham askirak Jesusar iyawsirinakarux tukt'ayi.

1Corinthians1:7 Ukhamat Diosan luräwipax jan pist'apktamti

1Corinthians1:14 ¡Diosaruw yuspagarta
1Corinthians1:15 Ukhamat jan khitis saskañapataki: “Nayax Pablon sutipxaruw bautismo katuqta” sasa.

Colossians1:1 Colosas iglesiankir munat jilatanaka
Colossians1:2 
Colossians1:3 Jumanakatak Diosat maykasaxa
Colossians1:4 Jumanakan Jesucristor iyawsapxatam yatipxta
Colossians1:5 kawkïr suyt'äwitix jumanakatak alaxpachan imatäski uka layku. Uka tuqitsti niyaw ist'apxta kunapachatix Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakapax arsutäkän ukkhatpacha
Colossians1:6 ukasti jumanak taypinkiwa. Diosan aka arunakapasti taqi chiqan yatiyasiski
Colossians1:7 Epafras munat jilatasaw uk yatichapxäyätam
Colossians1:8 Juparakiw nanakarux jumanakxat yatiyapxitu
Colossians1:9 Ukat nanakax
Colossians1:10 Ukhamat Tatitunkirjam sum sarnaqapxañamataki
Colossians1:11 Diosax alaxpach ch'amapampi jumanakar ch'amañchañapatakiw mayipxta
Colossians1:12 Dios Awkir yuspagarapxäta
Colossians1:13 Diosax ch'amakanakan munañapat qhispiyistu
Colossians1:14 jupasti cruzan jiwatapampiw qhispiyistu
Colossians1:15 Cristox Diosan Yuqapawa

1Timothy5:18 Qillqatax siwa: “Trigo takir vacarux jan ñuku uskumti” sasa. Yaqhawjansti sarakiwa: “Irnaqirix irnaqatapat qullqi katuqasiñapax wakisiwa” sasa.

Hebrews7:5 Moisesan kamachi arunakaparjamax Leví chachat saraqir sacerdotenakax jaqinakarux taqi kunat sapa tunkat may wayt'añapänwa
Hebrews7:6 Ukampis Melquisedec sacerdotex janis Leví chachat saraqirïkchïn ukasa
Hebrews7:7 janirakiw khitis siskaspati aski waxt'äwi churirix aski waxt'äwi katuqirit sipan jilankiw sasaxa.
Hebrews7:8 Jiwasanak taypinsti jiwiri jaqinakaw sapa tunkat maya mayipxi; ukampis Qillqatax Melquisedec sacerdoten jakaskatapat parli.
Hebrews7:9 Ukat saraksna
Hebrews7:10 mä amuyunxa
Hebrews7:11 Israel markax Levita sacerdotenakan luräwinakapxar lurat kamachi arunak katuqäna
Hebrews7:12 Sacerdoten luräwip mayjt'ayasinxa
Hebrews7:13 Qillqatax parlki uka Tatitusasti Israelan yaqha ayllunkirïnwa
Hebrews7:14 Ukax qhanäskiwa
Hebrews7:15 Akasti juk'ampi qhanawa
Hebrews7:16 janiw jaqin uchat kamachxar sacerdotëñar purkiti
Hebrews7:17 Diosasti jupa tuqit akham sänwa: “Jumaw wiñay sacerdotëtaxa
Hebrews7:18 Ukhamasti
Hebrews7:19 Moisesan kamachipasti janiw kunsa chiqachkänti. Uka lantisti suma suyt'äwiw utjistu
Hebrews7:20 Uksti Diosax mä juramento lurasaw chiqätap qhanañchäna. Maynïr sacerdotenakax jan juramentompi utt'ayatakïnwa
Hebrews7:21 ukampis Tatitux mä juramentompi utt'ayatänwa
Hebrews7:22 Ukhamat Jesusax nayrïrit sipan juk'ampi suma arust'äwïtap qhanañchi.
Hebrews7:23 Maynïr sacerdotenakax waljaniruw tukupxi
Hebrews7:24 ukampis Jesusax wiñay jakirïtap laykux sacerdote lurañap janiw yaqhar churkänti.
Hebrews7:25 Ukat jupa tuqi Diosar jak'achasirinakarux wiñayatak qhispiyaspa
Hebrews7:26 Ukhamasti Jesusax suykäyätan uka Jilïr sacerdotewa. Jupax qullanawa
Hebrews7:27 Janiw maynïr jilïr sacerdotenakjamäkiti
Hebrews7:28 Moisesan kamachipax jan q'umäpki ukanakaruw Jilïr sacerdotëñapatak utt'ayi; ukampis Diosax juramentompiw uka kamachi qhipat jupan Yuqapar jilïr sacerdotëñapatak utt'ayi
Hebrews8:1 Taqi kun sisktan ukanakat sipan wakiskirix akawa: jiwasan Jilïr sacerdotesax alaxpachan Diosan kupïxapar qunt'atäskiwa
Hebrews8:2 ukatsti sacerdotjamax chiqpach qullan utan lurañampiw phuqhi
Hebrews8:3 Taqi Jilïr sacerdotenakax waxt'äwinaka
Hebrews8:4 Jupatix aka uraqinkaspaxa
Hebrews8:5 Ukampis uka sacerdotenakax kunjämtix alaxpachan luraski ukanakar uñtat lurapxi. Taqi ukanakan uñtasitätap yatxtanwa
Hebrews8:6 Ukampis jiwasan Jilïr sacerdotesax juk'ampi suma sacerdote luräwip katuqi
Hebrews8:7 Nayrïr arust'äwitix askïsapän ukaxa
Hebrews8:8 Ukampis Diosax uka jaqinakarux jan aski lurapxatap jikxatäna
Hebrews8:9 Aka arust'äwisti janiw kunjämatix nayra awkinakapampi lurkäyät ukhamäkaniti
Hebrews8:10 Kuna arust'äwtix khaya urun Israelampi lurkä ukax akhamäniwa
Hebrews8:11 Janirakiw khitis maynir yatichañapax munaskxaniti
Hebrews8:12 Nayaw ñanqha luratanakap pampachä
Hebrews8:13 Kunapachatix mä machaq arust'äwit Diosax parlki ukkhax
Hebrews9:1 Nayrïr arust'äwinsti Diosar yupaychañatakix sarayañanakapaw utjäna
Hebrews9:2 Tatitumpi jikisiñ utasti akham luratänwa: Nayräx tuqinsti Qullan chiqa satäkis ukawjan candelerompi
Hebrews9:3 Payïr cortina qhipäxankki uka chiqax Qullanan Qullanapa satänwa;
Hebrews9:4 ukawjansti qurit lurat incienso nakt'ayañ altarampi
Hebrews9:5 Arca patxansti querubines sat chhiqhaninakaw utjäna
Hebrews9:6 Ukhamaw taqi kunas wakicht'atäna
Hebrews9:7 Ukampis Qullanan Qullanap chiqarux Jilïr sacerdotekiw maran mä kuti mantäna; ukawjarux uywanakan wilap apapxañapänwa
Hebrews9:8 Ukampisti Qullan Ajayux akham uñacht'ayañ munistu
Hebrews9:9 Taqi akanakasti jichhürutakix mä uñacht'äwiwa; Diosar ukham waxt'äwinakampi
Hebrews9:10 Uka manq'añanaka
Hebrews9:11 Ukampis Cristox niy jutxiwa
Hebrews9:12 Cristox uka qullan chiqaruw manti
Hebrews9:13 Urqu vacanakana
Hebrews9:14 Ukampis ukatix ukhamächi ukax
Hebrews9:15 Ukat Jesucristox machaq arust'äwin sumankthapiyiripaxa
Hebrews9:16 Mä arust'äwin phuqhasiñapatakix
Hebrews9:17 Arust'äwi luriritix jakaskchixa
Hebrews9:18 Ukat nayrïr arust'äwix wila wartäwimpi utt'ayasïna.
Hebrews9:19 Moisesax Diosan taqi kamachi arunakap taqpach markar yatiyäna; qhiparusti mä wila t'awrampi
Hebrews9:20 Ukatsti sarakïnwa: “Aka wilax kuntix Diosax jumanakamp arust'äwi lurki uk qhanañchi” sasa.
Hebrews9:21 Moisesasti qullan chiqaru
Hebrews9:22 Kamachirjamasti

Hebrews9:27 Taqi jiwasanakax mä kutikiw jiwañäni
Hebrews9:28 Ukhamarakiw Cristox mä kutik taqinin juchap pampachañatak t'aqhisis luqtasïna. Uka qhipatsti wasitat uñstanini
Hebrews10:1 Moisesan kamachipax jutañapäkän uka askinakat mä unañchäwikïnwa
Hebrews10:2 Uka kamachitix chiqpachapun juchat q'umachaspa ukaxa
Hebrews10:3 Ukampis aka wilañchanakax jucha luratanakapat sapa mara amtayañatakikiwa.
Hebrews10:4 Urqu vacanakana
Hebrews10:5 Ukat Cristox akapachar jutasax Diosar säna: “Janiw jumax wilañchanaksa
Hebrews10:6 Jumax juch pampachañatakix janiw nakt'äwinaksa
Hebrews10:7 Ukat nayax sista: ¡Diosay! ‘Nayax akankasktwa
Hebrews10:8 Nayraqatax siwa: Diosax juch apaqañatakix janiw wilañchanaksa
Hebrews10:9 Ukxarusti saskakiwa: “Nayax juman munañam phuqhiriw jutta” sasa. Ukampiw nayrïr wilañchanak luqtañax tukusxi
Hebrews10:10 Diosasti jiwasarux jupatakiw yaqhachistu
Hebrews10:11 Taqi judío sacerdotenakax sapüruw wilañchanak luqtapxi
Hebrews10:12 Ukampis Jesucristox juchanak layku mä sapa wilañchak wiñayatak luqtasiwayi
Hebrews10:13 Ukawjan jichhax suyaski taqi uñisirinakapar atipjañkama
Hebrews10:14 Diosax jupar katuyasirirux mä sapa luqtäwi tuqikiw wiñayatak q'umachxi.
Hebrews10:15 Qullan Ajayusti akham sasaw qhanañchistu:
Hebrews10:16 “Kuna arust'äwtix jupanakampi khä urunakan lurkä ukax akhamäniwa
Hebrews10:17 Jucha luratanakapsa
Hebrews10:18 Ukhamasti
Hebrews10:19 Jilatanaka
Hebrews10:20 uka machaq jakañ thakhi arkasina
Hebrews10:21 Diosan utap apnaqiri mä jilïr sacerdotew utjistu.
Hebrews10:22 Ukat Diosarux chiqpach chuymampi
Hebrews10:23 Ch'aman sayt'asipxañäni
Hebrews10:24 Maynit maynikam yanapt'asiñatak ch'amachapxañäni
Hebrews10:25 Janipun tantachasïwinakasar sarañ armasiñäniti
Hebrews10:26 Kunatix chiqäki uk yatkasin juchachasiskakiñän ukax
Hebrews10:27 jan ukasti
Hebrews10:28 Kunapachatix maynix Moisesan kamachipar jan phuqchixa
Hebrews10:29 Ukhamasti ¿janit jumanakax amuyapkta
Hebrews10:30 Tatitun arsutap niy yatiraktanwa: “Nayaruw chiqapar uñjañax wakt'itu; nayaw jupanakar kutt'ayaskä.” Ukat sarakiwa: “Tatituw markapar taripaskani” sasa.
Hebrews10:31 ¡Jakkir Diosan amparapar jalt'añax axsarkayapuniwa!
Hebrews10:32 Ukampis jumanakax nayra urunakat amtasipxam

Hebrews10:35 Ukhamasti

Hebrews10:37 Qillqatax siwa: “Khititix jutañapäki ukax jank'akipuniw jutani janiw juk'ampi suykaniti.
Hebrews10:38 Nayan aski iyawsirixax iyawsäwi laykuw jakani; qhipar kuttan ukkhasti
Hebrews10:39 Jiwasanakasti janiw qhipar kutt'irinakäpktanti
Hebrews11:1 Iyawsañax taqi chuymampi katuqañ suyktan ukawa; jan uñjkasin taqi chuymampi iyawsktan ukawa.
Hebrews11:2 Nayra awkinakasax iyawsañanïpxatap laykuw askit uñt'atänxa.
Hebrews11:3 Jiwasanakax iyawsäwi laykuw yattan
Hebrews11:4 Abel chachax iyawsäwi laykuw Caín jilapat sipan Diosarux suma waxt'äwi luqtäna
Hebrews11:5 Henoc chachax iyawsäwi laykuw janïr jiwkas alaxpachar aptatäxäna
Hebrews11:6 Jan iyawsañampix janiw Diosarux kusisiyksnati
Hebrews11:7 Noé chachax iyawsäwi laykuw Diosar jaysäna
Hebrews11:8 Abrahamax iyawsäwi laykuw Diosan jawsatap jaysäna
Hebrews11:9 iyawsañap utjatap laykuw yaqha markankir jaqjam jakasïna
Hebrews11:10 Abrahamax uka suma utt'ayat marka suyt'askäna
Hebrews11:11 Sara warmix iyawsäwi laykuw jan wawachasirïkasina
Hebrews11:12 Ukhamasti Abrahamax niy ch'ama qaritäxasinsa
Hebrews11:13 Taqi uka jaqinakax kuntix Diosax churañatak arsuwaykän uk jan katuqasaw jiwarapxäna; ukampis iyawsañanïpxatap laykux jayatak uñtapxäna
Hebrews11:14 Khitinakatix ukham arsupki ukanakaxa
Hebrews11:15 Jupanakatix kawkha uraqittix mistunipki ukat lup'isipkasapän ukkhaxa
Hebrews11:16 ukampis jupanakax mä suma marka munapxäna
Hebrews11:17 Abrahamax iyawsäwi laykurakiw kunapachatix Diosax yant'kän ukapachax Isaac wawap wilañcha luqtañatak irpäna. Jupax uka mä sapa wawap luqtañatak jank'akïnwa
Hebrews11:18 “Isaac wawam tuqiw jumax wawanakanïyäta” sasa.
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamasti Diosarux jiwatanak jaktayañatak ch'amanïtap uñt'äna; ukatarak Abrahamax wawaparux jiwatanak taypitsa kutsuyaskaspa ukham wasitat katuqxäna.
Hebrews11:20 Isaacax iyawsäwi laykuw Jacobumpiru
Hebrews11:21 Jacobux iyawsäwi laykuw niya jiwañampïkasin Josean sapa mayni wawanakapar walja askinak churañatak arsüna
Hebrews11:22 Joseax iyawsäwi laykuw jiwañampïkasas säna: “Israelitanakax akat qhiparux Egipto markat mistxapxaniwa” sasa
Hebrews11:23 Moisesax yurkän ukkhax iyawsäwi laykuw awkipa taykapax kimsa phaxsi imantäna; jupanakax wawan wali jiwakïtap uñjapxäna
Hebrews11:24 Moisesax iyawsäwi laykuw chacha wakt'ankxasax faraonan phuchhapan yuqapawa sas jan sayasiñ munkänti;
Hebrews11:25 jan ukasti Diosan markapamp chika uñisitäñ munäna
Hebrews11:26 Jupax Cristo layku t'aqhisiñan askïtap amuyäna
Hebrews11:27 Iyawsäwi laykurakiw Moisesax Egipto markat sarxäna
Hebrews11:28 Moisesax iyawsäwi laykuw Pascua uruyäna
Hebrews11:29 Israelitanakax iyawsäwi laykuw Mar Rojo sat qutxa wañanjam makhatapxäna; ukatsti
Hebrews11:30 Jericó markan jach'a pirqanakapas iyawsäwi laykuw allitattäna
Hebrews11:31 Rahab sat jan wal sarnaqir warmix iyawsäwi laykuw jan ist'asir jaqinakamp chikax jan jiwkataynati
Hebrews11:32 ¿Kunat juk'ampirak arsüsti? Gedeón
Hebrews11:33 Iyawsäwi laykuw yaqha markanakarus atipapxäna
Hebrews11:34 jan jiwarkay ninsa jiwarayapxänwa
Hebrews11:35 Warminakasti jiwirinakapar jakaskir katuqasxapxäna. Yaqhipanakax t'aqhisiñ taypin jiwarapxäna
Hebrews11:36 Yaqhipanakasti sawkch'ukita
Hebrews11:37 Yaqhipanakax qalamp k'upjataw jiwapxäna
Hebrews11:38 Akapachax janiw jupanakatakix askïkänti; wasaranakana
Hebrews11:39 Taqi jupanakasti suma iyawsañanïpkchïn ukasa
Hebrews11:40 Diosasti jiwasanakat amtasisax juk'ampi sumanak wakichatayna
Hebrews12:1 Ukhamasti
Hebrews12:2 Jesusaruy uñtañäni
Hebrews12:3 Ukalayku
Hebrews12:4 Jumanakasti juchampi nuwasisax janiw jupjam jiwañarux puripktati
Hebrews12:5 Diosax wawanakaparjam iwxt'apktam uk armasipxtaxa. Qillqatan siwa: “Nayan wawaxa
Hebrews12:6 Tatitux khitirutix munki ukarux chiqachiwa
Hebrews12:7 Jumanakan askimatakiw mutusipktaxa: Diosasti jumanakarux wawaparjamaw uñjasipktam. ¿Khiti wawarak awkipan jan chiqachat utjisti?
Hebrews12:8 Diosatix jumanakar jan chiqachapkiristamxa
Hebrews12:9 Ukhamarus kunapachatix wawanakäkäyätan ukkhax
Hebrews12:10 Janchi awkinakasax juk'a pachatakikiw chiqachawayistu
Hebrews12:11 Chiqpachansa mutuyäwi katuqtan ukkhax janiw sumäkiti
Hebrews12:12 Ukhamasti
Hebrews12:13 ukatsti chiqap thakhi thaqhapxam
Hebrews12:14 Taqinimpis sumankañan jakasipxam
Hebrews12:15 Janiy khitirus Diosan munasiñapax pist'pati
Hebrews12:16 Jumanakat jan khitis wachuq juchan sarnaqkpati
Hebrews12:17 Jumanakax yatipxtawa
Hebrews12:18 Jumanakasti janiw israelitanakjamax jak'achasipktati
Hebrews12:19 janirakiw trompetan phust'atapsa
Hebrews12:20 kuntix siskän uka arunakarux janiw jaysirjamäpkänti: “Khiti jaqitixa
Hebrews12:21 Kunatix utjkän ukax sinti axsarkayänwa
Hebrews12:22 Ukatsipan jumanakax Sión qulluru
Hebrews12:23 ukhamarak alaxpachan qillqantatäpki uka Diosan nayrïr wawanakaparusa. Taqinir taripir Diosaru
Hebrews12:24 machaq amtäwi arxatir Jesusaru

Hebrews12:26 Khä urunakan Diosax parlxaykän ukkhax
Hebrews12:27 “Mä kutimpiw” sasasti
Hebrews12:28 Diosax kawkïr marktix churkistu ukax janiw unxtayatäkaspati. Taqi ukat yuspagarañäni
Hebrews12:29 Diosasasti taqi kun nakhantir ninar uñtatawa.
Hebrews13:1 Maynit maynikam jilapurjam munasipxam.
Hebrews13:2 Utamar purinipki uka jaqinakar katuqt'añ jan armasipxamti
Hebrews13:3 Katuntat jaqinakat amtasipxam
Hebrews13:4 Chacha warmi jaqichasit sarnaqäwirux taqinipun waqaychapxam
Hebrews13:5 Jan qullqirux munapxamti; qawqhatix utjapktam ukampix kusisitakïpxam
Hebrews13:6 Ukhamasti taqi iyawsañampi arsuñasawa: “Tatituw yanapt'irixaxa; janiw axsarkäti. ¿Jaqisti kunarak kamachitanisti?” sasa.
Hebrews13:7 Irpirinakamat amtasipxam
Hebrews13:8 Jesucristox wasürusa
Hebrews13:9 Jumanakasti janiy yaqha jan uñt'at yatichäwinakampix apayasipxamti. Diosan munasiñapampi chuymar ch'amañchañax juk'amp sumawa
Hebrews13:10 Jiwasanakan mä altaraw utjistu
Hebrews13:11 Ukampis Jilïr sacerdotex qullan chiqawjarux uywanakan wilap apxi

Hebrews13:13 Ukhamasti Jesusampi chikay campamento anqäxar mistuñäni
Hebrews13:14 Janiw akapachan wiñayatak utjir markax utjkistuti
Hebrews13:15 Ukat Diosarux Jesucristo tuqi yupaychañasa. Aka yupaychañsti aski waxt'äwjam luqtañasawa. ¡Ukhamasti lakanakasampi yupaychapxañäni!
Hebrews13:16 Jumanakasti mayninakar aski lurañsa
Hebrews13:17 Irpirinakamar jaysapxam
Hebrews13:18 Nanakatak Diosat mayipxam
Hebrews13:19 Taqi kunat sipansa

Hebrews13:21 uka Diosay jumanakarux q'uma

Hebrews13:25 Diosax khuyapayasiñap jumanakar churanpan.

James1:3 Niy yatxapxtawa
James1:4 Ukampis uka ch'amañchäwix aski lurañaru

James1:6 Ukampis taqi iyawsañampiw mayiñapa
James1:7 Ukhamax khititix pächasiski ukax janiw kunsa Tatitut katuqkaspati
James1:8 jupax jichhürux may amti
James1:9 Jan yäqat jilatax Diosan jach'ar aptatätapat jach'añchasiñapa;
James1:10 qamir jaqisti aynacht'atapat jach'añchasiñaparaki. Qamirïñax qura panqarampi sasiwa
James1:11 Kunapachatix intix jalsusin wal lupt'anki ukkhaxa
James1:12 Yant'ar ch'amampi atipjir jaqix kusisiñaniwa
James1:13 Maynitix jan wali lurañatak yant'at uñjaschi ukkhaxa
James1:14 Jan ukasti
James1:15 Uka ñanqha amtäwinakat juchax sarti
James1:16 Munat jilatanakaxa

James1:23 Khititix aliqak uka arunak isch'ukki
James1:24 jupa pachpa uñkatt'asisax ukspachaw kunjämäkäntix uk armasxi.

James2:3 
James2:4 ukampix jumanakax yaqhachnukusipktawa
James2:5 Munat jilatanakaxa
James2:6 Ukampis jumanakax jan kunaninakarux jisk'achapxtawa. ¿Janit qamir jaqinakasti inak irnaqayapktamsti
James2:7 ¿Janit jupanakasti Tatituman suma sutipat jan walinak parlapkisti?
James2:8 Jumanakatix Diosan jach'a kamachip phuqhasipksta ukaxa
James2:9 Ukampis maynir yaqhachnukutam laykux juch lurapxtaxa
James2:10 Mä jaqitix Diosan kamachipar phuqkas mä kamachin pantjaschi ukkhaxa
James2:11 Pachpa Diosaw arsu: “Janiw wachuq lurätati”. Ukatsti sarakiwa: “Janiw jiwayätati” sasa. Ukhamasti maynitix wachuq juchan jan sarnaqkchixa
James2:12 Jumanakasti qhispiyasiñ apanki uka kamachimpi taripatäñatakjamaw parlapxañama
James2:13 Ukampis khitinakatix mayninakat jan khuyapt'ayaski ukaxa
James2:14 Munat jilatanakaxa
James2:15 Sañäni

James2:17 Iyawsañampix ukhamaw lurasi: janitix iyawsäwix luräwinïkaspa ukaxa
James2:18 Maynix saspawa: “Jumax iyawsañanïtawa
James2:19 Jumasti mä sapa Diosan utjatap iyawstaxa
James2:20 Pisi amuyt'an jaqi
James2:21 Abraham nayra awkisarux Diosax askit uñt'äna
James2:22 Abraham tuqit niyaw amuytaxa
James2:23 Ukhamaw qillqatax phuqhasïna: “Abrahamax Diosaruw iyawsäna
James2:24 Jumanakax niyaw uñjapxta
James2:25 Rahab sat jan wali sarnaqir warmimpix uka pachparakiw lurasïna; Diosax luratanakap uñjasaw askit katuqäna. Uka warmisti khithatanakarux utaparuw qurpachäna
James2:26 Kamisatix jan ajayun janchix jiwataxa
James3:1 Munat jilatanakaxa
James3:2 Taqiniw kunayman pantjasiñarux puripxtan; jichhasti
James3:3 Caballonakampi jaysayasiñatakix lakaparux jakimampiw uskunttan
James3:4 Barconak uñtapxarakim: sinti jach'anakäpkchisa
James3:5 Laxrasampix ukhamarakiw lurasi. Laxrasax janchin wali jisk'akiwa
James3:6 Kuna arunaktix laxrasamp arsktan ukax ninamp sasiwa. Laxrasax ñanqhanak lurañatak wali ch'amaniwa
James3:7 Jaqix kunayman axsarkañ animalanak apnaqaspa
James3:8 ukampis janiw khitis laxrarux apnaqirjamäkiti. Laxrasax jan atipjkay ñanqhawa
James3:9 Uka laxrampix Dios awkisaruw yupaychtan
James3:10 Pachpa lakat aski arunakasa
James3:11 Mä pachpa phuch'utsti janiw muxsa umampi k'allk'u umampix mistkaspati.
James3:12 Janirakiw higo alix aceitunanak achuykaspati
James3:13 Jumanak taypintix maynix wali yatiñani
James3:14 Ukampis jumanakan chuymamantix uñisisiñanaka

1Peter1:1 Naya Pedrox Jesucriston apostolupätwa
1Peter1:2 Jumanakarusti nayratpach Dios Awkix amtataparjam ajllisipxtam. Ajay tuqiw jupatak yaqhachasipxtam
1Peter1:3 Jesucristo Tatitusan Awkipar yupaychañäni
1Peter1:4 ukhamarakiw jumanakarux kuntix Tatitux alaxpachan suma churäwi imarapipktam uk katuqayapxätam
1Peter1:5 Tatitux jupar iyawsapxatamatxa
1Peter1:6 Inas mä juk'a pacha kunayman yant'anakan t'aqhisipxañam wakisirakchi
1Peter1:7 Jumanakan iyawsañamasti kunjämtix qurix ninampi yant'atäki ukham yant'atäñaparakiwa. Yant'ampi q'iwtasir iyawsäwix
1Peter1:8 Jumanakax Jesucristor jan uñjkasas
1Peter1:9 jumanakax iyawsapxatamat qhispiyasiñ jikxatapxta uka layku.

1John5:2 Kunapachatix Diosar munasitasampi arsutapar phuqhapktan ukkhaxa
1John5:3 Diosar munasiñax kamachinakapar phuqhañawa; kamachinakapasti janiw ch'amäkiti
1John5:4 khitinakatix Diosan wawapäpki ukanakax akapacharuw atipji. Iyawsañasasti akapacharuw atipt'ayistu.
1John5:5 Khititix Jesusarux Diosan Wawapätap iyawski ukax akapacharuw atipji.
1John5:6 Jesucristox uma tuqi
1John5:7 Kimsaniw qhanañchirixa:
1John5:8 Ajayumpi
1John5:9 Jaqinakan qhanañchatapsti iyawstanwa
1John5:10 Khititix Diosan Yuqapar iyawski ukaxa
1John5:11 Aka qhanañchäwix akhamawa: Diosax wiñay jakañ churistu
1John5:12 Khititix Diosan Yuqapar katuqki ukax wiñay jakañaniwa; ukampis khititix Diosan Yuqapar jan katuqki ukasti
1John5:13 Aksti Diosan Yuqapar iyawsirinakaruw qillqanipxsma
1John5:14 Diosar iyawsañaw utjistu
1John5:15 Ukhamat yattan
1John5:16 Maynitix jilapar jiwañar jan puriyir jucha lurir uñjkchi ukaxa
1John5:17 Kunatix jan walïki ukax juchawa
1John5:18 Khititix Diosat Awkinïki ukax
1John5:19 Jiwasax Diosankatas yattan
1John5:20 Diosan Yuqapan jutatapsa yatiraktanwa
1John5:21 Wawanaka
2John1:1 Naya jilïr irpiri
2John1:2 Chiqa kankañax chuymasan utjatap laykuw munasipxsma
2John1:3 Dios Awkina
2John1:4 Jumanakat yaqhipanakar chiqa kankañan sarnaqir uñjasax walipuniw kusista
2John1:5 Jichhasti
2John1:6 Munasiñax Diosan kamachinakaparjam sarnaqañawa
2John1:7 Ukampis walja sallqjirinakaw akapachan sarnaqi
2John1:8 Jumanakax wal amuyasipxam
2John1:9 Khititix Tatit Jesucriston yatichäwipat saranukki ukax
2John1:10 Maynitix jumanakan ukar sarasax jan aka yatichäwinïkan ukaxa
2John1:11 ukampis aruntirix jupan jan wali luräwinakapampis chikachaskaspa ukhamawa.
2John1:12 Jumanakar sañatakix waljaw utjaskitu
2John1:13 Khitinakarutix Diosax ajlliwayki uka jila masinakamax aruntanipxaraktamwa.

3John1:2 Munat jilata
3John1:3 Maynïr jilatanakaw purinipxi
3John1:4 Wawanakaxan chiqa kankañan jakapxatap ist'asax wal kusista
3John1:5 Munat jilata
3John1:6 Jupanakasti iglesia nayraqatan juman wali muñasiñanïtamat arsupxi. Jupanakan sarañapatakix Diosatakjam lurasay taqi kunan yanapt'am.
3John1:7 Jupanakasti Jesucriston sutipxar sarañatakiw mistupxi
3John1:8 Ukat jiwasanakax jupanakat amtasiñasa
3John1:9 Nayaw iglesiarux mä qillqat apayta
3John1:10 Ukat kunapachatix nayax sarkä ukkhaxa
3John1:11 Munat jilata
3John1:12 Demetrio jilatan chiqa sarnaqatapat taqiniw arsupxi. Nanakas uka pachparakiw arsupxta
3John1:13 Jumanakar sañatakix waljaw utjaskitäna
3John1:14 nayax jank'akiw jumar uñjañ munsma
3John1:15 Sumankañax juman utjpan. Akankir jilatanakax aruntanipxtamwa. Sapa mayni jilatanakasaruy aruntam.

Revelation12:2 Uka warmisti usurïnwa
Revelation12:3 Ukatsti yaqha chimpuw alaxpachan uñstarakïna: mä jach'a wila dragón animalaw uñstäna
Revelation12:4 Wich'inkhapampisti niya chikatan chikatap alaxpach warawaranak qatatïna
Revelation12:5 Uka warmisti mä yuqall wawa wawachasïna. Uka wawaw akapach uraqin taqpach markanakar wali qhuru kankañampi apnaqani. Ukampis wawapar apaqapxänwa
